dialogueElements.text: Erotic Dream Video
dialogueElements.text_zh: 午后，沙滩酒吧最靠海的躺椅区，罗克茜斜倚躺椅，一手按着太阳穴。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ah, my head is about to explode. Even aspirin doesn't work?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啊啊啊，我的头快炸了。连阿司匹林都不管用了?

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: However, last night's experience... was not bad
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过昨晚的体验……还不错

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Broad shoulders, tight waistline, elusive cold-toned cologne...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 宽厚的肩膀，紧致的腰线，若即若离的冷调古龙香...

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wait, who was the Nan from last night? (Is there any emotional problem with putting this sentence here?)
dialogueElements.text_zh: 等等，昨晚的男人...到底是谁？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ah! My clothes -
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哎！我的衣服——

dialogueElements.text: A stranger stood next to Roxie, holding a water bottle a few centimeters above Roxie's head
dialogueElements.text_zh: 陌生男人站在罗克茜旁，在罗克茜头上方几厘米处托着水壶

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What happened? Why are you holding a water bottle over my head?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 发生什么事?你为什么举着水壶在我头上?

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: He saved your life. It was the football that hit my tray. I'm so sorry!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他救了你一命。是橄榄球砸中了我的托盘。真抱歉!

dialogueElements.text: [Under the sun, his abs are clearly defined, more natural and beautiful than those of any naked Nan statue] (Will it be better to stop here?)
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【阳光下，他的腹肌线条分明，比任何裸男塑像的腹肌，都还要自然好看】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Were you just here? Why didn't I see it?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你刚刚就在这里么？我怎么没有看到

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I'm on the lounge chair next to you, and I heard them shout "Be careful" (adjust according to the direction Lance ran in the video).
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我就在你旁边的这个躺椅上，听到他们喊“小心”了

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ah, okay.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啊，好吧。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: My clothes are also wet, let's go change them first...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 正好衣服也湿掉了，先去换衣服吧....

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I appreciate the rescue.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 刚还要谢谢你救了我。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Natural speed and agility. A mix of skills made it happen.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没有关系，接球，我很专业

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’ve seen his picture. Football’s Ten Hottest Studs.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我见过他照片，《橄榄球十大性感球员》。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Football, right? Can’t remember your name.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是橄榄球明星吧？但我有点儿记不起你名字了。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Lance. We had the get-to-know-you chat last night. Forget?
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance。昨晚我们还聊过。你忘了？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Don’t let him know you don’t remember. Ice him a bit.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别让他看出你忘了。先晾他一下。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I met a lot of people. Guess you didn’t impress me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我昨晚见了很多人。看来你没给我留下什么印象。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Seriously? Pro athlete, future restaurant owner.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 认真的吗？我是职业运动员，未来的餐厅老板。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: You were coming on to me. Some saucy suggestions.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你可是主动撩我的。说了一些挺大胆的挑逗的话。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cool your jets, hotshot. I must have been flirting.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 冷静点，猛男。我无非就是在调情。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Could he be the one? That might not be so horrible.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他会是那个人吗？也许没那么糟。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: How about we pair up for body painting?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 要不要我们一起组队做沙雕和人体彩绘？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Sounds good. Try and control your carnal urges.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 听起来不错。不过要克制住你的肉欲冲动哦。

dialogueElements.text: Kudos on the life-saving move, Lance.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance，你这一手救命操作真给力。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: This party girl is a red-hot mess. Right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这个派对女孩真是火辣又乱人心，对吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You talking about me?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你在说我？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Oh yeah, Foxie Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 对呀，性感狐狸罗克茜。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Dial it down, Orwell.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别闹，Orwell。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: That’s what she told me to call her last night. Right, babe?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 昨晚她自己让我这么叫的啊，对吧，宝贝？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Relax. Go with it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 冷静，顺着他说。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Just playing around. A fun moment.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我只是开玩笑，玩一玩而已。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Some spicy hot moments. Quite the steamy chat box.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 昨晚气氛火辣。聊天简直火花四溅。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What else did I tell this character?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，天呐！昨天到底喝了多少...

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: It was a party. A girl having some fun.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那就是个派对。女孩出来放纵一下。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I wasn’t trying to shade you. The flip-side.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 先说我不是在黑你啊。反而是在夸你。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: My dream Nvzhu is a red-hot mess. I was into it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我梦中的女人就是火辣又乱人心的。你这一款的就是很戳我。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Hope we’re copacetic. Adios for now.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你们继续...“忙”，我就不打扰你们了

dialogueElements.text: Orwell gives a mock salute, then turns and walks away.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Orwell打了个假敬礼，转身离开。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: This is horrible.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 太糟糕了。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Some bad news?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 坏消息吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: It was about my stepsister, Raven.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是关于我继妹Raven的。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: She in an accident or something?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 她出车祸了还是怎么？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That would be nice. A coma would be perfect.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 要是那样就好了。不管这些，我们还是专注录制吧

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: We don’t know each other very well. This is a little uncomfortable.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们还不算熟。人体彩绘..总感觉有点尴尬。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: You paint me first. That puts you in control. Have fun!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你先画我。这样你就能掌握主动权。尽情发挥！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, okay.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧。先说好，我只会画笑脸和直线。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: My stomach. I’m hard as a rock. Well, rock hard abs.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 完美。我的腹肌就是直尺。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Very funny. Stomach should work.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 要不要给你多点画布——？

dialogueElements.text: Too high up. Paint lower.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance试探性的将手指放到泳裤边

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah. Okay.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不用。泳裤别动

dialogueElements.text: Roxie held Lance's hand and the two smiled at each other (with a close-up of hands, abs, and swimming trunks).
dialogueElements.text_zh: 罗克茜手按住Lance的手，二人对视一笑

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: A little further down.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你要是不舒服就随时喊停。节目没那么重要，成交？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Fine. Don’t pull your trunks down so far.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 成交。转一点……对，就这儿

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Oh my. Rock hard indeed.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 比我想的凉

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m not going any lower, humble hero.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 呼吸放慢，别动。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Where’s your next bit of canvas?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是有点痒，还是只有我这么觉得？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I could do your cheeks.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 乖一点，画布先生。我得把边画干净

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Oh, this stroke... is quite good at pretending to be an artist in front of the camera
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哎哟，这一笔……镜头前挺会装艺术家的

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Why are you here?
dialogueElements.text_zh: ……你怎么在这。

dialogueElements.text: Revan walked over with a Nan who looked like a CEO, stopped two steps outside the dead corner of the camera, with an intimate posture, like a guest, but also like watching a show
dialogueElements.text_zh: Raven挽着CEO模样的男士走来，停在机位死角外两步，姿态亲密，像来做客，也像在看戏

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: We are recording. Please -
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们在录制。请——

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Relax, I'm just admiring. By the way, sister - your lines are a bit shaky.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放松，我只是欣赏。顺便提醒你，姐——你的线条有点抖。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Check out this guy. He’s ready for a fancy-dress party.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 瞧瞧这造型，他以为这是什么化装舞会吗？

dialogueElements.text: A Nan wearing an elegant suit struts in. Standing out like an Eskimo at a pool party.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一个穿着一身高定的男人昂首阔步走进自助餐厅。格格不入到什么程度呢？就好比是爱斯基摩人去参加泳池趴。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: His name is Corbin. I hear he’s got quite the ego.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 感觉是挺膨胀的一个人。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Guess he’s sending us a message.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这身造型想表达什么呢？彰显他有钱、有地位罢了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Mr. fancy-pants thinks he’s better than the rest of us?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，觉得比我们都高级呗？自我感觉良好。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: I’m top-shelf compared to you clodhoppers.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我可比你们这些土包子有格调多了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Expensive threads don’t make you special.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 穿得再好，也盖不住你只是个普通人。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You thought I was special last night.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 诶？昨晚你可不是这么说的，你说我很特别。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Crap. I hope he’s not the one.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 妈呀……不会是他吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Brush him off. Push back.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 死不认账，给他怼回去。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You read me wrong. What’s your deal?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你想多了。搞清楚状况再说好伐？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Interesting wardrobe choice.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这身挺有意思啊。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Headed for the ballet or opera?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是准备去看芭蕾还是歌剧？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You're gonna coach me on style?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你在教我穿衣？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: My shoes cost more than your whole outfit.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我一双鞋比你这一身都贵。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Money doesn’t buy class, dandy boy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有钱不等于有品，炫富仔。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: It buys a classy look.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 钱当然可以让人打扮有排面。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Or a cheap and trashy one.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过有的人，就算有钱也只会买廉价俗气地摊货。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You calling me trashy?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你说谁呢？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: If the shoe fits, Jezebel.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你想对号入座，我不拦着，小妖精。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Is that how you like your women?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是不是就好这口啊？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cheap and trashy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: “俗气又辣眼睛”的女的。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: I don’t like cheap women.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我不喜欢廉价的女人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Okay. You like expensive ones.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，那你喜欢贵的咯。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: That’s right.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没错。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Wait. What are you saying?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 等等，你啥意思？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: I pay women to be with me?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是在说我花钱找人“陪”？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You said it, not me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这可是你自己说的，我没说。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: I’m a powerful Nan. Women love that.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 事实就是，女人都喜欢我这样有权有势的男人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Do women pick up the check for dinner?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那请问女人会倒请你吃饭吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You pay for the whole night, right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还是说，你一站式付款大冤种？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You need to shut your mouth.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 闭上你的嘴吧。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Hey! Don’t talk to her like that.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 喂！不许这么跟她说话！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Lance. Drop the hero act.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance，别英雄救美成吗。

dialogueElements.text: Lance moves a step closer to Corbin. And the air grows tense.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance 向 Corbin 靠近一步，空气里有点火药味。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Back off, beach boy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 退一边去，花架子。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: You back off, posh pants.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你才退一边儿去，假贵族。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You gonna get physical, jock strap?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 打算干一架吗，肌肉男？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Not enough ammo for a battle of wits.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 就你这点脑子，跟我斗嘴你火力太弱。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Roxie slapped down your wits pretty good.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 论火力，Roxie刚刚已经把你按地上摩擦很久了。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You figure you’ve got a lock on her now?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那你以为你就吃定她了？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Every Nvzhu wants to be rescued.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 女人都想被英雄救美。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You’re her white knight from the beach.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是她谁啊？沙滩白马骑士？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Hold on right there, Skippy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别自作聪明，给我乱编剧本。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: He’s not my white knight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他才不是我的白马骑士。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I did save your life.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 但我确实救了你啊。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wow! You’re both from the Stone Age.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哇塞，俩石器时代穿越过来的钢铁直男。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I look like a fragile princess wanting to be rescued?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我看起来就那么像一个想要被拯救的柔弱小公主吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: It’s a male fantasy about what women want.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这全是你们男人自己YY出来的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You dipsticks don’t understand mature women.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 成熟女人是怎么样的，你俩理解不了一点。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: You’re a mature Nvzhu?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你？成熟？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Singing karaoke when there’s no karaoke.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没人唱K，你偏拿起麦克风。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Dancing on table tops.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还上桌蹦迪。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Quite the mature Nvzhu at the party.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 成熟女人，呵呵，怕不是个派对女孩噢。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Oh crap. Switch gears.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 完了，得换路数。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Okay, guys, let’s do a rewind.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好啦，两位，我们倒带一下。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And set things straight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 让我来把话说清楚一点。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Those clothes, calling yourself top-shelf.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 穿那么一身，自诩“顶配”。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You came off arrogant to me, Corbin.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在我看来，你很傲慢，Corbin。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe I misjudged you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过，也有可能我误会你了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I go a little bitchy. I’m sorry.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 算我嘴贱，多有得罪了。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Apology accepted.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好，道歉收下。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And? Are you sorry?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你呢？不表个态？

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: For what?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我表什么态？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Seriously? Okay, fine. Moving on.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 认真的吗？真是服了。罢了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Grown women do not fantasize about being saved by a Nan.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还有，成熟女人不会幻想被男人拯救。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Are you both clear on that?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这点你俩清楚吗？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Sure. Whatever.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 行了，这事儿我不争了。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, okay.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好，知道了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Emotional cavemen, both of them.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 情绪原始人，两人都是。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m out of here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我先撤啦。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie leaves.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Roxie 转身离场。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: She is the total package, Nan.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不觉得她很飒吗，哥们。

dialogueElements.name: Corbin
dialogueElements.text: Maybe. You buy what she says about women?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 也许吧。你真信她那一套？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: No way we're gonna win that debate.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 信不信不重要，在这种事情上我们又争不赢她。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie takes time to think after leaving the buffet.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Roxie在离开自助餐区后，花了一些时间静静思考。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Neither of them understands women.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 男人？呵。全都自以为懂女人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Or maybe I don’t understand men.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 也可能，是我不懂他们。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Dancing on tables? Out of control, girl.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 上桌跳舞？我真是疯了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I can’t remember any of it. How did I get so drunk?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我什么都不记得了。酒怎么会喝成这样？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe someone spiked my drink? Oh, God. Surely not.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不会真有人在我酒里动了手脚吧？……操。

dialogueElements.text: Raven joins Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Raven 加入 Roxie。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I hope you’re getting ready to jump.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 怎么还不跳。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: May not be high enough to kill you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过这高度……跳了估计也死不了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m really not in the mood.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我现在真的没心情。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Been doing some snooping, sister dear.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我吃到一点你的瓜，亲爱的姐姐。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Seems like you made quite the scene at the party.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在派对上惊艳全场，你玩儿挺嗨啊。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Keep your cool. Play along.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 淡定。顺着她说。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I let my hair down. Some singing and dancing.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 就放松一下，唱唱歌，跳跳舞而已。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: People seemed to enjoy it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 大家都很嗨。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Really? That’s all that happened?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 真的吗？就这些？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Some harmless flirting. Why do you care?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一点无伤大雅的调情。你至于吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I don’t get why you’re here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你来这里干嘛？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Big actress coming on a reality show.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 大明星也混真人秀？你堕落了。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: You’ve always been jealous of me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你一直都嫉妒我。

dialogueElements.text: Raven and Roxie argue.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Raven 和 Roxie 发生争吵。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Me, jealous of you. What a joke.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我？嫉妒你？笑死人。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: You did that late-night show. Crude humor.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你上深夜档脱口秀。满嘴烂梗。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Not something a dignified Nvzhu would do.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有品位的女人不会那么下作。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: You blame me for your divorce.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 自己离了婚，还甩锅给我。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Look in the mirror. He wanted more than you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 照照镜子吧。他早腻了你了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That’s enough!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 够了！

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Your life is pathetic.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你的人生真是可悲。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Juggling some crummy jobs.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 几个破烂工作糊口。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Trying to score a husband on reality TV.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 以为能在真人秀里钓个老公。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Shut up! You narcissist bitch!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 闭嘴，你这个自恋的疯婆子！

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: You see what I have. Adoring fans, a real career.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你永远赶不上我拥有的这些。崇拜我的粉丝和一份真正的事业。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You’re a ‘B’ movie hack.
dialogueElements.text_zh: B级片小咖，也配？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You better shut your yap.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 拉倒吧。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Okay, fine.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧，随你。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Am I intruding?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我是不是打扰你们了？

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Archer. Good to see you. Join us.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Archer，好巧啊。一起聊聊啊。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: This is my dear sister, Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这是我亲爱的姐姐，Roxie。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Actually, stepsister, but we’re like real sisters.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，严格来说是继姐，不过我们就像亲姐妹一样~

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The amazing two-faced witch.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 人前装圣母，“双面女巫”本巫。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Archer and I met on the flight here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Archer和我是在来这的航班上认识的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Okay. Nice to meet you, Archer.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 噢。很高兴认识你，Archer。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Pleasure is mine.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我的荣幸。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Hope I’m not interrupting.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 希望我没有打扰到你们。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: No. We were just talking about careers.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 当然没有啦。我俩只是在聊事业。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I recall you were a fan of my work.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 对啦，你可是我的影迷哟~

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: I’ve seen some of your movies.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我看过你的一些电影。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Which one is your favorite?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你最喜欢哪部啊？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Black Widow Killer. Well written and a good plot.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 《黑寡妇杀手》。剧情不错，剧本写得很扎实。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I brought that character to life.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我可是把那个角色演活了。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: A sexy psychopath who murders five husbands.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一个性感的疯女人，连杀五任老公。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You were perfect for that part, sister dearest.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这角色适合你来演，亲爱的妹妹。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Disappointing that it went straight to DVD.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 可惜没上院线，只发了DVD。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Yes. Thank you, sweetie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是啊，谢谢你，我的小甜心。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I have to run. Meeting someone for drinks.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我得走了。还有人约我喝一杯呢。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: We need to hook up later, Archer darling.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们晚点再聚，Archer亲爱的。

dialogueElements.text: Raven leaves.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Raven 离开。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Thank God, she’s gone.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 谢天谢地，她走了。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Raven is an interesting Nvzhu.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Raven是个……有趣的女人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: She’s one of a kind.
dialogueElements.text_zh: “有趣”是个挺礼貌的说法。她的确是“独一款”。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The world couldn’t survive another.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 但凡再多一个她，世界恐怕都要崩坏。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What do you do in the real world?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 对啦，您做什么工作的？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Trauma surgeon for emergency cases
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我是急诊创伤外科医生。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wow. That sounds stressful.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哇，听起来压力很大。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: It’s challenging. I’ve got to stay detached.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 的确很有挑战。我必须保持情感抽离。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What do you mean?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 情感抽离？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: I can’t focus on them as people.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 意思是，我不能把病人当“人”看。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: While they’re lying on the operating table.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 至少在手术台上不行。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: A blocked artery. A bullet near the heart.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一条堵塞的血管，一颗贴着心脏的子弹。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: It’s a race between my skill and the Grim Reaper.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一场场我和死神的决战。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Handsome and smart. But a cold-hearted robot.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 人长得帅、脑子好使……但像个冷血机器人。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Think I’m a heartless monster, right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是不是觉得我很无情？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Well. Didn’t sound very compassionate.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯……听起来是没什么人味儿。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: It’s a coping mechanism.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这其实是种应对方式。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Let’s me focus on the delicate surgery.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 能让我下刀更稳更准。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Hey look! A puppy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嘿，看那边，有只小狗。

dialogueElements.text: Archer pets and comforts a puppy that wandered onto the deck.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Archer 抚摸并安抚了一只跑到瞭望台上的小狗。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Good boy. Good boy. You lost, fella?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 乖孩子，乖孩子。您跑丢啦，小家伙？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: You’re a sweet pup. You can hang out with us.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你真是个可爱的小狗。跟我们一起玩吧。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: What do you think, Roxie?
dialogueElements.text_zh: Roxie，你觉得呢？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m more of a cat person. But he’s a cutie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我比较喜欢猫……但他好可爱啊。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What about you, dog person or cat person?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你呢，喜欢猫还是狗多一点？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Well, cats are okay. I’ve got a soft spot for dogs.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 猫还行。但狗……是我的软肋。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Guess I was five when we got Shadow.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 五岁那年，我养了只叫Shadow（影子）的狗。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Didn’t take long before he was bigger than me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没多久，他就比我还高了。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: My best friend. Slept in my bed.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 和我一起睡。是我最好的朋友。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Died when I was in high school.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 可惜我上高中的时候他死了。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Found him dead on a pile of my dirty laundry.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 躺在我一堆脏衣服上。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Vet said he lay there to die because of my scent.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 兽医说，他是循着我的味道，专门去那里等死的。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Broke my heart. Kind of silly. Just a dog, right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我心都碎了。有点傻，对吧？毕竟……只是一条狗。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not silly. Not at all.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不傻，一点也不。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not such a cold soul.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他也没那么冷血嘛。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: He wasn’t at the party. I can trust him.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他没去昨晚派对，那就不在我怀疑名单里。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Is that your owner calling for you? Go boy!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嘿，小家伙，那是你的主人在叫你吗？去吧！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Look at him run. Looks like a happy reunion.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 看他跑的样子，像是一场幸福的重逢。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie and Archer continue talking.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Roxie 和 Archer 继续交谈。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Something personal is troubling me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有件私事一直困扰着我。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: As a doctor, you might have an idea.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是医生，也许能给点建议。

dialogueElements.text: You can trust me to keep it to myself.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放心，我不会说出去。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The party before you were here. I got a drink from the bar.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在你来岛之前有一场派对，我在吧台点了一杯酒。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Mingled a while and put my drink on a table.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我四处转了转，把酒搁桌上了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Went to the ladies’ room and retrieved my drink.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 去了趟洗手间，才拿回了我那杯酒。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That’s the last thing I remember.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那是我最后的记忆。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m very careful when I drink. I know how much is safe.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我喝酒一直非常小心，也很清楚自己的酒量。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I watched the bartender mix it in a big pink tumbler.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我亲眼看着调酒师用一个粉红色的大杯子给我调的。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: You’re worried someone drugged your drink.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是怀疑有人趁你去洗手间的时候……

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: While you were in the ladies’ room.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在你酒里下了药。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah. Some drugs can do this, right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是啊。有些药确实会让人失忆，对吧？

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Definitely
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是的

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: There might be another explanation.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 但也可能……

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Could you have picked up the wrong drink off the table?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你拿错了杯子。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Same cocktail in same color tumbler. A lot more alcohol.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 同款鸡尾酒，同色杯子，但你拿到一杯精度更高的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah,There were a lot of those pink ones on the table.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 对哦，当时桌上放着好多那种粉杯子。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That makes sense. I was getting worried.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这就说得通了。我之前还担心是有人故意下药。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wow. I feel much better. You saved me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哇，一下感觉好多了。多亏了你。

dialogueElements.name: Archer
dialogueElements.text: Every Nan dreams of saving a beautiful princess.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 男人都爱解救美丽的公主。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Princess, again? Is this how they all think?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 又是拯救公主这一套？男人都这么想的吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Who did I end up in bed with after the party?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 话说……派对之后，我跟谁上的床？

dialogueElements.text: Roxie walked alone by the shore. Piano drifted from the bar on the damp breeze.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜独自走在海边，酒吧内传来悠扬的钢琴声，在潮湿海风里传递着难言的魅力】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Bar? No! I hate booze!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 酒吧？不！我讨厌酒！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: But after today… I kinda want a drink. Now what?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 可今天经历那么多事，还是想喝点，怎么办？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe I’ll just take a look inside first?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 要不，先进去看看？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Small gin and tonic. Light on the gin and with extra lime, please.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 金汤力。小杯的。多放柠檬汁和苏打水少来点酒。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Rough day in paradise?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在“天堂”过得不顺心？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not in the slightest.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 顺不了一点。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Looks like you’ve had a... special day?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 看来你的今天……很特别？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: An up-and-down day I'd say.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 起起伏伏的一天吧算是。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: We bartenders are professional listeners.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们调酒师是专业的倾听者。

dialogueElements.text: If you care to share your woes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你要是愿意，就跟我讲讲烦心事吧。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not sure you would get it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你可能不会懂的。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Let me guess. It involves at least one Nan.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 让我猜猜吧——至少跟一个男人有关？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You're lowballing. It’s definitely more than just one.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你保守了，不止一个。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Wow. Look at you. Driving men wild! It makes sense though, you're gorgeous.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哇，瞧瞧我眼前的这位大美女都经历了什么，她让多位男士为之疯狂！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Well, you seem better suited as a host than a bartender.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我怎么觉得，比起酒保，你更适合当个主持人？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That dramatic flair of yours—it’s definitely wasted talent.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 瞧瞧你那夸张的表情和语调，屈才了。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Ain’t that the truth.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 谁说不是呢？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Jealous of my mess?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 羡慕我的遭遇？

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: More like hoping you spill the tea.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 更希望分享你的遭遇。

502001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台特写-story4_2

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Honestly, today’s been… hard to describe.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 其实今天是很难描述的一天。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Let it out. You'll feel better.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说出来会舒服点。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Alright. I’ll try.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧，我尝试一下。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Some girls wake to butterflies. I woke to wreckage and shadows.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有些女孩醒来是爱情的悸动，我醒来是一堆烂摊子和心理阴影。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Somehow I became the lead in a trashy drama I never signed up for.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我莫名其妙的成为一部根本没同意出演的狗血故事女主

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Luckily a charming jock kept trying to make me laugh.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还好遇到了一个很活力四射的男孩在逗我开心

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Then came a Nan telling me what’s what.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 然后就是各种乱入的男人在对我指指点点

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Fair’s fair—someone did listen, gently.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 平心而论，也有温柔的声音在听我倾诉

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: But there’s someone stirring the pot with her fake sweetness.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还有死绿茶还在坏我心境！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: So yeah, mood swinging up and down—I don’t even know how to rate it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 反正心情就是时好时坏，不知道该怎么评价它。

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Hey, don’t overthink it. In roNantic Wahalo… you have to be open to anything.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，在浪漫的瓦哈罗，也许一切都只是开始。

dialogueElements.text: The final note fell softly in the beam of light. The musician lifted his head, his gaze on Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【最后一个音符在光束里轻轻落地，音乐人抬起头，目光落在 罗克茜 身上】

dialogueElements.name: Harley
dialogueElements.text: Lots more fish in the sea. Handsome guy incoming.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 海里还有一堆好鱼呢。看，这不就来了一个帅哥么。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ugh. Last thing I need is more Nan-drama.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 额。可别再给我来什么“男人的戏码”了。

dialogueElements.text: Curious, Roxie glanced where the bartender pointed.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【出于好奇，罗克西朝酒保指的方向望去】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Oh no… God, are you trying to smite me?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别啊……上帝啊，你要玩死我是吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Please ignore me. Whatever you do, don’t say hi…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 无视我！千万别找我打招呼……

dialogueElements.text: Mind if I have a seat?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我可以坐这儿吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Sorry. Not in the mood.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 抱歉！我这会儿不太想搭理人。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Easy there. I’m just here for a drink, not looking to start anything.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放轻松，我只是来喝杯酒，不是来惹麻烦的

503001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台特写-story4_3

dialogueElements.text: Orwell sits down beside Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Orwell在罗克茜身旁落座】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Fine. Honestly—the music’s great.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧。说真的，音乐很棒。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Thanks. Orwell. I mess around with music.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 谢谢。Orwell，一个玩音乐的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The name’s so familiar… ugh, can’t place it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 名字好耳熟……嗯，想不起来。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Earlier… I wasn’t in the best mood, sorry.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 白天……心情不好，抱歉啊。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Ha, aren’t we supposed to be just meeting now?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，我们不该是才认识吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Last night, earlier today... let it go. Time to start fresh.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不需要再记住昨晚和白天，翻篇吧

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: …Alright. You don’t quite seem like a contestant.
dialogueElements.text_zh: ……好的。你……有点不像是个参赛选手。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Oh? And why’s that?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，为什么这么说？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The vibe? You don’t feel like you’re chasing cash, love, fame, or endless soda.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 感觉？你不太像是冲着金钱、爱情、成名又或者无限气泡水来的。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You left out the real reason here. Heal childhood wounds on national television.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 少说了一项：为了在全国观众面前卖惨去治疗童年创伤。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ha, then which type are you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，那你是属于哪一类？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: None of them. I belong to the “just here for fun” type?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 都不属于，我属于来玩的？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I’ll go with the show’s scripts and rules. Just don't direct my delivery.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 愿意配合节目组的规则去演，但具体怎么表达那就是我的事了。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Rules? I’ll follow rules like code—only until I break them.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 至于规则嘛，我会尝试解构规则，然后……打破规则。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You’re not here to play. You’re here to watch us play.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你不是来玩的。你是来看我们怎么玩。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You like peeling back layers, huh?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你喜欢揭人老底，是吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Knew it—you’re no contestant.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你果然不是参赛选手。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Ha, not exactly. A part-time job, kind of like yours.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈，也不完全。一份兼职的工作，和你们类似。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: So you’re staff then?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那你是工作人员喽？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: It doesn't count. You can treat me as an ordinary person holding a guitar and wearing ridiculous beach clothes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不算吧。可以当我是个抱着吉他，一身离谱沙滩装的普通人。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: What do you think of this program?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你怎么看这档节目。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The program is great - interesting people, challenges, and beautiful scenery. I'm very happy to be able to come!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 节目挺棒的——有趣的人、有挑战，还有漂亮的风景。我能来就很开心了！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I'm not a producer, I'm not recording your opening remarks. Speak the truth.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我又不是制作人，不是在替你录开场白。说点真心话吧。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: To be honest... I'm a little nervous.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 老实说……我有点紧张。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Why?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 为什么？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: So Nany strangers, and they have to forcefully show off their bodies and stir up emotional lines...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好多陌生人啊，还得强行秀身体，硬炒感情线……

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Well, it's really impossible not to be nervous.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，确实没办法做到不紧张。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: What else?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还有呢？

dialogueElements.text: The prize is huge. And yeah, I really want it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 奖金太可观了。也是真的想赢。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Oh, I see. Want to know how I see this show?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，懂了。你想知道我是怎么看待这个节目的吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What do you think of the show?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那你又是怎么看这档节目的呢？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: A chance for erotic encounters.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，有机会来点刺激的艳遇不好吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You don’t like sex?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你不喜欢性爱还是怎么着？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Relax. You’re wound way too tight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放松点，你情绪太紧绷了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I enjoy sex—but only on my terms.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧。我享受性爱。但得是我说了算。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not under pressure with cameras everywhere.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 而不是在镜头底下，被逼着做这做那。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Not the way I’d look at it. It just makes things harder on you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不推荐这么想，除了让自己不舒服以外，没有任何好处。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Think of yourself as an actress, performing your role.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你要想象自己只是一个演员，正在诠释属于你的角色。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: In front of the camera, chasing that big paycheck.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在摄影机下，为了那笔大奖。

505001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台左边-story4_5

dialogueElements.text: Orwell gives a faint smile, leans back with ease. His fingertips give a soft tap against the edge of the table.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Orwell浅浅的笑了笑，身体放松地后靠，手指轻轻敲击桌面】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, I want to win the money. I’ve got my reasons.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没错，我非常想拿这笔奖金。我有我的理由。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Pretend I’m an actress playing a role? I can’t do that.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 为此要装成个演员？说真的……真挺难的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Mainly because I’m not great in front of cameras.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 主要我根本不太会面对镜头。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe Raven fits this place better than I ever could.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 也许Raven来这里是正确的，她会更适应这里。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Moral hangup if people show some skin on TV?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是对在电视上多露点儿肤，有道德洁癖哇？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I enjoy a show with some steamy scenes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我也爱看火辣的场面。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: If done with style. I don’t think badly of the actors.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 只要拍得够风格、够体面。我不会因此看低演员。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Imagine you’re acting on this show.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那就想象你在这个节目里演戏。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You’re beautiful, with a killer figure. What’s weighing on you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你很美，身材也很火辣。你在担心些什么呢？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: If you can’t act, then don’t.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不会演，就别去演。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You’re just on a journey you’ve never taken before.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你只是在经历一段前所未有的人生旅程。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Never had it before, and never will again.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 以前没有过，以后也不会再有。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Meet it with honesty. Meet it with a lighter heart.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 真实面对，开心面对……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: A lighter heart?! If you knew what I’ve been through…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 开心个鬼啊！那是你不知道我都经历了什么……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Alright, I’ll just leave it unsaid.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 算了，不说了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Haha, keep that part of you, especially on camera.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，保持你的状态，尤其摄像机前。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: There’s real value in that kind of honesty—more than any pretense.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 比起刻意的造作，这种真实尤为可贵。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And hey, don’t just put me on the spot. What about you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 也别光说我啊！如果是你，你敢露出什么花样吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Of course. I could show the full package right here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 当然，我可以当场展示全套。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You mean... you’d strip down, here at the bar?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你意思现在就在吧台脱光，你也无所谓？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I’ve got no problem stripping down on camera.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在镜头前脱光我也没问题。

506001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台左边-story4_6

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Of course, they will cut it out.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 当然，他们肯定会把我这段剪掉咯。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You’re serious, aren’t you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是认真的？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I'll give them EXACTLY what they want.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他们想看，我就会给到位。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Rule number one for a musician—stay unchained. Who cares what they think?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 音乐人的第一素养，解放天性。谁在意？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: But to buy me bare? Way out of their budget. Ha.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过让我脱光的代价，他们给不起。哈哈！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Feels like you’ve got a bit more going on—mysterious, and...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我发现你不仅有那么一丢丢的神秘，而且还……

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: And a bit laid-back too, huh?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈哈，还很洒脱随性？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Please! You’ve no idea what I’ve been through!
dialogueElements.text_zh: ……真会给自己贴标签，我想说的是放荡不羁

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Nevermind... keep going.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 算了，你继续。

dialogueElements.text: A couple arrives at the bar.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【一对男女走进酒吧。】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Give me a break! What is this? Some prime time soap opera?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 饶了我吧！这是什么八点档狗血剧啊！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Did that Nvzhu put a tracking device on me or what?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这女人在我身上装了什么定位追踪吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Well, well. Looks like you know these two?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哟。看样子，你好像认识这两人？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I don’t!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不认识！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Which means… you do.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那就是认识啰。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I said I don’t!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说了不认识！

507001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-左边区域-story4_7

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Relax. Your face is saying everything.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别那么紧张，你的情绪都写在了脸上。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You picked a good spot. Not easy for them to see us here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你选了个很好的位置，他们没那么容易看到这里。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wait, did I just get lucky?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我忽然运气这么好了？

dialogueElements.text: Roxie lifts her head slightly to sneak a glance at them.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜偷偷的抬起头打量着那对男女】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You sure no one's watching us here?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 确定他们看不到这里是吧？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Positive. But you’ll need to keep your head down.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 确定，但你得保持这个低头的姿势。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Fine. I’ll play it low-key today.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 行吧，今天认怂。

dialogueElements.text: She rests her head on the counter, staring blankly at her drink.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜低头趴在桌面上，眼睛无神的盯着酒杯发呆】

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You avoiding that girl?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你在回避那个女孩？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I know her. She’s the new addition.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我知道她，刚加入的一个新人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I know her better. Her name’s Raven.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我比你更熟悉她。她叫Raven。

dialogueElements.text: Orwell watches the couple with an amused smile.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Orwell笑眯眯的看着不远处的那对男女】

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Huh. Now that’s interesting.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦，有点意思。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: If you're curious, go flirt with her. You're totally her type.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有意思就自己去搭讪，你这款她会非常喜欢。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You got it wrong. I'm profiling your enemy for you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你误会了，我在帮你分析敌人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Enemy? Am I that obvious?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 敌人？我有表现的这么明显？

508001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-左边区域-story4_8

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: That complicated look she gave you. It wasn’t friendly.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，看她的眼神很复杂，但肯定不是什么朋友。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: In this place, people are either your friends or your enemies.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在这里，参赛选手之间，不是朋友就是敌人。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Of course, don’t count me in that.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 当然，不用把我考虑在内。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: So you're an expert now? Go on then. Break it down for me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你很会分析人呗？说来听听。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: See how she's playing him. Flipping her hair.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 瞧她这一招——甩个头发就把那人迷得团团转。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Fingering the rim of the glass. Licking her lips.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 手指绕着杯沿转，还舔嘴唇。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: She's playing a part.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 她在演戏。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cameras aren't here. What's she up to?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 又没有摄影机在拍，她想干嘛？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Not sure. Nanipulating him for some leverage?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不确定，想从他身上套点筹码？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Something is off about him.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这男人也有点怪怪的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What you seeing?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你看出点啥了？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Wearing nice clothes. Look at his shoes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他穿得倒是体面——但你看看他鞋子。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cheap and scuffed up... tsk tsk.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 廉价、又磨破边儿了……啧啧啧

dialogueElements.text: Raven chats with Foley.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【女演员Raven与音效师Foley聊天。】

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: I didn’t think you’d actually say yes to my invite.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我没想过你能答应我的邀请。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Who could say no to such a charming Nan?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 谁会拒绝一位这么有魅力的男士呢？

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: That's a nice dress. You wear it well.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这裙子真不错，很适合你。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Shows enough. Leaves a little for the imagination.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 露得刚好，还留点想象空间。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Men like nice packaging.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 男人喜欢好看的皮囊。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I like men with nice packages.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 而我喜欢的男人，穿得体面是基本的，关键是“那儿”也得拿得出手。

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: Let’s go to your room. Special parcel delivery.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 走吧，去你房间。今晚送你专属“大礼包”。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Slow down. We haven't finished our drinks.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们还没喝完呢。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Anticipation is a great aphrodisiac.
dialogueElements.text_zh: “期待感”是最好的催情剂。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Tell me something about you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说说你吧。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Professional life? Leisure time? Maybe a boat.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 主业？副业？……家里有船吗？

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: Let's talk about you. I know you're an actress.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们还是聊聊你吧。我知道你是演员。

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: Any movies in the works?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 最近有接戏吗？

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I'm getting scripts. Nothing looks quite right.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 在看一些剧本，但都差点意思。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I get the feeling someone’s watching us.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我怎么觉得有人在偷看我们？

dialogueElements.text: Raven glances around, spotting nothing unusual.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Raven四下张望，没有发现任何异常】

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: I'm not surprised! You have no idea how eye-catching you are.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 很正常啊！你不知道自己有多耀眼吗？

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Thanks for the compliment, but…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 感谢你的恭维，不过……

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: There’s a lot of money on the line.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这节目里可牵扯着不少钱。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Who knows what some people might do.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 谁知道有些人会做出什么事来。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Especially today. I ran into that awful Nvzhu more than once.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 尤其是今天，三番两次遇到那个最恶心的女人。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Forget her. Let’s go back to what we were talking about...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 算了，不提她了。咱们继续刚才的话题……

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: So... what do you do for a living?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 所以……你的主业到底是什么啊?

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: I... Oh, your phone’s going off.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我……哦，你的手机响了。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: It's probably the showrunners. One sec, let me check it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 估计是节目组。稍等一下，回个信息。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Whoa! Tonight’s challenge is massage pairing!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哇哦！今晚是配对按摩！

dialogueElements.text: Raven and Foley talk after message arrives.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【女演员Raven与音效师Foley在收到配对信息后交谈。】

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: And we’ll be on camera for it? Perfect.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 今晚的挑战有摄像机？太棒了。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Time to show them who's the sexiest one here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我会让他们知道，什么才是性感的最佳人选。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Maybe a happy ending for my partner.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说不定我的搭档还在期待能来个“圆满收场”。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Off camera. If he’s a good boy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 如果他够乖的话——镜头外也不是不能给他机会。

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: You're getting a little loud.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你声音有点大了。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: I don't care, let them listen.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 无所谓，谁想听就听去吧。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: You're disappointed by the interruption, aren't you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 刚才话题被打断了……是不是有点扫兴？

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Will hook up another time.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们可以改天再约嘛。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: What challenge did you get?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 节目组给你发的什么挑战任务啊？

512001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_12

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: I didn't check.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我还没看呢。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Take a look at your mobile.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那你快看看手机呀。

dialogueElements.name: Foley
dialogueElements.text: Actually… I’m not a contestant. I’m a sound guy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 其实……我不是选手。我是音效师。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: A member of the crew.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 原来是工作人员啊。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Trying to score with me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还想勾搭我？

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Well, you are handsome. Maybe another night.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过你倒是挺帅的。也许改天还有机会。

dialogueElements.name: Raven
dialogueElements.text: Ciao, darling.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 拜拜啦，亲爱的～

513001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_13

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Guy is a poser. Trying to get her in the sack.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那人就是个装腔作势的家伙。想把她骗上床。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: She's bad news though.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过这女的可不简单啊。

dialogueElements.text: Mobile message arrives.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【手机有新信息！】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I just got word that we’re filming tonight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我接到拍摄任务了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wait, tonight? That came out of nowhere!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没说今晚要拍啊！怎么这么突然?

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I'm not prepared at all for this!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我什么都没准备呢！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Chill out.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放轻松点。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Who are you paired with?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你跟谁一组？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Lance, the footballer.
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance，一名橄榄球员

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Right, I remember him. He seems decent.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，有印象，感觉人还不错。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: A kid from a solid, well-off home, built strong and well-Nannered.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一个家境富裕的孩子，身体和教养都很好。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Huh? I thought he came here to save up for a restaurant?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啊？他不是来赚钱开餐厅的吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Not sure if you got the wrong impression or he lied to you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我不知道是你误会了什么，还是他想让你误会什么。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Whatever. It's not my business. I should get going.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 算了，也不关我事。我差不多得走了。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Wait. With that mindset, the cameras will eat you alive.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别急。你目前这种心态面对摄像机，会吃亏的

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Gotta play it smarter. Want my advice?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你需要更加自然一些。不妨听听我的建议？

514001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_14

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Not to complain, but a massage labeled “abstinence”? Seriously?!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我不想抱怨，可同房男女按摩，还特意标识“禁欲”……天啊！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Nervous?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 紧张么？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, it isn’t sitting right with me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，有点太别扭了。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Oh? What did you expect? A guessing game in a dating show?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦？不然你想干嘛？在恋综里玩儿猜谜游戏不成？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: But don’t you think they are way too controlling?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 可你不觉得节目组太控制人了吗？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Makes sense. People want to watch it, so they shoot it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 挺合理的啊。有人爱看，他们才拍。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Including me—we’re just rats in a cage after all.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 包括我在内，我们都只是笼子里的老鼠。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: We’re being studied for the audience’s pleasure.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他们在研究我们。为了取悦观众。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Ok, if you really believe all that, then why are you here?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦……如果你这么想，那你来参加节目是为了什么？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I get bored sometimes, and it’s kind of fun to shake things up from the inside.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我有时候也会无聊。而从内部搅局，挺有趣的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What? You sound like a villain—who are you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啥？好有反派味道啊，你到底什么来头？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Do you want the villain to give you more insider tips on how to get through this?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 要不要反派告诉你点内幕消息，教你怎么混过这一关？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Insider tip? Uh… fine.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啥？内幕？呃……好啊。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: They didn’t tell us this, but the audience’s opinion on the show is very important.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 节目组没告诉我们，但观众的反应对结果很重要。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You have to give them what they want to see in order to win.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你必须演给他们看他们想看的，才有可能赢。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And what exactly do they want to see?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那他们到底想看啥？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: It’s impossible to know for sure, I guess. Audiences are very fickle these days.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 倒也说不准啦。现在的观众变幻莫测

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And that’s your idea of advice?!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那你这算哪门子建议？！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Ok, calm down. If you just act tough yet vulnerable, sexy but chaste…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别急嘛。如果你能做到又强势又脆弱，又性感又矜持——

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Perfect but vulnerable, and fall in love in the end, you should be fine.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 又完美又不完美，最后还要坠入爱河，就没问题了

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You’re kidding, right? Listen to yourself—is that even possible?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你在逗我吧？你听听这是人能做到的事情吗！

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: This is entertainment. Not real life.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这是娱乐，不是真实生活。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: The audience craves tension, something sharp and electric.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 观众就爱看点带劲的，有张力的。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You’ve got to decide how you’ll play it for the camera… or if you won’t play at all.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你得决定自己要在镜头前怎么演……又或者怎么不演！

515001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_15

dialogueElements.text: Orwell shoots her a sly wink as their conversation rolls on.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Orwell朝她狡黠地眨了下眼】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Hadn’t thought through a strategy. Not like you have.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我之前还真没想过策略。你倒是挺有想法。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Explain this acting scheme to me.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说说你的“表演策略”呗。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You sure? I tend to push the boundaries a bit.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你确定？我的尺度可能会比较大哦。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: If you’re ready to strip at the bar, what else could shock me?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你都打算在吧台脱光了，还有什么是我不能听的？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Hope you don’t take offense.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你别觉得冒犯就好。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Pretend we’re paired tonight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 假设你也选手，我俩今晚一组。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You have to give me a massage.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你得给我按摩。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: OK. We could script it like this.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧，我们可以这样拍。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You're lying on your stomach, wearing a sexy thong.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你趴着，穿着一条性感的丁字裤。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Towel draped over your lower back.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 毛巾搭在你后腰，刚好盖住屁股上缘。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Anyone watching would think you’re naked.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不知情的人还以为你什么都没穿。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I start with a slow, deep rub of your calf muscles.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我从你的小腿按摩起。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Move up to the thighs. Slowly, higher and higher.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 然后一路慢慢往上按到大腿，越按越高。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Then I yank the towel off.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 然后，我猛地扯掉毛巾。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Big “woah” from the crowd.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 观众一定会集体“哇哦”一声。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Some disappointed. Some smiling.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有人会失望，但也有人会忍不住笑。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Hey. I’m not okay with that. They won’t show it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 等等，我不行。他们也不会播这个。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Just remember. You’re playing a part.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你得记住自己只是在演戏。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: But let’s be honest, a thong covers almost nothing.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 但说实话——丁字裤也遮不住个啥。

516001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_16

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I’m working your lower back.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我开始按你的腰部附近。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Then a soft spank on your buns.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 然后轻轻拍一下你屁股。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You softly moan. Again, baby.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你轻声呻吟：“再拍一下嘛，宝贝。”

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: No way! Just saying so would give me secondhand embarrasment.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没可能！说这种台词只会让我尴尬致死。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: This is when shows throw in some spicy drama or viewers will click away.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 电视上一般这时候，需要点劲爆内容。不然观众会划走。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’d rather they do that!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我宁可他们划走！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe you can play-act this, but I’m out. I can’t do it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这种剧本，也许你能演得下去，但我拒绝。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I respect that. I also feel for you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我理解。也挺同情。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: It makes you the producer's puppet.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这会让你成制作人的傀儡。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: They pull your strings and turn on the cameras.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 他们像操控提线木偶一样操控你，拍你。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: You won’t play the role they gave you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你不肯演“人设”剧本？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: So they’ll turn your real reactions into the story.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 节目就会拿你“真实反应”做文章。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Either way, you’re on the show. The question is: who’s writing your scenes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 无论怎样，你都在节目里。区别只是——你自己写剧本，还是他们？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Tough way to go after the money.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 想赚钱，肯定是不容易的。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Thanks, coach. Guess this is goodbye.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 感谢老师，后会无期。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Until our paths cross again... cheers.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 为你的别致道别，干杯。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Seriously, thanks. But why help me?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 说真的，谢谢你。不过为什么要帮我？

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: I already told you. I like to shake things up.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我说过啦。我喜欢搅局。

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: Anyway, I have a boat to catch. Good luck Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 行了，我得去搭船了。祝你好运。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Boat? Leave the island that freely? Envy you…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 船？这么随心所欲的吗？羡慕……

dialogueElements.name: Orwell
dialogueElements.text: See ya later.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 罗克茜~回见。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie and Lance arrives in the same villa bedroom for the massage challenge.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜和Lance刚刚抵达同一个别墅卧室，参加按摩挑战。观众投票将他们配对为按摩组合。】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: We meet again, Mr. Game in My Hands. Haha.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 很高兴再见。Game in My Hands！哈哈

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Ouch, guess I’ll take that as a compliment.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 有种被讽刺到的感觉，哈哈

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Good thing it’s you. With someone else, I’d be mortified.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还好是你，换个人更得尴尬！

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, totally. So earlier, I swung by production… made sure we’d get paired up.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我也这么认为，所以晚上去了趟节目组，指定了搭档。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Really? That works? That’s straight-up shady.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啊？这也行吗？这算是搞黑幕吗？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Ha, having some name recognition comes with perks.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哈，毕竟有些小名气，有些小条款可以利用。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Honestly, you were just way too cool tonight! I just had to tell you that myself.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 主要今晚太酷了！忍不住想当面夸夸你。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cool? Is that just politically correct for bitchy?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 酷？这词不会是泼妇的另类翻译吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Sharp-tongued and mean? Yeah, I can hear the critics already.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 牙尖嘴利的刻薄女人，我都能设想出自己的标签来。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wait, the cameras aren’t here?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 等等，没摄像机吧？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: They’ll come when we’re ready.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们准备好了再叫他们来。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That’s good.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那就好。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I want to apologize for the buffet incident.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我为自助餐那事向你道歉。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You’re apologizing to me? Seriously?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你向我道歉？没搞错吧？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I thought you were being bullied.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 本来感觉你被人欺负了。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Later I realized you could handle yourself.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 后来知道你能应对得了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Maybe I overreacted. I didn’t mean to throw your kindness back at you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我倒觉得是我反应过度，辜负了你的好意。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Honestly…I’m glad you said that.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过你能这么说，我很开心。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: It feels nice not being seen as weak.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没被人当成弱鸡。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: So, here’s to teaming up again tonight.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 所以，今晚很高兴再次搭档。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Yeah.I’ll make sure to keep giving you…my full services.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯。我也会继续专门服务你。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I was nervous about body painting, but it was fun.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我原本对人体彩绘很紧张，结果还挺有趣。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I had a good time.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我玩得很开心。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: No just having a good time. I’d say you nearly popped a seam of your trunks.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 开心？不只开心吧，我看都差点开档了！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, yeah—whatever makes you happy.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，嗯，你开心就好。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: When I painted around your bikini top...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我在你比基尼胸衣边缘那一圈画的时候……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Terrible timing—but you’ve got me replaying it anyway.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 气氛不太对啊，这时候这场合回忆这个画面……有点上头！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Alright, stop. New topic.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好了！打住！换个话题。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Fine, serious talk then.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 行啊！那我说正事了啊。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: We’ve both been sweating all day, and with that massage coming up...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 今天都没少出汗，为了不影响待会彼此观感。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: We should clean up first.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们都得去洗个澡吧。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: The crew said we can take our time. If we wanna hit the shower.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 工作人员说不用着急叫他们。如果是要洗的话。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, it wouldn't hurt to rinse off.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，是需要清理一下。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: You wash my back, I’ll wash your front?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你可以帮我洗背，我可以帮你洗前面？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Oh sure, showering together is so efficient.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是哦，一起洗倒确实省事。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: You’re teasing me. Aren’t you?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你这……不会是在撩我吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Did you really think we would shower together?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你该不会真以为我们要一起洗澡吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Keep dreaming.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 想屁吃呢！

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Conserve water. A sacrifice for the planet.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 节约用水嘛。为我们生活的地球出点儿力。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I bet you’ve done it before.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我猜你以前肯定这么干过。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Privacy alert.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 个人隐私，不劳费心。

dialogueElements.text: You peeking through the privacy screen?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是不是在屏风后面看我？

dialogueElements.text: It only seems fair. You’ve been ogling me all day.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是，是，在看你，都看的流口水了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What he's being so smug about?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 也不知道自恋个什么劲。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Still… Lance’s body? It's unreal.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过Lance的身材……真的有点夸张啊

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Those broad shoulder and tan skin? Straight up criminal.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这胸腰臀比是来索命的!

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Those abs… that tight ass…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 刀刻腹肌……钢铁翘臀……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: No. Stop it. Re-focus.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不行，不能再胡思乱想了。收！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Gotta think of something else, distract myself…
dialogueElements.text_zh: 得想些别的，分散注意力……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Like, who the hell was actually in my bed last night?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 比如，昨晚到底是谁在和我滚床单呢？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Archer—least likely of all, but honestly, I kinda wish it was him…
dialogueElements.text_zh: Archer，看上去最没有可能性的一位，不过倒真希望是他……

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Lance—not bad either, though I doubt it was him… right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: Lance，也不错啊，估计应该不是他……吧？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Orwell—ugh, seriously, what does this guy even DO?
dialogueElements.text_zh: Orwell，嗯，话说这人到底干嘛的？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And then… Ugh. That guy. Just thinking about him pisses me off.
