dialogueElements.text_zh: 还有……不行！就那个家伙，想起来就火大！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: It could be anyone else but him. Please, not him.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 是谁都行，就不能是他！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And Raven—screwed her own brother-in-law. She's not walking free.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 对！还有Raven那个勾引姐夫的小绿茶，给我等着！

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I’m done. The shower is all yours.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我洗完了。该你了。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie finishes her shower, and the cameraNan and soundNan finish setting up in the corner.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜 刚洗完澡，摄像师与录音师也正好在角落架好设备。】

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: We’re set. Pretend we aren’t even here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们准备好了。你们当我们不存在就行。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That’s stupid. I’m in a bedroom with three men.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 您这话说的。我现在跟三个男人共处一室。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: One I barely know and two strangers.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 一个不过见过几次面，另外两个是陌生人。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: And a camera and boom mic aimed at me. Any more useless advice?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 还有摄像机和收音麦正对着我。还有比无视你们更没用的建议吗？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: He’s just doing his job.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这是他工作嘛。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: That doesn’t make it better. Sorry for snapping at you.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那也不能说明这事就合理了。刚对不起啊说话有点冲，不是针对你们。

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: No problemo. You two ready to roll the camera?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 没关系。那我们现在可以开拍了吗？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Let’s get this show on the road.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那就来吧，开场喽。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Wait! What if I want you to stop shooting?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 等一下！如果我想叫停呢？

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: You say stop. We stop immediately.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你说停，我们就立刻停。

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: Our orders are crystal clear. Legal thing. I think.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们规矩写得很清楚，我想起码是合法合规的。

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: The producers might show the clip on TV.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 不过制作组可能还是会把刚才那段播出去。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: That would look bad to the audience.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 那个播出来，观众可不一定喜欢。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Don’t do that, Roxie. Enjoy it. Like body painting.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别叫停吧，罗克茜。你就当是，享受这个过程，就像之前泳装彩绘一样。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, okay. Roll the cameras.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧。开拍吧。

dialogueElements.text: Lance lies down on his back.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Lance躺下。】

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I’m thinking chest or stomach to start.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我在想，要不从胸口或者肚子开始？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Worked magic for body painting.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这招在泳装彩绘那次效果不错。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Let’s start like a proper massage. Lying on your stomach.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别想太多，咱们就按正经按摩那样开始——乖乖趴好。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’m pretty good at this. Neck and back, first.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 按摩我可是专业的，先从颈部和背部开始。

dialogueElements.text: Lance turns over.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Lance翻身，趴下。】

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Sounds like a plan.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 听起来不错。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Oh Wow. You are good at this.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 噢，哇哦，你真挺有一手的。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: My neck feels great.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我的脖子舒服多了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Now the lower back and the glutes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 现在该轮到腰部和臀部了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Goodness. Buns of steel.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 天哪……又见钢铁翘臀。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: A little harder. Yeah. That feels good.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 再用力一点……对，就是那里。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Don’t lose control.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 啊稳住……

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: That’s the spot! Yeah, keep going.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 就那儿！对，别停。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Time to turn over.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 现在……该翻面了。

dialogueElements.text: Lance hesitates before turning over.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【Lance犹豫是否翻身。】

dialogueElements.text: I’ve got a bit of a tent pole issue here.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我这边……出现了点儿小“状况”。（注：指的他小帐篷顶起来了）

dialogueElements.text: You catch my drift, buddy?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哥们儿你懂我啥意思吧？

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: Don’t worry, pal. Producers will edit this bit out.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别担心，老兄。这段我们会剪掉。

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: I’ll adjust the shooting angle.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我重新调整下拍摄角度。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You really are standing tall.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你是真的“昂首挺立”啊。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: What am I gonna do? This is getting embarrassing.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 怎么办?越来越害臊了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Keep talking, don’t let the blush take over.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 得继续说点什么转移注意力。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Even if the cameras shift, it’s still on display.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你打算把自己硬给全世界看？

dialogueElements.text: Can't you just...
dialogueElements.text_zh: 快收了你的神通吧。

dialogueElements.text: Uh… maybe give it another minute. Bad timing.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 别催啊！这是催能解决的事吗？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Looks like you’re reacting too.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 看得出你这边也有反应啊。（注：指的她凸点了）

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Hey! All of this will be edited out, right?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 喂！这些都会剪掉对吧？

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: Sure as shootin’. You can get back to it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 包剪包剪。继续你们的就行。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Shoulders and chest, next.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 接下来是肩膀和胸口。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Nice muscle tone.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这小子肌肉线条真不错。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Give it a soft pinch.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 轻轻捏一下。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Do it again.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 再捏一次嘛。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I know this feeling. Careful, Roxie.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我很清楚这种感觉……把持住啊罗克茜。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You're on camera. Act like you’ve seen a Nan before.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 当着摄像机，别一副没见过男人的发春样！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Men are all the same. Remember?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯！男人都是猪头肉。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Slow down.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 放缓一点。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Why you letting up?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你干嘛松了手劲？

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Move on to my thighs, okay?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 继续，按我大腿，行吗？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, okay. Upper legs next.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 嗯，好吧。接下来轮到大腿了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Cool down. Just like you’re playing a part.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 冷静点。就当是在演戏。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Oh, his legs are so strong.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦~这的腿简直太结实了。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Ohhh yeah. That’s it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 哦——对，就是这样。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Harder, but slower. Yes. Yes.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 再用力一点，但再慢一点。对，就是这样。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: I'm ready to do you. Give you a massage. Is what I meat to say.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我也想“伺候”你一下。（注：他这句话有点双关性暗示。）

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I’ll take care of YOU first.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我先把你伺候好。（注：她这句话无双关。）

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: Yeah, time for the big switch.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 确实该到互换的环节了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Okay! I’m losing it!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好吧！忍不住了！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Go for it. Now.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 来吧，就现在。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: The camera!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 摄像头！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Turn off the camera. Now!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 把摄像头关掉，快！

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Why?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你干嘛？

dialogueElements.name: CameraNan
dialogueElements.text: We're off.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我们关了。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Alright! Get out, please.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好了，请你们出去。

dialogueElements.name: Lance
dialogueElements.text: Oh? You mean… we can go further once the cameras are off?
dialogueElements.text_zh: 怎么？是想没有摄像机的情况下我俩继续下去？

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: In your dreams!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你想屁吃！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: You! All of you! Out, now!
dialogueElements.text_zh: 你们！一起的，都请出去！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I can’t keep filming. This challenge is officially over. I’m calling it.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 这环节我录制不下去了，我宣布挑战失败！

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: As for you, Lance you better pay me back for that massage tomorrow.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 至于你！Lance！明天请支付我按摩的费用。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: Good night, everyone.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 好了，各位晚安。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: I need some peace.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 我需要休息。

dialogueElements.text: Roxie marches to the door and forces each person out one by one. Moments later, a knock—Lance again.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜将所有人全部逐一推出房门，而门外很快传来Lance的敲门声】

dialogueElements.name: Roxie

dialogueElements.text_zh: 我先把你伺候好。（注：她这句话无双关。）

dialogueElements.name: Roxie
dialogueElements.text: As for you, Lance you better pay me back for that massage tomorrow.
dialogueElements.text_zh: 至于你！Lance！明天请支付我按摩的费用。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie

dialogueElements.text_zh: 好了，各位晚安。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie

dialogueElements.text_zh: 我需要休息。

dialogueElements.name: Roxie

dialogueElements.text_zh: 【罗克茜将所有人全部逐一推出房门，而门外很快传来Lance的敲门声】

双击可以收集！

点击图标可以查看已解锁的物品！

让我们看看它的详细信息。

build_chapter_des_501.en: NEXT—Drowning in a man’s relentless attention— and now, a new hottie?

build_chapter_des_502.en: NEXT—Laughter masking sharp edges, teasing sparks hidden beneath the banter!

build_chapter_des_503.en: NEXT—Then, sex comes up out of nowhere, and I’m frozen!

build_chapter_des_504.en: NEXT—And him? He says it like it’s nothing: he’d strip bare on camera, no problem!

build_chapter_des_505.en: NEXT—Just as the jokes heat up, fate drops my rival right into the bar!

build_chapter_des_506.en: NEXT—Can’t fight her, can’t avoid her— she’s driving me insane.

build_chapter_des_507.en: NEXT—Then, like a master move, he cuts right through the chaos!

build_chapter_des_508.en: NEXT—Drama’s unfolding, and me? I just want my front-row seat!

build_chapter_des_509.en: NEXT—So I stay put, popcorn in hand, watching every second!

build_chapter_des_510.en: NEXT—The chaos builds— and I can’t stop eating up the show!

build_chapter_des_511.en: NEXT—He slips up, and honestly? I’m living for the chaos!

build_chapter_des_512.en: NEXT—The show takes a wild turn and I’m completely thrown off!

build_chapter_des_513.en: NEXT—I almost lose it, but thank god he’s got a plan.

build_chapter_des_514.en: NEXT—While coaching me, he flirts and scrambles my mind.

build_chapter_des_515.en: NEXT—He teaches with focus, teases with fire.

build_chapter_des_516.en: NEXT—They all wan him in their beds, but he wants me.

build_chapter_des_601.en: NEXT—Stop teasing me! I just want to finish tonight in peace.

build_chapter_des_602.en: NEXT—Wet and breathless—oh God, have mercy on me.

build_chapter_des_603.en: NEXT—A shared challenge, or a dangerously intimate game?

build_chapter_des_604.en: NEXT—Every inch closer, every glance sharper—all out of control.

build_chapter_des_605.en: NEXT—I’m losing it. Every move sets my heart on fire!

build_chapter_des_606.en: NEXT—Heart racing faster than the moves. Steel buns? Annoying!

build_chapter_des_607.en: NEXT—Why is this challenge turning flirty? Ugh, this camera.

build_chapter_des_608.en: NEXT—I’m flipping out! See what a woman’s emotions can do!

buildTipUi1540.en: Corbin barges in, mocks Lance, and leaves.

buildTipUi1542.en: Corbin calls a lawyer to shut down the rumor site.

buildTipUi1544.en: Roxie meets Jax privately before the shoot.

buildTipUi1546.en: Old feelings resurface as they work together.

buildTipUi1549.en: They begin filming the pottery scene.

buildTipUi1550.en: He leans in close, whispering behind her.

buildTipUi1551.en: Roxie is ready to confess when an urgent call interrupts.

buildTipUi1552.en: Jax reveals Gabe may have been on the island earlier.

buildTipUi1553.en: Roxie recalls the face outside the door.

buildTipUi1554.en: They confront Gabe about the party.

buildTipUi1555.en: Roxie steps away to cool down.

buildTipUi1556.en: Jax presses for answers about the party and the blackout.

buildTipUi1558.en: Roxie visits the villa to unwind.

buildTipUi1559.en: They check out the VR setup.

buildTipUi1560.en: They team up to fight together.

buildTipUi1562.en: He plays an improvised piece for her.

buildTipUi1563.en: She wonders if Raven is behind it.

buildTipUi1565.en: A memory feels like a dream.

buildTipUi1567.en: They agree to slow things down.

buildTipUi1569.en: A hidden bowling lane is revealed.

buildTipUi1579.en: They wait for Archer to dig deeper.

buildTipUi1580.en: Roxie senses eyes on her again.

buildTipUi1582.en: Was she instructed to tail someone?

buildTipUi1585.en: Another one of Orwell’s strange theories.

buildTipUi1587.en: They set a trap to force the truth out.

buildTipUi1592.en: Roxie and the others confront her.

buildTipUi1593.en: They press her for her motive.

buildTipUi1594.en: The roots of her resentment come to light.

buildTipUi1595.en: Raven speaks of being wounded by favoritism.

buildTipUi1597.en: She admits losing control that night.

buildTipUi1598.en: She apologizes and promises to undo the damage.

buildTipUi1601.zh: 和解之后，新的消息传来

build_chapter_des_1429.zh: 下一集：茗月圆风波平息后，Roxie和Raven开始修复关系。Harley带来一个意想不到的消息——两位新嘉宾即将加入……
build_chapter_des_1429.en: NEXT – After the storm settles, Roxie and Raven begin mending their bond. Harley arrives with unexpected news — two new guests are about to join...

buildTipUi1603.zh: Harley宣布新嘉宾，大明星Sable闪亮登场

buildTipUi1604.zh: 所有镜头转向Sable，Roxie被边缘化

buildTipUi1608.zh: Sable的光环背后藏着不为人知的压力

buildTipUi1612.zh: Sable主动示好，是真心还是策略？

buildTipUi1616.zh: Roxie证明了真实的自己才最有魅力

buildTipUi1617.zh: Sable面对现实，嘉宾们重新审视一切

build_chapter_des_1430.zh: 下一集：Harley宣布的新嘉宾竟是当红明星Sable！所有人都被她的光环震住了。

build_chapter_des_1431.zh: 下一集：Sable轻松成为全场焦点，嘉宾们争相与她互动，Roxie感到被冷落。

build_chapter_des_1432.zh: 下一集：当所有人都在讨好Sable时，Corbin的冷漠反而激起了她的好胜心。

build_chapter_des_1433.zh: 下一集：Raymond悄悄翻阅节目组资料，看起来在搜集什么。

build_chapter_des_1434.zh: 下一集：一场即兴活动变成了Sable和Roxie的正面交锋。

build_chapter_des_1435.zh: 下一集：深夜，Sable独自坐在泳池边打电话，声音里带着慌张。

build_chapter_des_1436.zh: 下一集：Archer在走廊撞见Raymond翻看文件，Raymond巧妙掩饰。

build_chapter_des_1437.zh: 下一集：Sable约Lance单独聊天，气氛暧昧，Roxie的内心翻涌。

build_chapter_des_1438.zh: 下一集：Lance找Roxie坦白，面对选择他显得前所未有的认真。

build_chapter_des_1439.zh: 下一集：Sable突然对Roxie释放善意，让所有人都感到意外。

build_chapter_des_1440.zh: 下一集：Archer告诉Roxie他看到的事情，拼图逐渐完整。

build_chapter_des_1441.zh: 下一集：Roxie选择做自己而不是和Sable互撕，出乎所有人意料。

build_chapter_des_1442.zh: 下一集：Sable的假面出现裂痕，嘉宾们开始重新审视她。

build_chapter_des_1443.zh: 下一集：Roxie用真诚赢回所有人的认可，Sable终于正视自己。

build_chapter_des_1444.zh: 下一集：风波过后，Sable做出了一个意想不到的决定……

buildTipUi1619.zh: 月影花庭迎来新的夜晚

buildTipUi1620.zh: 秘密在月光下隐约显现

buildTipUi1623.zh: 每个人都藏着不为人知的秘密

buildTipUi1625.zh: 真正的伙伴在困难中显现

buildTipUi1627.zh: 月光唤醒了尘封的记忆

build_chapter_des_1445.zh: 月影花庭举办欢迎派对，Roxie遇到一位神秘的钢琴师。夜色中花香弥漫，一段新故事悄然拉开帷幕。

build_chapter_des_1446.zh: Roxie发现花庭里有人在秘密通信。她好奇地调查，却发现了一个令人不安的线索。

build_chapter_des_1447.zh: 一场意外让Roxie和Orwell被困在花庭的温室里。两人在等待救援时进行了一次深入交谈。

build_chapter_des_1448.zh: 月光晚宴上，Lance在众人面前表达了对Roxie的欣赏。但Roxie察觉到他眼中闪过的犹豫。

build_chapter_des_1449.zh: 花庭的宁静被一封匿名信打破。信中暗示有人带着不可告人的目的来到这里。

build_chapter_des_1450.zh: 深夜，Roxie听到花庭后院传来争吵声。她悄悄靠近，发现了一个不该知道的秘密。

build_chapter_des_1451.zh: Jax在关键时刻替Roxie解围。两人的友情在考验中更加坚固。

build_chapter_des_1452.zh: 节目组突然宣布规则变更——将有一位嘉宾被淘汰。花庭气氛骤然紧张。

build_chapter_des_1453.zh: 一张旧照片勾起了Corbin的回忆。他罕见地向Roxie敞开心扉，讲述了过去的故事。

build_chapter_des_1454.zh: 花庭举办化妆舞会。面具之下，有人说出了平时不敢说的话。

build_chapter_des_1455.zh: 看似和平的投票环节下，每个人都在暗中布局。Roxie感受到了前所未有的压力。

build_chapter_des_1456.zh: Roxie经历了最艰难的一天，但她选择直面一切。她的蜕变赢得了所有人的尊重。

build_chapter_des_1457.zh: 月圆之夜，花庭里所有的秘密和误会终于被揭开。真相令人震惊却也让人释然。

build_chapter_des_1458.zh: Archer向Roxie坦白了一切。以爱为名的选择，有时比想象中更加复杂。

build_chapter_des_1459.zh: 经历风雨后，每个人都找到了自己的答案。花庭的最后一个夜晚，温暖而宁静。

build_chapter_des_1460.zh: 月影花庭的故事到此画上句号。但对Roxie来说，新的旅程才刚刚开始。

buildTipUi1636.zh: 一位神秘宇航员的到来打破了灯塔的宁静

buildTipUi1637.zh: 沿着栈道散步，Conrad展示他的魅力

buildTipUi1638.zh: 傍晚夕阳下，Lance的疑虑浮出水面

buildTipUi1640.zh: 清晨的悬崖边，闺蜜的陪伴最暖

buildTipUi1642.zh: Archer发现Conrad与制片人的秘密通话

buildTipUi1643.zh: 灯塔顶层，银河之下的试探

buildTipUi1645.zh: 深夜值班，咖啡与真心话

buildTipUi1647.zh: 暴风雨中，所有真相浮出水面

buildTipUi1648.zh: 晨光中离开灯塔，带着新的决心

guide_1_0.en: Merge to reach its next level.

guide_1_4.en: Merge to reach its next level.

guide_1_5.en: Merge to reach its next level.

guide_1_6.en: Merge to reach its next level.

guide_1_9.zh: 点击获取新物品，这将消耗能量。
guide_1_9.en: Tap to get a new item.This will consume energy.

guide_1_10.zh: 莫吉托准备好了，让凯尔尝尝吧。
guide_1_10.en: Mojito is ready.Let Kyle have a taste.

guide_2_0.zh: 罗克茜刚到这里，需要一些基本的旅行用品。我们来给她做几样吧！
guide_2_0.en: Roxie's new here and needs a few travel basics. Let's make some for her!

guide_2_1.zh: 拖动这两个小布袋合并，看看会发生什么
guide_2_1.en: Drag one drawstring pouch onto the other to <color=#e1209b>merge</color>. See what happens!

guide_2_2.zh:
太棒了！是个洗漱包！
把可以移动的物品拖到灰色的物品上面进行<color=#e1209b>合成</color>！
guide_2_2.en: Perfect! A toiletry bag! Drag the movable item onto the grey one to <color=#e1209b>merge</color>.

guide_2_3.zh: 把这些化妆包合成，获得一个全新的升级物品！
guide_2_3.en: Merge these makeup bags to get a new, upgraded item!

guide_2_4.zh: 继续点击手提旅行袋生成更多物品！
guide_2_4.en: Keep tapping the duffel bag to generate more items.

guide_2_5.zh: 得到了一个比基尼上衣！是滴，这也可以拿来合成新物品。
guide_2_5.en: You got a bikini top! Yup, that can be merged too.

guide_2_6.zh: 我们得到了蝴蝶结比基尼！把它拿给游客吧。
guide_2_6.en: Now it's a bow bikinil! Let's give it to the tourist.

guide_2_7.zh: 真棒！<color=#e1209b>双击</color>物品也可以完成订单！继续点击背包！
guide_2_7.en: Nice! You can also <color=#e1209b>double-tap</color> items to complete orders. Keep tapping the bag to generate more items.

guide_2_8.zh: 把这两个物品合成为一个新的物品！
guide_2_8.en: Merge these two items to produce a new one!

guide_2_9.zh: 这些棋子也可以合并成高级的！
guide_2_9.en: These pieces can also be combined into advanced ones!

guide_2_11.zh: 双击体力棋子可以收集！
guide_2_11.en: Double-click the stamina chess piece to collect!

guide_2_12.zh: 体力棋子等级越高，收集到的体力就越多！
guide_2_12.en: The higher the level of the energy piece, the more energy you can collect!

guide_2_13.zh: 点击可以产生体力棋子
guide_2_13.en: Clicking will generate physical chess pieces.

guide_2_14.zh: 除了足够的金币，有时你需要用到一些其他资源才能继续！
guide_2_14.en: Sometimes you'll need more than just coins to continue.

guide_2_15.zh: 拖动两个打蛋器合并，看看会发生什么。
guide_2_15.en: Drag two balloon whisks together and see what happens.

guide_2_16.zh: 得到一个搅拌套组！现在把两个搅拌套组拖到一起！
guide_2_16.en: You got a whisk & bowl set! Now drag these two together!

guide_2_17.zh: 一个电动打蛋机！太棒了，让我们继续！
guide_2_17.en: An electric hand mixer! Awesome, let's keep going!

guide_2_18.zh: 再把两个高级打蛋机拖到一起试试看！
guide_2_18.en: Now try merging two premium stand mixers!

guide_3_0.zh: 点一下去赚金币，解锁下一段剧情！
guide_3_0.en: Tap to go earn coins and unlock the next part of the story!

guide_3_1.zh: 我们有了推进剧情的资金，<color=#e1209b>点击按钮</color>回到小岛！
guide_3_1.en: You've got enough coins to move the story forward. <color=#e1209b>Tap the button</color> to head back to the island!

guide_3_2.zh: 点击解锁下一个对话段落。
guide_3_2.en: <color=#e1209b>Tap</color> to unlock the next dialogue session.

guide_3_3.en: Tap to keep the story going!

guide_3_4.zh: 没有足够的金币了，让我们回到游戏面板完成更多订单吧！
guide_3_4.en: Not enough coins! Let's go back and complete more orders.

guide_3_5.zh: 奖励的物品会放在这里！<color=#e1209b>点击</color>将它放到棋盘上。
guide_3_5.en: The rewarded items will appear here! <color=#e1209b>Tap</color> an item to send it back to the board.

guide_3_6.zh: 鹦鹉出现意味着有新的剧情可以触发！
guide_3_6.en: Parrot's here, story's near—tap and make it all appear!

guide_3_7.en: Spend coins to unlock new stories!

guide_3_9.zh: 如果你没有体力了，点击这里补充体力！
guide_3_9.en: If you run out of energy, click here to replenish it!

guide_3_10.zh: 点击图标可以查看已解锁的物品！
guide_3_10.en: Tap this to view unlocked items!

guide_3_11.zh: 每解锁一个新物品都能收集一枚钻石！
guide_3_11.en: Each new item you unlock earns you a diamond!

guide_3_12.zh: 一个商店！我们去看看里面有什么！
guide_3_12.en: A shop! Let's check out what's inside!

guide_3_13.zh: 商店来了一批新的好东西，我们去看看！
guide_3_13.en: New goodies just arrived in the shop—let's check them out!

guide_3_14.zh: 点击订单可以查看如何完成它！
guide_3_14.en: Tap the order to see how to complete it!

guide_3_15.zh: 棋盘上没位置了？把物品拖储物柜存放吧！
guide_3_15.en: No room on the board? Drag items to storage.

guide_3_16.zh: 点击查看已储存的物品。

guide_3_17.zh: 点击某个物品，就能把它放回棋盘上啦！
guide_3_17.en: Tap an item to place it back on the board!

guide_3_19.zh: 哎呀！你现在还不能打开。打开它需要时间。<color=#e1209b>点击开始解锁</color>。
guide_3_19.en: Oops! You can't open it just yet. It needs some time. <color=#e1209b>Tap to start unlocking</color>.

guide_3_20.en: Don't want to wait? <color=#e1209b>Speed it up!</color>

guide_3_21.zh: 泡泡里藏着一个东西。让我们戳破它看看！
guide_3_21.en: Something's inside that bubble—let's pop it!

guide_3_22.zh: 泡泡过会儿就会消失。我们现在就把它打开。
guide_3_22.en: The bubble and what's inside disappear over time. Better open it now!

guide_3_23.zh: 正在补充物品，请稍等片刻。花费钻石可以立刻完成补充！
guide_3_23.en: Items are refilling… hang tight! Want it faster? Spend some diamonds!

guide_3_24.zh: 葡萄桶生产出了葡萄酒！葡萄酒倒完后葡萄桶就会消失啦！
guide_3_24.en: The grape bucket produced wine! Once it's emptied, the bucket disappears.

guide_3_25.zh: 让我们看看它的详细信息。
guide_3_25.en: Let's check out the details. Tap the item to view its info card.

guide_3_27.zh: 你可以随时查看自己的物品库存。现在我们回到游戏。
guide_3_27.en: You can always check your item(s) in storage. Let's get back to the game!

guide_3_28.zh: 这块宝石蕴含着无限的能量。拖动到任一物品上来提升它们的等级。
guide_3_28.en: This gem holds infinite power—drag it onto any item to upgrade it!

guide_3_29.zh: 一个打蛋器！点击将它放到棋盘上
guide_3_29.en: A balloon whisk! Tap to place it on the board!

guide_3_30.zh: 海湾瞭望通行证将提供 <color=#e1209b>超值额外奖励！</color>
guide_3_30.en: The Bay Watch Pass will provide <color=#e1209b>generous extra rewards!</color>

guide_3_31.zh: 点击此处了解更多<color=#e1209b>额外福利详情！</color>
guide_3_31.en: Tap here to learn more about <color=#e1209b>the extra perks!</color>

island_srpd_dec.zh: 一封邀请函，点燃昨夜余温。Roxie踏进海风深处，故事悄悄偏离剧本...
island_srpd_dec.en: An invitation letter rekindles the warmth of last night. Roxie steps into the heart of the sea breeze, and the story quietly slips off-script...

island_srpd_config_dec_1.en: Something goes wrong just before the opening...

island_srpd_config_dec_2.en: An old friend steps in to help...

island_srpd_config_dec_4.en: Roxie lets out a breath of relief...

island_srpd_config_dec_8.en: Rehearsal steps up, bodies moving closer...

island_srpd_config_dec_9.en: The light grows brighter, the distance closes...

island_srpd_config_dec_10.en: Under the moonlight, they walk together—the mood slowly deepening...

island_srpd_config_dec_11.zh: 夜色柔进心防，话题悄然变深。
island_srpd_config_dec_11.en: Night softens her defenses, and the conversation quietly deepens.

island_srpd_config_dec_12.en: The closer they walk, the harder it is to hide.

island_srpd_config_dec_15.en: The closer they write, the closer the distance…

island_srpd_config_dec_16.zh: 靠近一步，心跳就乱了半拍
island_srpd_config_dec_16.en: One step closer, and the heartbeat skips a beat.

island_srpd_config_dec_17.zh: 礼服的距离，比舞步更贴近...
island_srpd_config_dec_17.en: The distance of the formalwear feels closer than the dance steps…

island_srpd_config_dec_18.zh: 差一步的跌落，被他稳住了...
island_srpd_config_dec_18.en: One step from falling—he steadies her.

island_srpd_config_dec_19.en: One sip—the distance is just right.

island_srpd_config_dec_20.zh: 酒精让“真话”变得更靠近

island_srpd_config_dec_22.en: The pose suddenly brings them much closer.

island_srpd_config_dec_23.en: The aroma application brings them even closer.

island_srpd_config_dec_24.zh: 摆拍过程让距离进一步失控...
island_srpd_config_dec_24.en: The posing pushes the distance further out of control...

island_srpd_config_dec_25.en: The steadier the breath, the more the heartbeat slips.

island_srpd_config_dec_26.zh: 越靠近，越无法忽视彼此体温
island_srpd_config_dec_26.en: The closer they get, the harder it is to ignore each other’s warmth.

island_srpd_config_dec_27.zh: 身体被托起的瞬间，心也悬起来
island_srpd_config_dec_27.en: In the moment her body is lifted, her heart hangs with it.

island_srpd_config_dec_28.en: So close, neither of them dares to move.

island_srpd_config_dec_29.zh: 贴得近，呼吸都挤在一起。
island_srpd_config_dec_29.en: So close their breaths press into each other.

island_srpd_config_dec_30.zh: 香膏越推越开，距离越靠越近。
island_srpd_config_dec_30.en: As the balm spreads, the distance keeps closing in.

island_srpd_config_dec_31.zh: 肩贴肩的距离，比回答更让人心跳。
island_srpd_config_dec_31.en: At this distance, the shared shoulder sets the heart racing more than any answer.

island_srpd_config_dec_32.zh: 他说的每一句，都像只说给她听。
island_srpd_config_dec_32.en: Every word he says feels like it’s meant just for her.

island_srpd_config_dec_33.en: Seeing her to her door—but then…

elements.text_en: Roxie is waiting to be filmed on a beach lounge chair.
elements.text_zh: 罗克茜沙滩躺椅上等待拍摄。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who did you sleep with last night?!!!
elements.text_zh: 昨晚到底跟谁滚的床单啊！！！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: After living for so many years, it's the first time I've fallen so hard!
elements.text_zh: 活了这么多年，第一次栽这么大跟头！

elements.text_en: Crash! There was sudden thud as a football hit the tray carried by the waiter.
elements.text_zh: 砰！ 橄榄球猛地撞上服务生端着的托盘，发出一声突如其来的沉闷响声。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Be careful!
elements.text_zh: 小心！

elements.text_en: A pair of big hands firmly caught the cold water bottle that was about to fall. But water poured onto Roxie's face
elements.text_zh: 一双大手稳稳的接住了即将掉落的冷水壶。但有水倾洒到了罗克茜的脸上

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Are you planning to invite me to take a cold shower at the beach?
elements.text_zh: 你是打算请我在海边洗个冷水澡？

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: It was this gentleman who saved you! I'm so sorry! My tray was hit by a ball and almost hit you!
elements.text_zh: 是这位先生救了您！真是抱歉！我的托盘被球打中，差点砸到了您！

elements.text_en: The sunlight shines over his tight waist, the lines are neat and warm, the texture is clear and soft, beautiful and clean yet restrained
elements.text_zh: 日光漫过他紧实的腰腹，线条利落温润，肌理清晰柔和，美得干净又克制

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It's a pity not to go to the catwalk with this figure.
elements.text_zh: 这身材，不去走秀可惜了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: This thank-you gift... is quite special. Nice to see you again.
elements.text_zh: 这谢礼……挺特别的。很高兴又见面了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thank you very much... Hmm? See you again?
elements.text_zh: 真的非常感谢……嗯？又见面？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hmm! Looks a bit familiar... I remember now, you are the sports star with a golden buttocks!
elements.text_zh: 嗯！有点眼熟……想起来了，你是那个拥有黄金翘臀的运动明星！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yes, last night in front of everyone, you also teased me like this...
elements.text_zh: 是的，昨晚众目睽睽，你也是这么调侃我的……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This broken piece... has no impression at all.
elements.text_zh: 这片断的……完全没有印象啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can't quite remember your name.
elements.text_zh: 我有点儿记不起你名字了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Lance. We talked last night. Did you forget?
elements.text_zh: 兰斯。昨晚我们还聊过。你忘了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There were so many people last night, how could I remember every single one?
elements.text_zh: 昨晚人那么多，我哪记得住每一个。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Didn't remember? You came to me first last night and said some... quite direct words.
elements.text_zh: 没记住？昨晚可是你先来找我，还说了一些……挺直接的话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don't take it too seriously. I'm just saying it casually.
elements.text_zh: 别太认真。我只是随口说说。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That slap on my butt, it wasn't just a casual remark, was it?
elements.text_zh: 那拍我屁股的那一下，总不是随口说说了吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Am I playing so high?
elements.text_zh: ……我玩的那么high的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Relax, handsome guy. You might accidentally scratch it.
elements.text_zh: 放轻松，小帅哥。无意剐蹭到的也说不定。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who told you to have such a raised butt!
elements.text_zh: 谁叫你屁股那么翘！

elements.text_en: Was it him last night?
elements.text_zh: 昨晚会是他？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The program is about to be filmed. Focus.
elements.text_zh: 马上要要拍摄节目了。专心点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don't panic, check later. Stay calm.
elements.text_zh: 先别慌，之后再查。冷静点。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I still need a partner for the afternoon activity. Shall we go together?
elements.text_zh: 下午的活动，我还缺个搭档。一起吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well... there's no one else anyway.
elements.text_zh: 好吧……反正也没别人了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Perfect offensive. Lance. Gold medal quarterback up!
elements.text_zh: 完美的一波攻势。兰斯。金牌四分卫上分！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So you've grabbed the partner spot? You're quite picky and have good taste.
elements.text_zh: 这就把搭档名额抢到手了？还挺会挑，眼光不错。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Should I say it or not, I hate your recklessness.
elements.text_zh: 该说不说，我讨厌你的肆无忌惮。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Don't be nervous, I'm not here to steal a partner.
elements.text_zh: 别紧张，我不是来抢搭档的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Oh yeah, Foxie Roxie. That’s what your handle last night, right?
elements.text_zh: 性感小狐狸罗克茜。这是你昨晚的昵称，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me? Are you talking about me? Have we met again?
elements.text_zh: 我？你在说我吗？我们又认识了？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Don't know? When you held my arm and said you wanted to drink last night, that's not what you said.
elements.text_zh: 不认识？你昨晚抱着我胳膊说要喝酒的时候，可不是这么说的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Last night again... What kind of people did I provoke!
elements.text_zh: 又是昨晚…… 我都招惹了一帮什么人啊！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Friend, be careful when you speak!
elements.text_zh: 朋友，说话注意点！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A joke, don't mind. Of course...
elements.text_zh: 一个玩笑，别介意。当然……

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Some people, after drinking, speak crazy words and do very... crazy things!
elements.text_zh: 有些人，酒后说的是疯话，做的事情也很……疯狂！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Don't you think so, little fox?
elements.text_zh: 你说是吧，小狐狸？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why did you click on me?
elements.text_zh: 点我干嘛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ah... Could it be him?
elements.text_zh: 啊……该不会是他吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I won't disturb your painting. Have fun.
elements.text_zh: 不打扰你们彩绘了。祝…… 玩得开心。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Orwell gives a mock salute, then turns and walks away.
elements.text_zh: 奥威尔做了个假敬礼的动作，然后转身离开。

elements.text_en: Was it him last night?
elements.text_zh: 昨晚会是他？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is horrible. My stepsister, Raven.
elements.text_zh: 糟了，是我继妹Raven。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why did she come too? It's a big trouble!!!
elements.text_zh: 为什么她也会来？麻烦大了！！！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That would be nice. A coma would be perfect.
elements.text_zh: 要是她直接消失就好了——躺平那种更好。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Wow. That’s off the charts harsh.
elements.text_zh: 哇，你这话也太狠了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just found out she’s here on the show. She’s toxic.
elements.text_zh: 我刚知道她也在节目里。她就是个毒瘤。

elements.text_en: The shooting of the body painting officially begins.
elements.text_zh: 开始正式进入人体彩绘环节的拍摄。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. Where do I start? I'm not much of an artist.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。我该从哪儿开始？我画画可不怎么在行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: My stomach. I’m hard as a rock. Well, rock hard abs.
elements.text_zh: 从我肚子开始。我那里硬得像石头。嗯，腹肌啊别想歪了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're so funny. Then I'll start drawing from the belly~
elements.text_zh: 你可真逗。那我就从肚子开始画了哦~

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Too high! I'll be a bit sensitive if you go higher, go lower.
elements.text_zh: 太高了！再往上我会有点敏感，你往下一些。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. Okay.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，好吧……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sensitive area?
elements.text_zh: 敏感区域？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t pull your trunks down so far.
elements.text_zh: 别把你的泳裤往下拉那么多噢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I'm not going to draw any further. Why don't you just switch sides and draw on your butt?
elements.text_zh: 我可不会再往下画了。要不你干脆换个面，画你屁股上得了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You're a bit unscrupulous. Are you planning to let me take pictures of the camera naked?
elements.text_zh: 你有点心术不正啊，是打算让我光着屁股给摄影机拍？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Anyway, there are many people who miss "it", it's a golden buttocks.
elements.text_zh: 反正惦记“它”的人多了去，黄金翘臀嘛。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Are you also thinking about it?
elements.text_zh: 你也惦记？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I have tried it before, this is what you said.
elements.text_zh: 我上过手的，这可是你说的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No impression at all... a bit of a loss.
elements.text_zh: 印象全无……有点亏啊。

elements.text_en: A haunting voice sends a chill down Roxie’s spine when cameras stop.
elements.text_zh: 摄像机刚一停，一道熟悉又阴冷的声音，让罗克茜突然脊背一凉。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Still the same, look at your youthful appearance.
elements.text_zh: 还是老样子，瞧你这副春情荡漾的小模样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The shooting is still ongoing, please do not affect the production team.
elements.text_zh: 拍摄还在进行，麻烦你不要影响节目组。

elements.name: AVG
elements.text_en: Impact? I just feel sorry for Mr. Lance.
elements.text_zh: 影响？我只是心疼兰斯先生而已。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Anyone would feel uncomfortable being touched and looked at like this, right?
elements.text_zh: 被人这么又摸又看的，换谁都会不自在吧？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I would be happy to be her partner, it has nothing to do with you.
elements.text_zh: 我很乐意做她的搭档，这与你无关。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Mr. Lance doesn't know yet, right? My sister is best at getting along with people...
elements.text_zh: 兰斯先生还不知道吧？我姐姐最擅长跟人打得火热了……

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I heard that they didn't return it last night...
elements.text_zh: 我听说啊，昨晚不还……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How did she know? Could it be...
elements.text_zh: 她怎么会知道的？莫非……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is a recording location, not our backyard.
elements.text_zh: 这里是录制现场，不是家里的后院。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you want to find fault, you can. Wait until the shooting is over.
elements.text_zh: 想找茬，可以。等拍摄结束。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Since my older sister has said so, I won't disturb you in'cultivating your relationship '.
elements.text_zh: 既然姐姐都这么说了，那我就不打扰你们‘培养感情’啦。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: By the way, my family is all watching the show.
elements.text_zh: 对了，家里人可都看着节目呢。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Sister, don't play too crazy, you will lose face for our whole family.
elements.text_zh: 姐姐可别玩得太疯，丢的是我们全家的脸。

elements.text_en: Raven left. Roxie's fingertips tightened slightly, but she still maintained her dignity.
elements.text_zh: 雷文离开。Roxie指尖微微收紧，却依旧维持着体面。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ignore her, let's continue.
elements.text_zh: 别理她，我们继续。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hmm.
elements.text_zh: 嗯。

elements.text_en: After filming, Lance invited Roxie to the program's restaurant for dinner.
elements.text_zh: 拍摄完毕，Lance邀约Roxie来到了节目组餐厅共同晚餐。

elements.text_en: Corbin walked in alone in a neatly tailored dark suit, with a cold and stiff aura. His gaze immediately locked onto the female lead.
elements.text_zh: Corbin 一身剪裁利落的深色西装，气场冷硬，独自走进来，视线第一时间锁定女主。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why does this person keep staring at me? Could it be...
elements.text_zh: 这人老盯着我干嘛？该不会……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What's wrong?
elements.text_zh: 怎么了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nothing much... I just feel that person's eyes are a bit scary.
elements.text_zh: 没什么…… 就是觉得那个人，眼神有点吓人。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh, her name is Corbin, and it is said that she has a big background.
elements.text_zh: 哦，她叫Corbin，据说来头很大。

elements.text_en: Corbin walked straight towards them, stopped in front of the table, and his gaze fell on the female lead without any warmth.
elements.text_zh: Corbin 径直朝他们走来，停在桌前，目光落在女主身上，不带温度。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Do all the guests in the love show know how to use the camera like you?
elements.text_zh: 恋综的嘉宾，都像你这么……会利用镜头吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ah??? What does it mean?
elements.text_zh: 啊？？？什么意思？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Body painting, public ambiguity, creating topics.
elements.text_zh: 人体彩绘，当众暧昧，制造话题。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You know very well how to attract attention and who is watching you.
elements.text_zh: 你很清楚怎么吸引目光，也很清楚都有谁在看着你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What serious illness does this person have? Why are you picking on me?
elements.text_zh: ？？？这人有什么大病！找我茬干嘛！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This inexplicable gentleman, do we have any misunderstanding?
elements.text_zh: 这位莫名其妙的先生，我们是不是有什么误解？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Misunderstanding? I think you're good at hiding.
elements.text_zh: 误解？我倒觉得是你很会隐藏。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: In front of others, he looks innocent, but behind others... he is quite brave.
elements.text_zh: 人前一副无辜模样，人后…… 胆子倒不小。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don't know you, and I don't know what you're implying.
elements.text_zh: 我不认识你，也不知道你在暗示什么。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Don't know? Then you'd better never know.
elements.text_zh: 不认识？那你最好一直别认识。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Otherwise, you will find that the ambiguity from last night is not even an appetizer for me.
elements.text_zh: 不然你会发现，昨晚那点暧昧，在我这里连开胃菜都算不上。

elements.text_en: Ah... is it him?
elements.text_zh: 啊……是他？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Last night again? What did I do last night!
elements.text_zh: 又是昨晚？我昨晚都做了什么！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Never mind, don't be afraid, diss first!
elements.text_zh: 不管了，不怂，先怼！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure enough, having money doesn't equal having taste.
elements.text_zh: 果然，有钱不等于有品。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I confirmed this from you.
elements.text_zh: 从你身上我印证了这一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don't care if you know me or not, anyway I don't remember you.
elements.text_zh: 我不管你认不认识我，反正我是不记得你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, please don't use your sense of superiority to show off your existence here.
elements.text_zh: 所以，也请别用你的优越感来这里彰显存在。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Did you understand? You are not welcome here.
elements.text_zh: 你听懂了？这里不欢迎你。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I'm not talking to you.
elements.text_zh: 我没在跟你说话。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Your gaze is really annoying! Go out and gesture?
elements.text_zh: 你这眼神真让人恼火！出去比划一下？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Have you been relying on this body to solve problems all along?
elements.text_zh: 一直靠这副身体来解决问题？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: If necessary, I will do it! For example...
elements.text_zh: 有必要的话！我会这么干！比如……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stop talking, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 别说了，兰斯。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Why do you think I came here?
elements.text_zh: 你以为我是因为什么才会过来？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: If it weren't for this stupid woman last night...
elements.text_zh: 要不是这个蠢女人昨晚……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Last night! Last night! Didn't play anymore, right? So annoying!
elements.text_zh: 昨晚！昨晚！没玩了是吧！烦死了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Everyone is talking about last night, but I don't even know what happened last night!
elements.text_zh: 都在说昨晚，我都不知道昨晚发生了什么事！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What's it to you whether I'm stupid or not? Did I steal your cheese or eat your hamburger?
elements.text_zh: 我蠢不蠢关你什么事？偷你家奶酪还是吃你家汉堡了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What's the point of being a guest on a romantic variety show... putting on a posture of a workplace tyrant rectifying variety shows, funny! Who do you think you are?
elements.text_zh: 还什么恋综嘉宾……摆出一副职场暴君整顿综艺的架势，搞笑！你以为你是谁啊？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Tacky and eye-catching.
elements.text_zh: 俗气又辣眼。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Hey! Speak politely to me!
elements.text_zh: 喂！说话给我客气点！

elements.text_en: Lance took a step closer to Corbin, and there was a hint of gunpowder in the air.
elements.text_zh: Lance 向 Corbin 靠近一步，空气里有点火药味。

elements.text_en: Lance, get out of the way! I'm not finished yet.
elements.text_zh: 兰斯你给我让开！我还没说完。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Corbin, right... Did I touch your sore spot? Is it related to women?
elements.text_zh: Corbin是吧……我戳到你痛处了？是和女人有关吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're especially bad at women who don't listen to you, right?
elements.text_zh: 对那些不听你指挥的女人，你尤其不行，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Men like you. Using facts to make you feel ashamed is the most effective.
elements.text_zh: 像你这种男人。用事实让你无地自容最有效。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Looking glamorous on the surface, but timid and humble inside
elements.text_zh: 看着表面光鲜，内心怯弱卑微

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Where does the lack of confidence come from?
elements.text_zh: 究竟是源于哪里的不自信呢？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Are you really going to humiliate me? I know a lot about you.
elements.text_zh: 当真要羞辱我？我可知道你不少事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I investigated the background of your "contestant" today.
elements.text_zh: 我今天调查了一下你这位“参赛者”的背景。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I really don't understand, when did this program start accepting people like this?
elements.text_zh: 真搞不懂，这节目什么时候开始收留这种人了？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Marriage failure. Not like a good wife.
elements.text_zh: 婚姻失败。不像个好妻子。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Now you barely make a living with a few crappy jobs.
elements.text_zh: 现在你靠几个破工作勉强糊口。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You are a desperate loser.
elements.text_zh: 你是个孤注一掷的失败者。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Come to the love variety show and mix with a husband as a life-saving straw?
elements.text_zh: 来恋综混个老公当救命稻草？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Why did you suddenly stop talking? Did the truth make you feel so ashamed that you couldn't speak?
elements.text_zh: 怎么突然不说话了？真相让你羞愧得说不出话？

elements.text_en: I can't take it anymore...
elements.text_zh: 我忍不下去了……

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Who are you? The White Horse Knight on the Beach?
elements.text_zh: 你是她谁啊？沙滩白马骑士？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Do I really look like a fragile little princess who wants to be saved?
elements.text_zh: 我看起来就那么像一个想要被拯救的柔弱小公主吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You two don't understand how mature women should face embarrassment.
elements.text_zh: 成熟女人该怎么样面对难堪，你俩理解不了一点。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh, a hero saves a beauty? Others may not appreciate it!
elements.text_zh: 呵，英雄救美？别人未必领情哦！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're right! I am indeed struggling to survive.
elements.text_zh: 你说得没错！我确实是在挣扎中求生。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But I didn't feel embarrassed.
elements.text_zh: 但我没觉得自己丢脸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Every day when I wake up, I force myself to keep moving forward. Is this embarrassing?
elements.text_zh: 每天醒来，我都在逼自己继续前进。这很丢脸吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Do you think a failed marriage is a shame?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得婚姻失败是一种耻辱？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Shouldn't it be those who lie, betray, and then walk away! Do people who pretend nothing happened feel ashamed?
elements.text_zh: 不该是那些撒谎、背叛，然后拍拍屁股走人！假装什么都没发生的人感到羞耻吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I earn money with my own hands and get through the low point with my own strength.
elements.text_zh: 我靠自己的双手赚钱，靠自己的力量熬过低谷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No matter how difficult it is, I have never relied on others' charity.
elements.text_zh: 哪怕再难，也从没靠过别人施舍。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry to disappoint you! I can only be proud of myself for being like this.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉让你失望！我只会为这样的自己感到骄傲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Also, Lance, mature women don't fantasize about being saved by men.
elements.text_zh: 还有，兰斯，成熟女人不会幻想被男人拯救。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, I need to go out for a walk alone. I'll have to leave you alone for dinner.
elements.text_zh: 不好意思，我需要一个人出去走走。得留下你一个人用餐了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Go ahead, I'm glad to be your partner!
elements.text_zh: 去吧，很高兴能成为你的搭档！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Brother, you really should look in the mirror and see your own face just now.
elements.text_zh: 兄弟，你真应该照镜子看看自己刚刚的嘴脸。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Shut up! This is between her and me.
elements.text_zh: 闭嘴！这是我和她的事情。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh, really? Not anymore after that.
elements.text_zh: 哦，是吗？那之后就不再是了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Fool!
elements.text_zh: 蠢货！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: In this regard, you have more advantages.
elements.text_zh: 这方面，你更有优势些。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: After all, I wouldn't put on a mean look to scare people away.
elements.text_zh: 毕竟，我可不会摆出一副刻薄的模样把人吓跑。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Do you believe her story?
elements.text_zh: 你信她那套说辞？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not important. Is it important?
elements.text_zh: 不重要。重要吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie takes time to think after leaving the buffet.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在离开自助餐区后，花了一些时间静静思考。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Neither of them understands women.
elements.text_zh: 男人？呵。全都自以为懂女人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Or maybe I don’t understand men.
elements.text_zh: 也可能，是我不懂他们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I'm crazy. What did I do last night?
elements.text_zh: 我真是疯了。我昨晚都做了啥？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t remember any of it. How did I get so drunk?
elements.text_zh: 我什么都不记得了。酒怎么会喝成这样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe someone spiked my drink? Oh, God. Surely not.
elements.text_zh: 不会真有人在我酒里动了手脚吧？

elements.text_en: Raven joins Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Raven 加入 Roxie。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I hope you’re getting ready to jump.
elements.text_zh: 怎么还不跳。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: May not be high enough to kill you.
elements.text_zh: 不过这高度……跳了估计也死不了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m really not in the mood.
elements.text_zh: 我现在真的没心情。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Been doing some snooping, sister dear.
elements.text_zh: 我吃到一点你的瓜，亲爱的姐姐。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Seems like you made quite the scene at the party.
elements.text_zh: 在派对上惊艳全场，你玩儿挺嗨啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep your cool. Play along.
elements.text_zh: 淡定。顺着她说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I let my hair down. Some singing and dancing.
elements.text_zh: 就放松一下，唱唱歌，跳跳舞而已。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: People seemed to enjoy it.
elements.text_zh: 大家都很嗨。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Really? That’s all that happened?
elements.text_zh: 真的吗？就这些？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some harmless flirting. Why do you care?
elements.text_zh: 一点无伤大雅的调情。你至于吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t get why you’re here.
elements.text_zh: 你来这里干嘛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Big actress coming on a reality show.
elements.text_zh: 大明星也混真人秀？你堕落了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You’ve always been jealous of me.
elements.text_zh: 你一直都嫉妒我。

elements.text_en: Raven and Roxie argue.
elements.text_zh: Raven和Roxie当场吵起来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me, jealous of you. What a joke.
elements.text_zh: 我嫉妒你？别逗了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You did that late-night show. Crude humor.
elements.text_zh: 你上深夜档脱口秀。满嘴烂梗。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Not something a dignified woman would do.
elements.text_zh: 体面点的女人，可不会那样。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You blame me for your divorce.
elements.text_zh: 你离婚也怪我？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Look in the mirror. He wanted more than you.
elements.text_zh: 照照镜子吧。他早腻了你了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s enough!
elements.text_zh: 够了！

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Your life is pathetic.
elements.text_zh: 你的人生真是可悲。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Juggling some crummy jobs.
elements.text_zh: 几个破烂工作糊口。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Trying to score a husband on reality TV.
elements.text_zh: 还想在真人秀里捞个老公。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Shut up! You narcissist bitch!
elements.text_zh: 闭嘴！你这个自恋狂！

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You see what I have. Adoring fans, a real career.
elements.text_zh: 你永远赶不上我拥有的这些。崇拜我的粉丝和一份真正的事业。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re a ‘B’ movie hack.
elements.text_zh: 你？B级片都嫌你撑不住场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You better shut your yap.
elements.text_zh: 少说两句，嘴别这么碎。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Okay, fine.
elements.text_zh: 行，随你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Am I intruding?
elements.text_zh: 我是不是打扰你们了？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Archer. Good to see you. Join us.
elements.text_zh: Archer，你来啦。正好，一起聊。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: This is my dear sister, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 这是我亲爱的姐姐，Roxie。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Actually, stepsister, but we’re like real sisters.
elements.text_zh: 严格说是继姐——但我们亲得跟亲姐妹一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The amazing two-faced witch.
elements.text_zh: 呵，两面派演得真像。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Archer and I met on the flight here.
elements.text_zh: 我跟Archer是在来这儿的航班上认识的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. Nice to meet you, Archer.
elements.text_zh: 你好，Archer。幸会。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Pleasure is mine.
elements.text_zh: 我的荣幸。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Hope I’m not interrupting.
elements.text_zh: 希望我没有打扰到你们。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: No. We were just talking about careers.
elements.text_zh: 当然没有啦。我俩只是在聊事业。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I recall you were a fan of my work.
elements.text_zh: 我记得你说过喜欢我的作品？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve seen some of your movies.
elements.text_zh: 我看过你几部电影。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Which one is your favorite?
elements.text_zh: 你最喜欢哪一部？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Black Widow Killer. Well written and a good plot.
elements.text_zh: 《黑寡妇杀手》。剧本扎实，故事也好。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I brought that character to life.
elements.text_zh: 我可是把那个角色演活了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: A sexy psychopath who murders five husbands.
elements.text_zh: 一个迷人又危险的疯女人——还连环害死五任丈夫。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You were perfect for that part, sister dearest.
elements.text_zh: 这角色太适合你了，亲爱的妹妹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Disappointing that it went straight to DVD.
elements.text_zh: 可惜没上院线，只发了DVD。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Yes. Thank you, sweetie.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，谢谢你啊，小甜心。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I have to run. Meeting someone for drinks.
elements.text_zh: 我得走了。还有人约我喝一杯呢。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: We need to hook up later, Archer darling.
elements.text_zh: 回头我们再约，Archer，亲爱的。

elements.text_en: Raven leaves.
elements.text_zh: Raven离开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thank God, she’s gone.
elements.text_zh: 谢天谢地，她终于走了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Raven is an interesting woman.
elements.text_zh: Raven……挺有趣的女人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s one of a kind.
elements.text_zh: “有趣”是个挺礼貌的说法。她的确是“独一款”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The world couldn’t survive another.
elements.text_zh: 但凡再多一个她，世界恐怕都要崩坏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you do in the real world?
elements.text_zh: 对啦，您做什么工作的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Trauma surgeon for emergency cases
elements.text_zh: 急诊创伤外科医生，专门处理突发重症。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. That sounds stressful.
elements.text_zh: 哇，听起来压力很大。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s challenging. I’ve got to stay detached.
elements.text_zh: 的确很有挑战，所以我必须保持情感抽离。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you mean?
elements.text_zh: 情感抽离？怎么说？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I can’t focus on them as people, not while they’re on the table.
elements.text_zh: 我不能把病人当“人”看。至少在手术台上不行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Handsome and smart. But a cold-hearted robot.
elements.text_zh: 人长得帅、脑子好使……但像个冷血机器人。

elements.text_en: A puppy tumbles onto the observation deck and bolts toward them.
elements.text_zh: 一只小狗跌跌撞撞冲上观景台，直奔他们而来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How did you get up those stairs? You lost, buddy?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么爬上来的？迷路啦，小家伙？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He sure likes you.
elements.text_zh: 它也太黏我了吧。

elements.text_en: The puppy circles around her feet, his big eyes gazing up at Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 小狗绕着她的脚边转圈，圆眼睛一眨不眨地盯着 Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You think so? He is so cute.
elements.text_zh: 你觉得吗？他太可爱了。

elements.text_en: The puppy gently licks Roxie’s ankles. Roxie squats down.
elements.text_zh: 小狗亲昵地蹭到她脚踝边，Roxie下意识蹲下身。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why you doing that?
elements.text_zh: 你这是干嘛呀？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: He’s giving you puppy kisses. Like they give their mommas.
elements.text_zh: 它在跟你“打招呼”呢。小狗对信任的人都这样。

elements.text_en: The puppy rolls over, and Roxie rubs his belly.
elements.text_zh: 小狗翻了个身，Roxie顺手给它挠了挠肚皮。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Shadow loved to get a belly rub.
elements.text_zh: Shadow以前最爱别人挠肚皮。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Shadow?
elements.text_zh: Shadow？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Guess I was five when we got Shadow.
elements.text_zh: 我五岁那年家里养的，就叫 Shadow。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: He died when I was in high school.
elements.text_zh: 我上高中时它走了。

elements.text_en: Found him dead on a pile of my dirty laundry.
elements.text_zh: 后来我在一堆脏衣服上发现了它。

elements.text_en: Vet said he lay there to die because of my scent.
elements.text_zh: 兽医说，它可能是闻着我的味道，才躺在那儿不肯走。

elements.text_en: Archers eyes were glassy with tears with the memory of Shadow.
elements.text_zh: 回忆涌上来，Archer眼眶微红。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Broke my heart. Kind of silly. Just a dog, right?
elements.text_zh: 我当时心都碎了。说出来挺可笑的……就一只狗，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not silly. Not at all.
elements.text_zh: 一点都不可笑。真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not such a cold soul.
elements.text_zh: 他也没那么冷血嘛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He wasn’t at the party. I can trust him.
elements.text_zh: 而且他昨晚不在派对现场……至少他可信。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Hey, little one, have a snack!
elements.text_zh: 嘿，小家伙，吃点零食！

elements.text_en: Archer tossed a chicken strip, and the puppy ran off to a corner and chewed it intently.
elements.text_zh: Archer丢过去一条鸡肉条，小狗叼着跑到角落，埋头啃得特别认真。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer continue talking.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Archer继续聊着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Something personal is troubling me.
elements.text_zh: 有件私事一直困扰着我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: As a doctor, you might have an idea.
elements.text_zh: 你是医生，也许能给点建议。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You can trust me to keep it to myself.
elements.text_zh: 你放心，我会替你保密。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The party before you were here. I got a drink from the bar.
elements.text_zh: 在你来岛之前有一场派对，我在吧台点了一杯酒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Mingled a while and put my drink on a table.
elements.text_zh: 我四处转了转，把酒搁桌上了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Went to the ladies’ room and retrieved my drink.
elements.text_zh: 去了趟洗手间，才拿回了我那杯酒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s the last thing I remember.
elements.text_zh: 那就是我最后的记忆了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m very careful when I drink. I know how much is safe.
elements.text_zh: 我喝酒一直很小心，自己能喝多少我很清楚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I watched the bartender mix it in a big pink tumbler.
elements.text_zh: 我亲眼看着调酒师用一个粉红色的大杯子给我调的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re worried someone drugged your drink.
elements.text_zh: 你担心有人趁你去洗手间时，给你杯子“加了料”。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: While you were in the ladies’ room.
elements.text_zh: 就在那几分钟里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. Some drugs can do this, right?
elements.text_zh: 对……有些东西会让人直接断片，对吧？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Definitely
elements.text_zh: 会的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: There might be another explanation.
elements.text_zh: 但也可能有别的原因。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Could you have picked up the wrong drink off the table?
elements.text_zh: 你会不会……拿错了杯子？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Same cocktail in same color tumbler. A lot more alcohol.
elements.text_zh: 同样的鸡尾酒、同样的粉杯子，但那杯酒精度更高。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah,There were a lot of those pink ones on the table.
elements.text_zh: 有可能……当时桌上粉色杯子确实一堆。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That makes sense. I was getting worried.
elements.text_zh: 这样就说得通了。我之前还担心是有人故意下药。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. I feel much better. You saved me.
elements.text_zh: 哇，一下感觉好多了。多亏了你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Every man dreams of saving a beautiful princess.
elements.text_zh: 男人都爱解救美丽的公主。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Princess, again? Is this how they all think?
elements.text_zh: 又来“公主”这套？男人都这么想的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who did I end up in bed with after the party?
elements.text_zh: 那派对之后……我最后到底跟谁回的房间？

elements.text_en: Roxie walked alone by the shore. Piano drifted from the bar on the damp breeze.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一个人沿着海边走。吧台那边传来断断续续的钢琴声，海风把酒吧的味道也吹了过来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Small gin and tonic. Light on the gin and with extra lime, please.
elements.text_zh: 来杯金汤力，金酒少点，青柠多加。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Looks like you’ve had a... special day?
elements.text_zh: 看起来……你今天挺“精彩”的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: An up-and-down day I'd say.
elements.text_zh: 大起大落吧。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: We bartenders are professional listeners.
elements.text_zh: 我们当酒保的，最擅长听人吐槽。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: If you care to share your woes.
elements.text_zh: 你要愿意说，我就当你的树洞。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not sure you would get it.
elements.text_zh: 我怕你听不懂。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Let me guess. It involves at least one man.
elements.text_zh: 我猜猜——至少跟一个男人有关？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're lowballing. It’s definitely more than just one.
elements.text_zh: 你这猜得也太保守了。不止一个。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: It makes sense though, you're gorgeous.
elements.text_zh: 也正常，毕竟你这么好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, you seem better suited as a host than a bartender.
elements.text_zh: 你更像主持人，不像酒保。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Ain’t that the truth.
elements.text_zh: 这话我爱听。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sure you wanna hear this mess?
elements.text_zh: 你确定要听这摊烂事？

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Messy stories make the best company.
elements.text_zh: 乱糟糟的故事，最能拉近人心。

502001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台特写-story4_2

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Honestly, it's been… hard to describe.
elements.text_zh: 其实今天是很难描述的一天。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Let it out. You'll feel better.
elements.text_zh: 说出来就舒服了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright. I’ll try.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我试试。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Somehow I became the lead in a trashy drama I never signed up for.
elements.text_zh: 我莫名其妙成了某部狗血剧的女主，关键我根本没签这剧本。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: One played hero, the other gave a speech no one asked for.
elements.text_zh: 一个忙着演英雄，一个在那儿自说自话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then came another man telling me what’s what.
elements.text_zh: 然后又来一个男人，站我面前指点江山。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fair’s fair—someone did listen, gently.
elements.text_zh: 平心而论，确实有人挺温柔地听我说话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But there’s someone stirring the pot with her fake sweetness.
elements.text_zh: 但还有个死绿茶，装出一副甜腻模样，在背后煽风点火。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So yeah, mood swinging up and down—I don’t even know how to rate it.
elements.text_zh: 所以我现在情绪上上下下的……我自己都不知道该怎么给这一天打分。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Haha, in romantic Wahalo, maybe this is just the beginning.
elements.text_zh: 哈，恋爱综艺嘛——这可能才刚开场。

elements.text_en: The final note melted into the spotlight. The musician looked up, his eyes drawn to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 最后一个音符在光束里轻轻落地。乐手抬眼时，目光穿过人群落在 Roxie 身上，起身朝她走来。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Lots more fish in the sea. Handsome guy incoming.
elements.text_zh: 海里还有一堆好鱼呢。看，这不就来了一个帅哥么。

elements.text_en: Curious, Roxie glanced where the bartender pointed.
elements.text_zh: Roxie顺着Milo指的方向看过去。

elements.text_en: Mind if I have a seat?
elements.text_zh: 我可以坐这儿吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry. Not in the mood.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我现在没心情。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Easy there. I’m just here for a drink, not looking to start anything.
elements.text_zh: 别紧张。我就来喝一杯，不是来找事的。

503001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台特写-story4_3

elements.text_en: Orwell sits down beside Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Orwell在Roxie旁边坐下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fine.
elements.text_zh: ……行吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I'm Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 我是Orwell。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Roxie. Earlier… I wasn’t in the best mood, sorry.
elements.text_zh: Roxie。刚才……我心情不太好，抱歉。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Ha, aren’t we supposed to be just meeting now?
elements.text_zh: 哈，我们不是“现在才刚认识”吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Last night, earlier today... let it go. Time to start fresh.
elements.text_zh: 昨晚也好、今天早些时候也好——都翻篇。重新开始。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Alright. You don’t quite seem like a contestant.
elements.text_zh: ……好。不过你看起来不像参赛选手。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Oh? And why’s that?
elements.text_zh: 哦？为什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The vibe? You don’t feel like you’re chasing cash, love, fame, or endless soda.
elements.text_zh: 感觉不对。你不像冲着钱、恋爱、名气……或者无限续杯汽水来的那种。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, which type are you?
elements.text_zh: 所以，你是属于哪一类？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I belong to the “just here for fun” type?
elements.text_zh: 我属于“只想找点乐子”这一类？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ll go with the show’s scripts and rules. Just don't direct my delivery.
elements.text_zh: 我会配合节目组的规则去演，但具体怎么表达那就是我的事了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Rules? I’ll follow rules like code—only until I break them.
elements.text_zh: 至于规则嘛，我会尝试解构规则，然后……打破规则。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I knew it! You’re not here to play. You’re here to watch us play.
elements.text_zh: 我就知道！你不是来参与的，你是来“看戏”的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You like peeling back layers, huh?
elements.text_zh: 你喜欢揭人老底，是吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Knew it—you’re no contestant.
elements.text_zh: 你果然不是选手。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Ha, not exactly. A part-time job, kind of like yours.
elements.text_zh: 哈，也不算。算份兼职吧，跟你差不多。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So you’re staff then?
elements.text_zh: 那你是工作人员？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Not really. Just a guy with a guitar and some seriously questionable beachwear.
elements.text_zh: 不算吧。可以当我是个抱着吉他，一身离谱沙滩装的普通人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So, what do you think of this show?
elements.text_zh: 那你怎么看这个节目？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Honestly, I’m kinda nervous.
elements.text_zh: 说实话，我有点紧张。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Why?
elements.text_zh: 为什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Strangers being forced to show skin, fake romances…
elements.text_zh: 好多陌生人啊，还得强行秀身体，硬炒感情线……

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A chance for erotic encounters.
elements.text_zh: 顺便制造点暧昧火花的机会。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You don’t like sex?
elements.text_zh: 你不喜欢这种“亲密话题”？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Relax. You’re wound way too tight.
elements.text_zh: 放松点。你绷太紧了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I enjoy sex—but only on my terms.
elements.text_zh: 我不是不接受亲密，只是得按我的节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not under pressure with cameras everywhere.
elements.text_zh: 不是到处都是镜头、还被人推着走那种。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Not the way I’d look at it. It just makes things harder on you.
elements.text_zh: 我不这么看。只是镜头在，会让你更难受。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Think of yourself as an actress, performing your role.
elements.text_zh: 你把自己当演员——在演一个角色。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: In front of the camera, chasing that big paycheck.
elements.text_zh: 镜头前，冲着那笔奖金去演。

505001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台左边-story4_5

elements.text_en: Orwell gives a faint smile, leans back with ease. His fingertips give a soft tap against the edge of the table.
elements.text_zh: Orwell淡淡一笑，往后靠了靠，手指轻轻敲着桌沿。

elements.text_en: Yeah, I want to win the money. I’ve got my reasons.
elements.text_zh: 没错，我非常想拿这笔奖金。我有我的理由。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pretend I’m an actress playing a role? I can’t do that.
elements.text_zh: 为此要装成个演员？说真的……真挺难的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe Raven fits this place better than I ever could.
elements.text_zh: 也许Raven比我更适合这种地方。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Moral hangup if people show some skin on TV?
elements.text_zh: 你是介意上电视“穿得少”这事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I enjoy a show with some steamy scenes.
elements.text_zh: 我不是不能看尺度大点的桥段。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If done with style. I don’t think badly of the actors.
elements.text_zh: 有质感的那种，我也尊重演员。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Imagine you’re acting on this show.
elements.text_zh: 那就把自己当在这节目里演戏。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Keep that part of you, especially on camera.
elements.text_zh: 把你真实那一面留着——尤其在镜头前。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: There’s real value in that kind of honesty—more than any pretense.
elements.text_zh: 那种真，比硬装出来的强多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: In what kind of honesty？
elements.text_zh: 你说的“真”，是哪种？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Like I could show the full package right here.
elements.text_zh: 比如我现在就能把节目效果拉满。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You mean... you’d strip down, here at the bar?
elements.text_zh: 你是说……就在吧台这儿“来真的”？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ve got no problem stripping down on camera.
elements.text_zh: 镜头前我不介意“减衣服”。

506001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-吧台左边-story4_6

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Of course, they will cut it out.
elements.text_zh: 当然，播不播出去是他们的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re serious, aren’t you.
elements.text_zh: 你认真的？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I'll give them EXACTLY what they want.
elements.text_zh: 他们想看什么，我就给什么。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Rule number one for a musician—stay unchained. Who cares what they think?
elements.text_zh: 音乐人第一条：别被拴住。别人怎么想，关我什么事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Feels like you’ve got a bit more going on—mysterious, and...
elements.text_zh: 你这人……不止是“随性”。还有点神秘。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: And a bit laid-back too, huh?
elements.text_zh: 还有点松弛，是吧？

elements.text_en: A couple arrives at the bar.
elements.text_zh: 一对男女走进吧台。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Well, well. Looks like you know these two?
elements.text_zh: 哟——看样子你认识他们？

507001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-左边区域-story4_7

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Relax. Your face is saying everything.
elements.text_zh: 别那么明显，你表情都写脸上了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You picked a good spot. Not easy for them to see us here.
elements.text_zh: 你坐的位置选得好，他们不容易注意到我们。

elements.text_en: Roxie lifts her head slightly to sneak a glance at them.
elements.text_zh: Roxie微微抬头，偷瞄了那对男女一眼。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sure no one's watching us here?
elements.text_zh: 确定他们看不到这里是吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Positive. But you’ll need to keep your head down.
elements.text_zh: 确定，但你得保持这个低头的姿势。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fine.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。

elements.text_en: She rests her head on the counter, staring blankly at her drink.
elements.text_zh: Roxie低头趴在桌面上，眼睛无神的盯着酒杯发呆。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You avoiding that girl?
elements.text_zh: 你在躲那女孩？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I know her. She’s the new addition.
elements.text_zh: 我知道她，刚加入的一个新人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know her better. Her name’s Raven.
elements.text_zh: 我比你更认识。她叫Raven。

elements.text_en: Orwell watches the couple with an amused smile.
elements.text_zh: Orwell看着那对男女，嘴角带着点看戏的笑。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Huh. Now that’s interesting.
elements.text_zh: 嗯……这就有意思了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You think it's nteresting?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得有意思？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You got it wrong. I'm profiling your enemy for you.
elements.text_zh: 你误会了，我在帮你分析敌人。

508001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-左边区域-story4_8

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I mean. That complicated look she gave you.
elements.text_zh: 我的意思是，她刚看你的眼神很复杂。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: In this place, people are either your friends or your enemies.
elements.text_zh: 在这地方，不是朋友，就是对手。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Of course, don’t count me in that.
elements.text_zh: 当然，不用把我考虑在内。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So you're an expert now? Go on then. Break it down for me.
elements.text_zh: 行，那你这“专家”继续。给我分析分析。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: See how she's playing him. Flipping her hair.
elements.text_zh: 你看她怎么拿捏他：甩头发、装无辜。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Fingering the rim of the glass. Licking her lips.
elements.text_zh: 手指绕着杯口打转……还故意抿了下唇。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She's playing a part.
elements.text_zh: 她在演戏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cameras aren't here. What's she up to?
elements.text_zh: 又没镜头，她演给谁看？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Not sure. Manipulating him for some leverage?
elements.text_zh: 不好说。也许是想拿他当筹码？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Something is off about him.
elements.text_zh: 另外，那男的也不对劲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What you seeing?
elements.text_zh: 你看出什么了？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Wearing nice clothes. Look at his shoes.
elements.text_zh: 衣服倒是讲究——但你看他的鞋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cheap and scuffed up... tsk tsk.
elements.text_zh: 便宜货，还磨得挺旧……啧。

elements.text_en: Raven chats with Foley.
elements.text_zh: Raven 正在和 Foley 调情搭话。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I didn’t think you’d actually say yes to my invite.
elements.text_zh: 真没想到你会答应我的邀约。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Who could say no to such a charming man?
elements.text_zh: 谁会拒绝一位这么有魅力的男士呢？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: That's a nice dress. You wear it well.
elements.text_zh: 这裙子真好看，你穿得太合适了。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Shows enough. Leaves a little for the imagination.
elements.text_zh: 露得刚刚好，还留点想象。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Men like nice packaging.
elements.text_zh: 男人喜欢好看的皮囊。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I like men with nice packages.
elements.text_zh: 而我喜欢的男人，穿得体面是基本的，关键是“那儿”也得拿得出手。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Let’s go to your room. Special parcel delivery.
elements.text_zh: 走吧，去你房间。今晚送你专属“大礼包”。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Slow down. We haven't finished our drinks.
elements.text_zh: 慢点，酒还没喝完呢。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Anticipation is a great aphrodisiac.
elements.text_zh: “期待感”是最好的催情剂。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Tell me something about you.
elements.text_zh: 说说你吧。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Professional life? Leisure time? Maybe a boat.
elements.text_zh: 主业？副业？……家里有船吗？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Let's talk about you. I know you're an actress.
elements.text_zh: 我们还是聊聊你吧。我知道你是演员。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Any movies in the works?
elements.text_zh: 最近有接戏吗？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I'm getting scripts. Nothing looks quite right.
elements.text_zh: 在看一些剧本，但都差点意思。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I get the feeling someone’s watching us.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么觉得有人在偷看我们？

elements.text_en: Raven glances around, spotting nothing unusual.
elements.text_zh: Raven 环顾一圈，没发现异常。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I'm not surprised! You have no idea how eye-catching you are.
elements.text_zh: 很正常啊！你不知道自己有多耀眼吗？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Thanks for the compliment, but…
elements.text_zh: 感谢你的恭维，不过……

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: There’s a lot of money on the line.
elements.text_zh: 这节目里可牵扯着不少钱。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Who knows what some people might do.
elements.text_zh: 为了它，有些人什么都干得出来。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Especially today. I ran into that awful woman more than once.
elements.text_zh: 尤其是今天，三番两次遇到那个最恶心的女人。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Forget her. Let’s go back to what we were talking about...
elements.text_zh: 算了，不提她了。咱们继续刚才的话题……

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: So... what do you do for a living?
elements.text_zh: 所以……你到底做什么的？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I... Oh, your phone’s going off.
elements.text_zh: 我……咦，你手机响了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: It's probably the showrunners. One sec, let me check it.
elements.text_zh: 多半是节目组。我看一眼。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Whoa! Tonight’s challenge is massage pairing!
elements.text_zh: 哇——今晚挑战是“按摩配对”！

elements.text_en: Raven and Foley talk after message arrives.
elements.text_zh: Raven与Foley在收到配对信息后交谈。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: And we’ll be on camera for it? Perfect.
elements.text_zh: 还要上镜？正好。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Time to show them who's the sexiest one here.
elements.text_zh: 让他们看看，谁才是这里最撩人的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Maybe a happy ending for my partner.
elements.text_zh: 说不定我的搭档还在期待能来个“圆满收场”。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Off camera. If he’s a good boy.
elements.text_zh: 如果他够乖的话——镜头外也不是不能给他机会。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: You're getting a little loud.
elements.text_zh: 你声音有点大了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I don't care, let them listen.
elements.text_zh: 无所谓，谁想听就听去吧。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You're disappointed by the interruption, aren't you?
elements.text_zh: 刚才话题被打断了……是不是有点扫兴？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Will hook up another time.
elements.text_zh: 我们可以改天再约嘛。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: What challenge did you get?
elements.text_zh: 节目组给你发的什么挑战任务啊？

512001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_12

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I didn't check.
elements.text_zh: 我没看。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Take a look at your mobile.
elements.text_zh: 拿手机出来看看。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Actually… I’m not a contestant. I’m a sound guy.
elements.text_zh: 其实……我不是嘉宾。我是收音的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: A member of the crew.
elements.text_zh: 原来是工作人员。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Trying to score with me.
elements.text_zh: 还敢来撩我。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Well, you are handsome. Maybe another night.
elements.text_zh: 行吧，你确实挺帅。改天再说。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Ciao, darling.
elements.text_zh: 拜拜啦，亲爱的～

513001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_13

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Guy is a poser. Trying to get her in the sack.
elements.text_zh: 这男的装得一套一套的，就想把她哄...

elements.text_en: Mobile message arrives.
elements.text_zh: 手机消息弹了出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I also got word that I'm filming tonight. Massage pairing.
elements.text_zh: 我也收到通知：今晚要拍“按摩配对”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait, tonight? That came out of nowhere!
elements.text_zh: 今晚？也太突然了吧！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I'm not prepared at all for this!
elements.text_zh: 我一点准备都没有！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Chill out.
elements.text_zh: 冷静点。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Who are you paired with?
elements.text_zh: 你跟谁一组？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance, the footballer.
elements.text_zh: Lance，那个橄榄球手。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Right, I remember him. He seems decent.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，有印象，感觉人还不错。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A kid from a solid, well-off home.
elements.text_zh: 家里也比较有钱。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You two gotta play it smarter.
elements.text_zh: 你俩搭档，要讲点技巧。

514001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_14

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not to complain, but a massage labeled “abstinence”? Seriously?!
elements.text_zh: 我不是挑刺啊，但叫“禁欲按摩”？认真的？！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Oh? What did you expect? A guessing game in a dating show?
elements.text_zh: 不然呢？恋综还能陪你玩猜谜？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But don’t you think they are way too controlling?
elements.text_zh: 可这也管得太死了吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Makes sense. People want to watch it, so they shoot it.
elements.text_zh: 正常。观众爱看，节目就这么拍。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Including me—we’re just rats in a cage after all.
elements.text_zh: 包括我在内——我们都是笼子里的小白鼠。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We’re being studied for the audience’s pleasure.
elements.text_zh: 给观众当观察样本，供他们取乐。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ok, if you really believe all that, then why are you here?
elements.text_zh: 那你既然这么想，干嘛还来？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I get bored sometimes, and it’s kind of fun to shake things up from the inside.
elements.text_zh: 我也会无聊嘛。从里面搅一搅，还挺好玩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, any insider tip?
elements.text_zh: 要不要听个内幕小技巧？

elements.name: Orwell
