elements.text_en: They didn’t tell us this, but the audience’s opinion on the show is very important.
elements.text_zh: 节目组没明说，但观众的反应对结果很重要。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You have to give them what they want to see in order to win.
elements.text_zh: 想赢，就得给他们想看的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And what exactly do they want to see?
elements.text_zh: 那他们到底想看什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It’s impossible to know for sure, though. Audiences are very fickle these days.
elements.text_zh: 说不准。现在观众翻脸比翻书快。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And that’s your idea of advice?!
elements.text_zh: 你这算哪门子建议？！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: But one thing’s clear. The audience craves tension, something sharp and electric.
elements.text_zh: 但有一点确定：他们要张力，要那种一触即燃的劲儿。

515001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_15

elements.text_en: Orwell shoots her a sly wink as their conversation rolls on.
elements.text_zh: Orwell 狡黠地眨眨眼，话题还在继续。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hadn’t thought through a strategy. Not like you have.
elements.text_zh: 我还真没想过要做策略……不像你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Explain this acting scheme to me.
elements.text_zh: 你说的“演法”，给我讲清楚。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You sure? I tend to push the boundaries a bit.
elements.text_zh: 确定？我这人挺爱踩线的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you’re ready to strip at the bar, what else could shock me?
elements.text_zh: 你都敢在吧台那么放开了，还有什么能吓到我？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hope you don’t take offense.
elements.text_zh: 别介意。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pretend we’re paired tonight.
elements.text_zh: 假设我们今晚一组。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You have to give me a massage.
elements.text_zh: 你得给我按摩。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: OK. We could script it like this.
elements.text_zh: 行，那就这么写：

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You're lying on your stomach, wearing a sexy thong.
elements.text_zh: 你趴着，穿着很清凉的细带泳裤。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Towel draped over your lower back.
elements.text_zh: 腰上搭一条浴巾。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Anyone watching would think you’re naked.
elements.text_zh: 镜头里看起来就像没穿一样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I start with a slow, deep rub of your calf muscles.
elements.text_zh: 我先从小腿开始，慢慢按，力道压下去。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Move up to the thighs. Slowly, higher and higher.
elements.text_zh: 再往上到大腿，越按越靠近——一点点往上。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Then I yank the towel off.
elements.text_zh: 然后我一把掀开浴巾。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Big “woah” from the crowd.
elements.text_zh: 观众立刻一片“哇哦”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Some disappointed. Some smiling.
elements.text_zh: 有人失望，有人偷笑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey. I’m not okay with that. They won’t show it.
elements.text_zh: 喂，我不接受。他们也不会播这种。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just remember. You’re playing a part.
elements.text_zh: 记住，你是在演一个角色。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: But let’s be honest, a thong covers almost nothing.
elements.text_zh: 但说实话，那种泳裤……遮不了多少。

516001.useageDescription: 夜晚沙滩酒吧-右边区域-story4_16

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m working your lower back.
elements.text_zh: 我按你的后腰。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Then a soft spank on your buns.
elements.text_zh: 然后在臀部轻轻拍一下。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You softly moan. Again, baby.
elements.text_zh: 你低低喘一声：再来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way!
elements.text_zh: 想都别想！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: This is when shows throw in some spicy drama or viewers will click away.
elements.text_zh: 节目就爱在这儿加点“辣”，不然观众就划走了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t do it.
elements.text_zh: 我做不到。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Alright, I’ll shut up. I respect that, and I feel for you.
elements.text_zh: 行，我闭嘴。我尊重你，也理解你。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You won’t play the role they gave you?
elements.text_zh: 你不演他们给你的那套？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So they’ll turn your real reactions into the story.
elements.text_zh: 那他们就会把你的真实反应写进剧情。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Either way, you’re on the show. The question is: who’s writing your scenes.
elements.text_zh: 反正你已经上节目了。问题是：谁来写你的戏。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Tough way to go after the money.
elements.text_zh: 想靠奖金走这条路，可不轻松。

elements.text_en: Thanks, coach. But I guess this is goodbye.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，教练。但看来……就到这儿了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Anyway, I have a boat to catch. Good luck Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我得赶船了。祝你好运，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Boat? Leave the island that freely?
elements.text_zh: 船？你可以随便离岛？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: See ya later.
elements.text_zh: 回头见。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Lance arrives in the same villa bedroom for the massage challenge.
elements.text_zh: 为按摩挑战，Roxie 和 Lance 被安排进同一间别墅卧室。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We meet again, hero on the beach. Haha.
elements.text_zh: 又见面了。沙滩英雄。哈哈。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ouch, guess I’ll take that as a compliment.
elements.text_zh: 啊哟！我当你这是在夸我哈。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Well, I swung by production earlier… made sure we’d get paired up.
elements.text_zh: 话说，我晚上去了趟节目组，指定了搭档。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? That’s straight-up shady.
elements.text_zh: 啊？这算是搞黑幕了吧。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ha, having some name recognition comes with perks.
elements.text_zh: 哈哈，毕竟有点小名气嘛，多少有点福利。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait, the cameras aren’t here?
elements.text_zh: 等等，摄像机还没来？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: They’ll come when we’re ready.
elements.text_zh: 等我们准备好了他们才进。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s good.
elements.text_zh: 那就好。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I want to apologize for the buffet incident.
elements.text_zh: 我想为自助餐那事道个歉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re apologizing to me? Seriously?
elements.text_zh: 你跟我道歉？认真的？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I thought you were being bullied.
elements.text_zh: 我当时以为你被人欺负了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Later I realized you could handle yourself.
elements.text_zh: 后来才反应过来，你根本不用我插手。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe I overreacted.
elements.text_zh: 可能我也反应过头了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Honestly…I’m glad you said that.
elements.text_zh: 说真的……你这么说，我挺开心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, here’s to teaming up again tonight.
elements.text_zh: 那今晚继续搭档。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah.I’ll make sure to keep giving you…my full services.
elements.text_zh: 嗯。我保证——今晚我会让你体验一次“全程到位”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was nervous about body painting, but it was fun.
elements.text_zh: 我本来对人体彩绘挺紧张的，结果还挺好玩。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I had a good time.
elements.text_zh: 我也玩得很开心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No just having a good time. I’d say you nearly popped a seam of your trunks.
elements.text_zh: 开心？不止开心吧——我差点把你那条泳裤的线都绷断了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, yeah—whatever makes you happy.
elements.text_zh: 嗯嗯，随你。你开心就行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: When I painted around your bikini top...
elements.text_zh: 我给你比基尼上衣边缘那圈上色的时候……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright, stop. New topic.
elements.text_zh: 行了，打住。换个话题。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Fine, serious talk then.
elements.text_zh: 好，那就认真聊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We’ve both been sweating all day, and with that massage coming up...
elements.text_zh: 我们今天一整天都在出汗——再加上待会儿还有按摩环节……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We should clean up first.
elements.text_zh: 我们得先收拾一下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The crew said we can take our time. If we wanna hit the shower.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员说不着急，要冲澡的话慢慢来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, it wouldn't hurt to rinse off.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，冲一冲也没坏处。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You wash my back, I’ll wash your front?
elements.text_zh: 你帮我冲后背，我帮你...

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Showering together is efficient.
elements.text_zh: 一起冲更省事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re teasing me. Aren’t you?
elements.text_zh: 你是在逗我吧？对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you really think we would shower together?
elements.text_zh: 你不会真以为我们要一起洗吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep dreaming.
elements.text_zh: 想得美。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Conserve water. A sacrifice for the planet.
elements.text_zh: 节约用水嘛，为地球做点贡献。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I bet you’ve done it before.
elements.text_zh: 我猜你以前肯定这么干过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Privacy, please.
elements.text_zh: 拜托这是个人隐私好吗。

elements.text_en: Hey! You peeking through the privacy screen?
elements.text_zh: 喂！你在隔着隐私挡板偷看吗？

elements.text_en: Yeah, yeah, I’ve been watching. And practically drooling, okay?
elements.text_zh: 是是是，我在看。差点看入迷了，行了吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What he's being so smug about?
elements.text_zh: 他到底在得意什么啊？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Still… Lance’s body? It's unreal.
elements.text_zh: 但……Lance 的身材也太犯规了吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Such broad shoulders and tan skin.
elements.text_zh: 肩那么宽，皮肤还晒得很健康……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Those abs… that tight ass…
elements.text_zh: 腹肌……还有那条紧实的臀线……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. Stop it. Re-focus.
elements.text_zh: 不行。停。收回去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gotta think of something else, now!
elements.text_zh: 现在立刻想点别的！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Like, who the hell was actually in my bed last night?
elements.text_zh: 比如……昨晚到底是谁？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer—impossible, but honestly, I kinda wish it was him…
elements.text_zh: Archer——不可能，但说真的，我居然希望是他……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance—if it really was him, I wouldn’t complain.
elements.text_zh: Lance——如果真是他……我也不亏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Orwell… yeah. But what does he even do, anyway?
elements.text_zh: Orwell……嗯。可他到底是干嘛的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And then… Ugh. That Corbin. Just thinking about him pisses me off.
elements.text_zh: 还有……啧，Corbin。光想起他我就火大。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It could be anyone else but him. Please, not him.
elements.text_zh: 谁都行，就是别是他。求你了，别是他。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh right, and Raven girl. Gotta watch out for her.
elements.text_zh: 对了，还有 Raven……得防着点她。

elements.text_en: I’m done. The shower is all yours.
elements.text_zh: 我洗完了。轮到你了。

elements.text_en: Roxie finishes her shower, and the cameraman and soundman finish setting up in the corner.
elements.text_zh: Roxie洗完澡出来，摄像师和收音师也在角落把设备架好了。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: We’re set. Pretend we aren’t even here.
elements.text_zh: 都准备好了，当我们不存在就行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s stupid. I’m in a bedroom with three men.
elements.text_zh: 这建议也太蠢了吧。我现在是跟三个男人在一个卧室。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: One I barely know and two strangers.
elements.text_zh: 一个也就算半熟，另外两个还是陌生人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And a camera and boom mic aimed at me. Any more useless advice?
elements.text_zh: 还有摄像机和收音麦正对着我。还有比无视你们更没用的建议吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He’s just doing his job.
elements.text_zh: 这是他工作嘛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That doesn’t make it better. Sorry for snapping at you.
elements.text_zh: 那也不能说明这事就合理了。刚才我语气冲了点，不是针对你们，抱歉。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: No problemo. You two ready to roll the camera?
elements.text_zh: 没关系。那我们现在可以开拍了吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Let’s get this show on the road.
elements.text_zh: 来吧，开工。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait! What if I want you to stop shooting?
elements.text_zh: 等等——要是我想让你们停拍呢？

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: You say stop. We stop immediately.
elements.text_zh: 你说停，我们立刻停。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: Our orders are crystal clear. Legal thing. I think.
elements.text_zh: 我们规矩写得很清楚，我想起码是合法合规的。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: The producers might show the clip on TV.
elements.text_zh: 不过制作组可能还是会把刚才那段播出去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That would look bad to the audience.
elements.text_zh: 那个播出来，观众可不一定喜欢。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Don’t do that, Roxie. Enjoy it. Like body painting.
elements.text_zh: 别叫停吧，Roxie。你就当是，享受这个过程，就像之前泳装彩绘一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. Roll the cameras.
elements.text_zh: ……好吧。开拍。

elements.text_en: Lance lies down on his back.
elements.text_zh: Lance趴下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m thinking chest or stomach to start.
elements.text_zh: 我在想……从胸口还是肚子开始？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Worked magic for body painting.
elements.text_zh: 人体彩绘那次，这招效果就很可以。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s start like a proper massage. Lying on your stomach.
elements.text_zh: 别想太多，按按摩的流程来——先趴着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m pretty good at this. Neck and back, first.
elements.text_zh: 我挺会这个的。先从脖子和背开始。

elements.text_en: Lance turns over.
elements.text_zh: Lance翻过身。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sounds like a plan.
elements.text_zh: 听起来靠谱。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh Wow. You are good at this.
elements.text_zh: 哇，你真有两下子。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: My neck feels great.
elements.text_zh: 我脖子一下就舒服了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Now the lower back and the glutes.
elements.text_zh: 下面该到下背和臀部了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Goodness. Buns of steel.
elements.text_zh: 天……这也太结实了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: A little harder. Yeah. That feels good.
elements.text_zh: 再用力点……对，就那儿。舒服。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t lose control.
elements.text_zh: 稳住，别失控。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That’s the spot! Yeah, keep going.
elements.text_zh: 对，就是那儿！别停。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Time to turn over.
elements.text_zh: 行了……该翻面了。

elements.text_en: Lance hesitates before turning over.
elements.text_zh: Lance翻身前犹豫了一下。

elements.text_en: I’ve got a bit of a tent pole issue here.
elements.text_zh: 我这儿……出现了点尴尬的“小状况”。

elements.text_en: You catch my drift, buddy?
elements.text_zh: 你懂我意思吧，兄弟？

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: Don’t worry, pal. Producers will edit this bit out.
elements.text_zh: 别慌，老兄。这段我们会剪掉。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: I’ll adjust the shooting angle.
elements.text_zh: 我调整一下拍摄角度。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You really are standing tall.
elements.text_zh: 你这“反应”也太明显了……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What am I gonna do? This is getting embarrassing.
elements.text_zh: 怎么办……太尴尬了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep talking, don’t let the blush take over.
elements.text_zh: 继续说点别的，别让脸红露出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Even if the cameras shift, it’s still on display.
elements.text_zh: 镜头就算挪开……也还是很显眼啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Can't you just...
elements.text_zh: 你就不能……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Uh… maybe give it another minute. Bad timing.
elements.text_zh: 呃……再等一分钟吧，时机不太对。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Looks like you’re reacting too.
elements.text_zh: 看起来你也有点反应。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey! All of this will be edited out, right?
elements.text_zh: 喂！这些都会剪掉的，对吧？

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: Sure as shootin’. You can get back to it.
elements.text_zh: 包剪包剪。继续你们的就行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Shoulders and chest, next.
elements.text_zh: 接下来是肩膀和胸口。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nice muscle tone.
elements.text_zh: 这小子肌肉线条真不错。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Give it a soft pinch.
elements.text_zh: 轻轻捏一下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Do it again.
elements.text_zh: 再捏一次嘛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know this feeling. Careful, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我太熟这感觉了……把持住啊Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're on camera. Act like you’ve seen a man before.
elements.text_zh: 镜头在呢，别一副没见过男人的样子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Men are all the same. Remember?
elements.text_zh: 忘了吗？男人都是猪头肉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Slow down.
elements.text_zh: 放慢点。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why you letting up?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么突然松手了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Move on to my thighs, okay?
elements.text_zh: 换到我大腿那边，行吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. Upper legs next.
elements.text_zh: 嗯……好。接下来按大腿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cool down. Just like you’re playing a part.
elements.text_zh: 冷静，像在走流程一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh, his legs are so strong.
elements.text_zh: 他腿也太有劲了……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ohhh yeah. That’s it.
elements.text_zh: 对……就是这样。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Harder, but slower. Yes. Yes.
elements.text_zh: 再用力点，但慢一点。对，对。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I'm ready to do you. Give you a massage. Is what I meat to say.
elements.text_zh: 我也想“回敬”你一下——给你按摩的意思，别想歪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll take care of you first.
elements.text_zh: 我先给你按摩。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, time for the big switch.
elements.text_zh: 确实该到互换的环节了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay! I’m losing it!
elements.text_zh: 好吧……我快绷不住了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Go for it. Now.
elements.text_zh: 来吧。现在。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The camera!
elements.text_zh: 镜头！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Turn off the camera. Now!
elements.text_zh: 关掉镜头！立刻！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why?
elements.text_zh: 你干嘛？

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: We're off.
elements.text_zh: 已经关了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright! Get out, please.
elements.text_zh: 好，现在请你们出去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh? You mean… we can go further once the cameras are off?
elements.text_zh: 怎么？意思是……没有摄像机的情况下我俩继续？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: In your dreams!
elements.text_zh: 做梦。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You! All of you! Out, now!
elements.text_zh: 你们！所有人！现在就出去！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good night, everyone.
elements.text_zh: 各位晚安。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I need some peace.
elements.text_zh: 我需要休息。

elements.text_en: Roxie marches to the door and forces each person out one by one. Moments later, a knock—Lance again.
elements.text_zh: Roxie将所有人全部逐一推出房门，而门外很快传来Lance的敲门声。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who did I sleep with?
elements.text_zh: 昨晚……我到底和谁在一起？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t remember anything.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么一点都想不起来。

elements.text_en: Crash! There was a sudden thud as a football hit the tray carried by the waiter, knocking the orange juice into the air.
elements.text_zh: 砰！一只橄榄球猛地撞上服务生的托盘，闷响骤然炸开。

elements.name: Milo
elements.text_en: Lookout! Move!
elements.text_zh: 小心！快闪开！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What the hell happened? You saved me?
elements.text_zh: 喂！什么情况？你举着水壶想干嘛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You look familiar… Quarterback, right?
elements.text_zh: 你看着有点眼熟……四分卫，对吧？

elements.text_en: A hard body with the chiseled abs of a marble statue.
elements.text_zh: 结实的身躯，腹肌像大理石雕刻出来的一样分明。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You said the same thing last night.
elements.text_zh: 你昨晚也这么说过。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie. We had the get-to-know-you chat last night. Forget?
elements.text_zh: Roxie。昨晚我们还聊过，你忘了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don't let him know you don't remember. Ice him a bit.
elements.text_zh: 别让他看出来你断片了。先晾他一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I met a lot of people. Guess you didn’t impress me.
elements.text_zh: 昨晚见的人太多了。看来你没给我留下什么印象。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Seriously? Pro athlete, future restaurant owner.
elements.text_zh: 认真的？职业球员，未来的餐厅老板诶。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You were coming on to me. Some saucy suggestions.
elements.text_zh: 昨晚明明是你先撩我的，还说了些挺大胆的话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cool your jets, hotshot. I must have been flirting.
elements.text_zh: 放轻松，小帅哥。我可能是在调情吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Last night? Was it him?
elements.text_zh: 昨晚……会是他吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie alone, reflecting on her time on the island.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一个人待着，回想着自己在岛上的这段日子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. What a ride this has been.
elements.text_zh: 哇……这一路真是够跌宕的。

elements.text_en: A warm-hearted doctor arrives.
elements.text_zh: 一位温柔的医生走了过来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Looks like you are deep in thought. How you doing?
elements.text_zh: 看起来你在想事情。还好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m good. Thinking about recent ups and downs.
elements.text_zh: 我挺好的。就是在回味最近这些起起落落。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thought about walking away a few days ago.
elements.text_zh: 前几天我还认真想过要不要直接走人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Really? Still considering it?
elements.text_zh: 真的？现在还在考虑吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not sure, to be honest.
elements.text_zh: 说实话……我也不太确定。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I almost quit when I was doing my surgical residency.
elements.text_zh: 我做外科住院医的时候，也差点辞掉。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: First time a patient died during surgery. I was crushed.
elements.text_zh: 第一次遇到病人在手术中去世，我整个人都被击垮了。

elements.text_en: What got you through it?
elements.text_zh: 那你后来怎么撑过来的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The head of surgery talked to me.
elements.text_zh: 外科主任找我聊了一次。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Said he lost 27 patients in 19 years as a heart surgeon.
elements.text_zh: 他说，他做心外19年里，失去了27位病人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then he told me what kept him going.
elements.text_zh: 然后他告诉我，他靠什么继续往前。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The nearly 3000 lives he saved in that same time.
elements.text_zh: 同样的时间里，他也救回了将近3000条命。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not saving lives.
elements.text_zh: 可我又不是在救人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The attitude applies to everything.
elements.text_zh: 这个道理不只适用于“救人”。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Focus on the positives and not the setbacks.
elements.text_zh: 多看你做成了什么，别老盯着那些失败。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah! Your right. I always enjoy our talks.
elements.text_zh: 嗯！你说得对。我一直很喜欢跟你聊天。

elements.text_en: There are a lot of people here.
elements.text_zh: 这里人真多。

elements.text_en: We advertised it for the locals. Free drinks and snacks. Crew as well.
elements.text_zh: 我们也给本地人打了广告：免费饮料和小吃，工作人员也能来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I see a lot of tasty meat.
elements.text_zh: 我看到不少“鲜肉”。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Candy! Don’t be so crude.
elements.text_zh: 嘿！别这么粗俗。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Fine. There are a lot of hot dudes here. Right, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。这里有很多帅哥，对吧，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: For sure.
elements.text_zh: 当然。

elements.text_en: Check it out. Guy wearing the red man thong.
elements.text_zh: 看那个，穿红色男士丁字裤的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Oh my. I so wanted a banana this morning.
elements.text_zh: 哎呀。我今天早上还真想吃根香蕉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. Doesn’t leave much to the imagination.
elements.text_zh: 哇……真是一点想象空间都不给。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Bananas! Tikki bar last night at closing.
elements.text_zh: 香蕉！昨晚Tikki酒吧打烊的时候。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I asked Harley to leave a couple of bananas in a bowl.
elements.text_zh: 我让Harley在碗里留了几根香蕉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: A handsome local guy was there. It was just the two of us.
elements.text_zh: 有个帅气的本地男人在那儿。就我们俩。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He had been eyeballing me. I peeled a banana.
elements.text_zh: 他一直盯着我看。我剥了一根香蕉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I slowly ate it... inch by inch. Then . . .
elements.text_zh: 我慢慢地吃……一寸一寸地。然后……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Don’t tell me you had sex at the Tikki bar!
elements.text_zh: 别告诉我你在Tikki酒吧直接上床了！

elements.text_en: No. But I had quite the ride on the observation deck.
elements.text_zh: 没有。不过我在观景台那一趟可够刺激的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sex without any connection. Is it any good?
elements.text_zh: 没有任何情感连接的性爱，真的好吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: There’s always a connection. Doesn’t have to be forever.
elements.text_zh: 总会有点连接。不一定要天长地久。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Besides, it's good cardio.
elements.text_zh: 而且还挺当有氧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Girl. You are a trip.
elements.text_zh: 姐妹，你真是个活宝。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Maybe I could use a little more cardio.
elements.text_zh: 也许我也该多做点有氧。

elements.text_en: There’s Lance. That boy is sizzling hot.
elements.text_zh: 那是Lance。那小子简直火辣得发烫。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Saw some sparks during the body painting, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 身体彩绘的时候，我看你俩有火花呢，Roxie。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You never did say much about the massage.
elements.text_zh: 你倒是没怎么提按摩那段。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Not everybody shares as much as you.
elements.text_zh: 不是每个人都像你一样什么都往外说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance knows how to work it. Full body treatment.
elements.text_zh: 他很会。真正的全身护理。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Give us some details, sister.
elements.text_zh: 来点细节嘛，姐妹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just close your eyes and use your imagination.
elements.text_zh: 闭眼，自行脑补。别逼我说出口。

elements.text_en: That’s cold, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 你也太冷酷了吧，Roxie。

elements.text_en: Let me tell you how I would handle sweet Lance.
elements.text_zh: 我跟你说，要是换我来“拿捏”甜心Lance——

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: First, I would unleash the twin sisters. Let him get a good look.
elements.text_zh: 第一步，直接把“杀手锏”拉满，让他看个够。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t push it.
elements.text_zh: 你收敛点。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s enough, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 够了，Candy。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. You've got a thing for Lance.
elements.text_zh: 行行行——我懂了，你对Lance有点上头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t say that.
elements.text_zh: 我没说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Here comes Harley.
elements.text_zh: Harley来了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Harley, the bartender?
elements.text_zh: 那个酒保Harley？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He’s also one of the hosts. Sorry, couldn’t tell you before.
elements.text_zh: 他还是主持人之一。抱歉，之前不能提前透露。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Some new scoring rules and new challenges, and competitions.
elements.text_zh: 新的计分规则、新的挑战、新的比赛——全都上。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You feeling up for it, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你扛得住吗，Roxie？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You still having second thoughts?
elements.text_zh: 还在纠结？想临阵撤退？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m ready to rock and roll.
elements.text_zh: 我已经热好场了。随时开打。

elements.text_en: Jax leaves when Harley finishes, and Orwell arrives.
elements.text_zh: Harley讲完，Jax退场，Orwell登场。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Two of the finest babes on the beach.
elements.text_zh: 沙滩上最耀眼的两位女主角。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What you up to, Orwell?
elements.text_zh: 你在忙啥呢，Orwell？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Scouting some new talent. The local chicks.
elements.text_zh: 挖掘新“嘉宾”。本地妹子那种。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You gals been checking out some eye candy? Local studs?
elements.text_zh: 你们也在看帅哥？本地“顶配款”？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, I get your vibe. Roxie is a little judgmental.
elements.text_zh: 懂你意思。Roxie就是爱挑刺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, I’m not.
elements.text_zh: 我才没有。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Come on. You and Jax can be old school.
elements.text_zh: 得了吧，你和Jax就是“传统派”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Require some courtship before sex. Right?
elements.text_zh: 得先暧昧铺垫、先走流程——对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. But not a drive-through window at a fast-food joint.
elements.text_zh: 不是。但也别快到像“点单取餐”一样。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What about you, Orwell?
elements.text_zh: 那你呢，Orwell？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Carpe Diem. Pleasure of the moment.
elements.text_zh: 及时行乐。快乐优先。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Eyes lock with a hot tamale on an elevator.
elements.text_zh: 电梯里一个对视，气氛直接拉满。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hit the stop button and rock that boat.
elements.text_zh: 按下“暂停键”——剧情直接快进到名场面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t buy that story.
elements.text_zh: 我不信你这套。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Did it twice, just like that. Ain't no lie.
elements.text_zh: 真就这么发生过，两次。没吹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bull crap.
elements.text_zh: 少来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Not crap. I’ve done it
elements.text_zh: 真不是，我也遇到过。

elements.text_en: Lance arrives as Candy and Orwell depart.
elements.text_zh: Candy和Orwell刚走开，Lance就凑过来了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Hey, Roxie. What you think about these new contests?
elements.text_zh: 嘿，Roxie。你怎么看这些新比赛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m up for them. The Casino night sounds like fun.
elements.text_zh: 我挺期待的。“赌场之夜”听着就很刺激。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What about you?
elements.text_zh: 你呢？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The hot spring thing sounded cool.
elements.text_zh: 温泉那个也不错。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’ve been wanting to talk about the massage night.
elements.text_zh: 我一直想聊聊那晚的“按摩环节”。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I pushed things and made some awkward comments
elements.text_zh: 我当时有点用力过猛，还说了些不合时宜的话。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I didn’t mean to make you uncomfortable.
elements.text_zh: 我不是想让你难堪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I overreacted, okay. Let’s put it behind us.
elements.text_zh: 也有我反应过头的原因。翻篇吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The cameras were a big part of me freaking out.
elements.text_zh: 主要是镜头在旁边，我才会那么紧张。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Might have been a different result if we were alone.
elements.text_zh: 要是没那么多人围着，可能就不一样了。

elements.text_en: Really? Third base or home run?
elements.text_zh: 不一样是指……进度条要加速？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: First base, maybe second.
elements.text_zh: 最多加到“第二格”。别想太多。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We could revisit water conservation
elements.text_zh: 那我们也可以把“节水”那个梗再复习一下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Take showers together.
elements.text_zh: 比如……来个双人版本的“节水挑战”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? You get points for persistence.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，你这坚持不懈是打算刷成就？

elements.text_en: Lance and Roxie keep chatting.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Roxie继续聊着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You know who thinks you are smoking hot?
elements.text_zh: 你知道谁觉得你今天帅得有点犯规吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Most adult women in America.
elements.text_zh: 大概……全美大半成年女性？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There’s that huge ego. Never mind.
elements.text_zh: 行了行了，自恋劲儿又上来了。算了。

elements.text_en: Corbin, you're not wearing your fancy threads.
elements.text_zh: Corbin，你今天没穿你那套“招摇行头”啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Finally realized it’s a beach.
elements.text_zh: 终于想起来这是海滩了？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Very funny.
elements.text_zh: 真好笑。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Just wanted to say hello.
elements.text_zh: 我就是过来打个招呼。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You two seem very chummy.
elements.text_zh: 你俩看起来挺亲密的嘛。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What’s it to you, fancy pants?
elements.text_zh: 关你什么事，花孔雀？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Nothing to me.
elements.text_zh: 不关我事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m not looking to make waves, okay.
elements.text_zh: 我不想搅局，行了吧。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Did you hear about the casino night?
elements.text_zh: 听说今晚有“赌场之夜”？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds fun. I like roulette and craps. How about you?
elements.text_zh: 听着挺有意思。我喜欢轮盘和花旗骰。你呢？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh yeah! I’m gonna clean up. I got a system.
elements.text_zh: 当然。我有一套策略——今天就看我发挥。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Really? Don’t the odds always favor the house?
elements.text_zh: 真的？可概率不是永远偏向庄家吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Sure, for random chumps. Just watch and learn.
elements.text_zh: 那是对“随便玩玩”的人。你看着学就行。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Lance Keep Chatting after Corbin leaves
elements.text_zh: Corbin走开后，两人继续聊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Guy is so freaking arrogant.
elements.text_zh: 那家伙也太自大了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I thought so at first. He’s confident, maybe a little over the top.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，我一开始也这么觉得。他自信是自信，就是有点过头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some women really like that in a man.
elements.text_zh: 但确实有些女生就吃这套。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Decisive and take-charge kind of guy.
elements.text_zh: 果断、掌控全场那种。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A guy who knows how to make a woman feel safe.
elements.text_zh: 还能让人有安全感的那种。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Wow.
elements.text_zh: 哇哦。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What?
elements.text_zh: 怎么？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I know how to take charge.
elements.text_zh: 我也很会掌控节奏。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m a harbor of safety.
elements.text_zh: 我还是“安全港”那种。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What's bothering you?
elements.text_zh: 你这是怎么了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Never realized you were so into Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 没想到你这么关注Corbin。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s not what I said. Why do you care?
elements.text_zh: 我又没那个意思。你这么在意干嘛？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re making a big deal out of this.
elements.text_zh: 你别把这事说得这么大。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Seems like the other way around.
elements.text_zh: 我看是你先放大了吧。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just drop it, okay.
elements.text_zh: 行，别聊了，好吗。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: So, who thinks I’m smoking hot?
elements.text_zh: 所以——到底谁觉得我帅得离谱？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It's Jax, right?
elements.text_zh: 是Jax吧？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She’s got long legs and a nice tight . . .
elements.text_zh: 她腿又长，身材还很——

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? Keep it to yourself.
elements.text_zh: 行了，收一收，别当众说。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m just saying Jax has significant assets.
elements.text_zh: 我只是说她条件确实很出众。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s my friend … just stop, okay.
elements.text_zh: 她是我朋友……你到此为止，行吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I know. But I can picture it.
elements.text_zh: 我知道，可我就是忍不住脑补。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It’s the quiet ones that can be really wild.
elements.text_zh: 越安静的人，越让人好奇。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just shut it. It’s not her!
elements.text_zh: 闭嘴！不是她！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax didn’t say you're hot. Okay!
elements.text_zh: Jax也没说你帅，行了吧！

elements.text_en: Lance gives a light cough and rubs his ear, trying to shake off the awkwardness.
elements.text_zh: Lance赶紧找补。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sorry. Not cool to talk about your friend like that.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我不该这样拿你朋友开玩笑。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Maybe you and I should revisit the shower proposal.
elements.text_zh: 要不……我们把“淋浴间那个提议”再聊聊？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Seriously?
elements.text_zh: 你认真的？

elements.text_en: Sister dearest and hunky Lance.
elements.text_zh: 亲爱的姐姐——还有这位帅气的Lance。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Crap. Stay cool.
elements.text_zh: 糟了……稳住。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’m surprised to find you two together.
elements.text_zh: 真意外，你们俩居然凑一块儿了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why?
elements.text_zh: 怎么？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Word gets around. A Total fiasco during the massage challenge.
elements.text_zh: 消息传得可快了。按摩挑战那段……挺精彩啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You heard wrong.
elements.text_zh: 你听错了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Your face betrays you. I can see it.
elements.text_zh: 你脸上都写着呢，我看得出来。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You need some pointers, sis?
elements.text_zh: 要我教你两招吗，姐姐？

elements.text_en: You can watch me service this stud.
elements.text_zh: 不如看我怎么把这位大帅哥“配合”到位。

elements.text_en: Would you like that, Lance, baby?
elements.text_zh: 怎么样，Lance？你喜欢吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Well . . .uhh . . .
elements.text_zh: 呃……这个……

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He’s so excited he can’t speak.
elements.text_zh: 看吧，他都激动得说不出话了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s enough. What do you want?
elements.text_zh: 够了。你到底想干嘛？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I heard you flamed out.
elements.text_zh: 我听说你当场翻车了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Going to quit the show.
elements.text_zh: 还打算退赛呢。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Might need some sisterly support.
elements.text_zh: 需不需要妹妹来“关心”一下？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Or maybe some help packing up.
elements.text_zh: 或者我帮你收拾行李？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You are way off base.
elements.text_zh: 你想多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m pumped about these new competitions.
elements.text_zh: 我对新比赛可兴奋着呢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You worried about competing with me.
elements.text_zh: 倒是你——是在怕跟我比吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is that it, sister dear?
elements.text_zh: 就这点事？亲爱的妹妹？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Hardly. You’re not in my league.
elements.text_zh: 怎么可能。你还不配跟我一个档次。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Ta Ta darlings.
elements.text_zh: 拜啦，各位～

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You two take sibling rivalry to a new level.
elements.text_zh: 你们这姐妹“较劲”，真是刷新认知。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Has it always been like that?
elements.text_zh: 一直都这样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not when we were children.
elements.text_zh: 小时候不是。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, for a long time.
elements.text_zh: 但后来……是的，很久了。

elements.text_en: Hey Roxie. You, okay?
elements.text_zh: 嘿，Roxie，你没事吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I saw Raven. She causing problems?
elements.text_zh: 我看到Raven了。她又来找茬？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m fine. Typical crap.
elements.text_zh: 我没事。老套路。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Jax. Good to see you.
elements.text_zh: Jax，好久不见。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You too Lance.
elements.text_zh: Lance，你也是。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You really look nice today.
elements.text_zh: 你今天真好看。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Always do. Particularly fine at the moment.
elements.text_zh: 你一直都好看，今天尤其。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I saw a lot of eyes on you today.
elements.text_zh: 今天很多人都在看你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t go there, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 别再说了，Lance。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Really? Well thank you.
elements.text_zh: 是吗？那谢谢你。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I don’t want to embarrass you.
elements.text_zh: 我不想让你尴尬。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Compliments from a handsome man.
elements.text_zh: 帅哥夸奖嘛——

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Are always welcome.
elements.text_zh: 我当然照单全收。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s going on here?
elements.text_zh: 你们这是在干嘛？

elements.text_en: Roxie waves down Candy to break it up.
elements.text_zh: Roxie赶紧招手喊Candy来救场。

elements.text_en: Candy! Candy!
elements.text_zh: 哎！我看到Candy了！Candy！Candy！Candy！

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I need to get going.
elements.text_zh: 我得先撤了。

elements.text_en: Candy’s curious and a some heat develops with Lance.
elements.text_zh: Candy一脸八卦凑过来，和Lance的火花隐隐冒头。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Hi Lance. Good to see you.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Lance。又见面啦。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, you too.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，你也是。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You two were great together at the body painting.
elements.text_zh: 你俩在“身体彩绘”那段配合得太默契了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I bet the massage was great too.
elements.text_zh: 按摩挑战那段……也很精彩吧？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Roxie, is too shy. She won’t say.
elements.text_zh: Roxie太害羞了，肯定不肯自己说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, kind of like body painting. Sensual but under control.
elements.text_zh: 差不多吧——暧昧归暧昧，但我有分寸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nothing much to talk about, okay.
elements.text_zh: 没什么好说的，行了吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay.
elements.text_zh: 好好好，懂了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You looked really hot during the body painting, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 不过说真的，彩绘那会儿你也太上镜了吧，Lance。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: A real hard body. Hope it’s okay to say.
elements.text_zh: 身材练得真狠……我说这个不算越界吧？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, that’s cool. You are pretty smoking yourself.
elements.text_zh: 不算。你也很辣啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? With me standing right here.
elements.text_zh: 当着我的面就这么夸？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, two smoking hot people.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，两位“辣”人聊得挺开心。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Sorry, Roxie. That was kind of rude.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉啦Roxie，我刚刚有点嘴快。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You know me. I just blurt it out.
elements.text_zh: 你知道我的，我一激动就乱说。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Three smoking hot people.
elements.text_zh: 那就三位“辣”人一起站这儿，行了吧？

elements.text_en: Four friends arrive at the strip club for amateur night.
elements.text_zh: 四人来到夜店的“素人秀之夜”现场，气氛暧昧又热闹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This place is pretty upscale.
elements.text_zh: 这地方看着还挺高级的。
