elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m definitely going to do it.
elements.text_zh: 我肯定要上！不冲不行！

elements.text_en: The four friends decide on stripping routines.
elements.text_zh: 四人当场拍板：各自定一个“舞台主题秀”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Roxie, how about you?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你呢？上不上？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, but I haven’t decided on what I want to do.
elements.text_zh: 上是上……但我还没想好表演什么。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m definitely in. I got two ideas.
elements.text_zh: 我必上。我有两套方案。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: First choice is Arnie the Astronaut.
elements.text_zh: 方案一：宇航员Arnie——太空迷航风。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You think they have an astronaut costume?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得这儿能借到宇航服？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, maybe not.
elements.text_zh: ……行，当我没说。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Okay then, a cowboy. I know how to do rope work.
elements.text_zh: 那就牛仔。我会玩绳子花活儿。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sounds difficult. Cool if you can pull it off.
elements.text_zh: 听着难度挺高。你要真能搞定就帅了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m good. How about you?
elements.text_zh: 我稳。你呢？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’m in. Lance, the sexy fireman, comes to the rescue.
elements.text_zh: 我也上。主题：魅力工装——来救场的那种。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s a classic.
elements.text_zh: 经典款，永不过时。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m going with sexy school teacher.
elements.text_zh: 我选“熟女风”——越正经越带劲。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Down to a G-string and pasties.
elements.text_zh: 服装就走“极简舞台装”，但该遮的都遮，合规又撩人。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Have you decided, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你定了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, a sexy nurse gig.
elements.text_zh: 定了，“护士风”舞台秀。

elements.text_en: The group watches as the first dancer goes on stage.
elements.text_zh: 第一位表演者上台，四人一边看一边憋笑加紧张。

elements.text_en: Welcome, our first dancer of the night.
elements.text_zh: 欢迎今晚第一位表演者登场！

elements.text_en: Amazing Amanda, The Snake Charmer.
elements.text_zh: 掌声给到——“蛇影女王”Amanda！

elements.text_en: Your redheaded friend, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 哟，红发那位——你朋友啊，Lance？

elements.text_en: Wow! That’s a real snake!
elements.text_zh: 哇！那是真蛇？！

elements.text_en: Albino python. Very docile creatures.
elements.text_zh: 白化蟒。性格很温顺的那种。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My friend had one in high school.
elements.text_zh: 我高中同学还养过一条。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You could tell it liked to be held.
elements.text_zh: 它还挺爱被抱着的，看得出来。

elements.text_en: Applause and cheering, and a break after Amanda’s routine.
elements.text_zh: 一套动作下来，全场尖叫鼓掌，表演间隙短暂休息。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way she's an amateur.
elements.text_zh: 她这水平……不可能是业余吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A sexy striptease while handling a snake.
elements.text_zh: 一边控蛇一边走魅力路线，太会了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Totally topless with her reptile companion.
elements.text_zh: 她这上衣大胆得离谱……还稳得住蛇，离谱但服。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Topless is allowed. Private parts stay covered.
elements.text_zh: 主办方允许更大胆的上身设计，但关键部位必须遮挡到位——有规则的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance, you're quiet. Redhead was hot.
elements.text_zh: Lance，你怎么不说话？那红发真的很抢眼啊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not really into redheads.
elements.text_zh: 我不太吃红发这款。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I remember you saying the opposite.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么记得你以前不是这么说的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Snake thing creep you out?
elements.text_zh: 还是你被蛇吓到了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Don’t be silly.
elements.text_zh: 少来，我才没有。

elements.text_en: The group chats after another break.
elements.text_zh: 又一轮表演结束，四个人趁间隙凑在一起复盘吐槽。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Three people gave it a shot.
elements.text_zh: 已经有三个人上去试过了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance’s redhead was by far the best.
elements.text_zh: 你那位红发……确实是今晚最炸的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not my redhead. But yeah, she was the best.
elements.text_zh: 先声明：不是“我的”。但她确实最强。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The genius professor routine. That was lame.
elements.text_zh: 那个“天才教授”主题也太尬了吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He was wearing long underwear.
elements.text_zh: 而且还穿了那种……长秋裤一样的打底。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, that was weird.
elements.text_zh: 对，怪得离谱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The last girl was good. She beat me to it.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那位女生也很会……我想的点子被她抢先用掉了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sexy nurse gig worked for her.
elements.text_zh: 她的“护士主题”很吃镜头。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: One of us has to give it a go.
elements.text_zh: 总得我们也有人上场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not going first. I got to choose another act.
elements.text_zh: 我不当第一个，我得再换个套路。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m ready.
elements.text_zh: 我准备好了。

elements.text_en: Candy heads backstage.
elements.text_zh: Candy一甩头发就往后台走，气场拉满。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She will be good.
elements.text_zh: 她肯定稳的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh, yeah.
elements.text_zh: 那是。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know what you want to see.
elements.text_zh: 我知道你想看什么。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just supporting a friend.
elements.text_zh: 我只是支持朋友，别乱扣帽子。

elements.text_en: The three friends chat as Candy prepares backstage.
elements.text_zh: 后台准备中，剩下三个人在台下越聊越“上头”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m drawing a blank for a new idea.
elements.text_zh: 我脑子空白了……新点子想不出来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Nothing wrong with sitting it out.
elements.text_zh: 不上也没关系，别硬撑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why would you say that?
elements.text_zh: 你这话什么意思？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I‘ve got a good body. I’m a good dancer.
elements.text_zh: 我身材不差，舞也跳得好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some reason you don’t want me up there?
elements.text_zh: 怎么，你不想我上台？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No. Why would I care?
elements.text_zh: 没有。我为什么要在意？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I need a solid routine.
elements.text_zh: 我只是缺个能打的“完整编排”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You’re a natural for a classic feather dance.
elements.text_zh: 你适合经典羽毛扇舞——气质天生就对。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really?
elements.text_zh: 真的？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Those sultry eyes and pouty lips.
elements.text_zh: 你那种“会撩但不自知”的眼神，还有那点小傲娇。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Keep it slow and elegant. Yet seductive.
elements.text_zh: 动作放慢、走优雅路线，但要让人移不开眼。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Topless, but never showing the prized jewels.
elements.text_zh: 尺度别越线：露的是氛围，不是敏感部位。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Teasing as you reveal most of your shapely bosoms.
elements.text_zh: 用羽毛和走位“若隐若现”，让镜头自己脑补。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Orwell!
elements.text_zh: Orwell！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: What dude? Just helping a friend.
elements.text_zh: 干嘛？我是在认真给建议。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, what’s your problem?
elements.text_zh: 对啊，你急什么？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Nothing.
elements.text_zh: 没事。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Next, we have Candy, the naughty school teacher.
elements.text_zh: 接下来登场的是——Candy，“熟女”主题！

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: She whips the bad boys.
elements.text_zh: 今晚坏男孩都得乖乖挨训。

elements.text_en: Candy comes on stage.
elements.text_zh: Candy踩着鼓点上台，眼神一扫，全场立刻安静半秒。

elements.text_en: Men shout as Candy slips her blouse off.
elements.text_zh: 观众起哄声炸开，Candy只是把外套一掀——气氛直接升温。

elements.text_en: Whip me, whip me, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 有人大喊：“来点狠的，Candy！”

elements.text_en: Candy cracks a whip, and then her skirt comes off.
elements.text_zh: 她挥了下教鞭般的道具，转身一甩裙摆——动作又飒又利落。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The men are going wild for her.
elements.text_zh: 他们都快疯了……她太会控场。

elements.text_en: Candy slowly slips off a lacy bra.
elements.text_zh: 她用外套和灯光做遮挡，镜头只给到肩线与背影，暧昧拉满但不越界。

elements.text_en: Candy wearing a tiny G-string, holding a whip in one hand.
elements.text_zh: 她换成舞台“极简下装”造型，关键部位遮挡完整，手里还拎着道具，气场更强。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh my.
elements.text_zh: ……我去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stop drooling, dude.
elements.text_zh: 收收口水，行不行？

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Let's have a hand for Candy!
elements.text_zh: 掌声给Candy！

elements.text_en: Wild applause and cheering from the crowd.
elements.text_zh: 掌声、口哨、欢呼混成一片，现场直接沸腾。

elements.text_en: Candy joins her friends after her performance.
elements.text_zh: Candy下台回到三人身边，脸上写着“稳了”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: How did I do?
elements.text_zh: 怎么样？我表现还行吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You are the best so far. Hands down.
elements.text_zh: 目前为止你第一，毫无悬念。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I agree with Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 同意。你今晚是王炸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What was your favorite part, Lance?
elements.text_zh: 那你呢，Lance？你最喜欢哪段？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It was classy, really classy.
elements.text_zh: 挺……高级的。真的，很高级。

elements.text_en: Orwell is ready after two more dancers.
elements.text_zh: 又两位表演结束，Orwell终于坐不住了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Okay. I’m doing it.
elements.text_zh: 好了。我要上了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Good luck.
elements.text_zh: 祝你好运。

elements.text_en: Orwell heads backstage and is announced as the next act.
elements.text_zh: Orwell钻进后台，主持人立刻报出下一位。

elements.name: Jasmine
elements.text_en: Next Up is Buckaroo Bobby.
elements.text_zh: 下一位——Buckaroo Bobby！

elements.name: Jasmine
elements.text_en: The Bronco Buster.
elements.text_zh: 外号“野马驯服者”！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Look at that outfit. He really does know how to swing a lasso.
elements.text_zh: 看那身行头……他还真会耍套索那套。

elements.text_en: Women shouting and cheering from the crowd.
elements.text_zh: 女生们尖叫起哄，气氛一下被点燃。

elements.text_en: Ride me, Buckaroo Bobby.
elements.text_zh: “冲啊Bobby——！”

elements.text_en: Tie me up. Tie me up.
elements.text_zh: “来点狠的！来点狠的！”

elements.text_en: Let’s give a big yee haw for Buckaroo Bobby.
elements.text_zh: “给Buckaroo Bobby一个大大的——yee haw！”

elements.text_en: Applause and shouts for Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 掌声、口哨声一片，台下都在喊Orwell。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He was really good.
elements.text_zh: 他确实挺厉害的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Funny and sexy, that’s hard to pull off.
elements.text_zh: 又好笑又带劲，这可不容易。

elements.text_en: Lance pole-dances shirtless in a fireman’s hat and red thong.
elements.text_zh: Lance穿着夸张的“工装主题”舞台装登场，直接把气氛拉满。

elements.text_en: Women from the crowd are shouting and cheering.
elements.text_zh: 台下女生疯狂尖叫，起哄声此起彼伏。

elements.text_en: I’m on fire, baby!
elements.text_zh: “我燃起来了，宝贝！”

elements.text_en: Hose me down! Hose me down!
elements.text_zh: “快给我降降温！我太热了！”

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Wow! Women are throwing money on the stage.
elements.text_zh: 哇——她们把小费都往台上抛了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He wasn’t that great.
elements.text_zh: 也就那样吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: A sexy fireman doing a pole dance.
elements.text_zh: 热舞诶……这还不够杀？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He was smoking hot, girlfriend.
elements.text_zh: 他刚刚那股劲儿，简直犯规。

elements.text_en: Lance joins his friends after changing clothes.
elements.text_zh: Lance换好衣服回到他们这桌，脸还带着得意。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I think I got a passing grade.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉……至少及格了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Impressive pole work, dude.
elements.text_zh: 动作挺像那么回事的，兄弟。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What did you think, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你说呢，Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Solid C plus. Grade-wise.
elements.text_zh: C+，勉强过关。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No way. Solid A in my book.
elements.text_zh: 胡说，我给A。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The night is almost over, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 差不多该轮到你了，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I’m ready.
elements.text_zh: 行，我知道了。我上。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Ladies and Gentlemen. Our last dancer tonight.
elements.text_zh: 女士们先生们——今晚最后一位登场。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: A classic routine with burlesque roots.
elements.text_zh: 复古经典风的舞台秀，老派但致命。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Please welcome Foxie Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 让我们欢迎——Foxie Roxie！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She got that stage name from me.
elements.text_zh: 这个艺名是我给她取的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She moves like a ballet dancer.
elements.text_zh: 她的动作像芭蕾一样干净利落。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Why are the men in the crowd so quiet?
elements.text_zh: 怎么男的突然都安静了？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: They are mesmerized, hypnotized, and tantalized.
elements.text_zh: 看傻了、被勾住了、魂都快飞了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Is she really topless?
elements.text_zh: 她……穿得也太大胆了吧？

elements.text_en: Roxie is shown in side view, feathers covering just her front and back.
elements.text_zh: 侧面镜头带过：羽毛道具巧妙遮挡，若隐若现，但分寸卡得刚刚好。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Oh yeah. She is rocking it.
elements.text_zh: 对，就这股劲儿——她稳了。

elements.text_en: The crowd reacts as Roxie finishes her routine.
elements.text_zh: Roxie收尾定格，台下瞬间炸了。

elements.text_en: Men shouting louder and louder.
elements.text_zh: 欢呼声一浪高过一浪。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Roxie! Roxie! Roxie! Roxie! Roxie!
elements.text_zh: “Roxie！Roxie！Roxie！”

elements.text_en: Samson calms the crowd as Roxie exits the stage.
elements.text_zh: Samson抬手控场，Roxie从容退场。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Quiet down. That’s all the dancing for tonight.
elements.text_zh: 好了好了——今晚表演到此结束。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: Our panel of judges will choose a winner.
elements.text_zh: 评委将当场评出优胜者。

elements.text_en: Winner is announced as Roxie joins her friends.
elements.text_zh: Roxie回到朋友身边，主持人也同步公布结果。

elements.name: Samson
elements.text_en: This month’s amateur champion. Foxie Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 本月冠军——Foxie Roxie！

elements.text_en: Curious group arrives at tarot reading room.
elements.text_zh: 几人兴致未散，又转场来到塔罗占卜室。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We’re early. She’s doing a private session in the back.
elements.text_zh: 我们来早了，她在里面做私占。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is my first time in a place like this.
elements.text_zh: 这种地方我还是第一次来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Really? I have a full-time astrologer back home.
elements.text_zh: 真的？我在老家可是有“长期合作”的占星师。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah. I got a regular woman who keeps me in alignment.
elements.text_zh: 我也有固定的——专门帮我“校准状态”的那种。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It’s all nonsense. Tarot cards, fortune tellers, astrology.
elements.text_zh: 全是胡扯。塔罗、算命、占星，一套套的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Mock what you don’t understand.
elements.text_zh: 不懂就嘲笑，典型。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: At least keep an open mind, right, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 至少别把门关死嘛，对吧Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m more lined up with Corbin on this.
elements.text_zh: 这点上……我反而更站Corbin。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No way.
elements.text_zh: 不可能。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, girlfriend. Madam Luna is kind of famous, right?
elements.text_zh: 姐妹别急。Luna夫人不是挺有名的吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Definitely. Powerful connections to the spirit world.
elements.text_zh: 当然。她跟“灵性世界”的路子很深。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Maybe the dark side.
elements.text_zh: 甚至……可能有点偏“暗面”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No way. Luna is a white witch.
elements.text_zh: 才不是。Luna是走“白巫”那种正派路线的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you two talking about? Witches?
elements.text_zh: 等等，你们在说什么？女巫？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Some tap the dark side and use it for harm or manipulation.
elements.text_zh: 有人会借“暗面”的东西去伤人、操控别人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: White practitioners use it for well-being and protection.
elements.text_zh: 也有人只用来疗愈、守护、保平安。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Enough of the mumbo jumbo.
elements.text_zh: 行了，别神神叨叨的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It’s all a big con game.
elements.text_zh: 就是一场大型骗局。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Millions of people trust the spiritual realm.
elements.text_zh: 可有几百万人都信灵性这套。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Why do so many people believe?
elements.text_zh: 那为什么这么多人会信？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Because most people are stupid.
elements.text_zh: 因为很多人太容易被带节奏。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You calling me stupid! You don’t believe in a soul.
elements.text_zh: 你是在说我傻？你根本就不信有灵魂。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Sorry. I’m not saying I don’t believe in a soul.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉。我没说我不信灵魂。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I tend to believe we have souls. I don’t claim to understand.
elements.text_zh: 我倾向于相信我们有灵魂……但我不敢说我懂。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But I agree with Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 不过我同意Corbin一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t believe people can connect to a spirit world.
elements.text_zh: 我不太信人能直接“连到灵界”那种说法。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Doesn’t mean I think you’re stupid for believing.
elements.text_zh: 但你信也不代表你蠢——别对号入座。

elements.text_en: The debate continues with a calmer tone.
elements.text_zh: 争论的火气下去了，话题却还在继续。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So, you’re saying it’s all a scam.
elements.text_zh: 所以你是说——全是骗局吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Lay it on us. Burden of proof is on you.
elements.text_zh: 行，那你说说看。你得拿出点依据。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Well, it can also partly be self-delusion.
elements.text_zh: 也可能是自我暗示，自我催眠一半一半。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: More negative energy.
elements.text_zh: 你这叫负能量加倍。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You didn’t answer Orwell’s question.
elements.text_zh: 你没正面回答他的问题。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. I’ll give you an example.
elements.text_zh: 行，我举个例子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But you two have to keep an open mind.
elements.text_zh: 但你俩先别急着抬杠，听完再评。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m always open to alternatives. Let’s hear it, Foxie Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我一向接受各种可能。来吧，Foxie Roxie——放招。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: An old lady wants to connect with her dead husband.
elements.text_zh: 有个老太太，想“联系”她去世的老伴。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She makes an appointment with Madam Luna.
elements.text_zh: 她约了Luna夫人做占卜。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Madam Luna asks what the lady wants.
elements.text_zh: Luna先问：你想求什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Luna has her name, and she plays cyber sleuth.
elements.text_zh: 然后要了名字，转头就像网侦一样开始查信息。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Learns how he died, his hobbies, favorite food... on and on.
elements.text_zh: 他怎么走的、爱好是什么、最爱吃啥……全都能扒出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Next phase, she starts passing on messages from the other side.
elements.text_zh: 下一步，她再“顺势”开始传话：来自“那边”的讯息。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Some things aren’t on a computer.
elements.text_zh: 可有些事，网上也查不到吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She learn things from the lady as things progress.
elements.text_zh: 所以她就边聊边套，从老太太嘴里一点点挖出更多细节。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Plausible. Doesn’t mean they all do it.
elements.text_zh: 听起来说得通。但也不代表每个都这么干。

elements.text_en: A gentle chime. The back door opens, and perfume slips in on quiet footsteps.
elements.text_zh: 一声轻铃。后门开了，香气跟着轻脚步飘进来。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Sorry to keep you waiting.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，让你们久等了。

elements.text_en: Roxie introduces everyone.
elements.text_zh: Roxie简单介绍了在场的人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: What an attractive young group.
elements.text_zh: 哎呀，一群俊男靓女呢。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I sense you all have a connection.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉你们之间……有牵连。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Mostly friendly vibrations. Maybe a little friction.
elements.text_zh: 大多是善意的波动……但也带点火药味。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We don’t all agree on clairvoyant powers.
elements.text_zh: 我们对“灵视”这套意见不一。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some healthy skepticism.
elements.text_zh: 有人保持理性质疑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Including me. With all due respect.
elements.text_zh: 包括我在内——先说声尊重。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: That’s all right, dear. Nothing wrong with some doubt.
elements.text_zh: 没关系，亲爱的。怀疑很正常。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I sense Corbin has doubts.
elements.text_zh: 我倒是感觉……Corbin的疑心最重。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You believe what you can see and hear.
elements.text_zh: 你只信眼见耳闻。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That’s correct.
elements.text_zh: 没错。

elements.text_en: What do you see in that painting on the wall?
elements.text_zh: 那墙上那幅画——你看到了什么？

elements.text_en: A black chalice on a white background.
elements.text_zh: 白底上，一只黑色圣杯。

elements.text_en: Not two white faces facing each other?
elements.text_zh: 不是两张白色侧脸在相对吗？

elements.text_en: With a black void between them.
elements.text_zh: 中间夹着一块黑色空隙。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I see that. An optical illusion.
elements.text_zh: 行，我看到了。视觉错觉而已。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Our senses can fool us. Yes?
elements.text_zh: 人的感官会骗人，对吧？

elements.text_en: Discussion with Madam Luna continues.
elements.text_zh: 与Luna夫人的讨论还在继续。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A clever trick. It doesn’t prove clairvoyance.
elements.text_zh: 小把戏而已，又不能证明你真有“灵视”。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It shows our belief in our five senses.
elements.text_zh: 它只是在提醒我们：我们太依赖“五感”了。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Sight, sound, touch, smell, and taste.
elements.text_zh: 眼、耳、触、嗅、味——这五样。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Especially, Sight and hearing.
elements.text_zh: 尤其是眼见与耳闻。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: There is a whole world of experience beyond the concrete.
elements.text_zh: 可体验的世界，远不止眼前这些“看得见”的东西。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Right, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 对吧，Candy。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah. Love and romance. Hate and jealousy.
elements.text_zh: 嗯哼——心动与浪漫、厌恶与嫉妒，不都看不见却很真实？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Yes. Yes. How about dreams?
elements.text_zh: 对对对。那“梦”呢？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Are dreams meaningless, Orwell?
elements.text_zh: Orwell，你觉得梦毫无意义吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: There are messages buried deep inside.
elements.text_zh: 梦里藏着深处的讯息。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hidden messages intended for our inner spirit.
elements.text_zh: 像是写给内心的一封密信。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: What about intuition or de ja vu.
elements.text_zh: 再比如：直觉，或“既视感”。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You ever experience that, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你没遇到过吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure. Don’t see how that proves the power to connect to the spirit world.
elements.text_zh: 当然有。但这也不等于能“连上灵界”吧？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I’m an old lady. I need a rest break.
elements.text_zh: 我这把老骨头得歇口气。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Then we will explore a world beyond our five senses.
elements.text_zh: 待会儿我们再聊——五感之外的世界。

elements.text_en: Candy and Orwell shift gears when Luna leaves.
elements.text_zh: Luna一走，Candy和Orwell立刻换了个更“刺激”的话题。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You guys know about Doctor Zoz?
elements.text_zh: 你们听过Zoz医生吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah. Doctor Zoz and the five senses.
elements.text_zh: 当然，Zoz医生主打“五感体验”那套。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That cat’s holistic experience is awesome.
elements.text_zh: 那家伙的“全感官方案”据说绝了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Never heard of him. Some kind of holistic medicine?
elements.text_zh: 没听过。听起来像养生理疗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: No, babe. A holistic sexual experience.
elements.text_zh: 不，宝贝……是“全感官的亲密体验”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么啊？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Using all five senses for intense lovemaking.
elements.text_zh: 就是把五感都拉满，让亲密互动更有感觉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Oh my God. Multiple orgasms, guaranteed.
elements.text_zh: 我的天，据说能让人全程心跳加速——体验感直接拉满。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: For the man and the woman.
elements.text_zh: 不分男女，反正都说“很上头”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Look at him, touch him, smell him.
elements.text_zh: 看他、触碰他、闻到他的味道……

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Taste him. Let me give some details.
elements.text_zh: 再加点更“贴近”的互动——来，我给你细讲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s alright. I get it. Wait . . . Hear?
elements.text_zh: 行行行，我懂了……等等，“听”也算？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: When he climaxes.
elements.text_zh: 在他最投入的关键时刻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Of course.
elements.text_zh: 那当然算。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You got to try it, Roxie. I’ll send you the video link.
elements.text_zh: 你得试试，Roxie。我把链接发你，自己研究。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna Returns.
elements.text_zh: Luna夫人回来了。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Seems to be some excitement in the room.
elements.text_zh: 屋里怎么这么热闹？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some ideas about the five senses.
elements.text_zh: 我们刚聊到“五感”那点事。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Any thoughts about a soul or spirit?
elements.text_zh: 那关于灵魂、精神……你们怎么看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think we all believe in a soul in some manner.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得我们多少都信一点“灵魂”的存在。

elements.text_en: Corbin, Orwell, and Candy all nod in agreement.
elements.text_zh: Corbin、Orwell和Candy都点了点头。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Open your mind to the possibilities.
elements.text_zh: 把心门打开一点，可能性就来了。

elements.text_en: What is time like in the spirit world?
elements.text_zh: 那“灵界”的时间，会是什么样？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: No birth and death. Not the natural cycle of life.
elements.text_zh: 那里没有生与死，不按我们这套自然轮回走。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Not the flowing river we experience in the corporeal world.
elements.text_zh: 也不像肉身世界，时间像河水一样一直往前流。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Might there be a way to connect these plains of existence?
elements.text_zh: 那两边……有没有可能“搭上话”？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t see how that’s possible.
elements.text_zh: 我实在想不通怎么做到。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: We all have different capabilities and aptitudes.
elements.text_zh: 每个人的能力与天赋都不一样。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Including the ability to commune with the spirit dimension
elements.text_zh: 有的人天生就更容易与“那一层”沟通。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: For some of us. There are tools and devices that can help us.
elements.text_zh: 再加上一些工具、媒介，也许能帮我们把“信号”调出来。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna Continues.
elements.text_zh: Luna夫人继续说道。

elements.text_en: I will take you each on a journey using one of these tools.
elements.text_zh: 我会用这些“工具”，带你们各自走一段小旅程。

elements.text_en: Using Tarot cards to connect you to the spirit world.
elements.text_zh: 用塔罗牌——去照见你们的内心与“看不见的那一面”。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: The cards don’t tell a set future.
elements.text_zh: 牌不会给你写死的未来。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: They help reveal your inner self.
elements.text_zh: 它更像一面镜子，照出你自己。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Your soul's possible journey. Potential hazards and risks.
elements.text_zh: 也会提示：你可能会走向哪里，路上有哪些坑与考验。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Are you willing to open your minds?
elements.text_zh: 你们愿意把心门打开一点吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure, I’ll give it a shot.
elements.text_zh: 行，我试试。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m on board big time.
elements.text_zh: 我超上头，来吧来吧！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m ready to tap into my soul’s inner journey.
elements.text_zh: 我已经准备好，去“链接”我灵魂的深处了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No way. Sorry. I’ll just watch.
elements.text_zh: 免了。抱歉，我旁观就好。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Really, dude. Never figured you for a coward.
elements.text_zh: 不是吧兄弟，我还以为你胆子更大。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m not afraid. That’s not the point.
elements.text_zh: 我不是怕。重点不在这。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Okay, fine. I’ll do it.
elements.text_zh: 行。……我来。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Who wants to go first?
elements.text_zh: 谁先来？

elements.text_en: Me! Me! Me!
elements.text_zh: 我我我！

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Take a moment to clear your mind. Close your eyes.
elements.text_zh: 先清空一下杂念，闭上眼。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Now open your eyes and let's look at the cards.
elements.text_zh: 好，睁眼——看牌。

elements.text_en: Luna announces each card as she lays it on the table.
elements.text_zh: Luna一张张翻牌，边放边报出名字。

elements.text_en: The Lover, Temperance, Judgement, The Fool, The Tower
elements.text_zh: 恋人、节制、审判、愚者、塔。

elements.text_en: Look at the cards. Which two are you drawn towards?
elements.text_zh: 看着它们。你最被哪两张吸引？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The Lover and the Fool
elements.text_zh: 恋人和愚者。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Yes, of course. You're spontaneous and sensual.
elements.text_zh: 果然。你随性、敢爱，也很会享受氛围。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Physical love gives you energy.
elements.text_zh: 亲密与触碰，会让你“充电”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s dead on for Candy.
elements.text_zh: 太准了……这就是Candy。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You make friends quickly.
elements.text_zh: 你很容易和人熟起来。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: As you get older, will this be enough?
elements.text_zh: 但越往后——这种热闹，够不够你用？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Will you need more permanent connections?
elements.text_zh: 你会不会开始想要更稳定、更长久的连接？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good advice for Candy.
elements.text_zh: 这话对她很有用。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Love and spiritual energy.
elements.text_zh: 爱，还有那种“灵性”的火花。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I had a spiritual experience once.
elements.text_zh: 我还真有过一次……很玄的体验。

elements.text_en: Candy shares her spiritual experience.
elements.text_zh: Candy兴致勃勃讲起她的“玄学经历”。

elements.text_en: We were having sex in a mountain pasture.
elements.text_zh: 那次是在山野草地上……我们抱在一起，氛围特别满。

elements.text_en: A summer evening, and the stars were bright in a clear sky.
elements.text_zh: 夏夜，天很干净，星星亮得像要掉下来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: An out-of-body experience. I looked down on us as we both climaxed.
elements.text_zh: 我突然像“飘”出去了一下，从很远的地方看见我们——情绪一起冲到顶点。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I was definitely communing with the spirit world.
elements.text_zh: 那一刻我真觉得……自己和某种“更大的世界”连上了。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Oh my. Thank you, dear.
elements.text_zh: 哎呀。谢谢你，亲爱的。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I think it's time for Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 下一位，轮到Orwell了。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna Reads Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Luna为Orwell占读。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna finishes shuffling and laying the cards on the table for Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Luna洗好牌，为Orwell铺开牌阵。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Which two cards speak loudest?
elements.text_zh: 哪两张“声音最大”？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The Hermit, and Hierophant
elements.text_zh: 隐者，和教皇。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I feel it. You are a very private person.
elements.text_zh: 我明白了。你是个很“收着”的人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Deeply introspective with a unique and innate wisdom.
elements.text_zh: 内省很深，天生带着不一样的智慧感。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Realize that sometimes people don’t understand you.
elements.text_zh: 也要接受：有时候别人就是读不懂你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Unique wisdom. I can see that.
elements.text_zh: 独特的智慧……这点我认。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sometimes hard to understand. For sure.
elements.text_zh: 难懂？那更是……太是了。

elements.text_en: Orwell reacts to the message.
elements.text_zh: Orwell听得一脸“被说中了”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m synchronized to those spiritual insights.
elements.text_zh: 我跟那些“灵感频段”是同步的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Tune in to the right frequency.
elements.text_zh: 把频率调对就行。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So that people receive the signal.
elements.text_zh: 这样别人才能接收到信号。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Ensure that the bytes sent are the bytes received.
elements.text_zh: 确保发出去的“数据”，对方收到的不走样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s using metaphors wrapped in riddles.
elements.text_zh: 他又开始：谜语套比喻……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I wonder if Madam Luna understood him.
elements.text_zh: Luna夫人听懂了吗……

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You’ve got the gift, Madam Luna.
elements.text_zh: 你有天赋，Luna夫人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Thank you, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Orwell。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I hope it was helpful.
elements.text_zh: 希望对你有帮助。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Let’s move on to Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 我们来看Corbin。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It might take some time for us to connect.
elements.text_zh: 我们可能需要一点时间“对上频道”。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Were you close to your father as a child?
elements.text_zh: 你小时候和父亲亲近吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Not so much. He wasn’t an emotional man.
elements.text_zh: 不算。他不是那种表达情绪的人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Did you respect him?
elements.text_zh: 但你尊敬他吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh yeah. Hard-working and successful.
elements.text_zh: 当然。他很拼，也很成功。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna and Corbin continue.
elements.text_zh: Luna和Corbin继续对话。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Close your eyes. Recall the first time he was proud of you.
elements.text_zh: 闭上眼。想起他第一次为你骄傲的时刻。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Junior high debate competition. He was there when I won.
elements.text_zh: 初中辩论赛。他在场，我拿了第一。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He kissed me on the forehead and hugged me.
elements.text_zh: 他亲了下我的额头，还抱了我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. Never expected that from Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 哇……真没想到Corbin会说这个。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I feel the warmth.
elements.text_zh: 我能感觉到那份温度。

elements.text_en: Luna shuffles the deck, lays five cards on the table, announcing each one.
elements.text_zh: Luna再次洗牌，铺出五张牌，逐一报出牌名。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Which two cards are you focused on?
elements.text_zh: 你盯住的是哪两张？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: The Emperor and The World
elements.text_zh: 皇帝，和世界。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I see what you value and aspire to.
elements.text_zh: 我看到你在乎什么、也在追什么。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You value stability, success, and you expect rewards.
elements.text_zh: 你看重稳定、成果，也希望付出有回报。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You seek authority and control. You're decisive.
elements.text_zh: 你追求掌控与权威，下决定也很果断。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s Corbin in a nutshell.
elements.text_zh: 这就是Corbin，一句话概括。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Be careful that you do not try and bend people to your will.
elements.text_zh: 但要小心：别把所有人都硬掰成你想要的样子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I hope he gets that message.
elements.text_zh: 希望他听得进去。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Give people a chance to see your inner self.
elements.text_zh: 也给别人一个机会——看见你柔软的那一面。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: This has been a most interesting session.
elements.text_zh: 今晚很有意思。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I need to take a short rest. Help yourself to snacks and drinks.
elements.text_zh: 我得歇一会儿。点心饮料随意。

elements.text_en: The group chatters about Luna’s powers after she leaves.
elements.text_zh: Luna一走，几个人立刻小声议论起来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Okay, Orwell. Dark powers?
elements.text_zh: 所以呢，Orwell？“黑暗力量”？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Can’t say for sure.
elements.text_zh: 不好说。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It might be inside her. But she was rocking positive energy today.
elements.text_zh: 也许她身上确实有点东西……但今天她的气场很正。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She was keeping it real.
elements.text_zh: 而且她挺真诚的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sometimes people don’t get me.
elements.text_zh: 就像有些人总听不懂我。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Because you spout off a lot of crazy nonsense.
elements.text_zh: 因为你老爱胡扯一堆玄乎的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hey, dude.
elements.text_zh: 喂，兄弟。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What about you Corbin? She a total fraud?
elements.text_zh: 那你呢Corbin？她是不是纯忽悠？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She’s right that I’m decisive.
elements.text_zh: 她说我果断，这点没错。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I give her points on that.
elements.text_zh: 这一分我给她。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That stuff about inner self and bending people to my will.
elements.text_zh: 至于什么“内心”“把人掰成我想要的样子”……

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That seemed off the mark.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得有点瞎猜。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I think she nailed you dead to rights.
elements.text_zh: 我倒觉得她说中你要害了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: She nailed all three of us.
elements.text_zh: 咱仨她都拿捏得死死的。

elements.text_en: The chatter continues.
elements.text_zh: 吐槽还在继续，越聊越起劲。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Orwell, innate wisdom. Not buying that.
elements.text_zh: Orwell“天生智慧”？我不信。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You can be a real jerk, Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 你嘴也太损了吧，Corbin。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What do you think, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你怎么看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It all had a certain sense of truth, but kind of vague.
elements.text_zh: 有些话挺像那么回事……但又说得很虚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wasn’t she also kind of blowing smoke?
elements.text_zh: 感觉也有点“话术”在里面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Said a few positive things that you want to believe.
elements.text_zh: 挑几句好听的，让人自己往里对号入座。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That’s harsh!
elements.text_zh: 哇，你也太狠了！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You don’t think I make friends easily?
elements.text_zh: 你不觉得我很容易交朋友吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m spontaneous and sensual!
elements.text_zh: 我随性又有魅力，好吗！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not saying you aren’t. That’s not my point.
elements.text_zh: 我没说你没有。重点不是这个。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What is your point?
elements.text_zh: 那你重点是什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Could just be some clever research.
elements.text_zh: 也可能她提前做过功课。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She could have a hidden camera in here and watched us earlier.
elements.text_zh: 甚至……这里要是早就有人观察过我们，也不奇怪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She heard our views about this kind of stuff.
elements.text_zh: 她可能早就摸清了我们对这些事的态度。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She heard you talking about Dr. Zoz and holistic sex.
elements.text_zh: 她还听到你们聊什么Dr. Zoz的“五感体验课”。

elements.text_en: The group keeps talking.
elements.text_zh: 几个人还在你一言我一语。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She could have gotten a good read on all four of us.
elements.text_zh: 所以她能把我们四个都说得八九不离十。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You're as bad as Mr. ass hat.
elements.text_zh: 你跟那个“嘴欠王”一个样！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Maybe you’re worried about what she's gonna say about you.
elements.text_zh: 你是不是怕她把你也说穿？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m just being honest.
elements.text_zh: 我只是实话实说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Everything good she said about you is true, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 但她夸你的那些——确实都是真的。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna returns.
elements.text_zh: 这时，Luna回来了。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Are you ready, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 准备好了吗，Roxie？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I’m having some difficulty getting a sense of you.
elements.text_zh: 你有点特别……我一时抓不太准。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I sense complexity and depth.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉到：你很复杂，也很深。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Softening me up with compliments.
elements.text_zh: 先夸我一通……这是要我放松警惕？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I sense something painful from your childhood.
elements.text_zh: 还有一件事……你的童年，有过刺痛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My dad's drinking was painful.
elements.text_zh: ……我爸喝酒那件事，确实像根刺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way she knows about that.
elements.text_zh: 不可能吧……她怎么会知道？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Everyone has something painful from childhood.
elements.text_zh: 谁的童年没点难过的事……

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Let’s go ahead with the cards.
elements.text_zh: 来，我们开始抽牌。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s not going to ask me about a childhood memory?
elements.text_zh: 她不会真要追问我的童年吧……

elements.text_en: Madam Luna carefully shuffles the cards.
elements.text_zh: Luna小心地洗着牌。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: The spiritual forces determine the order. My hands are only a tool.
elements.text_zh: 顺序由“灵性”来定，我的手只是媒介。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s laying it on a bit thick.
elements.text_zh: 她这套说辞也太满了吧。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna announces each card.
elements.text_zh: Luna一张张翻开牌面，逐一报出名字。

elements.text_en: The Hanged Man. Sacrifice and Letting Go.
elements.text_zh: 倒吊人：取舍，与放下。

elements.text_en: The devil: Resentment, jealousy, violence.
elements.text_zh: 恶魔：执念、嫉妒，还有失控的冲动。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me or someone else?
elements.text_zh: 指我……还是另有其人？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: The Chariot. Will power, victory.
elements.text_zh: 战车：意志，胜利。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A black sphinx and a white sphinx. Weird.
elements.text_zh: 黑白狮身人面像……怪怪的。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Wheel of fortune. Destiny and good fortune.
elements.text_zh: 命运之轮：转机，与好运。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Strength. For bravery, patience.
elements.text_zh: 力量：勇气与耐心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: An infinity sign over the woman's head. Curious.
elements.text_zh: 她头顶那个∞……有点意思。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I feel you are drawn to the Chariot and Strength.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉，你更被“战车”和“力量”吸引。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She saw me staring at them. She’s clever.
elements.text_zh: 被她看出来了……有两下子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes, you read me correctly.
elements.text_zh: 是的，你看得挺准。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You are troubled by the devil card.
elements.text_zh: 但“恶魔”这张，让你心里不舒服。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It is a disturbing visual image.
elements.text_zh: 它的画面确实让人不安。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was staring at it as well.
elements.text_zh: 我也一直盯着它看。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It can symbolize liberation and understanding in the reverse.
elements.text_zh: 换个角度，它也可能代表“看清”与“解脱”。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It might reflect a presence in your life. Not necessarily within you.
elements.text_zh: 它更像在说：你身边有个影响你的人——不一定是你自己。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I will focus on Chariot and Strength for my interpretation.
elements.text_zh: 所以我会以“战车”和“力量”为主来解读。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I sense willpower, patience, and courage. Deep in your core.
elements.text_zh: 你骨子里有很强的意志、耐心和勇气。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You had to be strong and independent at a young age.
elements.text_zh: 你很早就学会了坚强与独立。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow, okay. She nailed that.
elements.text_zh: ……这句真戳中我了。

elements.text_en: Your strength can become a vulnerability.
elements.text_zh: 但你的强，也可能变成你的软肋。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Don’t shy away from accepting help from friends.
elements.text_zh: 别总一个人扛。该让朋友帮忙时，就让他们靠近。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s not far off base either.
elements.text_zh: 这也说得挺对。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You have been one of my most challenging reads, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你是我今天最难读的一位。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I wish you well on your journey.
elements.text_zh: 愿你接下来的路，走得更轻松。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: It has been a pleasure meeting all of you.
elements.text_zh: 能见到各位，我很荣幸。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Please spend a few moments relaxing before you depart.
elements.text_zh: 离开前，先在这里静一静，缓一口气。

elements.text_en: Everyone says thank you, and they grab some drinks and snacks.
elements.text_zh: 大家道谢后，各自去拿了点饮料和小点心。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You don’t have a hidden camera in here, do you?
elements.text_zh: 你这儿不会真有隐藏摄像头吧？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Would I tell you if I did, child?
elements.text_zh: 孩子，就算有，我会告诉你吗？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: There are many fraudsters who claim to have the gift.
elements.text_zh: 世上确实有很多冒充“有天赋”的人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: They do computer research, employ private investigators.
elements.text_zh: 他们会查资料、找人打听，甚至雇人跟踪。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Use hidden cameras. You are free to search.
elements.text_zh: 也会装摄像头。你们要查，随意。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We aren’t gonna do that.
elements.text_zh: 我们不会这么做。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I think Corbin would like to have a look around.
elements.text_zh: 不过我看……Corbin倒是很想搜一搜。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That would not be respectful. Regardless of what I might think.
elements.text_zh: 那样不礼貌。无论我怎么想，都不会做。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How did you come to do this?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么会走上这条路的？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I was born to it. It is all I have ever known.
elements.text_zh: 这就是我的命，也是我唯一熟悉的事。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: When I was ten years old. I began to see visions of a sort.
elements.text_zh: 我十岁那年，开始看到一些……异象。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I would tell my grandmother. Faces I would see and messages.
elements.text_zh: 我会告诉外婆：我看到的脸、听到的讯息。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Voices of those passed on to the other side.
elements.text_zh: 有些声音，像是来自彼岸的人。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: My grandmother said her mother had the gift. She fostered it in me.
elements.text_zh: 外婆说她母亲也有这个天分，于是把它一点点教给了我。

elements.text_en: Madam Luna grabs Roxie by the arm as they leave. She whispers to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 众人起身要走时，Luna轻轻抓住Roxie的手臂，贴近低语。

elements.text_en: Please stay for a moment.
elements.text_zh: 你先留下，片刻就好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll catch up. I want to check the doll collection in the other room.
elements.text_zh: 你们先走，我马上跟上。我想去隔壁看看那套玩偶收藏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is there a problem?
elements.text_zh: 怎么了？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Please listen to me. I know you are not convinced of my gift.
elements.text_zh: 听我说。我知道你并不相信我的本事。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: There is no harm in you listening to an old woman.
elements.text_zh: 听听一个老太婆的话，不吃亏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay
elements.text_zh: 好。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: The energy you felt from the devil card.
elements.text_zh: 你在“恶魔”那张牌上感到的那股压迫……

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I felt it pulling on you.
elements.text_zh: 我能感觉到，它在拽着你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It is a disturbing visual image.
elements.text_zh: 那画面确实让人不舒服。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: This was energy from another dimension.
elements.text_zh: 那不是你自己的情绪，更像是外来的阴影。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: I can’t see it clearly. Some dark betrayal.
elements.text_zh: 我看不清细节……但像是背叛，带着很深的黑影。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ex-husband sleeping with Raven. Pretty dark.
elements.text_zh: 前夫和Raven搞到一起……够阴的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She couldn’t know about that.
elements.text_zh: 她不可能知道这事。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: You think it has passed. It’s still out there.
elements.text_zh: 你以为都过去了？它还在暗处。

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Please take care to be safe.
elements.text_zh: 接下来多留个心，保护好自己。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. Thank you.
elements.text_zh: 好，谢谢你。

elements.text_en: Roxie leaves and chases after her friends.
elements.text_zh: Roxie快步离开，追上朋友们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What was that all about?
elements.text_zh: 她到底想暗示什么？

elements.text_en: The Girls Talk Poolside as the Men ‘Play’ in the Villa Pool
elements.text_zh: 女孩们在泳池边聊天，男人们在泳池里“玩耍”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Look at them. Swaggering and splashing.
elements.text_zh: 你看他们，又摆造型又泼水。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Men. Most of them are like boys. Trying to show off.
elements.text_zh: 男人就这样，越有人看越来劲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Especially, Lance. Definite man-child.
elements.text_zh: Lance 更夸张，永远长不大。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That body is all man.
elements.text_zh: 心智没有很成熟，身体倒是长的很好嘛。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Orwell looks good in a swimsuit.
elements.text_zh: Orwell 穿泳裤，还真挺抢眼的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They all do.
elements.text_zh: 说实话，都不差。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I bet Orwell has a freaky, sexy side.
elements.text_zh: Orwell 这人，看着有点犯规啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raunchy or nasty? I don’t think so.
elements.text_zh: 你意思他不是骚就是坏？我不认为哟。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No. No. Erotic and a little naughty.
elements.text_zh: 不不不，我是说，他有点勾人。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Soft-sexy whips and a few other toys.
elements.text_zh: 各种小道具，他肯定不缺。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Something for spicy variety and extra excitement.
elements.text_zh: 就是为了多点刺激。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Corbin might have a wild side.
elements.text_zh: Corbin 估计也不简单的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hidden below the surface.
elements.text_zh: 只是藏得比较深。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You might be right about that.
elements.text_zh: 你这么一说，好像真是。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That lifeguard is a pleasant eyeful.
elements.text_zh: 哇，救生员也这么帅。

elements.text_en: The girls turn their attention to hunky Logan.
elements.text_zh: 女孩子们的注意力，这就已经被 Logan 拉走了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Swimmers have lots of stamina.
elements.text_zh: 游泳的，体力一般都不差。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: A hunky man with strong legs and endurance. Nice.
elements.text_zh: 这腿，一看就挺行的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: His name is Logan.
elements.text_zh: 他叫 Logan。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Logan baby. Come to momma.
elements.text_zh: Logan 啊，看着就挺顺眼的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Perfect guy for some fantasy porn fun.
elements.text_zh: 顺眼到可以做白日梦的那种类型。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么呢？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Come on. You both have done it in silence.
elements.text_zh: 少装了，你俩心里都想过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Done what?
elements.text_zh: 想过什么？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: A spicy daydream with some dude as a character.
elements.text_zh: 那种带点刺激的小幻想呗。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The delivery man with the tight shorts.
elements.text_zh: 比如穿紧身裤的某某小哥。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You imagine inviting him inside for a special delivery.
elements.text_zh: 想象和他一起……。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. I don’t get what you're suggesting.
elements.text_zh: 噢，那个啊。然后呢？你想说啥。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Create a story and tell it out loud.

elements.text_en: How about some pool basketball?
elements.text_zh: 来玩泳池篮球怎么样？

elements.text_en: Lance shooting a ball at the poolside basket.
elements.text_zh: Lance把球朝泳池边的篮筐投了过去。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I could go for that.
elements.text_zh: 我可以啊。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Sure. Teams or a one-on-one tournament?
elements.text_zh: 行啊，咱们组队还是单挑？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: One-on-one wouldn’t be fair.
elements.text_zh: 单挑不公平吧。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m a pro athlete. I’d kick your butts.
elements.text_zh: 我可是职业运动员，单挑我怕你扛不住。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Football's not pool basketball.
elements.text_zh: 橄榄球跟泳池篮球可不是一回事。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let’s play teams. I’m not much at team sports.
elements.text_zh: 那就分队吧，我其实不太擅长团队运动。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Me either. I never played basketball.
elements.text_zh: 我也是，我都没正经打过篮球。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Me and Orwell against Corbin and Archer.
elements.text_zh: 那好，我和Orwell一队，Corbin和Archer一队。

elements.text_en: The girls watch the men playing pool basketball.
elements.text_zh: 女孩们在一旁看着男人们在泳池里打篮球。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Check it out. Water hoops.
elements.text_zh: 快看，他们在玩水上篮球。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Foul! That was a foul!
elements.text_zh: 犯规！刚才那下就是犯规！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You stupid jock!
elements.text_zh: 你这蠢肌肉男！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds like it’s getting rough.
elements.text_zh: 怎么听上去有点火药味。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That wasn’t a foul, you wimp!
elements.text_zh: 那根本不是犯规，你这怂货！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Wimp! I’m gonna kick your ass.
elements.text_zh: 怂货？你说你自己呢！

elements.text_en: Logan blows the whistle again.
elements.text_zh: Logan又吹了一声哨。

elements.text_en: Come on, Guys! Last Warning.
elements.text_zh: 够了！最后一次警告！

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Both of you. Calm down.
elements.text_zh: 你们两个，都冷静点。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Corbin called a foul on Lance.
elements.text_zh: 刚才是Corbin喊的犯规。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I didn’t see it. Orwell, how about you?
elements.text_zh: 我没注意看。Orwell，Lance犯规了吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Clean block. Corbin is being a wussy.
elements.text_zh: 这么干净的盖帽也叫犯规，不是怂货是啥。

elements.text_en: Corbin grabs Orwell, and the two men go underwater.
elements.text_zh: Corbin一把抓住Orwell，两个人直接滚进水里。

elements.text_en: Lance and Archer pull them apart.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Archer赶紧去把他们分开了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You’re a freaking psycho, dude!
elements.text_zh: 你他妈有病吧！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Let go of me. Lance! I said, let go.
elements.text_zh: 放开我！Lance！我说了放开！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. They are out of control.
elements.text_zh: 我靠，这已经完全失控了。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: That’s it out of the pool now!
elements.text_zh: 停停停，大家都注意安全！

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: Or I’m calling the cops!
elements.text_zh: 再闹我就叫安保了啊！

elements.text_en: Logan vents his frustration at the four men as they stand near the pool.
elements.text_zh: Logan站在泳池边，对着那四个男人压着火气吼了一通。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: I gave you two warnings!
elements.text_zh: 我已经警告过你们两次了。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: My job is to prevent accidental drownings.
elements.text_zh: 我的工作是防止有人意外溺水。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: Not adults trying to drown each other. Work it out.
elements.text_zh: 不是看你们在这儿互相往水里按。要打别处打去。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Fair enough.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，大家都冷静一点。

elements.text_en: Logan leaves the four men alone.
elements.text_zh: Logan不再搭理他们，转身走开。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What is up with you, Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 你到底怎么回事，Corbin？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Screw you, Lance!
elements.text_zh: 滚！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’ve had it with your arrogant attitude.
elements.text_zh: 我早就受够你那副自以为是的样子了。你谁啊？

elements.text_en: Corbin pushes Lance, and Lance shoves back.
elements.text_zh: Corbin推了Lance一把，Lance立刻顶了回去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You don’t want to get physical with me.
elements.text_zh: 别逼我跟你动手。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You need to calm down.
elements.text_zh: 别把自己太当回事儿！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Come on, guys. Let’s all chill.
elements.text_zh: 行了行了，兄弟们，都消停点。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We're all imperfect creatures. Right?
elements.text_zh: 谁还没个缺点啊，对吧？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m sick of you, too, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 得了吧Orwell，我也受够你了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Your bizarre ideas and weirdo language.
elements.text_zh: 你那些乱七八糟的想法，还有你那阴阳怪气的说话方式。

elements.text_en: I’m just trying to keep the peace.
elements.text_zh: 打住，我就是个劝架的。

elements.text_en: Corbin moves closer to Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Corbin一步步逼近Orwell。

elements.text_en: Mind your own business, whackjob.
elements.text_zh: 劝你少管闲事。

elements.text_en: Corbin pushes Orwell. Orwell pushes back.
elements.text_zh: Corbin推了Orwell，Orwell立刻推了回去。

elements.text_en: Don’t push me. You punk ass wuss!
elements.text_zh: 别推我，你这废物！

elements.text_en: Corbin rushes at Orwell and shoves him.
elements.text_zh: Corbin二话不说直接冲上去，又推了Orwell一把。

elements.text_en: Orwell stumbles backwards and falls into the pool.
elements.text_zh: Orwell脚下一滑，踉跄着掉进泳池。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They are out of control.
elements.text_zh: 他们彻底失控了。

elements.text_en: That’s it, ass hole.
elements.text_zh: 够了，混蛋。

elements.text_en: All eyes are on Lance as he goes after Corbin.
elements.text_zh: Lance冲向Corbin，所有人的目光瞬间都集中在他身上。

elements.text_en: Lance tackles Corbin to the ground.
elements.text_zh: Lance把Corbin直接扑倒在地。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Something's wrong with Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 不对，Orwell是不是出事了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Orwell's drowning!
elements.text_zh: Orwell好像溺水了！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh, crap! Someone help him!
elements.text_zh: 糟了！快救他！

elements.text_en: Orwell floating face down as Logan dives into the water.
elements.text_zh: Orwell面朝下漂在水面上，Logan立刻跳进水里。

elements.text_en: Logan pulls Orwell out of the water onto the concrete deck.
elements.text_zh: Logan把Orwell从水里拖出来，拉到泳池边的地面上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Please be okay. Please be okay.
elements.text_zh: 你可千万别有事啊Orwell。

elements.text_en: Archer kneels, trying to revive Orwell as others look on.
elements.text_zh: Archer跪下来抢救Orwell，其他人围在一旁。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Breathe. Slow breaths. You're doing good. Deep breaths.
elements.text_zh: 呼吸，慢慢呼吸，再慢一点。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You must have hit the back of your head when you fell in.
elements.text_zh: 做得很好，现在，深呼吸。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Knocked you out. Need to ice it later.
elements.text_zh: 你刚被撞晕了，应该是掉下去的时候撞到后脑了。

elements.text_en: I’m so sorry, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 问题不大，冰敷一下就好。

elements.text_en: Sorry to all of you.
elements.text_zh: 对不起，Orwell。对不起了大家。

elements.text_en: My father died yesterday. It was unexpected.
elements.text_zh: 我爸昨天去世了，很突然。

elements.text_en: We had a complicated relationship. I think it messed me up.
elements.text_zh: 我们关系一直很复杂，我可能真的崩了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sorry, man. Hey, we're cool, okay.
elements.text_zh: 没事，兄弟。我没事儿了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Water under the bridge, so to speak.
elements.text_zh: 过去的就过去了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah. Sorry to hear that, Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，我们刚也不对。你爸的事儿，请节哀。

elements.text_en: Roxie moves close to Corbin.
elements.text_zh: Roxie走到Corbin身边。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, sorry. The Funeral is soon?
elements.text_zh: 真的很抱歉，葬礼定在哪一天？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He left his body for medical research.
elements.text_zh: 不办葬礼，他把遗体捐给医学研究了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: A memorial next month.
elements.text_zh: 下个月办追思会。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: You four guys. No more time in the water today.
elements.text_zh: 你们四个，今天都不准再下水了。

elements.name: Logan
elements.text_en: You ladies are okay for pool time.
elements.text_zh: 女士们可以继续用泳池。

elements.text_en: The gal-pals talk as they get into the pool.
elements.text_zh: 几个闺蜜一边聊着，一边下到泳池里。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You know who got overlooked in all of this?
elements.text_zh: 你们有没有发现刚有个人表现很棒。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You talking about Logan?
elements.text_zh: 你是说Logan？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He took care of business, saving Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 他确实救了人。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Well, yeah. I was thinking about Archer.
elements.text_zh: 不过我想说的是Archer。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He was so calm. Moved right in and revived Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 他太冷静了，第一时间就上去把Orwell救回来了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You're right.
elements.text_zh: 啊我也想说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A real lifesaver.
elements.text_zh: 当时大家都很慌，只有Logan和他沉着冷静。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, he knew exactly what to do.
elements.text_zh: 他处理这些紧急情况应该很在行。Orwell一下就醒了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He’s a hard one to read.
elements.text_zh: 不过他这个人，还真不好看透。

elements.text_en: The three gal-pals look at the four men talking and laughing.
elements.text_zh: 三个闺蜜看着那四个男人又说又笑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Look at them, chattering and laughing.
elements.text_zh: 你看他们，居然又开始嘻嘻哈哈。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Orwell nearly drowned.
elements.text_zh: Orwell刚才差点没命诶。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They act like nothing even happened.
elements.text_zh: 他们现在跟没事儿人一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Can you imagine us acting like that?
elements.text_zh: 你能想象我们会这样吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pushing and shoving each other.
elements.text_zh: 互相推来推去？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Me grabbing Jax and holding her underwater.
elements.text_zh: 比如我把Jax按进水里，我们马上又能开心聊天吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey! Why me.
elements.text_zh: 喂，为什么是我？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Just making a point, sister.
elements.text_zh: 就是打个比方，姐妹。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Men are weird. Like from another planet.
elements.text_zh: 男人真的是一种很奇怪的生物。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, Mars.
elements.text_zh: 对，火星生物。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We women are from Venus.
elements.text_zh: 女人是金星生物。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Mars and Venus?
elements.text_zh: 怎么扯到火星和金星？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You never read the book? Try and understand men.
elements.text_zh: 你没看过那本书吗？讲怎么理解男人的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Okay. I’ve heard of it.
elements.text_zh: 听说过。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: From my mother and old aunties.
elements.text_zh: 我妈她们应该都读过，那本书老火了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That book is old, girls.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，的确有些年代感。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: There are some thoughtful ideas in there.
elements.text_zh: 不过里面有些观点还挺有意思。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Okay, I’m listening.
elements.text_zh: 说来听听。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The idea is that men are logical and direct. Problem solvers.
elements.text_zh: 书里说，男人偏理性、直接，遇事就想解决。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Women are indirect, emotional, and focus on relationships.
elements.text_zh: 女人更委婉、更情绪化，也更看重关系。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, it’s a bit dated. But here’s an example.
elements.text_zh: 是不是觉得有点老掉牙，不过你看今天就知道了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It says men look for something competitive to socialize.
elements.text_zh: 男人社交喜欢相互竞争，女人则会尽量避免冲突。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Look at today. Guys choosing pool hoops.
elements.text_zh: 比如今天，非要去打什么泳池篮球。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Women socialize with something nurturing and cooperative.
elements.text_zh: 女人更喜欢在分享、照顾、合作中社交。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Like fantasy porn stories about sweet Logan.
elements.text_zh: 比如围着我们甜甜的Logan讲点白日梦的故事。

elements.text_en: The three women look at Logan.
elements.text_zh: 三个女人同时看向Logan。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I have a real-world life guard story.
elements.text_zh: 说到Logan，我倒是有个现实版的救生员故事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Summer break, junior year of college. At a lake house.
elements.text_zh: 大学三年级的暑假，在湖边小屋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A full moon and I go skinny dipping.
elements.text_zh: 满月的晚上，我跑去游泳，没穿泳衣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Life guard suddenly shows up. We’ve been flirting for weeks.
elements.text_zh: 救生员突然出现，我们之前已经暧昧了好几个星期。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I get out of the water and march up next to him.
elements.text_zh: 我直接从水里走出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Naked and dripping wet.
elements.text_zh: 站到他面前。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can see he’s rock hard with anticipation.
elements.text_zh: 他当时整个人都愣住了。一副满怀期待的样子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes indeed. Strong legs and endurance.
elements.text_zh: 腿有劲，体力好，应该是救生员的标配了吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Oh my. Sex on a moonlit beach.
elements.text_zh: 天哪，月光下的湖边……

elements.text_en: A week later, the four friends arrive at a casino.
elements.text_zh: 一周后，四个朋友来到了一家赌场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow! This is quite a place. I’m psyched.
elements.text_zh: 哇，这地方也太夸张了，我有点兴奋了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Prime space for people watching.
elements.text_zh: 看帅哥美女的绝佳地点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You don’t like gambling?
elements.text_zh: 对玩牌不感兴趣？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not a big thing for me.
elements.text_zh: 不算特别爱。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: On the field, I influence the odds.
elements.text_zh: 在赛场上，胜负是我能左右的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I can’t control these games.
elements.text_zh: 如果是玩牌，输赢就不由我控制了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I gamble a little. Have a few drinks.
elements.text_zh: 我会小玩一点，喝上几杯。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Mostly focus on behavioral studies.
elements.text_zh: 主要还是观察这里的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, right. Scope out women.
elements.text_zh: 是啊是啊，主要是看美女吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know where you want to go, Jax.
elements.text_zh: 我就知道你想去哪儿，Jax。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, girlfriend. Blackjack!
elements.text_zh: 没错，姐妹。我去二十一点那桌！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m good for Blackjack. I’ve got a system for every game.
elements.text_zh: 二十一点我很拿手，每种玩法我都有一套。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You ladies can watch and learn.
elements.text_zh: 你们就坐旁边看着学吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Great. Corbin is back to normal.
elements.text_zh: 太好了，Corbin又回到老样子了。

elements.text_en: Lance heads off alone.
elements.text_zh: Lance一个人先走开了。

elements.text_en: Jax points to a Blackjack table.
elements.text_zh: Jax指了指一张二十一点的桌子。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Jake the snake. He’s a legend. Old school and entertaining.
elements.text_zh: 发牌的是Jake，人称“毒蛇”，他可是个传奇，很old school。

elements.text_en: Jake welcomes the three newcomers.
elements.text_zh: Jake热情地招呼这三位新来的。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Aloha and howdy. Have a seat, compadres.
elements.text_zh: Aloha（夏威夷语你好），Howdy（美西口语你好）。坐吧，朋友们。

elements.text_en: Jake rapidly shuffles the cards without looking.
elements.text_zh: Jake连看都不看，飞快地洗着牌。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You don’t use a card shoe?
elements.text_zh: 你不用发牌盒？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Standard for blackjack. Not worried about card counters?
elements.text_zh: 二十一点不是都用那个吗？不怕有人算牌？

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Ain’t how I learned the craft in Vegas, gent.
elements.text_zh: 我在拉斯维加斯学手艺的时候，可不是这么玩的，兄弟。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: I’ll keep your attention. No way to count.
elements.text_zh: 我会让你们根本没法算。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Rhythm of the cards and some sleight-of-hand.
elements.text_zh: 靠的是牌的节奏，再加点手上功夫。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: House rule, I have to stand on 17.
elements.text_zh: 按规矩，我拿到17点就得停。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Be clear when you make your call.
elements.text_zh: 你们要牌得说清楚。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Stand, Hit, Split, Double Down, or Surrender.
elements.text_zh: 停牌、要牌、分牌、加倍，或者投降。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I never surrender.
elements.text_zh: 我从不投降。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Even when it’s the smart play, amigo?
elements.text_zh: 就算那是最聪明的选择？

elements.text_en: Jake holds out two hands. Showing they are empty.
elements.text_zh: Jake摊开双手，示意自己手里是空的。

elements.text_en: Ready to cash in for some Blackjack?
elements.text_zh: 打算在这赢点儿钱吗我的朋友们？这就开始！

elements.text_en: Jake claps his hands together once. Three chips fall to the table.
elements.text_zh: Jake双手一拍，三枚筹码掉在桌上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some magic, as well. Very cool.
elements.text_zh: 你还会点魔术，挺帅的。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: One-hundred-dollar chips on the house.
elements.text_zh: 一百刀的筹码，算送你们的。

elements.text_en: Jake slowly moves a hand over the chips, and they seem to disappear.
elements.text_zh: Jake慢慢用手掠过筹码，筹码像是消失了一样。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: The house is fickle tonight. Let’s play Blackjack.
elements.text_zh: 今晚庄家心情多变，开始吧。

elements.text_en: Jax has the biggest pile of chips after nearly an hour.
elements.text_zh: 将近一个小时后，Jax面前的筹码堆成了小山。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Double Down.
elements.text_zh: 加倍。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Ten of diamonds. Fine lady has twenty. Dealer nineteen.
elements.text_zh: 方块十，美女二十点，庄家十九点。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: What about you, buck?
elements.text_zh: 你呢，兄弟？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Hit me.
elements.text_zh: 给我牌。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Five of clubs. You’re busted, bubba.
elements.text_zh: 梅花五，你爆牌了，老兄。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How is your system doing, Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 你的那套玩法套路，好用吗，Corbin？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Amateur hot streaks for you gals. It happens.
elements.text_zh: 你们还在新手保护期，算我让你们的。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: These lasses aren’t dabblers.
elements.text_zh: 这几个姑娘可不像是新手。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Just deal the cards. Less talk and fewer magic tricks.
elements.text_zh: 您只管发牌就行。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It throws me off.
elements.text_zh: 至于陪聊和变魔术，不劳您大驾。

elements.text_en: Mind if I take the fourth seat?
elements.text_zh: 我能坐第四个位置吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That voice? It sounds familiar.
elements.text_zh: 是……他？

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Three-person table. Casino rules say the players decide.
elements.text_zh: 这是三人桌，按赌场规矩，得玩家说了算。

elements.text_en: Roxie, is that you?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，是你吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie stares in stunned silence for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Roxie愣了好几秒，一句话都没说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe? What are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: Gabe？你到这儿来干什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Blackjack and roulette. Maybe some Baccarat.
elements.text_zh: 玩儿呗，玩二十一点、玩轮盘，还有百家乐。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You know what I mean.
elements.text_zh: 你知道我啥意思。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why are you here on the island?
elements.text_zh: 你为什么会来这儿？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Jake, are you due for a break?
elements.text_zh: Jake，要不您去休息一下？

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Yeah. I’ll be back in fifteen.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，我十五分钟后回来。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m here for a vacation. Free country, right.
elements.text_zh: 我来度个假，透个气，不允许？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just randomly picked this place?
elements.text_zh: 偏偏挑了这个地方？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What are you getting at, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你到底想说什么，Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t like to be stalked.
elements.text_zh: 你为什么跟到这儿来了？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Keep your voice down. Mind your language.
elements.text_zh: 注意你的用词。什么叫“跟”？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about the truth? Why are you here?
elements.text_zh: 这么多年你一点消息都没有。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I haven’t seen or heard from you in years.
elements.text_zh: 现在倒好，突然诈尸？

elements.text_en: Gabe moves closer to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Gabe朝Roxie走近了一步。

elements.text_en: Can’t we just have a calm conversation?
elements.text_zh: 我俩就不能好好聊几句吗？

elements.text_en: Gabe reaches out to touch Roxie’s shoulder.
elements.text_zh: Gabe用手轻轻拍了下Roxie的肩膀。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t touch me!
elements.text_zh: 别碰我！

elements.text_en: Corbin watches a man in a suit move closer.
elements.text_zh: Corbin注意到一个西装男靠近。

elements.text_en: Character Raymus, apparently staring at Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 男人站在那儿，明显正盯着Roxie的一举一动。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What’s this dude up to? Why is he staring at Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 那家伙想干嘛？干嘛一直盯着Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m out of here!
elements.text_zh: 我不玩了！

elements.text_en: Roxie walks away.
elements.text_zh: Roxie转身就走。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Crap!
elements.text_zh: 喂！

elements.text_en: Gabe walks off, and Corbin watches the man in the suit follow Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Gabe也走开了，Corbin看到那个西装男还跟着Roxie。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Jax chat.
elements.text_zh: Corbin找到Jax准备聊几句。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Who’s Gabe? What’s going on?
elements.text_zh: Gabe是谁？刚才是什么情况？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m not sure. I know some of their history.
elements.text_zh: 我也说不太清楚，只知道点他们以前的事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They started dating their last year in college.
elements.text_zh: 他们大学最后一年在一起的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie got a job, and Gabe went to law school. Lived in the same city.
elements.text_zh: 后来Roxie毕业找到工作，Gabe继续读法学院，两个人在同一个城市。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Kept dating. I think like for another year and a half.
elements.text_zh: 大概又在一起了一年多吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I don’t know why they broke up.
elements.text_zh: 最后具体怎么分的，我也不知道。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I met Roxie maybe a year later. We saw him once, at dinner.
elements.text_zh: 我后认识的Roxie，有次吃饭碰见Gabe。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He was on a date with some babe. He spotted Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 他当时跟一个女生在约会。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Acted like he didn’t. Roxie told me some of their history.
elements.text_zh: 假装没看见Roxie。Roxie就才跟我说了这些过往。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m gonna go find her.
elements.text_zh: 我去找她聊聊。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax chat.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax一边走一边聊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey girl, you and Gabe spiraled pretty quickly.
elements.text_zh: 喂，姐妹，你俩这火气窜挺快啊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Is there something I don’t know?
elements.text_zh: 是不是还有什么我不知道的？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Did he ever hurt you?
elements.text_zh: 他以前伤过你吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. No. Nothing like that.
elements.text_zh: 没有，没有那种事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was just shocked to see him.
elements.text_zh: 我就是突然看见他，有点懵。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s the first man I thought I loved.
elements.text_zh: 他是我第一个以为自己爱过的人。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I get it. Let’s find the roulette wheel.
elements.text_zh: 懂了。走吧，去轮盘那边。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax chat at the Roulette Table
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax在轮盘桌旁继续聊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: My first love was in college. So, I thought.
elements.text_zh: 我大学时候的初恋也是，当时真以为是爱情。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I blurted out, I love you. In bed, right after doing it.
elements.text_zh: 有次我们一起躺在床上，我突然说了句“我爱你”。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He grinned and said, Yeah, the sex is really good.
elements.text_zh: 他被我这句话吓到了，说，噢，好。穿上衣服就跑了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ouch. Those three words. Magic or devastation.
elements.text_zh: “我爱你”这三个字有时候是惊喜，有时候是惊吓。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I didn’t remember Gabe being so handsome.
elements.text_zh: 话说，以前没觉得Gabe这么帅呢。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I only saw him the one time. He is a fine-looking man.
elements.text_zh: 我之前倒也就见过他那一次。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, and he’s aged really well.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，现在状态更好了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Lawyer, right?
elements.text_zh: 他是律师对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Litigator. Became a managing partner a few years ago.
elements.text_zh: 诉讼律师，几年前选上了合伙人。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie! You’ve been cyber stalking him.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你该不会一直在网上偷偷关注他动向吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. No. I’ve checked his feeds a few times
elements.text_zh: 没有没有，就偶尔刷到过几次。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Home alone after a few glasses of wine. Curious.
elements.text_zh: 好奇的时候随便看看。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Is he married?
elements.text_zh: 他结婚了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Divorced, right before he made partner.
elements.text_zh: 离了，升合伙人之前离的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Major league stalking, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 喂！你还说没关注他！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I haven’t checked in like two years. Honestly.
elements.text_zh: 我真的两年没看了，真的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Maybe cut him some slack. Here he comes.
elements.text_zh: 过去的事儿就让它过去吧。诶，他来了。

elements.text_en: Gabe joins Jax and Roxie at the Roulette Table
elements.text_zh: Gabe走到轮盘桌旁。

elements.text_en: I come in peace. Let me start over.
elements.text_zh: 我没有恶意。我只想打声招呼。

elements.text_en: Hi, Roxie. Good to see you again.
elements.text_zh: “嗨，Roxie。又见面了”。就像这样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay, I’ll play along. Jax, Gabe. Gabe, this is Jax.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，那我配合一下你：Jax，这是Gabe。Gabe，这是Jax。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Full disclosure. I knew you were on the island. Saw you on the show.
elements.text_zh: 先说清楚，我知道你在岛上，是在节目宣传里看到的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It’s not like I’m stalking you.
elements.text_zh: 这不等于说我在跟你。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You sure you haven’t been tracking her?
elements.text_zh: 你确定不是有意的？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: No! What are you saying?
elements.text_zh: 没有，您这话说的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s joking. Weird sense of humor.
elements.text_zh: 她开玩笑的。逗你玩儿呢。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Anyway, I have a corporate client on the Big Island.
elements.text_zh: 总之，我在大岛有个客户。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I took care of some business. Thought it would be nice to see you.
elements.text_zh: 事情办完了，就想着顺便来看看你。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sorry about the creepy approach. You look great, by the way.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那样突然出现可能吓到你了，抱歉。不过，你状态真不错啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Apology accepted. I overreacted a bit. I’m sorry.
elements.text_zh: 好吧原谅你。我刚才也有点反应过激，抱歉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You look great as well. Want to join us?
elements.text_zh: 你状态也不错，要不要一起玩？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I like roulette. People think there is no strategy.
elements.text_zh: 我挺喜欢轮盘的，很多人觉得这游戏没技术含量。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s right. It’s not about predicting the ball.
elements.text_zh: 没错，这个不是靠猜球落哪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s about managing the bankroll and understanding the odds.
elements.text_zh: 而是看你会不会管钱，懂不懂概率。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Even money outside bet: red and black, odd and even.
elements.text_zh: 在外围下注：红黑、单双，都是一赔一。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you win, you start again with your base bet.
elements.text_zh: 赢了就回到最初的下注。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I know it. Double your next bet if you lose.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，输了就往上加一点。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: A risky strategy. Requires nerves of steel.
elements.text_zh: 你这路数风险并不小，得沉得住气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Surely, a litigator can take the pressure.
elements.text_zh: 诉讼律师的抗压能力，应该可以吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, but I prefer a smarter and slower play.
elements.text_zh: 是，但我更喜欢慢一点、稳一点的打法。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Fibonacci sequence. You know it?
elements.text_zh: 节奏是递进的，你懂吧？

elements.name: Roxie
