elements.text_en: Yeah, I know how it goes. Slow and boring.
elements.text_zh: 嗯我知道，但太慢了，会有点无聊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sounds like you two both love this game. I’ll watch.
elements.text_zh: 听你们俩聊就知道你俩都很厉害，我在旁边看你们玩。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s see who racks up the most chips.
elements.text_zh: 看看最后谁的筹码多！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I forgot you are like over-the-top competitive.
elements.text_zh: 你真是一点儿没变啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Me? Remember Saturday night board games.
elements.text_zh: 有吗？你还记不记得我们周六晚上玩桌游？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I caught you cheating during Monopoly.
elements.text_zh: 我抓到你玩大富翁作弊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Slipping money out of the bank.
elements.text_zh: 从银行里偷偷拿钱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I remember you claiming I cheated.
elements.text_zh: 对啊，某人当时直接揭发我来着，一点情面不留的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Saturday night board games.
elements.text_zh: 每周六的桌游局，就是尽情聊天和放松的时刻。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Those were some great times.
elements.text_zh: 也是一段美好回忆啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Just relax and chat. You know my favorite?
elements.text_zh: 你知道我最喜欢哪个游戏吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jenga Tower. You always cheated.
elements.text_zh: 是不是叠叠乐。你老耍赖。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I didn’t cheat. Just tapped the table to pressure you.
elements.text_zh: 我哪有，我只是给你点心理压力。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I was thinking of the battleship game with a twist.
elements.text_zh: 我最喜欢的，其实是那个改版的海战棋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: With a twist? I don’t remember.
elements.text_zh: 有改版的吗？我怎么不记得。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Strip battleship. You loved it.
elements.text_zh: 就是加了点“小惩罚”的那种，你当时挺投入的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Don’t mind me. No judgment.
elements.text_zh: 你们……当我……什么都没听见啊，我不评价。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Strip battleship. Definitely good times.
elements.text_zh: 那个版本，确实挺有意思的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s focus on Roulette, okay.
elements.text_zh: 我们还是专心玩轮盘吧，好吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sure, let’s cash in.
elements.text_zh: 行，下注吧。

elements.text_en: Nearly an hour later. They both are doing well.
elements.text_zh: 差不多一个小时后，两个人都赚了不少。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You ready to admit it? I’ve got the edge.
elements.text_zh: 你准备认输了吗？我这边好像多一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think I’m doing better. You cashed in with more than me.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得算下来我应该更赚。你本来兑的筹码就比我多啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax. You make the call.
elements.text_zh: Jax，你来当裁判。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Why don’t we call it a draw?
elements.text_zh: 要不就算平手？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. Okay. Take a break?
elements.text_zh: 嗯，好吧，休息一下？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sure. Let’s not cash out yet.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，歇会儿再玩啊，先别急着走。

elements.text_en: Corbin joins them at the Roulette Table.
elements.text_zh: Corbin走到轮盘桌这边。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Mind if I join you?
elements.text_zh: 我能一起吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure. I don’t think I introduced you before.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，我好像还没正式介绍过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A bit of misunderstanding earlier. Everything is cool now.
elements.text_zh: 刚才有点小误会，现在没事了。

elements.text_en: Roxie introduces them, and they exchange pleasantries.
elements.text_zh: Roxie给两人做了介绍，大家客套了几句。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You two knew each other years ago?
elements.text_zh: 你们以前认识？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Dated for more than two years, right?
elements.text_zh: 交往了两年多，对吧？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, through the first year of law school.
elements.text_zh: 对，直到我读完法学院第一年。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He’s looking to see if there is still a spark.
elements.text_zh: 看样子，他是想确认和Roxie还有没有感觉。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Lawyer. What brought you here?
elements.text_zh: 律师？什么风把您吹到这儿来的？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Kind of an out-of-the-way place.
elements.text_zh: 要我说，这地方还挺偏的。

elements.text_en: Corbin wants to know what Gabe is up to.
elements.text_zh: Corbin想弄清Gabe到底想干嘛。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I had business and thought I would pop in and see Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我来这边处理点工作，顺便看看Roxie。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She seemed surprised to see you.
elements.text_zh: 她见到你，好像挺意外的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You just parachuted in? After how many years?
elements.text_zh: 这么多年了，怎么突然又出现了？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Why? You have a problem, dude?
elements.text_zh: 怎么？你有意见？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Just trying to figure out what’s going on.
elements.text_zh: 我只是想搞清楚现在什么情况。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Like I said. It was a misunderstanding earlier.
elements.text_zh: 我说过了，刚才只是个误会。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Okay. I didn’t mean to make waves.
elements.text_zh: 行，我也没想搞事情。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s play some more Roulette.
elements.text_zh: 继续玩轮盘吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You want to cash in, Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 你要不要先去兑筹码，Corbin？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I think I’ll just watch for now.
elements.text_zh: 先不用了。

elements.text_en: Corbin spots the suspicious bloke in the suit again.
elements.text_zh: Corbin又注意到那个穿西装的家伙。

elements.text_en: Image of Raymus with the handle of a pistol under his jacket.
elements.text_zh: 他看到那人外套下露出一样不对劲的东西。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He’s following Roxie, and he’s got a gun.
elements.text_zh: 是一把手枪！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I need backup.
elements.text_zh: 他在跟着Roxie，而且还带了枪。我得找个人帮忙。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m gonna see what Lance is up to.
elements.text_zh: 我去看看Lance在干嘛。

elements.text_en: Corbin heads out to find Lance.
elements.text_zh: Corbin出去找Lance。

elements.text_en: Corbin finds Lance at the slot machines.
elements.text_zh: Corbin在老虎机区找到了Lance。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’ve been looking for you.
elements.text_zh: 我找你半天了诶。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You’ve been at the one-armed bandits this whole time?
elements.text_zh: 你一直在这边玩？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No. I played some craps. Sat at one of the bars for a while.
elements.text_zh: 没有，先玩了会儿别的，又在酒吧坐了一会儿。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Been here thirty minutes. Check out the red mini-skirt.
elements.text_zh: 在这儿差不多半小时了。你看那边那个红裙子的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She’s been eyeballing me.
elements.text_zh: 她一直在看我。

elements.text_en: Corbin watches the woman for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Corbin看了那女人几秒。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Seems like you’re watching her. Not vice versa.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么看着倒像是你在看她。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Looks like she is with a boyfriend or husband.
elements.text_zh: 她好像是跟她老公一起来的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Looks like a brother or cousin, maybe.
elements.text_zh: 不，应该是表哥什么的吧。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She just kissed him. On the lips.
elements.text_zh: 她刚亲了那个人。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. Why were you looking for me?
elements.text_zh: 好吧好吧。找我什么事儿？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: There’s a stalker shadowing Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 有个穿西装的，一直盯着Roxie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What are you babbling about?
elements.text_zh: “盯着”是什么意思？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You trying to punk me?
elements.text_zh: 你可别跟我开玩笑啊！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m not messing with you. I’m not imagining things.
elements.text_zh: 我没时间跟你开玩笑，我也不觉得我是危言耸听。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I saw him when we were at the Blackjack table.
elements.text_zh: 在二十一点那边我就注意到了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He was staring at her.
elements.text_zh: 他一直盯着Roxie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: So, a lot of guys stare at Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 盯着Roxie的男人多了去了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He followed her after she argued with her ex-boyfriend.
elements.text_zh: 从她跟前男友吵完架开始，西装男就一直跟着她。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ex-boyfriend? What’s that about?
elements.text_zh: 前男友？这又是哪一出？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Whole other story. We don’t have time for that.
elements.text_zh: 说来话长，没时间解释了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: The stalker is watching her at the Roulette table right now.
elements.text_zh: 那家伙现在就在轮盘那边。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I saw a gun under his jacket.
elements.text_zh: 我看到他外套下面有枪。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re sure he had a gun?
elements.text_zh: 你确定没看错？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’m sure.
elements.text_zh: 我确定。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie already told us off before. White knight crap.
elements.text_zh: Roxie之前就警告过我们，别乱当英雄。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She doesn’t need to be rescued. Blah. Blah. Blah.
elements.text_zh: 说什么她不需要人保护。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He’s got a gun. We need to keep an eye on him.
elements.text_zh: 但那人不对劲，我们得盯紧他。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah. Okay. Let’s roll.
elements.text_zh: 行，走。

elements.text_en: The roulette wheel slows down, and the ball comes to a stop.
elements.text_zh: 轮盘慢慢停下。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Black Fifteen.
elements.text_zh: 黑色十五。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ooh, yeah. I’m on a hot streak!
elements.text_zh: 太好了，我手气正顺。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’re shadowing my bets! You’re riding me.
elements.text_zh: 你怎么老“追”我啊？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way! Other way around.
elements.text_zh: 少来，是你在“追”我。

elements.text_en: Roxie kisses Gabe on the cheek.
elements.text_zh: Gabe凑过Roxie耳边，小声说了句什么。Roxie有些脸红。

elements.text_en: Roxie whispers in his ear ‘You wish I was riding you.’
elements.text_zh: 她轻轻地在Gabe脸颊上亲了一下。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Are we still talking about Roulette?
elements.text_zh: 你就只给我一个“外祖母一样的吻”？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes, of course. What did you think?
elements.text_zh: 对啊，你以为呢？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m going to the bar for a bit.
elements.text_zh: 我这灯泡有点儿亮啊，我要去酒吧坐一会儿。

elements.text_en: A chilling voice from behind after Jax leaves.
elements.text_zh: Jax刚走，背后传来一个冷冷的声音。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Games of chance, sister.
elements.text_zh: 碰运气的游戏好玩吗，姐姐？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Things were going so good.
elements.text_zh: 这人哪儿冒出来的……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Here to throw a curse on my luck?
elements.text_zh: 运气？我运气好着呢。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Such droll attempts at humor.
elements.text_zh: 你这是跑来给我添堵来了？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Your little witch barbs are tedious.
elements.text_zh: 天天这样，不嫌烦吗。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I recognize this handsome beefcake.
elements.text_zh: 这位我认识，大帅哥啊。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Gabriel, the angel. Right?
elements.text_zh: Gabriel，对吧？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Some years ago. Renewed love or just lust?
elements.text_zh: 都这么多年了。你们这是旧情复燃了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven, don’t cause a problem.
elements.text_zh: Raven，别惹事。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Problem? Me? Never, darling sister.
elements.text_zh: 惹事？我？从来没有。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Gabriel, have you heard the news?
elements.text_zh: Gabriel，你听说了吗？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Roxie’s new career. Striptease artist.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的羽毛舞新“事业”。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Totally nude. Was it just topless, sister dear?
elements.text_zh: 台下的男士看到她，全都要疯掉了，对吧？姐姐？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What’s she talking about?
elements.text_zh: 她在说什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A competition, we went for fun.
elements.text_zh: 比赛而已，大家图个热闹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I wasn’t nude.
elements.text_zh: 我没做什么出格的事。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You danced topless in front of strangers?
elements.text_zh: 你在那么多人面前跳羽毛舞还不算？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hold on, sport. What if I did?
elements.text_zh: 等等，就算我做了什么出格的事儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is that any of your business?
elements.text_zh: 难不成，这还归你管？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sorry, I guess not. Doesn’t sound like you.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我不是这意思。嗯，我知道你不是那种人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A nice upscale place. Amateur night. I did a feather dance.
elements.text_zh: 那地方很正规，逼格也很高，我只是体验一下异域风情的舞蹈。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We all took turns, and it was fun.
elements.text_zh: 大家精心打扮，轮流上场表演，很轻松也很有趣。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Okay, yeah. That paints a different picture.
elements.text_zh: 那听起来完全不是刚那么回事儿了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I heard it was quite raunchy.
elements.text_zh: 不不不，我听说场面挺夸张的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Are you spinning a tale, sis?
elements.text_zh: 姐姐，你该不会想就这么骗了他吧？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I hear your boy toy, Lance, put on quite the show.
elements.text_zh: 我还听说Lance挺抢眼的，他是你谁来着。酒店你那玩，不用我说了吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s not my boy toy.
elements.text_zh: 他不是你说的那样。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Sexcapades with you two. Body painting, massage.
elements.text_zh: 你们玩的那些花样，真让人脑补。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: One can only imagine what else there is.
elements.text_zh: 想想就够刺激的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I need to run. Tootles dear.
elements.text_zh: 我得走了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Nice to see you again, Gabriel.
elements.text_zh: 很高兴再见到你，Gabriel。

elements.text_en: Raven cackles wildly as she rushes off.
elements.text_zh: Raven笑着离开。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I remember things between you two were awkward.
elements.text_zh: 我记得你们两姐妹，一直不太对付。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That was way beyond difficult.
elements.text_zh: 那可不只是闹别扭。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. That was actually pretty mild.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那样的，已经算很克制了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t want to get into it.
elements.text_zh: 我不想聊她。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sure. Okay.
elements.text_zh: 好，明白。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: So, the deal with Lance. Me being here going to be a problem?
elements.text_zh: 那谁……Lance。他会不会误会？我在这儿会不会添乱？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you mean?
elements.text_zh: 什么意思？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Ex-boyfriend shows up. He might read it wrong.
elements.text_zh: 你的前任突然出现，他会不会……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re an old friend. He’s a friend.
elements.text_zh: 你是老朋友，他也是老朋友，有什么问题吗。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m a mature woman and a free agent.
elements.text_zh: 我现在还单身。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It should be fine if you boys act like adults.
elements.text_zh: 只要你们都成熟点，就不会有啥事儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If they keep their alpha egos in check.
elements.text_zh: 但凡你们几个把大男子主义收一收，就不会有问题。

elements.text_en: Jax returns from the bar.
elements.text_zh: Jax从酒吧回来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: How about some more Blackjack?
elements.text_zh: 要不要再玩会儿二十一点啊？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: See if Jake's table is open.
elements.text_zh: 看看Jake的桌子开没开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds good.
elements.text_zh: 好啊。

elements.text_en: Jax, Roxie, and Gabe find that Jake is on a break.
elements.text_zh: 他们发现Jake在休息。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: His breaks are short. Let’s wait.
elements.text_zh: 他休息不了多久，我们等等吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: There are some other open tables.
elements.text_zh: 旁边倒是也有空桌。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: It’s worth waiting a few minutes.
elements.text_zh: 但为了Jake，等几分钟值。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A great dealer. Does magic, witty, and good sense of humor.
elements.text_zh: 他手法很好，也挺会调节气氛。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He handles cards like no one you have ever seen.
elements.text_zh: 玩牌很有一套。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Okay. Sounds like it’s worth the wait.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我们等等吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I can teach you gals how to win at Blackjack.
elements.text_zh: 一会儿玩二十一点，我可以带带你们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. We already heard that from one man tonight.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，今晚已经有人这么说过了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sad little pile of chips when he left the table.
elements.text_zh: 结果走的时候筹码都没剩几个。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I kicked your butt at the Roulette wheel.
elements.text_zh: 轮盘那局可是我赢的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax is gonna take you to school here.
elements.text_zh: 说起二十一点，我们都没Jax厉害。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: My backside is just fine from Roulette
elements.text_zh: 我轮盘那局可不算输给你。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: And talk is cheap, ladies.
elements.text_zh: 光说不练假把式。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You got some game, Jax?
elements.text_zh: 你玩儿二十一点真的挺厉害吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I know when to hit and when to split.
elements.text_zh: 算是吧，我知道什么时候该要，什么时候该分。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Lance talk quietly from a distance.
elements.text_zh: 远处，Corbin和Lance压低声音，好像在商量什么。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: There’s Roxie at the Blackjack table.
elements.text_zh: Roxie那桌。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Is that the stalker? She’s talking to him.
elements.text_zh: 跟他说话的那个，是不是你说的西装男。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No, that’s the ex-boyfriend.
elements.text_zh: 不是，那是她前男友。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She keeps touching his arm. He's not exactly homely.
elements.text_zh: 她好像挺亲近他的。那男的长的吧，也还行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Do you see the stalker?
elements.text_zh: 那个可以的人去哪儿了呢？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No. Looks like they just got to the Blackjack table.
elements.text_zh: 我没看到。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’ll let you know when I spot him.
elements.text_zh: 一会儿看见了提醒你。

elements.text_en: Jax waves at Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: Jax朝他们招手。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Lance! Corbin! Join us.
elements.text_zh: Lance！Corbin！过来一起玩啊。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Lance join them at the Blackjack table.
elements.text_zh: 两人走到桌边。

elements.text_en: Roxie does introductions of Lance and Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Roxie给他们做了介绍。

elements.text_en: The two men stare at each other like gladiators.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Gabe两人互相打量了几秒，气氛有点怪怪的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Old friend from college, really?
elements.text_zh: 你们是……大学校友之类的？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, we were pretty close.
elements.text_zh: 是的，以前挺熟的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stop these two before they go to war.
elements.text_zh: 他俩可别吵起来了。我得说点什么打断一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Corbin, we were just talking Blackjack.
elements.text_zh: 诶，Corbin，我们说要玩二十一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe figured he was going to teach us girls how to play.
elements.text_zh: Gabe刚也说他可以带带我们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I explained how Jax already taught you a lesson.
elements.text_zh: 我跟他说你玩之前也说带我们来着，结果发现Jax比你还厉害。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Hold on there. You two held your own.
elements.text_zh: 别说了，你们确实很会玩。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Nobody took me to school.
elements.text_zh: 但我玩得也不赖。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not cool to talk down to women, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Gabe，你说带带她们就有点小瞧人了啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That’s not what was happening, dude.
elements.text_zh: 不是那个意思。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Women can compete with men, most anywhere.
elements.text_zh: 男女平等，共同进步嘛。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: A real man understands the balance.
elements.text_zh: 别说得好像男的比女的厉害似的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? You’re going to lecture about this?
elements.text_zh: 金牌四分卫给我们讲男女平权？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: As a professional football player. I understand competition.
elements.text_zh: 我也就是跟他分享一些和女生相处需要避雷的点罢了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Maybe you don’t get it.
elements.text_zh: 不过他听没听懂我就不知道了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: American football. What a ridiculous sport.
elements.text_zh: 你打橄榄球？那真是个可笑的运动。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t go there, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 快打住，Gabe。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Really? You play any sports?
elements.text_zh: 噢？那你玩什么球？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Competitive team sports. Not whacking a golf ball down a fairway.
elements.text_zh: 我踢足球。那才是真正的团队运动。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: College soccer, varsity four years. Real football.
elements.text_zh: 大学四年，我都在校队。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Where we actually use our feet.
elements.text_zh: 大量时间泡在足球场上。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: National championship, junior year. All-American senior year.
elements.text_zh: 我们队大三那年全国冠军，大四拿下“全美最佳阵容”。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Pretty much non-stop running. Got to be physically fit
elements.text_zh: 一到足球场上你基本得不停地跑。身体素质必须过硬。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You spent most of your time in huddles.
elements.text_zh: 不像橄榄球，每个回合之间，基本都在干站着。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Standing around between plays.
elements.text_zh: 足球，那才是刺激的运动。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Soccer. Real exciting game. Lots of scoring.
elements.text_zh: 对啊，你们足球可真“刺激”。进球可“真多”。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’re a quarterback, right?
elements.text_zh: 你是四分卫，对吧？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: A lot of time with your hand on a man's butt.
elements.text_zh: 紧跟在中锋屁股后面的角色。

elements.text_en: Lance moves toward Gabe, and Roxie steps between them.
elements.text_zh: Lance往前一步，Roxie立刻挡在他和Gabe中间。

elements.text_en: Jake the Snake returns from break.
elements.text_zh: Jake结束休息回来了。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Anybody ready for Blackjack?
elements.text_zh: 咱们可以开始了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thank God. Just in time.
elements.text_zh: 太好了，您来得正是时候。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes! Definitely.
elements.text_zh: 我们开始吧。

elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin Watch Blackjack.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin在旁边看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Corbin, you going to join?
elements.text_zh: Corbin，你不上吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I think I will sit out for a while.
elements.text_zh: 我先歇会儿。

elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin talk quietly as they watch.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin一边看一边聊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I don’t like this, Gabe, dude.
elements.text_zh: 我看Gabe有点不顺眼呢。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Soccer? Who watches soccer?
elements.text_zh: 足球？谁看？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Isn’t it the most-watched sport in the world?
elements.text_zh: 那不是全球收看人数最高的运动项目吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That’s what people claim. Boring, big B.
elements.text_zh: 大家这么说而已。无聊得不行。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Forget about him. There he is. The stalker.
elements.text_zh: 别管Gabe了。我跟你说的西装男就在那。

elements.text_en: Lance studies a guy with a bulge under his jacket.
elements.text_zh: Lance盯着那个外套下有鼓包的家伙。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, he’s definitely watching Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 你说得没错，他就是在盯着Roxie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He seems intense. Focused on her.
elements.text_zh: 盯得怪紧的啊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That definitely could be a gun.
elements.text_zh: 那极有可能就是一把枪。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It’s a gun. I saw it.
elements.text_zh: 我看清楚了。就是！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Okay. We play it cool.
elements.text_zh: 小点儿声，别打草惊蛇。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie will be ready to leave soon.
elements.text_zh: Roxie应该很快就要走了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Maybe she’ll ditch, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 也许她会找机会甩掉Gabe那家伙。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: A pair of eights for the courtly squire.
elements.text_zh: 给这位绅士一对八。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Splitting and matching five hundred on each.
elements.text_zh: 分牌，两手各加五百。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Ace of hearts. Looking like a sound move.
elements.text_zh: 红心A，不错。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Nineteen on this hand, stick.
elements.text_zh: 这一手十九点，停。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Nine of clubs. The gentleman showing seventeen on this hand.
elements.text_zh: 梅花九，庄家这手十七点。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hit me again.
elements.text_zh: 再来一张。

elements.name: Jake
elements.text_en: Four of hearts. Twenty-one. Nicely played.
elements.text_zh: 红心四，二十一点。打得漂亮。

elements.text_en: Gabe crows as Roxie and Jax both go bust, and Jake has eighteen.
elements.text_zh: Gabe一脸得意，而Roxie和Jax双双爆牌，Jake十八点。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m the teacher, and I’m gonna spank you both.
elements.text_zh: 我说要带带你们，没说错吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Such a classy guy.
elements.text_zh: 别急，刚热身而已。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Trash talking goes both ways, gals.
elements.text_zh: 你们这热身也热太久了吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie talks trash when Jax and her have a long run, and Gabe goes dry.
elements.text_zh: 后来Roxie和Jax连赢，而Gabe开始走背字。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who is spanking who?
elements.text_zh: 现在是谁带谁？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Two girls gonna make you cry?
elements.text_zh: 我们两个女生要把你赢哭了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gone kind of quiet, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Gabe？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That’s enough, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 够了，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hold on. Trash-talking goes both ways.
elements.text_zh: 不是你先开的头吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You are all about trash now, aren’t you?
elements.text_zh: 赢了几把挺得意啊？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That’s what Raven said.
elements.text_zh: 也许Raven说得没错。

elements.text_en: Roxie jumps out of her chair.
elements.text_zh: Roxie猛地站起来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We were having fun. What kind of crap is that?
elements.text_zh: 什么叫Raven说得没错？你把话说清楚一点。

elements.text_en: Gabe gets out of his seat and reaches for Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Gabe也站起来，伸手想拉住Roxie。

elements.text_en: I’m sorry. I lost my temper.
elements.text_zh: 对不起，我刚才有点上头了。

elements.text_en: Roxie pulls away.
elements.text_zh: Roxie甩开他的手。

elements.text_en: Don’t grab me.
elements.text_zh: 别碰我。

elements.text_en: Lance sees the stalker moving toward Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Lance看到那个可疑的人此刻正朝Roxie靠近。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He’s making a move.
elements.text_zh: 这家伙他要动手了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Corbin was right, he’s got a gun.
elements.text_zh: Corbin说得没错，他有枪。

elements.text_en: Lance shouts as he and Corbin swing into action.
elements.text_zh: Lance一边喊一边和Corbin冲了过去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Take him down! He’s got a gun!
elements.text_zh: 放倒他！他身上有枪！

elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin tackle Raymus.
elements.text_zh: 两人把Raymus按在地上。

elements.text_en: Raymus on the ground with Lance and Corbin on top of him.
elements.text_zh: Raymus被他们狠狠压住。

elements.name: Raymus
elements.text_en: Get off me. You fools.
elements.text_zh: 放开我，你们疯了吗。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Call security. Dudes got a gun.
elements.text_zh: 叫安保！这人有枪！

elements.name: Raymus
elements.text_en: I’m the security manager. Get off my man.
elements.text_zh: 我是安保主管。放开他。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Your man?
elements.text_zh: 你的人？

elements.name: Raymus
elements.text_en: Yeah. Undercover security.
elements.text_zh: 对，我是便衣安保。

elements.name: Raymus
elements.text_en: I thought this guy was harassing the woman.
elements.text_zh: 我以为这位男士想要骚扰这位女士。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You mean Gabe? Just an argument.
elements.text_zh: 你是说Gabe？我们刚只是吵了两句。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin. What the hell?
elements.text_zh: Lance，Corbin，你们这又是在干什么？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: We thought he was stalking you.
elements.text_zh: 我们以为他在跟踪你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ehh… What did I tell you before?
elements.text_zh: 呃……我之前怎么跟你们说的？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You guys are seriously out of date.
elements.text_zh: 你们这反应也太过激了，随时准备英雄救美吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie can take care of herself. Right babe.
elements.text_zh: Roxie又不是什么待宰羔羊，她能照顾好自己，对吧？

elements.text_en: Roxie kisses Gabe on the cheek, and they walk away.
elements.text_zh: Roxie轻轻亲了Gabe一下的脸颊，两人一起离开。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Dude is getting on my nerves.
elements.text_zh: 这家伙真招人烦。

elements.text_en: Narration: Roxie and Archer meet at a Garden Fountain
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Archer在花园喷泉旁见面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good to see you.
elements.text_zh: 好久不见。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yes, we haven’t seen each other for a bit.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，有一阵子没见了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Work has been busy.
elements.text_zh: 最近工作挺忙。

elements.text_en: A dog runs past them.
elements.text_zh: 一只狗从他们身边跑过去。

elements.text_en: Chasing a bird, I think.
elements.text_zh: 狗狗好像在追一只鸟。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Remember the puppy?
elements.text_zh: 还记得那只小狗吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sure, on the observation deck.
elements.text_zh: 当然，在观景台那次。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: First time we met. A pleasant evening, together.
elements.text_zh: 我们第一次见面的地方，那晚挺美好的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The puppy was reunited with his human family.
elements.text_zh: 后来小狗也找到它的主人了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Did you know that time with a pet lowers blood pressure?
elements.text_zh: 你知道吗，跟宠物待在一起会让人放松。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I remember reading that.
elements.text_zh: 哈哈，好像是有这个说法。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Speaking of animals. Would you like to see some local wildlife?
elements.text_zh: 要不要改天一起去看看这边的野生动物？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. What do you have in mind?
elements.text_zh: 好啊，你怎么安排？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I have a long-term rental cabin. We can do some hiking.
elements.text_zh: 我有个长租的木屋，我们可以去木屋附近徒步看看。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer make plans for a visit to the cabin.
elements.text_zh: 他们开始计划去木屋周边的徒步行程。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is wonderful. Like we are in the middle of nowhere.
elements.text_zh: 这地方真不错，秘境一般的存在。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The air is so fresh.
elements.text_zh: 空气也很清新。

elements.text_en: Archer crouches down.
elements.text_zh: Archer蹲了下来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: See these red flowers. Hibiscus.
elements.text_zh: 看，这有一些红色的花。是木槿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They are beautiful.
elements.text_zh: 好漂亮。

elements.text_en: Archer grabs a few handfuls and puts them in a plastic bag.
elements.text_zh: Archer摘了一些花儿，装进一个袋子里。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Makes a nice tea. Good for the digestive system.
elements.text_zh: 木槿可以用来泡茶，有助于消化。

elements.text_en: Archer stands up and points at another plant.
elements.text_zh: Archer站起来，指了指另一种植物。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Guavas, the ripe red ones are really tasty.
elements.text_zh: 这是番石榴，果实成熟之后味道很不错。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Doesn’t look like any of them are ready.
elements.text_zh: 不过看起来还要等等。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Close your eyes and just relax.
elements.text_zh: 闭上眼睛，放松一下。

elements.text_en: Roxie feels her pulse slowing and hears wild birds chirping.
elements.text_zh: Roxie感觉心跳慢了下来，周围是各种鸟儿的叫声。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So many song birds. So peaceful.
elements.text_zh: 好多鸟，这里好安静。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah. The nesting birds are just a short distance ahead.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，鸟儿筑巢的地方就在前面不远。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A great spot for some trail mix and sandwiches.
elements.text_zh: 这里很适合坐下来吃点东西。

elements.text_en: Archer looks through binoculars as they stop along the trail.
elements.text_zh: 他们在路边停下，Archer用望远镜看着远处。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We're lucky. A nest with three hatchlings.
elements.text_zh: 我们运气不错，一个巢里有三只小家伙。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A few days old, I would guess.
elements.text_zh: 看起来也就出生没几天。

elements.text_en: Archer gives Roxie the binoculars and points to the spot.
elements.text_zh: Archer把望远镜递给Roxie，指了指方向。

elements.text_en: Oh my. They are so tiny.
elements.text_zh: 哇，它们好小好萌啊。

elements.text_en: There’s the momma. I guess it’s the momma.
elements.text_zh: 那一只，是鸟妈妈吧？我猜。

elements.text_en: She’s feeding them. Now she’s flying away
elements.text_zh: 她在喂它们……现在飞走了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No! No! One of them fell out of the nest.
elements.text_zh: 不！不！有一只鸟宝宝掉下来了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That chick is going to die!
elements.text_zh: 不好！

elements.text_en: Roxie runs toward the spot with Archer chasing behind.
elements.text_zh: Roxie朝那边奋力跑去，Archer紧跟在后面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s alive. Let’s get it back up there.
elements.text_zh: 它还活着，得送它回去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Medical rescue team is here, little one.
elements.text_zh: 小家伙，你的救援队到了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Okay. I have some cotton gloves.
elements.text_zh: 好，得先戴上棉手套。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We don’t want our scent on it.
elements.text_zh: 一定不能留下人的味道。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It will get tossed out if it has a human scent.
elements.text_zh: 不然它可能会被再丢出来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: How are we going to get it up there?
elements.text_zh: 那怎么把它送回巢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about girls on top?
elements.text_zh: 要不我把你举高？

elements.text_en: Archer stumbles a bit with Roxie sitting on his shoulders.
elements.text_zh: Roxie坐在Archer肩上，他有点站不稳。

elements.text_en: Steady. I’m carrying a baby here.
elements.text_zh: 稳住噢，我手里还有一个“小朋友”呢。

elements.text_en: Roxie is holding the baby bird in her gloved hands.
elements.text_zh: Roxie戴着手套，小心地托着那只雏鸟。

elements.text_en: Yeah, I can reach. Move closer.
elements.text_zh: 可以了，应该够得着，再靠近一点点就行。

elements.text_en: An adult bird swoops at Roxie and chirps in distress.
elements.text_zh: 一只大鸟突然俯冲过来，急得冲Roxie鸣叫。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Chill out, momma. We’re rescuing your baby.
elements.text_zh: 别紧张，我们在帮你。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer watch from the ground minutes later.
elements.text_zh: 几分钟后，两人站在下面看着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The happy family is back together. Awesome.
elements.text_zh: 一家子又团聚了，太好了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Amazing. Wild animals take care of their babies.
elements.text_zh: 真神奇，野生动物真的很顾自己的孩子。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A lot of diversity in the animal kingdom for caring for the young.
elements.text_zh: 动物世界照顾后代的方式也很多样。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Female lions hunt and do most of the caregiving.
elements.text_zh: 比如母狮负责狩猎，也承担大部分照料。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The males strut about and guard the pride.
elements.text_zh: 公狮更多是巡逻，守着族群。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Kind of like the traditional old school American way of life.
elements.text_zh: 有点像传统老派的家庭分工。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Do you think men and women are fundamentally different?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得男女在本质上真的不一样吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Beyond basic biology.
elements.text_zh: 不只是生理层面那种。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer discuss life as they hike.
elements.text_zh: 两人一边走一边聊。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s a dicey subject.
elements.text_zh: 这话题有点敏感啊。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We are good enough friends to venture there.
elements.text_zh: 没事，就我俩，你随便说说呗。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A German doctor wrote a book about a hundred years ago.
elements.text_zh: 之前有个德国医生写过一本书。说女性天生心智薄弱。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The basic premise was the weak minds of women.
elements.text_zh: 你肯定会觉得，嚯，这说法有够蠢的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The state of medicine and misogynistic society for decades.
elements.text_zh: 一百年前嘛。医学水平就那样，社会观念也不行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some men still think like that.
elements.text_zh: 可怕的是现在仍然有些男人这么想。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Recent decades brought a new view. Our brains are the same.
elements.text_zh: 不过现在新的说法是，男女大脑没有区别，他们行为上的差异都是文化的产物。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Our behavior was all cultural. We now realize that’s wrong.
elements.text_zh: 听上去是不是也有点玄学？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I think there are some inherent differences, but mostly the same.
elements.text_zh: 要我说，男女先天差异肯定有，但不大。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A lot that is acquired through parental influence and culture.
elements.text_zh: 所以男女本质上不一样吗？我不觉得。大部分差异是后天形成的，无关男女。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe we should enjoy the differences with mutual respect.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，尊重差异，享受差异就好。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s a great way to put it.
elements.text_zh: 没错！

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Vive la difference, as the French say.
elements.text_zh: 就像法国人老爱说：差异万岁。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We're circling back to the cabin. It's not far.
elements.text_zh: 小木屋就快到了。

elements.text_en: Roxie falls to the ground.
elements.text_zh: Roxie突然脚下一滑，摔倒在地。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ow! Ow! My ankle.
elements.text_zh: 哎哟！哎哟！我的脚踝……

elements.text_en: Archer scrambles over and crouches down.
elements.text_zh: Archer赶紧跑过来，蹲下身。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: These tree roots are dangerous. I’ve gotten tripped up here.
elements.text_zh: 这些树根很容易绊人，我自己也在这儿摔过。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I should have warned you.
elements.text_zh: 该早一点提醒你的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let me get your boot off. Can you rotate your foot?
elements.text_zh: 我先帮你把靴子脱了。慢慢试一试，你的脚能活动吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, but it hurts a little.
elements.text_zh: 好像可以，不过有点疼。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s sprained. It's not broken. I’ll take care of you.
elements.text_zh: 是扭伤，不是骨折。一会儿简单处理一下就没事了。

elements.text_en: Archer piggybacks Roxie along the trail.
elements.text_zh: Archer背着Roxie沿着小路往回走。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Are you getting tired? You need to take a break?
elements.text_zh: 你累不累？要不要歇一下？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah. You weigh a ton.
elements.text_zh: 有点累。没想到你这么重。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Excuse me?
elements.text_zh: 你说什么？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Just kidding. I’m good. We're almost there.
elements.text_zh: 开玩笑呢。不用歇了，我们都快到了。

elements.text_en: Archer helps Roxie to a sofa in the Great Room.
elements.text_zh: Archer把Roxie扶到木屋大客厅的沙发上。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Maybe you should stay the night.
elements.text_zh: 要不你今晚就住这儿吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I know you planned to have dinner with Jax in town.
elements.text_zh: 你原本打算跟Jax在镇上吃饭吧，要不要提前跟她说？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow! This is how you trap women in your forest retreat.
elements.text_zh: 哇，这就是你在森林小屋里“留住”女生的方式吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I thought it would be . . .
elements.text_zh: 我本来是想……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m just kidding. You're right. I’ll text Jax.
elements.text_zh: 我逗你呢。你说得对，我给Jax发个消息。

elements.text_en: Archer cleans Roxie’s foot and ankle and wraps it with a brace.
elements.text_zh: Archer帮Roxie清理脚踝，又用护具固定好。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Rest it on this footstool. We will wait for the ice pack.
elements.text_zh: 把脚放在这个脚凳上，一会儿冰袋好了敷一敷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I have a bit of head headache.
elements.text_zh: 我有点头疼。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Tension headache, probably.
elements.text_zh: 多半是紧张引起的。

elements.text_en: Roxie gulps down a few aspirin with a glass of water.
elements.text_zh: Roxie喝了点水，吃了几片阿司匹林。

elements.text_en: Archer steps behind her, standing on the floor behind the couch.
elements.text_zh: Archer走到她身后，站在沙发后面。

elements.text_en: Close your eyes and lean back. A neck massage will do the trick.
elements.text_zh: 头疼可以按一按脖子。这样，你往后靠，把眼睛闭上。

elements.text_en: Those muscles are tight. Let’s work out those stress knots.
elements.text_zh: 这块肌肉还挺紧的。

elements.text_en: That feels good. So good.
elements.text_zh: 哇，舒服多了。

elements.text_en: Roxie's eyes flutter open as Archer finishes.
elements.text_zh: Archer停下时，Roxie慢慢睁开眼。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You feel better?
elements.text_zh: 好点了吗？

elements.text_en: After he finishes, Roxie reaches back, pulling Archer into a kiss.
elements.text_zh: Roxie回头拉住他，轻轻亲了一下。

elements.text_en: Then the soft kiss turns into a long, passionate one...
elements.text_zh: 这个轻吻慢慢变成了一个温柔的拥抱。

elements.text_en: Roxie’s foot falls off the footstool.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的脚从脚凳上滑了下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ouch!
elements.text_zh: 哎哟！

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let's get that icepack.
elements.text_zh: 我去拿冰袋。

elements.text_en: Roxie wakes up on the sofa. Archer is reading a book.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在沙发上醒来，Archer坐在旁边看书。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I guess I crashed. How long did I sleep?
elements.text_zh: 看来我直接睡过去了。我睡了多久？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Almost two hours. Sleep is great medicine. How’s your ankle?
elements.text_zh: 快两个小时。睡眠是最好的药。脚踝怎么样了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not much pain. A little stiff.
elements.text_zh: 不怎么疼了，但是有点僵。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I took the icepack off about thirty minutes ago.
elements.text_zh: 我大概半小时前把冰袋拿掉了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’ll be nearly a hundred percent tomorrow.
elements.text_zh: 等吧，等到明天就全好了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Kitchen is fully stocked. What sounds good for dinner?
elements.text_zh: 厨房里什么都有。晚饭有特别想吃的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not the greatest chef.
elements.text_zh: 我不怎么会做饭诶。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’m a modern man and a pretty good cook. Plus, you're injured.
elements.text_zh: 你受伤了我还要你做饭啊？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You like lasagna?
elements.text_zh: 放心，我做饭很好吃的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I love it. It’s a lot of trouble and takes time.
elements.text_zh: 其实我今天很想吃千层面，就是做起来有点费时费力……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We got time, and I like to cook.
elements.text_zh: 哈，你也喜欢千层面啊。我们不缺时间，我也喜欢做。

elements.text_en: A few hours later, they are finishing dinner.
elements.text_zh: 几个小时后，他们吃完了晚餐。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That was awesome, Archer. The salad was so fresh, with wild flowers.
elements.text_zh: 太棒了，Archer。沙拉特别新鲜，千层面也好吃，还有你采回来那些花。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll help with the dishes.
elements.text_zh: 我来洗碗吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Rest the ankle. Doctor's orders.
elements.text_zh: 脚踝要休息够时间明天才能痊愈，遵医嘱噢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s next? Another kiss? Sleeping arrangements?
elements.text_zh: 那接下来呢？继续聊天？还是安排睡觉？

elements.text_en: Someone knocks at the door as Archer and Roxie finish dinner.
elements.text_zh: 这时有人敲门。

elements.text_en: Roxie hobbles behind Archer as he goes to the door.
elements.text_zh: Archer去开门，Roxie一瘸一拐地跟在后面。

elements.text_en: Surprise!
elements.text_zh: 惊喜不惊喜！

elements.text_en: Roxie moves closer to the door.
elements.text_zh: Roxie往门口走近了一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance! What are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: Lance？你怎么会在这儿？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’ve been meaning to do some off-road biking.
elements.text_zh: 我一直想找机会出来骑越野。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Here to Archer’s cabin?
elements.text_zh: 骑越野骑到这儿来了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I talked to Jax. She said you were hurt on the trail.
elements.text_zh: 噢……我问Jax，她说你徒步把脚扭了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She knew where the place was.
elements.text_zh: 我求她给我发的定位。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I wanted to make sure you were okay.
elements.text_zh: 想来看看你怎么样了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You could have called.
elements.text_zh: 啊？可以直接给我们打电话呀。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer’s a trauma surgeon.
elements.text_zh: Archer是医生。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t you think he can handle a twisted ankle?
elements.text_zh: 脚踝扭伤还是处理得好的吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What is this really about?
elements.text_zh: 还是说你有别的事要找我？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You've got to be tired, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 你肯定也累了，Lance。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Are you hungry?
elements.text_zh: 要不要吃点东西？

elements.text_en: Lance rushes past Roxie and follows Archer.
elements.text_zh: Lance脸有点红，没吭声，跟着Archer进了屋。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah. I’ve worked up an appetite. Thanks, Archer.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，一路骑过来正好饿了。谢谢你，Archer。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What the hell is going on?
elements.text_zh: 现在这是什么情况？

elements.text_en: Roxie watches in amazement as Archer serves dinner to Lance.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看傻了，Archer热好一桌美味，Lance大口吃起来。

elements.text_en: That was awesome. You’re a good cook.
elements.text_zh: 太棒了，你手艺真不错啊，大厨。

elements.text_en: I have plans for a restaurant. I’m a pretty good open fire chef.
elements.text_zh: 我一直有开餐厅的想法，明火料理我还挺拿手的。

elements.text_en: A light rain starts to fall, and it’s getting dark.
elements.text_zh: 外面开始下起小雨，天也慢慢暗了。

elements.text_en: I don’t think it’s safe for you to bike back.
elements.text_zh: 你现在骑回去不太安全。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: My car is at the bottom of the hill.
elements.text_zh: 而且，我车停在山脚下没法送你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That trail will be a muddy mess.
elements.text_zh: 那条小路估计全是泥。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Why don’t you just stay the night?
elements.text_zh: 要不你今晚就住这吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is going to be weird.
elements.text_zh: 我天……就我们三个……怎么有点怪怪的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You sure, man?
elements.text_zh: 你确定吗，哥？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I just meant to make a quick check-in on Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我本来只是想来看看Roxie。没想到得要住一晚了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure you did.
elements.text_zh: 只是想来看看我……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’ll clean the kitchen.
elements.text_zh: 我来收拾厨房！

elements.text_en: Lance breaks minutes of silence as they sit in the great room.
elements.text_zh: 三个人坐在大客厅里，起初没人说话，还是Lance先开口。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Did Roxie tell you about the Casino night?
elements.text_zh: Archer，Roxie跟你说过赌场那晚的事吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: No. It’s a nice place. I like to play Baccarat.
elements.text_zh: 没有。那地方挺不错的。我偶尔也去玩玩。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m not much for gambling. Fun place to people-watch.
elements.text_zh: 我不太爱赌，嘿嘿，主要是去看众生相的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I got to meet Gabe. That was so great.
elements.text_zh: 我还见到了Gabe。还真是巧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Where are you going with this jock strap?
elements.text_zh: 你这话是要往哪儿拐？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I don’t think I know Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 等等，谁是Gabe？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie’s ex-boyfriend. Good guy. For a soccer player.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的前男友。人还行。我意思是他踢足球踢得还行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just kind of showed up. Is he still on the island?
elements.text_zh: 他就这么……出现了。现在应该还在岛上吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He had business on the Big Island.
elements.text_zh: 他来大岛见客户，顺便……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was nice to see him again. He’s sticking around for a while.
elements.text_zh: 能再见面是好事儿。他也还会在岛上待一阵子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why are we talking about Gabe?
elements.text_zh: 等等，我们为什么要聊Gabe？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just making conversation.
elements.text_zh: 这不是Archer还不认识他么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You want to talk about Casino night?
elements.text_zh: 你想聊赌场那晚？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s talk about the stalker you tracked down.
elements.text_zh: 那不如跟Archer讲讲你扑击“跟踪者”的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s an interesting story.
elements.text_zh: 那才有意思呢？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Stalker?
elements.text_zh: 你是说那个保安Raymus?

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: A little misunderstanding. It was nothing.
elements.text_zh: 一场小误会，有啥好说的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: How about cards? You guys want to play cards.
elements.text_zh: 要不我们三个打牌吧？

elements.text_en: Two hours pass with awkward conversation as they play cards.
elements.text_zh: 他们一边打牌一边尬聊，不知不觉过了两个小时。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I have an idea. It’s called awkward moments.
elements.text_zh: 时间不早了，我们一起玩“尴尬时刻”，然后再去休息怎么样？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We each share a story about an awkward moment.
elements.text_zh: “尴尬时刻”就是每个人轮流讲一个自己最尴尬的经历。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The stalker is a great story of an awkward moment.
elements.text_zh: 噗，那个“跟踪者”就挺符合这个主题的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: No. Your own awkward moment from the past.
elements.text_zh: 不，是自己讲自己以前的糗事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sure. I’m game.
elements.text_zh: 这个我可以。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ll go first.
elements.text_zh: 我先来。

elements.text_en: Archer finishes his story about a medical school cadaver.
elements.text_zh: Archer讲完了他在医学院的一段经历。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I squealed like a little child.
elements.text_zh: 我当时像小孩那样惊声尖叫。周围的同学也都惊呆了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I knew cadavers could exhibit movement.
elements.text_zh: 我明明知道医学解剖的时候，尸体有时候有反射动作。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The timing, as I made an incision, shocked me.
elements.text_zh: 但第一次真的下刀的那一刻，我还是被吓尿了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I would have squealed and wet my pants.
elements.text_zh: 换成我，估计当场社死。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: These two are getting along like best buddies. Weird.
elements.text_zh: 这俩人慢慢处成哥们儿了？奇怪。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Who’s next?
elements.text_zh: 下一个谁来呀？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve got one. I was a sophomore in high school.
elements.text_zh: 我。高二那年。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We were at a farm for the day. Some distant relative.
elements.text_zh: 我们全家去一个亲戚的农场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lots of family for an outside picnic. Home-cooked and homegrown.
elements.text_zh: 一大家子在外面野餐，吃的都是自家做的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My grandma sent me out to fill up a sack of potatoes.
elements.text_zh: 我奶奶让我去装一袋土豆。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I came back about thirty minutes later.
elements.text_zh: 大概半小时后我回来了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Told everyone there were no potatoes on the vines.
elements.text_zh: 我说藤上根本没有土豆。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You didn’t know they grew underground?
elements.text_zh: 你不知道土豆长在地下吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was a city girl.
elements.text_zh: 我那时候没怎么去过农村。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You were in high school!
elements.text_zh: 可你都上高中了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s what my grandma said.
elements.text_zh: 我奶奶也是这么说的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She pointed out that a hand shovel was in the bag.
elements.text_zh: 她说，不然你以为袋子里的小铲子是拿来干嘛的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Your turn, hotshot.
elements.text_zh: 轮到你了，球星。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I was small and kind of a weakling in elementary school.
elements.text_zh: 我小学个子小，身体弱。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Junior high and high school, I sprouted up and filled out.
elements.text_zh: 到了初中高中才长高长结实的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Fourth and fifth grade, the boys would play pickup games.
elements.text_zh: 四五年级的时候，男孩们经常凑一起打球。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I was always picked last. Sometimes left out.
elements.text_zh: 我总是最后一个被选，有时候干脆被人无视。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The big stud in the fifth grade was Rodney.
elements.text_zh: 五年级最横的那个叫Rodney。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: One day, he tells me I’m gonna be on his team.
elements.text_zh: 有一天他说，他会选我进他的队。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Finally, Rodney calls my name. I run over to join his group.
elements.text_zh: 他一点到我名字，我就跑过去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He pushes me to the ground.
elements.text_zh: 结果他一把把我推倒。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Everyone laughs, and he shouts, No way, loser.
elements.text_zh: 大家都在笑，他还喊，想得美，废物。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Where’s the cocky punch line?
elements.text_zh: 然后呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You got revenge when you were the junior high stud.
elements.text_zh: 后来你成了风云人物，报复回去了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No, I remembered how it felt.
elements.text_zh: 没有。我只是记得那种不好的感觉。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I always picked the kids nobody wanted.
elements.text_zh: 所以后来我总是先选那些没人选的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not what I expected. That is really sweet.
elements.text_zh: 没想到你还有这样一面。

elements.text_en: At bedtime, Roxie takes the master. The men in guest bedrooms.
elements.text_zh: 到了睡觉时间。Roxie睡主卧，两个男人睡客房。

elements.text_en: Roxie is a bit restless.
elements.text_zh: Roxie有点睡不着。

elements.text_en: She finds Archer alone in the great room.
elements.text_zh: 她在大客厅里看见Archer一个人。

elements.text_en: You still awake?
elements.text_zh: 你还没睡？

elements.text_en: Just thinking. Your ankle hurting?
elements.text_zh: 在想点事。脚踝还疼吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. Just tossing and turning a bit.
elements.text_zh: 不疼，就是有点睡不着。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Want a cup of chamomile? Good for sleep.
elements.text_zh: 要不要来杯洋甘菊？助眠的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, that’s okay.
elements.text_zh: 不用了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: There’s more to Lance than he lets on.
elements.text_zh: Lance这个人，其实没他表现得那么简单。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: He’s a good guy.
elements.text_zh: 他是个好人。

elements.text_en: Roxie feels Archer staring at her.
elements.text_zh: Roxie感觉到Archer在看她。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He is a decent guy.
elements.text_zh: 他确实是个不错的人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I feel like something is missing from my life.
elements.text_zh: 我总觉得生活里好像少了点什么。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Someone is missing. A long-term partner.
elements.text_zh: 少了一个人吧，一个能长期一起的人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I might have met someone. Can’t be sure.
elements.text_zh: 我可能遇到过这样的人，也可能没有。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s staring at me. Is he talking about me?
elements.text_zh: 他在看我吗？他指的是我吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Takes time to be sure about real commitment.
elements.text_zh: 确认是否合拍需要时间。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Patience is probably best.
elements.text_zh: 慢一点也好。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re probably right. I’m gonna hit the sack.
elements.text_zh: 你说得对。我去睡了。晚安。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This place looks amazing. Great idea, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 这地方看起来真不错。好主意，Orwell。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is going to be a blast.
elements.text_zh: 一定会很好玩。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Did you hear that? The footsteps?
elements.text_zh: 你们听到了吗？脚步声。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I heard it.
elements.text_zh: 听到了。

elements.text_en: They slowly turn around but no one is there.
elements.text_zh: 他们慢慢转过身，却什么人都没有。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: There’s no one there.
elements.text_zh: 那边没人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ouch!
elements.text_zh: 哎哟！

elements.text_en: They see a pale figure in crimson robes, hovering in the shadows.
elements.text_zh: 他们看到一个披着红袍的苍白身影，站在阴影里。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The vampire… a harbinger of bloodshed.
elements.text_zh: 像个吸血鬼一样。

elements.text_en: The door opens as a sinister female baritone voice comes from a dark hallway.
elements.text_zh: 这时门开了，走廊里传来一个低沉阴冷的女声。

elements.name: Stranger
elements.text_en: Come this way, if you dare.
elements.text_zh: 有胆子的话，就过来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yikes. That gave me the shivers.
elements.text_zh: 哎，这一下真把我给吓了一跳。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You know why we love to be scared?
elements.text_zh: 你知道我们为什么喜欢被吓吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: A rush of chemicals in the brain. Like a roller coaster.
elements.text_zh: 因为大脑会分泌化学物质——肾上腺素、多巴胺那套。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sure, but there is an existential question.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，这我知道。不过这事不只是生理反应那么简单。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Monsters, creatures, and ghouls. We know they might be real.
elements.text_zh: 怪物啊，异形啊，幽灵啊……谁知道呢，也许真有。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Movies and books. They make it fun. But it's fiction.
elements.text_zh: 电影和书虚构出来的吧，只是图个刺激。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know it's make-believe, but it’s still exciting.
elements.text_zh: 不过，虽然知道是假的，但还是会紧张、兴奋。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sweet Roxie. Open your mind to the universe.
elements.text_zh: Roxie甜心，快别把自己的想象力框死了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Like Halloween when you were a child.
elements.text_zh: 想想你小时候过万圣节的时候。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Before the world slammed your imagination shut.
elements.text_zh: 是不是想象力还没被磨没？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No such thing as Santa Claus.
elements.text_zh: 那时候的我们还相信鬼怪、还相信圣诞老人。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Even though I believed as a child.
elements.text_zh: 但长大后，我们便决定：

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No such thing as monsters or ghouls. End of story.
elements.text_zh: 圣诞老人是假的。怪物妖怪也是假的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Except in stories. Fictional stories.
elements.text_zh: 一切只存在于故事里。都是人编出来的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I can prove both of you doubters are wrong.
elements.text_zh: 但，我可以证明你俩都错了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Go for it, grand wizard.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，我们洗耳恭听，大法师。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You gonna open your mind, Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 你愿意敞开心扉吗，Corbin？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’ll listen to what you say.
elements.text_zh: 行，你说，我听着。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Don’t go all esoteric weird.
elements.text_zh: 但别来那套玄乎其玄的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Okay, hotcake. Chupacabra. Is it a monster?
elements.text_zh: 放心，用不着长篇大论。我先问你：吸血怪，算不算怪物？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You asking if I think it is real?
elements.text_zh: 你是问我信不信它是真的？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: No. I’m asking if you think it’s a monster?
elements.text_zh: 不是，我是问你觉得它算不算怪物？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. A blood sucking wolf-like creature.
elements.text_zh: 算吧，一种会吸血的狼形生物。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You can’t prove that they exist.
elements.text_zh: 但你也拿不出证据它真存在。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Not directly. There are blood sucking monsters.
elements.text_zh: 没法直接证明。但吸血的“怪东西”确实有。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The vampire bats of South and Central America.
elements.text_zh: 比如中南美洲的吸血蝙蝠。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Quite real. Feed exclusively on blood.
elements.text_zh: 那可是真实存在的生物。而且只以血液为食。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, they aren’t monsters. Real animals.
elements.text_zh: 但它们不算怪物，是真实的动物。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Not monsters? Because they are common.
elements.text_zh: 对，不算怪物吧。毕竟吸血蝙蝠很常见？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Why not a small population of wolf-like blood suckers?
elements.text_zh: 那为啥不能真的存在一小撮像狼一样的吸血生物？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Why hasn’t anyone found a skeleton?
elements.text_zh: 既然存在为什么找不到遗骸？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: If they exist, there would be some scientific evidence.
elements.text_zh: 假如真的存在，不可能一点科学证据都找不到。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yes, Corbin, my man. Let’s go with science.
elements.text_zh: 对，Corbin，我的兄弟。正好你讲到证据。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Extinct species. Keep up with me, real facts coming at you.
elements.text_zh: 那不妨来掰扯一下那些被宣布灭绝的物种。干货来了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: In 1938, scientists found a prehistoric fish species alive.
elements.text_zh: 1938年，科学家突然发现了一种史前鱼类居然还活着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I remember reading about that.
elements.text_zh: 这个我好像看过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Scientists believe it had been extinct for like 60 million years. So?
elements.text_zh: 据说，这还是此前一度被认为已经灭绝了几千万年的鱼类，对吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Believed extinct because they hadn’t seen one, or a skeleton.
elements.text_zh: 对，之前就因为没人见过活的，也没见过残骸，就说这种鱼已经灭绝了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You’re muddying the waters. The ocean is huge.
elements.text_zh: 你这有点偷换概念，海那么大，不断有一些新学说新发现，这很正常。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Fine. You ever hear of the Laotian Rock Rat?
elements.text_zh: 行，那举个陆地的例子，你听说过老挝岩鼠吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No, can’t say as I have.
elements.text_zh: 没印象。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Found living specimens in the last few decades.
elements.text_zh: 也是最近几十年才发现还有活的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Again, believed to have been extinct for millennia.
elements.text_zh: 之前同样被认为已经消失了上千年。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Science proves small populations can stay hidden.
elements.text_zh: 这说明什么？小群体可以躲很久不被发现。刚说的远古鱼类也是一样道理。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: What other strange monsters might be out there?
elements.text_zh: 所以说，世界上还有什么怪东西没被找到，也不奇怪。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Like chupacabra!. Iron-clad logic, amigos.
elements.text_zh: 比如刚说的吸血怪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay, Orwell. You never cease to amaze.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，Orwell，你这套还真能绕。逻辑闭环了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Monsters and ghouls might exist!
elements.text_zh: 所以说，怪物和鬼怪，也许真的存在！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s forget whether real or not. Let’s talk movies.
elements.text_zh: 这么说，怪让人觉得害怕的。要不我们还是聊电影吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Best movie monsters, creatures, or ghouls ever.
elements.text_zh: 盘点你们心目中最棒的怪物电影。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Gnarly cool. I can rock in that direction.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，怪物电影看过不少。要说我心目中第一……

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Without a doubt, Nosferatu. The 1922 original.
elements.text_zh: 那必须是《诺斯费拉图》，且得是1922年的原版。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Really, 1922? What is that?
elements.text_zh: 1922？那么老？那是啥？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You don’t know it? You’re out of touch, brother.
elements.text_zh: 你连这个都不知道？有点说不过去吧，兄弟。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Best vampire-like creature ever.
elements.text_zh: 那可是史上最好的“类吸血怪”形象。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Way better than classic Dracula. It’s been copied many times.
elements.text_zh: 吊打德古拉系列，属于是一直被模仿，从未被超越。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Bald, pointed ears, and long, claw-like fingers. Clearly not human.
elements.text_zh: 光头、尖耳朵、长手指，明显不是人类。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Human-like, much more believable than a count in a castle.
elements.text_zh: 类人形又明显不是人类，所以更像是真的存在，也更让人害怕。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I’ve seen that in some movies.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，这种造型我在别的电影里也见过。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Okay, Roxie, babe. Your choice? No aliens or zombies, please.
elements.text_zh: 行了，Roxie，该你了。外星人和僵尸不算。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The clown that eats children.
elements.text_zh: 那个吃小孩的小丑，叫啥来着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Movie scared me to death! I was afraid of clowns as a kid.
elements.text_zh: 那部电影真把我吓惨了，我小时候就怕小丑。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That is a classic.
elements.text_zh: 那确实是经典。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Corbin, you're up. Jump in with us.
elements.text_zh: Corbin，到你了，你也说一个吧。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: None of this stuff scares me.
elements.text_zh: 你们说的这些东西，没一个能吓到我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Come on, dude. Be a real person.
elements.text_zh: 来嘛，兄弟，别装了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You never had a good monster movie scare?
elements.text_zh: 你就没被哪部怪物电影吓到过？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Come on. Admit it. I can see it in your eyes.
elements.text_zh: 还是说，你不敢看怪物电影？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Well, maybe.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，也许有。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A crack in the ice. Let’s hear it.
elements.text_zh: 这就对了，说来听听。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: A science fiction story about teleportation.
elements.text_zh: 一部讲瞬间移动的科幻片。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I loved science fiction ever since I was a kid.
elements.text_zh: 我从小就爱看科幻。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: This movie tossed me for a loop. A modern version.
elements.text_zh: 那部电影真把我整懵了，我看的翻拍版。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I guess I never saw the original.
elements.text_zh: 原版我好像没看过。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: A fly gets in the teleporter with the main character.
elements.text_zh: 有只苍蝇跟主角一起进了传送装置。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, dude! The scientist ends up with some fly DNA.
elements.text_zh: 对对对！后来科学家身体里混进了苍蝇的DNA。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He slowly changes into a man-fly. It freaked me out.
elements.text_zh: 他后来彻底变异了，真的挺吓人的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Another classic. You should check out the original.
elements.text_zh: 那也是经典，你该补补原版。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I want to see what this place has to offer.
elements.text_zh: 我想先去看看这地方到底有啥。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m gonna go solo. Makes for a richer experience.
elements.text_zh: 就……不带你们了啊。

elements.text_en: Orwell races off, alone.
elements.text_zh: Orwell一个人兴冲冲地冲进了鬼屋。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Roxie venture into the Haunted House
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin一前一后走进了鬼屋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You ready to check it out?
elements.text_zh: 准备好进去看看了吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Sure. Don’t expect much reaction from me.
elements.text_zh: 当然，别指望我有多大反应。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I don’t scare easily.
elements.text_zh: 我不太容易被吓到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s talk more about scary movies.
elements.text_zh: 那我们继续聊恐怖片吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Worst scary movie, ever.
elements.text_zh: 史上最烂的恐怖片。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That’s a long list. You have one in mind?
elements.text_zh: 那可太多了，你有具体的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: An old one. The giant blob that oozes across towns and cities.
elements.text_zh: 一部老片子，那个慢慢爬过城镇的黏糊糊怪物。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. Wasn’t that meant to be satirical?
elements.text_zh: 哦，那部啊，不是偏搞笑的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not the original black and white version.
elements.text_zh: 不是最早的黑白版。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It moved so slowly. Just didn’t seem scary.
elements.text_zh: 它们移动得太慢了，一点都不吓人。反而有点蠢萌。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Dreadfully persistent and inevitable, I guess was the idea.
elements.text_zh: 那种怪物慢慢移动、躲又躲不开的感觉，也不能说一点都不吓人。

elements.text_en: Hundreds of small rubber spiders drop down on thin wires.
elements.text_zh: 一大堆橡胶小蜘蛛顺着细线掉了下来。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Spiders! Spiders are in my hair.
elements.text_zh: 蜘蛛！蜘蛛！我头发上都是蜘蛛！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They aren’t real!
elements.text_zh: 假的！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You said you don’t easily get scared.
elements.text_zh: 你不是说你不容易被吓到吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Not from fake monsters. Spider eggs in my hair.
elements.text_zh: 如果是假怪物我反倒不怕的。但是蜘蛛弄到头发里。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Nothing funny about that.
elements.text_zh: 这一点都不好笑。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Corbin continue through the haunted house.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin继续往鬼屋深处走去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, seemed kind of funny.
elements.text_zh: 不好意思，刚才确实有点好笑。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That doesn’t freak you out. Spider eggs in your hair?
elements.text_zh: 那样你都不怕？不怕蜘蛛真的在你头上产卵吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not really. Do they instantly lay eggs?
elements.text_zh: 也还好吧，你的意思是，它们一落到头上，会马上产卵吗？笑死。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I guess anything can be a monster.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得很多东西，换个角度看，都能变成怪物。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Orwell made a good point about blood sucking.
elements.text_zh: Orwell说吸血怪那套，其实也有点道理。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Real animals aren’t monsters. Imagined ones are.
elements.text_zh: 真的存在的动物不算怪物，被想出来的才算。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Orwell is an enigma wrapped in a riddle.
elements.text_zh: Orwell这个人，本身就挺让人摸不透的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: At first, I thought he was foolish and absurd.
elements.text_zh: 一开始我还觉得他又夸张又不靠谱。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I checked into some of his ideas.
elements.text_zh: 后来我去查过他提的一些东西。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He doesn’t make stuff up, and he always has a point.
elements.text_zh: 他不是乱说，每次都有点依据。

elements.text_en: Corbin goes quiet for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Corbin沉默了几秒。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What happened at the pool scared me.
elements.text_zh: 泳池那件事，真的把我吓到了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: If he had drowned. It’s too horrible to think about.
elements.text_zh: 要是Orwell当时真出事了，光想想都后怕。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He knows it was an accident. Not the type to hold a grudge.
elements.text_zh: 他知道你不是故意的，Orwell不是那种会记仇的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe there’s more to Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 之前怎么没发现。原来Corbin还有这样一面。

elements.text_en: A moan comes from the shadows. Shadowy figures of clowns.
elements.text_zh: 阴影里传来一声低低的呻吟，几个模糊的小丑身影慢慢浮现。

elements.text_en: Children no longer satisfy my appetite.
elements.text_zh: 孩子已经不够我“解馋”了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. No. No. This isn’t funny!
elements.text_zh: 不不不，这一点都不好笑！

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Relax, Roxie. It’s not real.
elements.text_zh: 放松点，Roxie，这都是人演的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Someone is grabbing my legs.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么觉得有人在抓我的腿！

elements.text_en: Roxie grabs Corbin by the hand as a door opens up.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一把拉住Corbin的手，旁边的门突然打开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Through the door!
elements.text_zh: 快，从这边走！

elements.text_en: The door slams shut. They are in a small, dark space.
elements.text_zh: 门猛地关上，他们被困在一个又小又黑的空间里。

elements.text_en: Corbin puts an arm around Roxie’s waist and whispers.
elements.text_zh: Corbin低声说，把她护在身边。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: We’re in a closet. Perfectly safe. It’s a game.
elements.text_zh: 我们现在在一个小隔间里，很安全，刚那些都是假的，别怕有我在呢。

elements.text_en: Roxie moves closer and kisses him.
elements.text_zh: Roxie靠近Corbin，亲了他一下。

elements.text_en: Corbin gently returns the kiss.
elements.text_zh: Corbin轻柔地回吻了一下Roxie。

elements.text_en: Roxie pulls back as the door opens.
elements.text_zh: 门一开，Roxie立刻退开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not sure why I did that.
elements.text_zh: 我也不知道刚才为什么会那样。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Emotional support from a friend.
elements.text_zh: 也许就是朋友之间的下意识反应。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: We don’t need to make too much of it.
elements.text_zh: 相互间的……情绪支持吧。我们不用把这件事看得太重。

elements.text_en: Orwell stumbles through a door into a small, poorly lit room.
elements.text_zh: 另一边，Orwell跌跌撞撞地推开一扇门，闯进了一间昏暗狭小的房间。

elements.text_en: You’re not supposed to be back here.
elements.text_zh: 你不该跑到这里来。

elements.text_en: This isn’t part of the show area.
elements.text_zh: 这里不是给游客走的区域。

elements.text_en: Some storage and control panels.
elements.text_zh: 算是储物间。这还有一些控制面板。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You look like you’re in costume.
elements.text_zh: 你这身打扮。你是NPC吗？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: It’s not a costume.
elements.text_zh: 这不是演出服这就是我自己衣服。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You don’t work here?
elements.text_zh: 你不是这里的工作人员？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Well. I’m one of the owners.
elements.text_zh: 算是吧，我是这里的老板之一。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I’m not playing a part here.
elements.text_zh: 我这也不是在演戏。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m an aficionado of vampires and vampiress.
elements.text_zh: 我喜欢“吸血鬼”所以穿成这样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ve never seen one more beautiful.
elements.text_zh: 我还是头一次见到像你这么美的“吸血鬼”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: In the classic form of the genre.
elements.text_zh: 而且你这身打扮太经典了吧。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: For me, it’s not a story or a game.
elements.text_zh: 你不一定能理解。对我来说，这不是假的，也不是闹着玩，而是我的生活方式。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Auspicious. You’re into the role-playing subculture.
elements.text_zh: 有意思，看起来你也玩角色扮演这一套。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Not a role-playing thing. Something more.
elements.text_zh: 不只是角色扮演，是更深一层的东西。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: You might find it disturbing.
elements.text_zh: 你可能会觉得有点难以接受。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m pretty much a free spirit and attuned to many things.
elements.text_zh: 我这个人比较随性，对很多东西都很能感同身受。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You suffer from low hemoglobin production?
elements.text_zh: 你有身体方面的问题吗？比如……血红蛋白生成不足……之类的。

elements.text_en: Morganna moves close to Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Morganna走近了Orwell。

elements.text_en: I don’t suffer any medical maladies.
elements.text_zh: 我没有任何医学上的疾病。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I don’t believe I’m mentally ill.
elements.text_zh: 也不觉得自己精神有问题。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I do have strong cravings. Those of vampires.
elements.text_zh: 只是，我确实一直渴望成为“吸血鬼”。或者说，我已经算是了。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Dental surgical implants to accommodate.
elements.text_zh: 我这几颗尖牙，是找牙医给我做的假体来的。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I have resisted tasting the elixir of life.
elements.text_zh: 我一直在克制自己，不去品尝生命的甘露。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: However, my carnal desires are powerful.
elements.text_zh: 但这种冲动，有时候很难压住。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: You’re a tantalizing specimen.
elements.text_zh: 你对我来说，就很有吸引力。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ve got the same burning sensation.
elements.text_zh: 我也有同样灼热的感觉。

elements.text_en: Morganna locks the door.
elements.text_zh: Morganna把门锁上了。

elements.text_en: They embrace, and Orwell gently kisses her neck.
elements.text_zh: 两人靠得很近，气氛一下子变得暧昧起来。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I won’t bite if you don’t.
elements.text_zh: 放心我不咬人。你也不许咬我。

elements.text_en: Morganna kisses Orwell’s neck, almost like she’s biting it.
elements.text_zh: Morganna贴近他的脖子……

elements.text_en: Three gal-pals are enjoying quiet time together in the warm waters.
elements.text_zh: 三个闺蜜泡在温热的水里，难得安静了一会儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This place is awesome. Great place to relax.
elements.text_zh: 这里真不错，太适合放松了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We haven’t had any girl time since life guard stories.
elements.text_zh: 自从聊完救生员那次，我们就没好好聚过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Ohhh, yeah. Sexy story time.
elements.text_zh: 对哦，我们的“故事会”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not now. Let’s just mellow out.
elements.text_zh: 今天不玩了，就泡泡温泉吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, sounds good.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，好好放松一下。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: How long we have this place to ourselves?
elements.text_zh: 节目组啥时候来？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Nearly an hour. What you been up to lately, Candy?
elements.text_zh: 差不多还有一个小时吧我们是自由的。Candy，你最近在忙什么？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You know me, pretty boring.
elements.text_zh: 你知道的，我嘛，没什么忙的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Like a nun in a convent.
elements.text_zh: 像修道院里的修女一样每天重复一样的生活呗。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, right.
elements.text_zh: 得了吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’ve seen your ex, Gabe. What’s going on there?
elements.text_zh: 我看到你前任Gabe了，你们什么情况？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just an old friend, catching up.
elements.text_zh: 就老朋友，叙叙旧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just leave it at that
elements.text_zh: 就这样。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Not bringing an old romance back to life?
elements.text_zh: 没打算让旧情复燃？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nah. Keeping it casual.
elements.text_zh: 没有，就顺其自然。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I saw Gabe in a swimsuit at the villa pool. Yummy.
elements.text_zh: 我在别墅泳池看到过Gabe。他好帅啊，身材也好。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Thought about inviting him to the ladies' changing room.
elements.text_zh: 我还开玩笑想叫他去更衣室。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Maybe take him for a ride on the observation deck.
elements.text_zh: 或者带他去观景台转转。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Damn girl! Cool your jets.
elements.text_zh: 喂喂，干嘛跟我说这些！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You said just old friends catching up.
elements.text_zh: 你刚不是说只是老朋友叙叙旧吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She didn’t invite you to take a test drive.
elements.text_zh: 叙旧也是Roxie和Gabe叙旧啊。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He’s a hunk. A girl can imagine.
elements.text_zh: Gabe条件不错，我脑子里想一想，也不犯法吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just keep it to yourself.
elements.text_zh: 自己想想就行。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Old friends. Yeah, right.
elements.text_zh: 老朋友，好吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You as a nun, in a convent. I’m trying to picture it.
elements.text_zh: 你当修女的样子，我真想象不出来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I could be celibate for a while. If I wanted.
elements.text_zh: 如果我愿意，我当然可以清心寡欲一阵子。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: How long has it been? Truth girl.
elements.text_zh: 那要不要说一下，你上一次不清心寡欲是什么时候？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Someone you both know, recently.
elements.text_zh: 最近，而且这人你们都认识。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Connected to the show? Spill it.
elements.text_zh: 节目组的人？快说是谁。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: My lips are sealed. Roxie said no sexy stories today.
elements.text_zh: 我嘴很严的。而且刚Roxie不是说了么，今天泡温泉，我们不讲那些。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Wow! Three hot babes in warm water.
elements.text_zh: 哇，温水里三位大美女。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You señoritas waiting for me?
elements.text_zh: 你们是在等我吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The intimacy challenge includes a group option.
elements.text_zh: 听说今天的亲密挑战可以选多人诶。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Let’s strip down and get this show on the road.
elements.text_zh: 我是不是可以……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Dream on. You and Candy are on for the challenge.
elements.text_zh: 想得美，这次节目组指定你和Candy搭档。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re a little early. Crew will be here in a bit.
elements.text_zh: 你来早了，工作人员一会儿才到。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Candylicous, sounds like fun.
elements.text_zh: 听起来挺有意思。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax get out of the water as Lance climbs in.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax从水里出来，Lance走进了温泉池。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Careful, Lance. I’m slippery when wet.
elements.text_zh: 小心点，Lance，这地方一不留神就会滑。

elements.text_en: Lance and Candy in the small spring. Candy’s hand is on Lance's shoulder. They both have seductive smiles.
