elements.text_zh: Lance和Candy在小温泉那边有说有笑，举止暧昧。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax head back down to the large spring.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax回到了下面的大温泉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They will just talk and tease each other.
elements.text_zh: 他们应该就只是聊聊天、互相逗逗吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t see them doing anything, right?
elements.text_zh: 我也没看到他们真干什么，对吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Who can tell with Candy. No big deal, is it?
elements.text_zh: Candy的事谁说得准。不过，也没什么大不了的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Of course not. Just wondering.
elements.text_zh: 对，没什么，我就是随便想想。

elements.text_en: Crew comes back from the small spring 30 minutes later.
elements.text_zh: 三十分钟后，工作人员从小温泉那边回来了。

elements.text_en: Jax talks to the crew and gets back into the spring with Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Jax和工作人员聊了几句，又回到大温泉找Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The crew left. Things must be getting spicy.
elements.text_zh: 诶，为啥工作人员又撤了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s going on?
elements.text_zh: 怎么回事？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Crew said they were having minor power issues. I texted Foley.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员说电力有点小问题，拍摄暂停，我已经给Foley发了消息。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Candy and Lance are still up there. What are they doing?
elements.text_zh: Candy和Lance还在上面呢，他们在干嘛？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Chatting. Giving each other a massage. Wild and wet sex.
elements.text_zh: 聊天吧，不过也有可能在……。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You think so?
elements.text_zh: 你真这么觉得？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You need to come clean about you and Lance.
elements.text_zh: 你得跟我说清楚，你和Lance的事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You ain’t hiding it. Not from me.
elements.text_zh: 你瞒不过我。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re starting the same game with Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 对了，还有Gabe。你自己心里有数吗？还是打算走一步看一步，随便玩玩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not playing games.
elements.text_zh: 我没在玩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not sure myself.
elements.text_zh: 就是自己也还没想明白。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m footloose and fancy free.
elements.text_zh: 不想太早做决定。不想给自己设太多限制。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That means they are free agents, right, girlfriend?
elements.text_zh: 嗯，那意思就是，大家都是单身咯？

elements.text_en: Lance and Candy come down thirty minutes after the crew left.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员走后大概三十分钟，Lance和Candy一起走了下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: An hour up there. Guess you two had fun.
elements.text_zh: 在上面待了一个小时啊，看样子挺尽兴的。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Candy slip into the big spring with Jax and Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Roxie、Candy和Jax一起回到大温泉里。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Candy is slippery when wet.
elements.text_zh: 这水一泡，人就容易打滑。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Took me a while to work her out of her swimsuit.
elements.text_zh: 折腾了半天，才把她哄得换好衣服。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: It was hard to get him back into his trunks.
elements.text_zh: 他也是，身体反应有点太大了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Such a hard body.
elements.text_zh: 等他恢复等了好一会儿，我们才敢下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not interested in your dirty stories.
elements.text_zh: 我不想听你们那些带颜色的描述。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Hey! What’s your problem?
elements.text_zh: 喂，姐，你还真信啦？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Lance said it would be fun to play-act.
elements.text_zh: Lance说就当演着玩。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Tease you and Jax.
elements.text_zh: 逗逗你和Jax。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Was I out of bounds?
elements.text_zh: 我是不是有点过火了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, sweetie. Sorry about snapping.
elements.text_zh: 没有，甜心。刚才我说话语气有点冲，抱歉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance is the one out of bounds.
elements.text_zh: 倒是你，Lance。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: How you figure? Just a little teasing.
elements.text_zh: 我怎么了？不就开个玩笑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’ve been acting weird since Gabe got here.
elements.text_zh: 自从Gabe来了，你就一直不对劲。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No way. Hardly notice the dude.
elements.text_zh: 哪有，我都没怎么注意他。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re the one acting freaky.
elements.text_zh: 是你自己怪怪的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Agitated about Candy and me having a go.
elements.text_zh: 因为我跟Candy闹着玩，你就不爽了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I knew you would get spun up.
elements.text_zh: 我就知道你会被点着。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Hey! What the hell, Lance!
elements.text_zh: 喂！你搞什么，Lance！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: This was some kind of twisted game!
elements.text_zh: 你纯纯就是故意的是吗？！利用我来气Roxie？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No, Candy. It’s not like that.
elements.text_zh: 不是的，Candy，不是你想的那样。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You two are messed up. I need a break.
elements.text_zh: 你俩自己掰扯吧，我不奉陪了。

elements.text_en: Candy heads back up to the small spring.
elements.text_zh: Candy转身离开。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: See what you did!
elements.text_zh: 看！Candy都误会我了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me! It’s your fault.
elements.text_zh: 怪我？这明明是你的问题！

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Candy’s right. You’re both messed up.
elements.text_zh: Candy说得没错，你们俩自己好好理理清楚吧，别掺和别人进来。

elements.text_en: Foley and Gabe arrive as Roxie and Lance stew in the big spring.
elements.text_zh: Foley和Gabe走了过来，Roxie和Lance还泡在大池子里。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hi, Foley. You brought Gabe along?
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Foley。你把Gabe也带来了？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I pestered him to come. Is it okay?
elements.text_zh: 我这求了人半天，他好不容易同意来了呢！

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. We aren’t filming here in the big spring.
elements.text_zh: 可以啊，这个大池子本来也不拍。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Foley, you can handle checking the power?
elements.text_zh: Foley，你能去排查下电路问题吗？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Sure, thing. The main cabinets are down here.
elements.text_zh: 没问题，主控离这不远。我马上过去。

elements.text_en: Gabe gets into the spring as Foley heads off.
elements.text_zh: Foley离开时，Gabe走进了温泉。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Water is perfect. Nice.
elements.text_zh: 水温刚好，挺舒服的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Slide over here close to me, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Gabe，过来坐这边。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I thought this was crew and cast only tonight?
elements.text_zh: 我以为今晚只有工作人员和男女嘉宾可以进到这里来？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: It’s okay here in the lower level. I know Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 这些片池子没关系，我认识Gabe。他可以来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You got a problem, Lance?
elements.text_zh: 你有意见？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: So long as Jax is cool. I’m great.
elements.text_zh: 只要Jax没意见，我就没问题。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You're okay with me just showing up?
elements.text_zh: 你不介意我今天又不请自到吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. I’ve got to film a spot later.
elements.text_zh: 不介意啊，我一会儿还要拍个镜头。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: How was the haunted house?
elements.text_zh: 鬼屋玩得怎么样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Kissing Corbin. He doesn’t know.
elements.text_zh: 我和Corbin那事儿，他应该不知道吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was fun, we had a blast.
elements.text_zh: 挺好玩的，大家都很嗨。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Anything give you a legit scare?
elements.text_zh: 有真把你吓到的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Scary clowns, like from that horror movie.
elements.text_zh: 那种恐怖片里的小丑，挺吓人的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I remember you telling me that clowns scared you as a child.
elements.text_zh: 我记得你说过，你小时候就怕小丑。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re afraid of clowns? That’s lame.
elements.text_zh: 你怕小丑？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You really don’t understand women, do you?
elements.text_zh: 女人怕小丑你觉得很奇怪吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What they want and don’t want.
elements.text_zh: 她们怕什么，不怕什么，看来你是真不知道啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Rushing in like a fool to stop a supposed stalker.
elements.text_zh: 才会傻傻冲出去，去拦那个所谓的跟踪者。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You stood there. Like a coward.
elements.text_zh: 你当时就站在旁边。跟个没事儿人一样。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He had a gun. You didn’t know he was security.
elements.text_zh: 他有枪。而且你也不知道他是安保。为啥不出手。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Coward? I would have taken that guy down.
elements.text_zh: 我要是真出手，早就把那家伙放倒了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Black belt, karate, and jiu-jitsu.
elements.text_zh: 黑带，空手道和柔术，随便一个都够了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, so. You didn’t do squat.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，那又怎样？你不也什么都没干。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You still don’t get it, Lance!
elements.text_zh: 你还是没明白，Lance。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You screwed up.
elements.text_zh: 你搞错了。你不懂。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I don’t think that’s fair, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你不觉得Lance当时做得对吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re buying into fragile woman syndrome.
elements.text_zh: 连你也认为，“女的时时刻刻就需要男的来保护”？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s not it. But the guy did have a gun.
elements.text_zh: 不是这个意思。但那个人确实带了枪。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He was moving toward you. I saw him.
elements.text_zh: 而且他当时也确实朝你走过去了，我看得很清楚。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin were rash and got it wrong.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin是太冲动了，判断也出了点偏差。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I also think they were brave.
elements.text_zh: 不过我也觉得，他们算是挺有担当的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You saying I was afraid to step in?
elements.text_zh: 你是说我当时不敢出手？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No. I’m not putting you down.
elements.text_zh: 不是，我没有那个意思。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie, two nice, handsome men arguing about protecting you.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，两个大帅哥为了你吵成这样。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You really want to complain about that?
elements.text_zh: 你真的要为这个生气吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax has a point.
elements.text_zh: Jax说得也有道理。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about we all calm down.
elements.text_zh: 要不大家都冷静一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nothing more about what happened at the Casino.
elements.text_zh: 赌场那点事，咱们这就翻篇吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I didn’t see a gun.
elements.text_zh: 我当时没看到枪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t care. Let’s talk about something else.
elements.text_zh: 不纠结这个了，换个话题吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: There must be something that won’t stir the pot.
elements.text_zh: 得聊点大家不容易吵起来的话题。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sports. Should be fun and safe.
elements.text_zh: 要不聊运动吧，有趣又安全的话题。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You two guys were both athletes, right?
elements.text_zh: 你们两个以前不都是运动员吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh my. More male ego wars.
elements.text_zh: 赶紧打住，你是真不了解这俩人。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I played a real sport. He ran around in a field chasing a ball.
elements.text_zh: 我玩的是正经运动。他玩的是追着球满场跑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Soccer is a sport, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 足球不是正经运动？Lance。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Well, it is kind of boring. Football is exciting.
elements.text_zh: 足球的确也是正经运动。不过足球有点无聊。橄榄球要精彩刺激得多。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s not quarrel about sports, okay?
elements.text_zh: 我们别吵了，好吗？

elements.text_en: Everyone quietly nods in agreement.
elements.text_zh: 大家都安静地点了点头。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’re a football fan. I didn’t know that.
elements.text_zh: Jax！你是橄榄球迷？我之前都不知道。

elements.text_en: Lance and Jax quietly chat about football.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Jax低声聊起了橄榄球。

elements.text_en: While Roxie and Gabe quietly talk.
elements.text_zh: 另一边，Roxie和Gabe小声说着话。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I would have stepped in if I saw a gun.
elements.text_zh: 要是让我我看到枪，我当时肯定也会出手。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m sure. You know I’m not a damsel in distress.
elements.text_zh: 我知道。不过你也知道我不是什么等着被拯救的公主。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Definitely. Remember that time in college...
elements.text_zh: 我当然知道，大学那次……

elements.text_en: Foley doesn’t find problems with the main cabinets.
elements.text_zh: Foley检查完主控柜，没发现什么问题。

elements.text_en: He finds Candy in the small spring.
elements.text_zh: 他在小温泉那边看到了Candy。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Foley, what are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: Foley，你怎么在这儿？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I’m troubleshooting the power.
elements.text_zh: 我在排查电力。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Just wondering. Does Jax know about us hooking up?
elements.text_zh: 随口问问，Jax知道我们之前那件事吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I didn’t say anything.
elements.text_zh: 我没说。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Is the crew coming back up here?
elements.text_zh: 工作人员还会上来吗？

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: Not for more than an hour.
elements.text_zh: 至少一个小时内不会上来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Why don’t you join me? The water is wonderful.
elements.text_zh: 要不要一起泡？这池子水挺舒服的。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I’ve got to check the power.
elements.text_zh: 我先处理电力的问题啊。

elements.text_en: Foley fixes the problem in ten minutes.
elements.text_zh: Foley十分钟就把问题搞定了。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: It was just a loose connection. I’m done.
elements.text_zh: 就是个接触不良，已经排查好了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Why don’t you get in and check my connections?
elements.text_zh: 要不要下来，“排查”一下我的问题？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We’re all alone up here.
elements.text_zh: 这边就咱俩没别人。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I don’t have a swimsuit.
elements.text_zh: 可我没带泳衣。

elements.text_en: Candy takes off her top and lays it on the side.
elements.text_zh: Candy把全套泳衣丢在池边。

elements.text_en: Her breasts visible just below the surface of the water.
elements.text_zh: 然后，靠在水里，对着Foley笑。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You don’t need a swimsuit. Remember these?
elements.text_zh: 用不着泳衣。你明白我的意思吗？

elements.text_en: She bobs up and down in the water. Briefly exposing her bare chest.
elements.text_zh: 她在水里晃了晃，故意逗他。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: I sure do.
elements.text_zh: 当然记得。

elements.text_en: Foley takes off his shirt. Candy takes off her bottoms.
elements.text_zh: Foley把衣服、鞋子、裤子全放在温泉池边。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Okay, total package now. Shoes and pants.
elements.text_zh: 行了，现在才算准备好了。

elements.text_en: Topless, Candy smiles seductively in the spring as Foley strips off his pants before her.
elements.text_zh: Foley坐到Candy面前的温泉池边。

elements.text_en: Foley gets into the water and makes his way to Candy.
elements.text_zh: 然后迫不及待地走进水里，朝Candy那边靠过去。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: You’re right, the water is perfect.
elements.text_zh: 你说得对，水温刚刚好。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Some positions only really work in the water.
elements.text_zh: 有些事，在水里做更合适。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We’ve got time for a couple.
elements.text_zh: 时间应该够吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Put your hands around my waist.
elements.text_zh: 把手放我这边……

elements.text_en: Foley stops at the large spring.
elements.text_zh: Foley已经穿戴整齐回到大温泉旁。

elements.name: Foley
elements.text_en: The power is all good, Jax. I’m heading out.
elements.text_zh: 电力都没问题了，Jax。我先走了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Thanks so much.
elements.text_zh: 太感谢了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Looks like he is soaking wet.
elements.text_zh: 看起来Foley浑身都汗湿了。

elements.text_en: Candy arrives back at the large spring five minutes after Foley leaves.
elements.text_zh: Foley走后五分钟，Candy回到大温泉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m gonna join you guys.
elements.text_zh: 我回来啦。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Foley and Candy. I can see that.
elements.text_zh: Foley和Candy，这俩人一前一后绝对有事儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you help out Foley?
elements.text_zh: 你刚才帮Foley去了吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He knew what he was doing.
elements.text_zh: 他需要我什么帮忙？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No more drama, like before. Okay, you or Lance?
elements.text_zh: 别再像刚才那样闹了，好吗？还要把Foley扯进来干嘛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, no more drama, homegirl.
elements.text_zh: 好，我们不聊八卦了，姐妹。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m sorry about putting you on the spot.
elements.text_zh: 刚的事儿抱歉啊Candy。

elements.text_en: Everyone goes quiet for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: 大家沉默了几秒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Finally, we can all chill out.
elements.text_zh: 终于可以都放松一下了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This place is so peaceful
elements.text_zh: 这里真的很安静。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: This is where the losers hang out!
elements.text_zh: 这里是什么“失败者”据点吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Not you, ladies. These two screwballs.
elements.text_zh: 美女们，我不是说你们啊。我说的是他们俩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Things were perfect.
elements.text_zh: 刚放松下来，Corbin又来捣乱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Corbin in full-blown snob mode.
elements.text_zh: 他又开始端着架子了，一副看谁都低一等的嘴脸。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Chill out, dude. We were all kicked back.
elements.text_zh: 说话别这么冲，老兄。刚才我们几个好不容易放松下来。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Roxie and I are scheduled for the intimacy challenge.
elements.text_zh: 我和Roxie马上有个拍摄，亲密度挑战环节，Jax没通知你们吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It slipped my mind.
elements.text_zh: 我差点忘了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not up for that, okay. Let's just hang out.
elements.text_zh: 我不太想搞那个，好吗？我们就一起聊聊不行吗。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just get in with us and relax.
elements.text_zh: 过来一起泡泡温泉放松一下吧。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No. No. You have an obligation.
elements.text_zh: 不，不行。你有安排。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Tell her, Jax.
elements.text_zh: 快跟她说，Jax。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Really, Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 这就要开拍了吗，Corbin？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Do your job.
elements.text_zh: 没错。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He’s right, Roxie, it’s a show obligation by contract.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，Roxie，去准备一下吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay fine!
elements.text_zh: 好吧。行。

elements.text_en: Gabe and Candy chat as Roxie and Corbin head for the small spring.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin前往拍摄，Gabe和Candy留下继续聊天。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You doing okay, Candy?
elements.text_zh: 你还好吗，Candy？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah. Hanging loose.
elements.text_zh: 还行。在这还挺放松的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What’s this intimacy challenge thing about?
elements.text_zh: 那个“亲密挑战”到底是怎么回事？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Part one is strip or don’t.
elements.text_zh: 有点像大冒险，比如沉到水池底换身衣服什么的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: The crew films all of it?
elements.text_zh: 全程都拍？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: They don’t gawk. They know how to make it work.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员知道分寸，不会乱来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Nothing shows up on TV, even if you're totally naked.
elements.text_zh: 电视播的也不会有大尺度镜头。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: There’s another part?
elements.text_zh: 还有呢？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Intimate or not. Kiss, touch, fondle, caress.
elements.text_zh: 还有就是自由决定要不要进一步有更亲密的接触啊，比如抱一抱，亲一亲。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: All the way for big points!
elements.text_zh: 不是越亲密越好，还要看默契度、配合度。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Nobody forces you. Mutual consent.
elements.text_zh: 不能有演的成分。或者说不能让人感觉是在演。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The crew leaves when things get steamy.
elements.text_zh: 做到位的话分数很高！气氛一热，工作人员就会走开，给足隐私空间。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The audience gets the message from the body language.
elements.text_zh: 观众会从之前的肢体语言里明白后来发生了什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Roxie and Corbin butt heads at the small spring.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和阴着脸的Corbin到了小温泉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay, butt head, we're here.
elements.text_zh: 好了，某位摆臭脸的先生，我们到了噢。

elements.text_en: This meets my obligation.
elements.text_zh: Corbin朝工作人员示意。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Don’t start filming.
elements.text_zh: 先别开始拍。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Every time, I think you’re a decent guy. You pull something.
elements.text_zh: 每到我以为你是个还不错的人的时候，你就又摆回那张臭脸。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I just said it was part of your contract.
elements.text_zh: 我只是提醒你，你这还有段拍摄要完成。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You show up thumping your chest. Calling Lance and Gabe losers.
elements.text_zh: 你一来就趾高气扬，骂Lance和Gabe是“失败者”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Order me up here, like you own me.
elements.text_zh: 又把我叫到这里，好像我就得听你指挥一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: None of that is okay. Don’t you get it?
elements.text_zh: 这样不对。你明白吗？

elements.text_en: They both go quiet for several moments.
elements.text_zh: 两个人沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, I get it. Sorry.
elements.text_zh: 我明白。对不起。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Roller coaster day with business stuff.
elements.text_zh: 今天工作把我搞炸了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Big conference call. Major supplier threatened to bail.
elements.text_zh: 一整个下午的会议。大供应商威胁要撤。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I threatened to sue for breach of contract. I beat them down.
elements.text_zh: 我直接拿违约说事，把他们压回去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, you came here feeling all pumped and powerful.
elements.text_zh: 你看，你现在还是那种“一切尽在我掌控”的状态？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, I guess I did.
elements.text_zh: ……是的，我可能还没切换过来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You can’t bomb in on people like that.
elements.text_zh: 你也不能总是这样强势地对待所有人吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about we take a breather and just talk.
elements.text_zh: 正好，我们坐下来好好聊聊。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Sounds like a plan.
elements.text_zh: 噢，好啊。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Corbin sit on the side of the spring, legs dangling in the water.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin坐在温泉边，腿垂在水里。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: There is something I want to get off my chest.
elements.text_zh: 有件事我一直想说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay.
elements.text_zh: 什么事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: The moment in the closet at the haunted house.
elements.text_zh: 鬼屋里那个储藏间……

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I said we shouldn’t make too much of it.
elements.text_zh: 我当时说别想太多。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Now I wonder, what did it mean?
elements.text_zh: 但我忍不住不去想？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A brief emotional moment between friends.
elements.text_zh: 朋友之间一时的情绪吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s not nothing. Let’s not make too much of it.
elements.text_zh: 当时我们之间，也不是啥也没有，但别想太多。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。

elements.name: Cam Op
elements.text_en: Should we start filming?
elements.text_zh: 要开始拍了吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You guys can take off. We’re just going to sit and talk.
elements.text_zh: 你们先走吧，不拍了，我们就坐着聊会儿。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: The thing with the spiders. You should forget...
elements.text_zh: 还有，蜘蛛那件事……有点囧。你就当没发生过吧……

elements.text_en: Corbin and Roxie chat as the crew leaves.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员离开后，Corbin和Roxie继续了一会儿。

elements.text_en: Gabe moves close to Candy as Roxie and Corbin return from the challenge.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin回到大池子时，Gabe挪到Candy身旁。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Crew came down a while ago.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员刚经过。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Guess you scored big points, up there.
elements.text_zh: 看来你们在上面进展不错嘛。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Candy explained how it works. Thanks, sweet cheeks.
elements.text_zh: Candy跟我讲了规则。谢啦，小可爱。

elements.text_en: Candy is wide-eyed as Gabe kisses her on the cheek.
elements.text_zh: Gabe在Candy脸颊上点了一下，Candy愣住了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You're welcome. I guess.
elements.text_zh: 不是……不用谢。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Hey, it's not...
elements.text_zh: 等等，这不是……

elements.text_en: Roxie cuts Corbin off as they both get into the big spring.
elements.text_zh: Roxie打断了Corbin，两人一起下到大温泉池里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s not any of your business, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 拍摄顺不顺利你管不着，Gabe。

elements.text_en: Roxie kisses Corbin on the cheek and slides next to him.
elements.text_zh: Roxie挪到Corbin身边，在他脸颊上轻轻亲了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We don’t kiss and tell, right, beefcake?
elements.text_zh: 我们不会拿着这事儿到处说，对吧，亲爱的？

elements.text_en: Corbin stares at Roxie for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Corbin看了Roxie一眼。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay, right.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，对。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The crew did seem to enjoy the foreplay.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员看应该是大饱眼福了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Beefcake? You went all in with Corbin? Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 你叫他亲爱的？你俩来真的了？Corbin，你说句话啊？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What business is it of yours? I was talking to Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 我在跟Gabe说话。你来八卦什么？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What do you mean … with Corbin?
elements.text_zh: 等等，什么叫Roxie跟我来真的？听不懂你说什么。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sorry, dude. I don’t see it happening.
elements.text_zh: 不好意思，看来是我们想多了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie’s messing with soccer boy. He bought it.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在逗Gabe呢，他当真了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I didn’t pay any attention. Why would I?
elements.text_zh: 我当真？我甚至都没在意。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: And you were playing Candy to mess with Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 反倒是你，之前一直拿Candy气Roxie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: And she was totally buying it.
elements.text_zh: 利用Candy是我不对，但Roxie吃我的醋了啊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I wasn’t buying anything, and I don’t care.
elements.text_zh: 我没吃你们任何人的醋，我也不在乎。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m tired of being part of these warped games.
elements.text_zh: 实际上，我受够了你们这些乱七八糟的。

elements.text_en: A group image in the big spring of chaos as everyone shouts.
elements.text_zh: 大温泉里一片混乱，大家都忙着为自己辩解。

elements.text_en: Jax stands up and shouts to stop the chaos.
elements.text_zh: Jax站起来大声制止混乱。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s enough of this craziness.
elements.text_zh: 好啦，大家都少说两句。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie, are we going to see some sizzling film for you and Corbin?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你跟Corbin这次真会有“名场面”吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. We just sat and talked.
elements.text_zh: 不会，我们只是坐着聊了聊。没拍。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No more drama plays using friends as chess pieces.
elements.text_zh: 别再把朋友当棋子搞事情了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax is right. No more games.
elements.text_zh: Jax说得对，别再玩这些了。

elements.text_en: Candy and Roxie help Jax make sure everything is ready for the evening.
elements.text_zh: Candy和Roxie帮Jax一起确认晚上的筹备事宜。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Thanks for helping out. Looks like everything is good.
elements.text_zh: 今天拍摄辛苦了。还好没出什么岔子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: One camera segment and then free time, right?
elements.text_zh: 晚上就拍一个镜头，然后就自由活动，对吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, Harley will host a segment. Then, a small party just for us.
elements.text_zh: 对，Harley会主持一个环节，之后是我们自己的小派对。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: No more drama games, I hope.
elements.text_zh: 希望别再搞什么抓马了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Things got out of hand at the hot springs. Sorry for my part.
elements.text_zh: 温泉那边确实有点失控，我也有责任，抱歉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s stick together, chicas.
elements.text_zh: 今晚我们抱团吧，姐妹们。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, girl power.
elements.text_zh: 对，女孩力量。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Speaking of girls and guys. Gabe is doing a guest spot.
elements.text_zh: 话说，今晚的派对，Gabe也会来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The managing producer saw him and insisted. Last-minute thing.
elements.text_zh: 执行制片看中了他，临时拍板，特别邀请他做我们嘉宾。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Okay with that, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你ok吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just for tonight?
elements.text_zh: 就今晚？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah. A one-episode deal. He was fine with it.
elements.text_zh: 对，就一集。他也答应了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure. Sounds like fun.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，听起来挺有意思。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Let’s have it, girlfriend. You keep dancing around it.
elements.text_zh: 说吧，姐妹。别绕圈子了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Dancing around what?
elements.text_zh: 我绕圈子？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Come on, Roxie, you and Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 别装了，Roxie，你和Gabe。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I know the backstory. Jax gave me the big picture.
elements.text_zh: 我知道背景故事。Jax已经给我讲了大概。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She did?
elements.text_zh: 她说了？

elements.text_en: Roxie shoots a look at Jax.
elements.text_zh: Roxie瞪了Jax一眼。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Publicly available data, sister.
elements.text_zh: 这从赌场那晚开始，都是公开信息啦，姐妹。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m with Candy. Supposedly, he was just dropping by.
elements.text_zh: 我跟Candy问的是一件事儿。Gabe说是说他只是路过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What’s the real deal?
elements.text_zh: 但真实情况呢？是专门为你而来吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You two are making something out of nothing.
elements.text_zh: 你们俩想太多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We talked about him staying around.
elements.text_zh: 不过我们确实聊过，他说他会留下来一阵子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I said I thought it would be nice.
elements.text_zh: 我说不急着走也挺好的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You and Lance? You keep denying it. I don’t buy it.
elements.text_zh: 那你和Lance呢？你一直否认你们之间有什么，我可不信。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I like Lance.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，我是挺喜欢Lance的，我不否认。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t know what I want. Play it cool
elements.text_zh: 但在我弄清楚自己想要什么之前，就先不要那么上头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fun in the sun kind of stuff.
elements.text_zh: 就当是，来到这个美丽的地方，找找乐趣呗。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Speaking of which. Here come the guys.
elements.text_zh: 诶，他们来了。

elements.text_en: Corbin, Lance, and Gabe chatter as they arrive.
elements.text_zh: Corbin、Lance和Gabe一边聊着一边走过来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Total BS dude, soccer is not a skill sport.
elements.text_zh: 扯吧你，兄弟。足球算哪门子技术活。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You aren’t even allowed to use your hands.
elements.text_zh: 你们连手都不能用。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Goalie uses his hands.
elements.text_zh: 守门员能用手。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Football, you have all these specialized positions.
elements.text_zh: 美式橄榄球分工那么细。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: The linemen, they look like a bunch of Sumo wrestlers.
elements.text_zh: 那些线卫，看着跟相扑选手似的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stop! No more football versus soccer.
elements.text_zh: 停！别再比足球和橄榄球了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t you have anything else to talk about?
elements.text_zh: 你们就不能换个话题吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Roxie’s right. Tennis, now there’s a real sport.
elements.text_zh: Roxie说得对。网球才叫真本事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Mano-a-Mano.
elements.text_zh: 一对一。

elements.text_en: Gabe and Lance go after Corbin and tennis.
elements.text_zh: Gabe和Lance立刻拿Corbin和网球开涮。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Enough with the sports jabber.
elements.text_zh: 行了行了，咱仨别再聊运动了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I hear you are on camera tonight, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 我听说你今晚要上镜，Gabe。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You ready for it?
elements.text_zh: 准备好了吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sure. I’m a natural for the camera.
elements.text_zh: 当然，我很上镜的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And so modest.
elements.text_zh: 而且你还特别谦虚。

elements.text_en: Harley arrives, and the group is seated. Jax is standing with the crew.
elements.text_zh: Harley到了，大家入座，Jax和工作人员站在一起。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why did they put me between Lance and Gabe?
elements.text_zh: 为什么我会被安排坐在Lance和Gabe中间？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You gonna give us the rundown, Harley?
elements.text_zh: Harley，要不要先给我们讲下流程？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: A Truth or Dare challenge. I’m the host.
elements.text_zh: 真心话大冒险，我来主持。

elements.text_en: Harley gives a summary of how the segment works.
elements.text_zh: Harley简单说了下规则。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There are penalties, right?
elements.text_zh: 惩罚机制有吧？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Yeah. If someone calls you out on a truth.
elements.text_zh: 有。如果有人质疑你的真心话。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: You make your case, and the group votes.
elements.text_zh: 你可以解释，然后大家投票。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: If the group decides you lied. Zero points for the segment.
elements.text_zh: 如果大家觉得你在说谎，这一轮直接零分。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Same deal if you don’t complete a dare?
elements.text_zh: 不完成大冒险也是一样？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: You got it.
elements.text_zh: 对。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What if the dare is unreasonable?
elements.text_zh: 那要是大冒险太离谱呢？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: I’m the wizard. My challenges are reasonable.
elements.text_zh: 不会，我亲自把关。我是裁判，我出的题都很合理。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Physical contact. Mutual consent. No penalty if you decline.
elements.text_zh: 涉及身体接触，必须双方同意。拒绝不扣分。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Everyone ready to go?
elements.text_zh: 大家准备好了吗？

elements.text_en: Everyone nods their agreement.
elements.text_zh: 所有人都点了点头。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Cameras rolling. Get us started, Harley.
elements.text_zh: 摄像开始。Harley，开始吧。

elements.text_en: After several rounds, Harley calls on Roxie for a Challenge.
elements.text_zh: 几轮之后，Harley点名让Roxie接挑战。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie, are you ready for another challenge?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，准备好再来一个挑战了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Again, already. Keep on your game face.
elements.text_zh: 又是我？稳住，稳住。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure thing! Bring it on. Truth this time.
elements.text_zh: 好啊。这次我选真心话。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: You recently visited a haunted house with Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 你最近跟Corbin一起去了鬼屋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The kiss? Does he know? Corbin blabbing?
elements.text_zh: 哈？他知道那个吻了吗？还是Corbin说漏嘴了？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Give us the truth about spooky effects that scared Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 说说那些把Corbin吓到的“名场面”吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie describes Corbin’s fear when the rubber spiders dropped down.
elements.text_zh: Roxie笑着描述了橡胶蜘蛛掉下来时，Corbin当场破防的样子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, Corbin can't afford to lose a segment.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉啦，Corbin，这一轮可不能让你输掉。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No problem. I can take it.
elements.text_zh: 没事，你说吧，能给你涨点分，我忍了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Come on, Lance, let me have it.
elements.text_zh: 嘿，Lance，你想说什么？有屁就放。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Nothing from me, bro. Spider eggs in your hair. Nasty stuff.
elements.text_zh: 我没啥可说的，兄弟。蜘蛛卵掉你头发里，这叫恶心。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Ain’t nothing funny about that.
elements.text_zh: 算不上什么“名场面”。也不好笑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re kidding. Both of you?
elements.text_zh: 不是吧？你们俩认真的？这还不好笑吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Don’t poke fun at us. You’re afraid of clowns.
elements.text_zh: 笑我们，你自己还怕小丑呢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is a truth about Corbin. Not me!
elements.text_zh: 现在说的是真心话，说的是什么把Corbin吓到了，不是我！

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Let’s see where the truth leads.
elements.text_zh: 你们这么一说，信息量还挺大的嘛。

elements.text_en: Later. Harley calls for the last challenge of the evening.
elements.text_zh: 稍后，Harley宣布今晚的最后一个挑战。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: It's been a great evening of truth and dare.
elements.text_zh: 今晚的真心话大冒险玩得很精彩。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: The last challenge is for a couple.
elements.text_zh: 最后一个挑战，我们选一男一女参加。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not me. Please not me.
elements.text_zh: 别是我，千万别是我。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Lance and Candy. What do you two want? Truth or dare?
elements.text_zh: Lance和Candy，这个机会就给你俩吧。你们选真心话还是大冒险？

elements.text_en: Lance and Candy whisper for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Candy低声商量了一会儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This could be interesting.
elements.text_zh: 有意思。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Give us a dare, Harley.
elements.text_zh: 我们选大冒险吧。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: A passionate kiss for you two. Not a peck on the cheek.
elements.text_zh: 好，敢不敢当众来个有点分量的吻，不是那种敷衍的，也不能是贴面礼。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You good with that?
elements.text_zh: 你们可以吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure.
elements.text_zh: 可以。

elements.text_en: Lance wraps an arm around her lower back and pulls her close.
elements.text_zh: Lance伸手把Candy拉到身边。两人对视了一下便亲了下去。

elements.text_en: Their kiss turns passionate as Lance squeezes Candy’s bottom.
elements.text_zh: 周围一片起哄声，两人完全不像是敷衍。

elements.text_en: Candy softly moans, and then they separate.
elements.text_zh: Candy脸有点红，两人亲了好一会儿才分开。

elements.text_en: Lance and Candy kissing in a tight embrace near the bonfire. Roxie wide-eyed with surprise.
elements.text_zh: 篝火旁气氛瞬间被点燃，Roxie睁大了眼睛。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Wow! Full points for that effort. That’s it for tonight.
elements.text_zh: 哇，这一下给满分。今晚就到这儿吧。大家辛苦啦！

elements.text_en: The crew packs up and leaves, along with Harley.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员和Harley一起收拾设备离开。

elements.text_en: Roxie stares at Lance.
elements.text_zh: Roxie盯着Lance看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That didn’t look like play acting.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那一下不像演的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why you eyeballing me like that, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你干嘛那样盯着我，Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not doing anything.
elements.text_zh: 没有啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Back off, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 别靠Roxie那么近，Lance。保持社交距离。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’re like a dog marking your territory around Roxie
elements.text_zh: 别整得像是在宣示主权似的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Me? How about you?
elements.text_zh: 我？那你呢？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You’ve been on her like a bee on honey.
elements.text_zh: 你黏她黏得也不轻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stop it, Lance. Shut up.
elements.text_zh: 够了，Lance，闭嘴。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, dude, shut it.
elements.text_zh: 对，闭嘴吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You too, Gabe. Shut it!
elements.text_zh: 你是，Gabe！

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m done with this place.
elements.text_zh: 你吼我。算了我不该来掺和这里的。

elements.text_en: Gabe rushes away, and Roxie moves into the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Gabe气冲冲地走开了，Roxie也悄悄退进了阴影里。

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie talk quietly in the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Roxie在阴影中低声说着话。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Talk to Gabe when you both calm down.
elements.text_zh: 等你们都冷静下来，再去找Gabe聊聊吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Smooth things over with Lance. It will all be fine.
elements.text_zh: 也跟Lance把话说清楚，一切都会好起来的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thanks, Jax.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Jax。

elements.text_en: Candy and Roxie chat after the crew and Harley are gone.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员和Harley走后，Candy找到Roxie聊了几句。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I've got to be honest. That kiss with Lance.
elements.text_zh: 我得坦白说，刚才和Lance那个。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: It started as just a dare challenge.
elements.text_zh: 一开始只是个大冒险。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: It finished with a spark.
elements.text_zh: 结果却有点不一样的感觉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Are you and I good?
elements.text_zh: 这事儿不会影响咱们俩吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We’ve gotten close, almost like sisters.
elements.text_zh: 女嘉宾里，就你和我走得近。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That kiss didn’t break our sisterly bond.
elements.text_zh: 放心吧，那个吻破坏不了我们的姐妹情谊。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Girl power, right?
elements.text_zh: 嗯，女孩力量。那我先走啦。

elements.text_en: Lance and Roxie set things right.
elements.text_zh: Lance找到Roxie，两人把话说开了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m sorry that Gabe bolted.
elements.text_zh: Gabe刚才突然走掉，我很抱歉。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m partly to blame.
elements.text_zh: 我也有一部分责任。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I had my own part in all of this.
elements.text_zh: 我不也是吗。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He made the decision to walk off.
elements.text_zh: 他自己要离开的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You and I have to get along
elements.text_zh: 不影响你和我好好相处。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: On the show and hopefully, as friends.
elements.text_zh: 不管是在节目里，还是私下，作为朋友。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m square with that.
elements.text_zh: 这点我同意。

elements.text_en: Orwell arrives and brings renewed energy to the group.
elements.text_zh: Orwell到场，气氛瞬间不一样了！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: This is supposed to be a partayyy!
elements.text_zh: 嘿，大家燥起来啊！不是派对时间吗！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A festive gathering!
elements.text_zh: 篝火已经把气氛都烘托到这了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A bonfire is the perfect atmospheric.
elements.text_zh: 我们来一场庆祝聚会怎么样！

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Corbin. I heard a rumor that you and spiders were an item this evening.
elements.text_zh: Corbin，我听说今晚爆出你一个梗对吧，蜘蛛那个。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, my fear got some chuckles.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，我的恐惧倒是给大家添了点笑料。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nobody was laughing.
elements.text_zh: 没有人笑你啦。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I giggled a little. Sorry.
elements.text_zh: 不过我……也没完全忍住不笑，抱歉。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m with Orwell, not a funny situation.
elements.text_zh: 我站Corbin这边，这一点都不好笑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Spiders laying eggs in your hair. It doesn’t happen.
elements.text_zh: 喂！别当真。蜘蛛在你头发里产卵，这种事不会发生。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Contraire, my fair lady. It’s real.
elements.text_zh: 恰恰相反，女士，这是真的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: See, Roxie. It’s something to be afraid of
elements.text_zh: 你看，Roxie，这事确实值得害怕。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I didn’t say that, amigo.
elements.text_zh: 我可没这么说，朋友。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Orwell, you’re contradicting yourself.
elements.text_zh: Orwell，你这不是自相矛盾吗？

elements.text_en: The group gathers as Orwell spins another quirky tale.
elements.text_zh: 大家围了过来，Orwell又开始讲他的怪故事。

elements.text_en: It started decades ago with a woman and a giant beehive hairdo.
elements.text_zh: 事情要从几十年前说起，一个女人顶着夸张的蜂巢发型。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A lot of hairspray kept it stable. Spiders made a nest in the dooh.
elements.text_zh: 靠大量发胶才固定住，结果蜘蛛在里面安了家。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Urban legend that caused panic about doohs and hairspray.
elements.text_zh: 这成了都市传说，大家开始害怕发型和发胶。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, see! Legend, false, right.
elements.text_zh: 看吧！传说而已，假的，对吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s not the end of the story, Fraulein.
elements.text_zh: 故事还没完，小姐。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Several documented cases of spider eggs hatching in human hair.
elements.text_zh: 后来真有记录，说有人头发里孵出过蜘蛛卵。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Prisoners with puffy hairstyles who don’t frequently shower.
elements.text_zh: 多发生在不怎么洗澡、发型蓬松的人身上。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I knew it! Horrible.
elements.text_zh: 我就知道！太可怕了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: No, it’s a wonderful thing. Circle of life, experience.
elements.text_zh: 不，这是一种生命的循环。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: An incubator for another species.
elements.text_zh: 成了别的物种的“温床”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Imagine the transformative moment as hundreds hatch.
elements.text_zh: 想象一下，成百上千一起冒出来的瞬间。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Orwell, stop. Please stop!
elements.text_zh: Orwell，够了，用不着讲这么细！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah. You’re making it worse.
elements.text_zh: 对，你越说越吓人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Okay. You don’t dig hosting an arachnid hatchery.
elements.text_zh: 行了，没人想当“蜘蛛孵化场”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We got this great fire to commune around.
elements.text_zh: 但我们有篝火，正好换个话题。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I’ve got a business call. Be back in about half an hour.
elements.text_zh: 我接个电话，半小时回来。

elements.text_en: Corbin leaves the group as Orwell continues.
elements.text_zh: Corbin起身离开，Orwell还在讲。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A fire is a great spot for scary stories. Monsters.
elements.text_zh: 篝火最适合讲吓人的故事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No more monster truths, myths, or movies
elements.text_zh: 拜托，别再讲怪物、传说或电影了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Want to hear about a real-life encounter with a serial killer?
elements.text_zh: 那讲个真人经历，敢不敢听？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Happened to me when I was a kid.
elements.text_zh: 我小时候亲身遇到过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re comfortable talking about it?
elements.text_zh: 你真要讲这个？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It’s Orwell. Sure, he is. Let’s hear it, dude.
elements.text_zh: 这是Orwell，他肯定想讲。说吧。

elements.text_en: Everyone falls quiet as Orwell begins his story.
elements.text_zh: 大家都安静下来，等他开口。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It was summer when I was thirteen.
elements.text_zh: 那年夏天，我十三岁。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I grew up in a small town.
elements.text_zh: 我在一个小镇长大。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: There was a state prison about ten miles outside of town.
elements.text_zh: 镇外不远有一座州立监狱。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: One evening, we heard the prison sirens and then the news on TV.
elements.text_zh: 那天晚上警报响了，电视也在播新闻。

elements.text_en: The meat hook serial killer had escaped.
elements.text_zh: 有个连环杀手越狱了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He lost his right hand in an accident. Replaced with a hook.
elements.text_zh: 他少了一只手，说是换成了钩子。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He killed people with the hook.
elements.text_zh: 传说他用那玩意儿杀人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My dad was a cop; he was working second shift.
elements.text_zh: 我爸是警察，那天上夜班。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My mom and I were alone at home.
elements.text_zh: 家里只剩我和我妈。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We heard the back door creak open. Footsteps in the hallway.
elements.text_zh: 我们听见屋里有动静。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My mom and I hid in the front closet.
elements.text_zh: 我妈拉着我躲进了柜子。

elements.text_en: Orwell goes quiet and stares at the ground.
elements.text_zh: Orwell说到这儿突然沉默了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What happened? What did the killer do?
elements.text_zh: 然后呢？发生什么了？

elements.text_en: A figure of a man appears in the shadows as he shouts a threat.
elements.text_zh: 这时，阴影里冒出一个人影。

elements.text_en: I’m going to kill you all!
elements.text_zh: 他喊：我要把你们全干掉！

elements.text_en: A man in the shadows wearing a hooded cape and he has a hook for a hand.
elements.text_zh: 披着斗篷，手上还挂着“钩子”。

elements.text_en: Roxie, Candy, Jax, and Lance scream as they jump up.
elements.text_zh: Roxie她们当场尖叫跳起来。

elements.text_en: The figure in the shadows starts to laugh.
elements.text_zh: 那个人影突然笑出声。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Good job, Corbin. Got all four of them.
elements.text_zh: 干得漂亮，Corbin，四个全中。

elements.text_en: Corbin removes the costume and hook as he steps from the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Corbin从阴影里走出来，摘下面具和道具。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m impressed, you two working together.
elements.text_zh: 我服了，你们两个配合得真好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That took some planning.
elements.text_zh: 这事儿肯定提前设计过。

elements.text_en: Everyone settles back down in seats around the fire.
elements.text_zh: 大家又在篝火旁坐了下来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Aren’t fires also good for romantic tales?
elements.text_zh: 篝火不也很适合讲点浪漫故事吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Where you going with this?
elements.text_zh: 你这是想带到哪儿去？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Sharing a spicy truth. You can share as much as you want.
elements.text_zh: 来点“劲爆”的真心话，想说多少都行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. What kind of truth?
elements.text_zh: 行吧，什么样的真心话？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Most fantastic, outlandish place you've had sex.
elements.text_zh: 说说你经历过最离谱的地方。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. I’ll jump in. University biology lab. Dissection table.
elements.text_zh: 那我先来。大学生物实验室，解剖台。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie, dissection table? Nasty.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，解剖台？也太恶心了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was clean, girl. Sterilized clean.
elements.text_zh: 很干净的，真的，消过毒。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Kind of pedestrian, just a room. First-class seat, commercial airline flight.
elements.text_zh: 这个就有点普通了。头等舱，商业航班。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Swedish stewardess at 45,000 feet.
elements.text_zh: 瑞典空姐，四万五千英尺高空。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I can’t compete at this level. I’ll pass.
elements.text_zh: 这级别我比不了，我弃权。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Pass for me as well.
elements.text_zh: 我也弃权。

elements.text_en: Everyone waits for Candy after Orwell finishes.
elements.text_zh: Orwell说完后，大家都看向Candy。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Very interesting, Orwell. Not as hard to pull off as Lance.
elements.text_zh: 挺精彩的，Orwell。没Lance那么难搞。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Candy. What do you have?
elements.text_zh: Candy，你呢？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Commercial airplane, 48,000 feet.
elements.text_zh: 商业航班，四万八千英尺。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: So what? Three thousand feet higher.
elements.text_zh: 所以？也就高了三千英尺。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Cockpit with the captain while on autopilot.
elements.text_zh: 驾驶舱里，飞机开着自动驾驶。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Co-pilot on break and navigator racked out.
elements.text_zh: 副驾驶在休息，导航员在睡觉。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Over the polar ice cap.
elements.text_zh: 在极地冰盖上空。

elements.text_en: A cold wind sweeps over the gathering.
elements.text_zh: 一阵冷风掠过人群。

elements.text_en: Raven is just visible in the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Raven的身影隐约出现在阴影中。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Telling stories around the fire. How quaint
elements.text_zh: 哟，篝火故事，真是古雅。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Guess who I met up with in the darkness?
elements.text_zh: 猜猜我在黑暗里遇到了谁？

elements.text_en: Gabe comes out of the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Gabe从阴影中走出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe, what’s going on?
elements.text_zh: Gabe，怎么回事？

elements.text_en: Gabe stares at the ground.
elements.text_zh: Gabe低着头。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He’s eager to please. Reminds me of your ex-husband, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 他很有服务意识。让我想起你前夫。

elements.text_en: Roxie has a flashback of her ex-husband and Raven.
elements.text_zh: Roxie闪回前夫和Raven的画面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you want, Raven?
elements.text_zh: 你想干什么，Raven？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I just wanted to make sure Gabe found his way back.
elements.text_zh: 我只是确认Gabe能顺利回来。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Ta. Ta. Darlings.
elements.text_zh: 再见了，亲爱的们。

elements.text_en: Raven rushes off, and Gabe wanders away.
elements.text_zh: Raven冲进黑暗中，Gabe漫无目的地走开。

elements.text_en: Roxie shuffles into the shadows, and Jax follows.
elements.text_zh: Roxie走进阴影里，Jax跟了上去。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Don’t assume the worst.
elements.text_zh: 别往最坏的地方想。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You and I know what Raven was saying.
elements.text_zh: 你我都懂Raven在暗示什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe just stood there.
elements.text_zh: Gabe就那样站着。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Raven could be lying. Some kind of twisted stunt.
elements.text_zh: Raven也许在撒谎。可能是某种恶作剧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I want to be alone for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: 我想一个人待一会儿。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Okay, come back to the bonfire.
elements.text_zh: 好，等会儿回篝火那边。

elements.text_en: Roxie is shocked by a voice from the shadows as Jax leaves.
elements.text_zh: Jax离开后，一个声音从阴影里响起，Roxie被吓了一跳。

elements.text_en: I warned you about betrayal.
elements.text_zh: 我警告过你，会有背叛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Madam Luna, what are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: 露娜夫人？你怎么会在这？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My sister? Gabe? Both of them?
elements.text_zh: 我妹妹？Gabe？他们两个？

elements.name: Luna
elements.text_en: Now I see danger. It’s lurking out there.
elements.text_zh: 现在我看到危险了。它就潜伏在暗处。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Danger? From who? What kind of danger?
elements.text_zh: 危险？来自谁？什么危险？

elements.text_en: Madam Luna disappears into the darkness.
elements.text_zh: 露娜夫人消失在夜色里。

elements.text_en: Roxie follows Orwell into a bar after leaving the bonfire.
elements.text_zh: 离开篝火后，Roxie跟着Orwell进了酒吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie scans the rough-looking crowd at the doorway of the pub.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在酒吧门口扫了一眼那群看起来不太善的客人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sure this place is okay, Orwell?
elements.text_zh: 你确定这地方没问题吗，Orwell？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve had enough drama already.
elements.text_zh: 我已经受够这些抓马了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We’ll be fine. My man, Bruiser here, will make sure of that.
elements.text_zh: 放心。我兄弟Bruiser会罩着的。

elements.text_en: A tough-looking bouncer stares at Roxie for a moment.
elements.text_zh: 一个看起来很凶的保镖盯着Roxie看了几秒。

elements.name: Bruiser
elements.text_en: Who is this fine lady?
elements.text_zh: 这位美女是谁？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: This is Roxie, a good friend of mine.
elements.text_zh: 这是Roxie，我的好朋友。

elements.name: Bruiser
elements.text_en: Pleasure is mine, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 幸会，Roxie。

elements.name: Bruiser
elements.text_en: Somebody here gives you the stink eye, let me know.
elements.text_zh: 要是有人对你眼神不对，跟我说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nice to meet you, and thanks.
elements.text_zh: 很高兴认识你，谢谢。

elements.text_en: The bartender waves Orwell to a booth.
elements.text_zh: 酒保朝Orwell招手，示意他们去卡座。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The sign says reserved. Did you call ahead?
elements.text_zh: 牌子写着“已预订”。你提前约了？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: No. They keep a spot for me.
elements.text_zh: 没有。他们给我留位。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You come here a lot?
elements.text_zh: 你常来？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I pop in now and then.
elements.text_zh: 偶尔。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A great place for cultural studies.
elements.text_zh: 很适合做文化观察。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Orwell settle In.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Orwell坐了下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bruiser seems like a tough character.
elements.text_zh: 那个保镖看起来不好惹。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He can handle anyone who gets out of line.
elements.text_zh: 谁要是越界，他都能搞定。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Kind of a softie on the inside, if you get to know him.
elements.text_zh: 真认识了你就知道，其实他内心挺软的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He plays the harp. Don’t mention that in here.
elements.text_zh: 他会弹竖琴。这事在这儿可别提。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The harp, seriously?
elements.text_zh: 竖琴？真的假的？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yes indeed. Plucks it like an angel in heaven.
elements.text_zh: 千真万确。弹起来跟天使似的。

elements.text_en: A waitress serves Roxie and Orwell drinks.
elements.text_zh: 服务员给Roxie和Orwell端上了酒。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You’re always careful about drinking. Half a shot only.
elements.text_zh: 你喝酒一直很克制，只要半杯。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, a metabolism thing.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，代谢问题。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just hang out and chill, okay.
elements.text_zh: 就放松点，随便坐坐，好吗。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I see you got a lot rolling around in your gray matter.
elements.text_zh: 我看你脑子里转着不少事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Too many men in my life.
elements.text_zh: 我生活里男人太多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. Thanks, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 是啊。谢谢你，Orwell。

elements.text_en: I’m curious about something, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 有件事，Orwell。

elements.text_en: It’s kind of personal.
elements.text_zh: 我私下有点好奇。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m an open book, especially for a home girl.
elements.text_zh: 说吧，你知道我向来很坦诚，尤其对自己人。

elements.text_en: Do you find me attractive, you know, sexy?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得我有吸引力吗？我是说，性感那种。

elements.text_en: Curious query coming from a drop-dead beautiful lady.
elements.text_zh: 从一个美到惊艳的女人嘴里听到这问题，挺有意思。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: What you getting at? Speak plainly, sweet cheeks.
elements.text_zh: 你想问什么？直说吧，小可爱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’ve never chased after me. Kind of wonder.
elements.text_zh: 你从没追过我。我有点好奇为什么。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I figured we're cool as friends. Right?
elements.text_zh: 我以为我们当朋友就挺好，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I like it this way just fine.
elements.text_zh: 我也很喜欢现在这样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Besides, you’ve got plenty of Casanovas circling you.
elements.text_zh: 再说了，你身边一直围着一堆情场高手。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Don’t let their antics get to you.
elements.text_zh: 别让他们那些把戏影响你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s right about that.
elements.text_zh: 他说得没错。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Something darker is also on your mind, right?
elements.text_zh: 你心里是不是还压着点更阴影的事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, there is something. Can’t put my finger on it.
elements.text_zh: 是的，确实有点。但我说不上来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t tell him you saw Madam Luna tonight.
elements.text_zh: 别告诉他你今晚见过露娜夫人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t mention danger.
elements.text_zh: 也别提什么危险。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You really believe in Madam Luna?
elements.text_zh: 你真的相信露娜夫人吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Madam Luna, why are you asking?
elements.text_zh: 露娜夫人？你怎么突然问这个？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You remember I stuck around after our readings.
elements.text_zh: 你记得占卜后我又留下来了吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, why? Something happen?
elements.text_zh: 记得。怎么了？发生什么事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep this between us, okay.
elements.text_zh: 这件事只在我们之间，好吗。

elements.text_en: Solemn oath.
elements.text_zh: 庄严发誓。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She warned me to be careful of who I trust.
elements.text_zh: 她提醒我要小心我信任的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m wondering if I should have taken her seriously.
elements.text_zh: 我在想，也许我该认真对待她的话。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: What powers she has or doesn’t have, I can’t be sure.
elements.text_zh: 她到底有没有什么能力，我也说不准。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She’s not a con artist or an act.
elements.text_zh: 但她不是骗子，也不是在演戏。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’d say, take what she says to heart.
elements.text_zh: 我会建议你认真对待，多留个心眼。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You afraid? Need someone covering your back?
elements.text_zh: 你害怕吗？需不需要找个人罩着？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. No. Nothing like that.
elements.text_zh: 不。不。不是那样。

elements.text_en: Roxie looks around at the crowded pub.
elements.text_zh: Roxie环顾了一下拥挤的酒吧。

elements.text_en: Quite the assortment of guys and gals.
elements.text_zh: 这里的人真是五花八门。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, not everything is as it appears.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，表面看到的未必是真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you mean?
elements.text_zh: 什么意思？

elements.text_en: Orwell nods at a rugged middle-aged man at the bar.
elements.text_zh: Orwell朝吧台那边一个粗犷的中年男人点了点头。

elements.text_en: Would you want to meet him in a dark alley?
elements.text_zh: 你愿意在黑巷子里碰见他吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way. Looks like he must be in a biker gang.
elements.text_zh: 才不。看着像混摩托帮的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Probably beats up people just for the fun of it.
elements.text_zh: 估计会为了找乐子就揍人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He’s an accountant. Alter ego to come here and pretend.
elements.text_zh: 他是个会计。来这儿换个身份演一演。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He wouldn’t hurt a fly.
elements.text_zh: 他连只苍蝇都不会伤害。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Never would have guessed. Everybody here knows that?
elements.text_zh: 真没想到。这里的人都知道吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Bruiser, the bartender, and your main man, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 保镖、酒保，还有你最重要的那位，Orwell。

elements.text_en: Okay, the biker chick at the end of the bar. What’s she in real life?
elements.text_zh: 那吧台尽头那个机车风的女人呢？现实里干嘛的？

elements.text_en: A vicious biker babe who would stab you without blinking an eye.
elements.text_zh: 一个狠角色，眼都不眨就能捅人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. This is quite the place, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 哇，这地方真不简单，Orwell。

elements.text_en: Orwell, I didn’t know you were going to be here tonight.
elements.text_zh: Orwell，我不知道你今晚也在这儿。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hey, babe, join us.
elements.text_zh: 嘿，宝贝，过来一起坐。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I don’t want to barge in.
elements.text_zh: 我不想贸然打扰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Please, we have this whole booth.
elements.text_zh: 别啊，这整个卡座都是我们的。

elements.text_en: Roxie recognizes the woman as Orwell does introductions.
elements.text_zh: Orwell介绍的时候，Roxie已经认出她了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I saw you when we left the haunted house.
elements.text_zh: 我们离开鬼屋时我见过你。

elements.text_en: Orwell kisses Morganna on the cheek as she sits next to him.
elements.text_zh: Morganna坐到Orwell身边，他在她脸颊上亲了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There’s a connection between you two.
elements.text_zh: 你们俩明显有点关系。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Are you coming straight from the haunted house?
elements.text_zh: 你是刚从鬼屋过来的吗？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: No. This is how I look. Well, most of the time.
elements.text_zh: 不是。我平时差不多就这样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Roxie is cool, give her the quick and dirty.
elements.text_zh: Roxie人很好，简单说说就行。

elements.text_en: Morganna explains her lifestyle as a ‘vampire’.
elements.text_zh: Morganna解释了自己“吸血鬼”的生活方式。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. I don’t want to be a Nosey Nancy.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我不想当个爱打听的人。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: You have a few questions? Shoot.
elements.text_zh: 有问题就问吧。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Orwell says you're cool, that’s good for me.
elements.text_zh: Orwell说你人不错，那我也放心了。

elements.text_en: Morganna gives Roxie the scoop on growing up as a vampire.
elements.text_zh: Morganna开始跟Roxie讲自己“吸血鬼”式的成长经历。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How long have you been...
elements.text_zh: 你这样多久了？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Yeah, I know what you're asking.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我知道你想问什么。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: My father didn’t sleep in a coffin, nothing like that.
elements.text_zh: 我爸没睡棺材之类的，没那么夸张。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I grew up in a really middle-class family.
elements.text_zh: 我是在一个很普通的中产家庭长大的。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Straight A student, Girl Scouts, soccer team in high school.
elements.text_zh: 成绩全A，女童子军，高中踢足球。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Something always felt off inside of me.
elements.text_zh: 但我心里一直觉得哪儿不太对。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: I went away to college, met someone in the culture.
elements.text_zh: 后来去上大学，认识了圈子里的人。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: It clicked with me right away.
elements.text_zh: 一下子就对上了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Your parents, how did they react? Can I ask?
elements.text_zh: 那你父母呢？可以问吗？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: More than surprised. They accept and love me.
elements.text_zh: 不只是惊讶。他们接受我，也爱我。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Different topic. You know Madam Luna, right?
elements.text_zh: 换个话题。你认识露娜夫人，对吧？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. I’ve lived here for nearly ten years.
elements.text_zh: 认识。我在这儿住了快十年了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She warned a friend of ours.
elements.text_zh: 她警告过我们的一位朋友。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: How seriously should we take it?
elements.text_zh: 这事该当真到什么程度？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: What kind of warning?
elements.text_zh: 什么样的警告？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Roxie knows it better than me.
elements.text_zh: Roxie比我更清楚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pretty vague. Be careful about who the person trust.
elements.text_zh: 挺模糊的。就是说要小心你信任的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Luna insisted that the person take it seriously.
elements.text_zh: 露娜夫人还特别强调要认真对待。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Let me tell you about my friend Cassie and Madam Luna.
elements.text_zh: 我跟你们说个我朋友Cassie的事吧。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Cassie grew up here on the island. She’s a nurse.
elements.text_zh: Cassie是在岛上长大的，是个护士。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Probably three years ago. Luna warned her to stay close to home.
elements.text_zh: 大概三年前，露娜夫人警告她别离家太远。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stay close to home?
elements.text_zh: 别离家太远？

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Cassie lived with her mother at the time. Just the two of them.
elements.text_zh: 那时候Cassie和她妈妈一起住，就她们俩。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Cassie was planning her first big vacation.
elements.text_zh: Cassie正打算来一次人生第一次大旅行。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Take a boat to the big island. Stay in a big resort.
elements.text_zh: 坐船去大岛，住高级度假村。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Madam Luna warned her of danger. Told her to stay close to home.
elements.text_zh: 露娜夫人警告她会有危险，让她待在家附近。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What did she do?
elements.text_zh: 那她怎么做的？

elements.text_en: Morganna gives them her bottom line on Madam Luna.
elements.text_zh: Morganna给出了自己关于露娜夫人的最终结论。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: She was frustrated. Luna was so vague.
elements.text_zh: 她当时很纠结，因为露娜说得太含糊。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: She made her reservations and got a boat ticket.
elements.text_zh: 但她还是订了行程，也买了船票。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: She panicked on the way to the dock.
elements.text_zh: 去码头的路上，她突然开始慌了。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Imagined the boat sinking. Horrible things at the resort.
elements.text_zh: 脑子里全是船沉、度假村出事的画面。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: She had the taxi take her back home.
elements.text_zh: 最后她让出租车直接掉头回家。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Cassie found her mom on the floor. A stroke.
elements.text_zh: 结果一进门，就发现她妈倒在地上。中风。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Being there saved her mom’s life.
elements.text_zh: 正因为她在场，才救回了一命。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. Stay close to home.
elements.text_zh: 哇……所以，“留在家附近”。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Yeah. Tell your friend to take heed.
elements.text_zh: 对。跟你那位朋友说，真要当回事。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Thanks, kitten. We will pass it on.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，小可爱。我们会转告的。

elements.text_en: A man in a cheap suit shows up at the booth.
elements.text_zh: 一个穿着廉价西装的男人走到卡座旁。

elements.text_en: The man gestures at Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 那男人朝Roxie这边比划了一下。

elements.name: Stranger
elements.text_en: Looks like you’re a third wheel, honey.
elements.text_zh: 看起来你有点多余了，甜心。

elements.name: Stranger
elements.text_en: How about a private party at my place?
elements.text_zh: 要不要去我那儿搞个私人派对？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t think you’re my type.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得你不是我的菜。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That rug on your head is not a good one.
elements.text_zh: 而且你头上那块假发，真的不行。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: And that suit. Flea market?
elements.text_zh: 还有您这身……西装？上哪儿淘的啊这是？

elements.name: Stranger
elements.text_en: Watch your mouth, freak.
elements.text_zh: 嘴巴放干净点，怪胎。

elements.text_en: Morganna stands up, hisses like a cat, exposing her sharp canines.
elements.text_zh: Morganna站起来，像猫一样低吼，露出尖牙。

elements.text_en: The man rushes away and out of the bar.
elements.text_zh: 那男人吓得转身就跑，冲出了酒吧。

elements.text_en: A man with a crummy suit and obvious toupee has a panicked look on his face as Morganna hisses at him with her sharp canines showing.
elements.text_zh: 男人被露出尖牙嘶吼的Morganna吓得面如土色。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think he wet himself.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得他刚才都快吓尿了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That was rad, Morganna.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那一下太帅了，Morganna。

elements.name: Morganna
elements.text_en: Yeah, we make a pretty good team.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，我们配合得还挺默契。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m going to call it a night.
elements.text_zh: 我差不多该回去了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ll walk you back to the villa.
elements.text_zh: 我送你回别墅吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No way. Hang with Morganna.
elements.text_zh: 不用，你陪Morganna就好。

elements.text_en: Bruiser stops Roxie at the door.
elements.text_zh: 门口的保镖拦住了Roxie。

elements.name: Bruiser
elements.text_en: You have a good time?
elements.text_zh: 你玩得开心吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I did. Place is a sassy kind of cool.
elements.text_zh: 挺开心的，这地方又野又酷。

elements.name: Bruiser
elements.text_en: Roger that. Come back and see us.
elements.text_zh: 那就好，记得常来玩啊。

elements.text_en: Roxie relaxes in a garden the next morning.
elements.text_zh: 第二天清晨，Roxie在花园里让自己冷静下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Luna’s warning. Danger? I don’t know.
elements.text_zh: 露娜的警告还在耳边……危险？我也说不准。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t let these men get under my skin.
elements.text_zh: 我不能让他们牵着我的情绪走。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance, he’s cool and fun. But a manchild with an ego.
elements.text_zh: Lance好玩是好玩，就是幼稚又爱逞强。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Corbin. Different flavor every day. Another big ego.
elements.text_zh: Corbin天天换花样，核心就俩字：自恋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe. Why did he really come back here? With Raven?
elements.text_zh: Gabe偏偏这时候回来……还和Raven一起？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer? Hmmm. Does he think I’m the one?
elements.text_zh: Archer……他是不是把我当成“答案”了？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Hey, Roxie. We keep meeting in these gardens.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Roxie。我们又在花园撞上了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s weird timing.
elements.text_zh: 这时机也太巧了吧……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Looks like you got something on your mind?
elements.text_zh: 看起来你心里有事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hi, Archer. You remember when we talked about me blacking out?
elements.text_zh: Archer，你还记得我那晚“断片”的事吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sure. Hyper alcohol sensitivity. Picked up the wrong drink.
elements.text_zh: 记得。你对酒精太敏感，可能喝错了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What if it wasn’t an accident? Could’ve been that way, right?
elements.text_zh: 可如果……不是意外呢？有人故意的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re serious. Sure, spiked with drugs. Who and why?
elements.text_zh: 你是认真的？那可能是酒被人动了手脚。谁会这么做？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t know. Just rethinking it.
elements.text_zh: 我不知道……只是越想越不对劲。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If it wasn’t an accident. You could be in danger.
elements.text_zh: 如果真不是意外，你得小心点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not going to panic over suspicions.
elements.text_zh: 我不会因为猜测就自乱阵脚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep this between us.
elements.text_zh: 这事先别声张，只你我知道。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe. What are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: Gabe？你来这儿干什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: The director invited me.
elements.text_zh: 导演请我来的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you want?
elements.text_zh: 你到底想要什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Explain what happened with Raven.
elements.text_zh: 把你和Raven那件事说清楚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not interested.
elements.text_zh: 我没兴趣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep away from me.
elements.text_zh: 离我远点。

elements.text_en: Roxie walks away and finds Candy and Jax.
elements.text_zh: Roxie转身离开，去找Candy和Jax。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Was that Gabe?
elements.text_zh: 刚才那是Gabe吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. I don’t want to talk about him.
elements.text_zh: 是的。我不想聊他。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you see Orwell break dancing?
elements.text_zh: 你们看到Orwell跳霹雳舞了吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, he was awesome.
elements.text_zh: 看到了，他太炸了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you two doing?
elements.text_zh: 你们俩在干嘛？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Keeping an eye on things.
elements.text_zh: 盯着呗，看是什么情况。

elements.text_en: Roxie sees Logan in the pool.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在泳池里看见了Logan。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I see what you got your eyes on, Logan.
elements.text_zh: 我知道你在盯谁看，Logan。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How did he get invited?
elements.text_zh: 他怎么会被邀请来的？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I invited him. You got a problem with Logan?
elements.text_zh: 我邀请的。你对Logan有意见？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No girlfriend. No problem.
elements.text_zh: 没有，姐妹。没意见。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He is an eyeful.
elements.text_zh: 他确实很养眼。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We telling bawdy stories about our boy?
elements.text_zh: 我们真要聊“男主角”的八卦？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No. No. Too many people here.
elements.text_zh: 不行。人太多。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: There’s no ladies' changing room here, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 而且这里可没女士更衣室，Candy。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m sure I can find somewhere.
elements.text_zh: 我总能找个地方。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’ve already checked boat engine rooms off my list.
elements.text_zh: 我已经把“游艇引擎室”从清单里划掉了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: List? What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 清单？什么清单？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Bonfire night. You did it in the biology lab.
elements.text_zh: 篝火那晚——你在生物实验室闹的那出。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Kind of gross, Roxie. Sex on a dissection table.
elements.text_zh: 也太敢了吧，Roxie。连解剖台都不放过？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I said it was sterilized clean.
elements.text_zh: 我说过，消过毒的！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What’s going on over there?
elements.text_zh: 那边什么情况？

elements.text_en: A group is gathered around two men holding a limbo stick.
elements.text_zh: 一群人围着两个举着林波杆的男人起哄。

elements.text_en: Okay, Gabe. Just me and you.
elements.text_zh: 行了，Gabe。就咱俩对决。

elements.text_en: Drop it lower, guys.
elements.text_zh: 再低点，各位！

elements.text_en: Lower. Lower. Okay, that’s good.
elements.text_zh: 低点……再低。好，就这高度！

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: No way. Think you’re rubber man, dude?
elements.text_zh: 不可能吧？你当自己是橡皮人？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Turn up the music, so I can get the beat.
elements.text_zh: 音乐开大点，我得踩着节奏来。

elements.text_en: I’ll show you why they call this limbo.
elements.text_zh: 看好了——让你们知道林波到底怎么跳。

elements.text_en: Gabe going under a limbo stick at an impossible angle.
elements.text_zh: Gabe以离谱的角度从杆下滑过去。

elements.name: Guest
elements.text_en: You win! I ain’t going to try that.
elements.text_zh: 你赢了！这我可不敢试。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I can go a little lower.
elements.text_zh: 我还能再低一点。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: If I could get a back rub.
elements.text_zh: 要是有人顺便给我捶捶背就更完美了。

elements.name: Guest
elements.text_en: You bet, sweetie. Come here.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，小帅哥，过来。

elements.text_en: Cheers and chants for Gabe as he goes under the stick again.
elements.text_zh: 欢呼声一浪高过一浪，Gabe又一次从杆下穿过。

elements.text_en: The girls talk after Gabe wins the limbo game.
elements.text_zh: Gabe赢下林波后，女孩们聊了起来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That was awesome.
elements.text_zh: 太强了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bending over backwards. Big deal.
elements.text_zh: 不就是往后折？也就那样吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was pretty amazing.
elements.text_zh: ……好吧，确实挺惊人的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Flexibility with that body. Lots of possibilities.
elements.text_zh: 这柔韧度太夸张了，动作一做就很抓眼。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t go there, okay.
elements.text_zh: 别想歪，行吗。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Why do you care?
elements.text_zh: 你这么急干嘛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just drop it.
elements.text_zh: 收。别聊了。

elements.text_en: A short time later, Jax, Roxie, and Candy watch action in the swimming pool.
elements.text_zh: 没一会儿，Jax、Roxie和Candy又去泳池边看热闹。

elements.text_en: What’s going on now?
elements.text_zh: 现在又玩什么？

elements.text_en: Looks like more rooster games.
elements.text_zh: 看着像又一轮硬汉挑战。

elements.text_en: Okay, guys, ten coins. Are you ready to dive?
elements.text_zh: 好了各位——十枚硬币，准备下潜！

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Ten? Let’s go for a dozen.
elements.text_zh: 十枚？来十二枚！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, I can do that.
elements.text_zh: 行，我也敢。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You think you can handle twelve?
elements.text_zh: 你真能搞定十二？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You bet.
elements.text_zh: 当然。

elements.text_en: Debate continues about the next round of the coin dive.
elements.text_zh: 关于下一轮捞硬币，争论还在继续。

elements.name: Simon
elements.text_en: Too many, stick with ten.
elements.text_zh: 太多了，十枚就行。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: Yeah, we just did eight. Let’s try ten.
elements.text_zh: 对，刚才才八枚，先上十枚。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Okay, a wimpy ten.
elements.text_zh: 行吧，‘保守的’十枚。

elements.text_en: Clyde and Simon both fail to get ten coins and are out.
elements.text_zh: Clyde和Simon都没捞够十枚，直接出局。

elements.text_en: Okay, I’m tossing twelve. Lance is first.
elements.text_zh: 好，十二枚开局。Lance先来。

elements.text_en: Cheers and shouts as Gabe comes up with all 12 coins.
elements.text_zh: Gabe浮出水面，十二枚全捞齐！全场炸了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Lance didn’t do it. Gabe got all 12.
elements.text_zh: Lance没成，十二枚全被Gabe拿下。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I like a man who can hold his breath.
elements.text_zh: 我就喜欢这种憋得住气的狠角色。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Candy, control yourself.
elements.text_zh: Candy，收着点。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Gabe seems to be the man of the hour.
elements.text_zh: 今晚的风头全在Gabe身上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not in my book.
elements.text_zh: 我可不买账。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Am I being too stubborn?
elements.text_zh: 我是不是太固执了？

elements.text_en: The gal-pals watch the action around the swimming pool.
elements.text_zh: 闺蜜团在泳池边继续围观。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve never seen those two guys.
elements.text_zh: 这俩我没见过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Friends of the boat owner. I know the owner pretty well.
elements.text_zh: 游艇主人的朋友。我跟老板挺熟。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The one talking to Gabe is Clyde. He’s a lawyer.
