elements.text_zh: 跟Gabe聊的那个叫Clyde，律师。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He has a runner’s body.
elements.text_zh: 他身材像跑步的人。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: A hiker and mountain climber, goes on trips with the boat owner.
elements.text_zh: 徒步和登山爱好者，经常和船主一起出行。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Simon is the one talking to Lance.
elements.text_zh: 跟Lance说话的是Simon。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He’s a big football fan. He played in college at a small school.
elements.text_zh: 他是个狂热的橄榄球迷。大学时在一所小学校打过球。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The new boys are free of Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 新来的两位，气场不受Lance和Corbin影响。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’ll check them out. Let them check me out.
elements.text_zh: 我去看看他们——也让他们看看我。

elements.text_en: The gal pals regroup after Candy chats with Clyde and Simon.
elements.text_zh: Candy跟Clyde、Simon打完招呼，三人又凑回来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Candy, why did you let those guys ogle you like that?
elements.text_zh: Candy，你干嘛让他们那样盯着你看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It seemed like you were giving them a show.
elements.text_zh: 看起来就像你在给他们表演一样。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Really? Who was in control down there?
elements.text_zh: 是吗？那下面到底是谁在掌控局面？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Me or the two guys who couldn’t take their eyes off me?
elements.text_zh: 是我，还是那两个眼睛根本离不开我的家伙？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I get your point.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我明白你的意思了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I set my limits, not what a man wants.
elements.text_zh: 我的底线我说了算，不是谁想怎样就怎样。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m proud of my sexuality and sharing some of the fun with you chicks.
elements.text_zh: 我对自己的魅力很自信，也愿意跟你们分享点热闹。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You got a problem with me?
elements.text_zh: 你们有意见？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, we don’t. Sorry, we didn’t mean to judge.
elements.text_zh: 没有，对不起，我们不是那个意思，不该评判你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The girls talking with Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 那边在跟Lance、Corbin聊天的几个女孩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They are new on the show, right? I haven’t met them.
elements.text_zh: 她们是新来的吧？我还没见过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, Sophie and Lana. They are on the show.
elements.text_zh: 对，Sophie和Lana，节目里的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They are good friends. Sophie is the redhead.
elements.text_zh: 她俩关系很好。红发的是Sophie。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Not doing great on the show. They are both sweet.
elements.text_zh: 节目里表现的不太行，但人挺好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sweet? That Sophie has her hands all over Lance.
elements.text_zh: “挺好”？Sophie的手都快黏在Lance身上了。

elements.text_en: Sophie and Lance laughing, standing close together. Sophie has a hand on Lance’s shoulder.
elements.text_zh: Sophie和Lance贴得很近在笑，Sophie一只手搭在他肩上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He has a thing for redheads.
elements.text_zh: 他就吃红发那一套。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Something eating at you, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你在意了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. I’m surprised at Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 没有。我只是意外Lance和Corbin这么主动。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Throwing themselves at two strange women.
elements.text_zh: 对两个刚认识的女生，太上头了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Strange women? Cute girls on the show.
elements.text_zh: 刚认识？那是节目里的可爱女孩。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The green-eyed monster took a bite out of you.
elements.text_zh: 醋坛子咬你一口咯。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jealous? Me? Lance and Corbin, no way.
elements.text_zh: 吃醋？我？对Lance和Corbin？不可能。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax keep chatting.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax继续聊着。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The two of them have been chasing you.
elements.text_zh: 他们俩一直在追着你转。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Corbin and Lance, circling you. You’ve enjoyed it.
elements.text_zh: Corbin和Lance一直围着你转，你还挺享受的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, we’re friends.
elements.text_zh: 是朋友而已。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re more than just friends.
elements.text_zh: 你们可不止是朋友。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You see two babes flirting with them.
elements.text_zh: 你看那两个女孩在跟他们调情。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re a little jealous.
elements.text_zh: 你有点吃醋。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’ve known you for a long time, girl.
elements.text_zh: 我认识你很久了，姐们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t be silly, let’s talk about something else.
elements.text_zh: 别闹了，换个话题吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Okay, fine.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，行。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey, look, there go Candy and Logan.
elements.text_zh: 嘿，看那边，Candy和Logan走了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Surely, not. Where would they go?
elements.text_zh: 不会吧？他们能去哪儿？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not the engine room.
elements.text_zh: 别告诉我是机舱。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax keep chatting.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax继续聊着。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m sure Candy will give us the scoop later.
elements.text_zh: 我敢打赌Candy一会儿会给我们爆料。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey, there’s Raven alone in the corner.
elements.text_zh: 嘿，那边角落里Raven一个人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Looks like she’s watching us.
elements.text_zh: 看起来她在盯着我们。

elements.text_en: Raven smirks and waves as she walks away.
elements.text_zh: Raven带着坏笑挥挥手，转身走开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wonder what she’s up to?
elements.text_zh: 不知道她又在打什么主意。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She’s just enjoying the party. Don’t let her get to you.
elements.text_zh: 她就是来凑热闹的。别让她影响你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: First time I’ve seen her since the bonfire.
elements.text_zh: 篝火之后这是我第一次见到她。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. Why don’t you let Gabe explain?
elements.text_zh: 是啊。要不让Gabe解释一下？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I never told you everything about when we broke up.
elements.text_zh: 我没把我们分手的细节全告诉你。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Ignoring you. Forgetting to meet you. Not returning calls.
elements.text_zh: 冷落你、放你鸽子、也不回电话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Someone told me they saw him kiss a classmate in the law library.
elements.text_zh: 有人说在法学院图书馆看到他亲了一个同学。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He denied it. So, I broke up with him.
elements.text_zh: 他不承认。所以我跟他分了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: One kiss? One person said they saw him.
elements.text_zh: 就一个吻？还是一个人说看见的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, so? With the other stuff, I had enough.
elements.text_zh: 那又怎样？再加上别的事，我受够了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Give him a chance to explain, girl.
elements.text_zh: 给他个解释的机会吧，姐妹

elements.text_en: Roxie arrives early on the observation deck for a dinner date.
elements.text_zh: Roxie提前到达观景平台，准备一场晚餐约会。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow, this view is amazing.
elements.text_zh: 哇，这景色也太震撼了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Geez. Really, high up. Don’t lean over the railing.
elements.text_zh: 天哪，真的好高。千万别靠近栏杆。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Roxie, is that you?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，是你吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance, what are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: Lance，你在这儿干嘛？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just taking in the view. What about you?
elements.text_zh: 随便看看风景。你呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Same thing. I’ve never been up here.
elements.text_zh: 一样。我从没来过这儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is he snooping on me? Throw him off balance.
elements.text_zh: 他是在跟踪我吗？得打乱他的节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The yacht party was a little rough.
elements.text_zh: 游艇派对有点“刺激”。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe beating you in the coin dive.
elements.text_zh: Gabe在潜水捞硬币那轮赢了你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bested by a soccer guy, must sting.
elements.text_zh: 被一个踢球的家伙打败，肯定不太好受吧。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No big deal. Made some new friends.
elements.text_zh: 没什么大不了的。反而交了些新朋友。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The redhead? Back down. Keep things friendly.
elements.text_zh: 那个红头发的？冷静点，保持友好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I heard you and Simon are new buds.
elements.text_zh: 我听说你和Simon成了新朋友。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He’s a cool dude. We’re hanging some.
elements.text_zh: 他人不错。最近经常一起混。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Someone said he’s a fan of yours.
elements.text_zh: 有人说他是你的粉丝。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Admit it. Jax said you signed an autographed picture for him.
elements.text_zh: 承认吧。Jax说你还给他签了照片。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He follows our team. I’m the QB.
elements.text_zh: 他关注我们球队。我是四分卫。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Here for dinner? Restaurant is supposed to be nice.
elements.text_zh: 你是来吃晚餐的吗？听说这家餐厅不错。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t lie.
elements.text_zh: 别撒谎。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, with Archer.
elements.text_zh: 是的，和Archer。

elements.text_en: Lance is quiet for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Lance沉默了几秒。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Archer, okay. He’s a good guy.
elements.text_zh: Archer啊，挺好的。他是个好人。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Well, I’m gonna take off.
elements.text_zh: 那我先走了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Have a good evening.
elements.text_zh: 祝你今晚愉快。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What was that all about?
elements.text_zh: 这到底怎么回事？

elements.text_en: Roxie heads back to the railing to take in the view.
elements.text_zh: Roxie回到栏杆边，继续看风景。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What was Lance up to? Just sightseeing?
elements.text_zh: 话说Lance真的是来随便逛逛、看看风景吗？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Some people jump to their death from here.
elements.text_zh: 有人从这儿失足受过伤。

elements.text_en: Raven comes out of the shadows.
elements.text_zh: Raven从阴影中走出来。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You thinking about ending it all. This is a good place.
elements.text_zh: 想找个安静地方透透气？这儿挺合适。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Some anxiety about the bonfire evening.
elements.text_zh: 是不是对篝火那晚还有点不安？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Watch your mouth. I might push you over the edge.
elements.text_zh: 注意你的嘴。别惹我。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Truce, darling. Heard you were coming here.
elements.text_zh: 停战，亲爱的。听说你会来这儿。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I wanted to warn you.
elements.text_zh: 我想提醒你一件事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Warn me? About what?
elements.text_zh: 提醒我？什么事？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Nasty rumors are swirling around about you.
elements.text_zh: 关于你的难听传闻正在流传。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ve been contacted by a few entertainment reporters.
elements.text_zh: 有几个娱乐记者联系过我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What kind of rumors?
elements.text_zh: 什么样的传闻？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Let’s just say the headline is ‘Show Slut’.
elements.text_zh: 简单来说，标题会写《综艺绯闻女》。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Sleeping with cast, crew, show runners, anyone who can help you win.
elements.text_zh: 说你跟演员、工作人员、制作人都走得太近——谁能让你赢就靠谁。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Supposedly, some dirty pictures of you posing nude.
elements.text_zh: 据说还有一些你的“私密照”在流传。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I assume it's not true. I hope so.
elements.text_zh: 我也希望这不是真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bullshit! You’re making all of this up.
elements.text_zh: 胡说八道！你全是编的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: No, sister. Three reporters contacted me.
elements.text_zh: 不，妹妹。三位记者联系过我。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I declined to comment, of course. Be careful.
elements.text_zh: 我当然拒绝置评。但你要小心。

elements.text_en: Archer arrives moments later.
elements.text_zh: Archer在片刻后赶到。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Raven. I’m surprised to see you.
elements.text_zh: Raven？真没想到会在这儿见到你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Are you joining us for dinner?
elements.text_zh: 你是要一起吃晚饭吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, she’s not. We ran into each other.
elements.text_zh: 不，她不来。我们只是碰巧遇到。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Dinner would be charming. I have other plans.
elements.text_zh: 一起吃晚餐听起来很迷人。不过我另有安排。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Would be nice to catch up with you, Archer.
elements.text_zh: 很想找时间和你叙叙旧，Archer。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Be careful of the railing, sister, dear.
elements.text_zh: 小心点，亲爱的妹妹，靠近栏杆可危险。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Heights can make you a bit dizzy, right?
elements.text_zh: 高处容易让人头晕，对吧？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Tootles.
elements.text_zh: 拜拜。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: What was that all about?
elements.text_zh: 刚才那是怎么回事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nothing. Typical Raven, crap.
elements.text_zh: 没什么。Raven一贯的胡话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why would she make up stuff about rumors?
elements.text_zh: 她为什么要编造那些谣言？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I saw Lance in the lobby downstairs.
elements.text_zh: 我在楼下大厅看见Lance了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Did you see him up here?
elements.text_zh: 你在这儿见到他了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, we ran into each other.
elements.text_zh: 见到了。我们碰了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is this going to be some kind of issue?
elements.text_zh: 这会不会变成什么问题？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Seems like he shows up every time we get together.
elements.text_zh: 看起来他每次我们在一起都会出现。

elements.text_en: Archer goes quiet for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Archer沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I like Lance. Forget I brought it up.
elements.text_zh: 我其实挺喜欢Lance的。忘了我刚才说的吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s a great restaurant. Let’s go inside.
elements.text_zh: 这家餐厅很棒。我们进去吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie spots Gabe at the bar as they come inside.
elements.text_zh: 和Archer进门时，Roxie在吧台看见了Gabe。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What the hell? Everyone is here tonight.
elements.text_zh: 搞什么？今晚所有人都在这儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t make eye contact. Circle back in a bit.
elements.text_zh: 别对视。待会儿再绕过去。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer are seated at a booth near a window.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Archer坐在靠窗的卡座里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good. We can’t see Gabe from here.
elements.text_zh: 太好了。从这儿看不到Gabe。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What a great view.
elements.text_zh: 这景色真棒。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We can see the cabin from here.
elements.text_zh: 从这儿能看到小木屋。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really?
elements.text_zh: 真的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: See that cluster of lights. Follow them toward those hills.
elements.text_zh: 看到那片灯光了吗？顺着往那片山走。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s about halfway up the middle hill in the darkness.
elements.text_zh: 在黑暗里，正好在中间那座山的半山腰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The baby bird is right about there, right?
elements.text_zh: 小鸟就在那附近，对吧？

elements.text_en: Roxie points at a spot further down the hill.
elements.text_zh: Roxie指向山坡更低的位置。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah, chirp is right there.
elements.text_zh: 对，Chirp就在那儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Chirp. You named him.
elements.text_zh: Chirp？你给它取名字了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve kept an eye on the nest. They will be ready to fly off soon.
elements.text_zh: 我一直留意着那个巢。它们很快就会飞走了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Chirp is alive because of you.
elements.text_zh: Chirp能活下来，是因为你。

elements.text_en: Roxie makes an excuse to leave the table.
elements.text_zh: Roxie找借口离开餐桌。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I need to go to the ladies’ room, Archer.
elements.text_zh: 我得去趟洗手间，Archer。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Order me a passion fruit cocktail, virgin.
elements.text_zh: 给我点一杯百香果鸡尾酒，无酒精的。

elements.text_en: Roxie finds Gabe at the bar.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在吧台找到了Gabe。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: 你在这儿干什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Having a drink, seeing the sights.
elements.text_zh: 喝一杯，看看风景。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cut the crap, Gabe. Not cool.
elements.text_zh: 别装了，Gabe。这不合适。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You got Candy or Jax to tell you I was here.
elements.text_zh: 你让Candy或者Jax告诉你我在这儿。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Fine, okay. They said you were coming here.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，好吧。他们说你要来这里。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: They didn’t say who you were meeting. I wanted to see.
elements.text_zh: 他们没说你是跟谁一起。我想看看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: None of your business. Get the hell out of here.
elements.text_zh: 不关你的事。走开。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Not till I get a chance to explain.
elements.text_zh: 在我有机会解释之前不行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Here at the bar, while I’m on a dinner date?
elements.text_zh: 在酒吧？在我约会吃饭的时候？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m not leaving. It’s a public place.
elements.text_zh: 我不走。这是公共场所。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fine, I promise to listen.
elements.text_zh: 好。我答应听你说。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Thanks. When? Give me a place and time, I’ll be there.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢。什么时候？给我时间和地点，我一定到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Tomorrow morning at the hot air balloon launch site.
elements.text_zh: 明早上，热气球起飞点。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Okay. I’m leaving.
elements.text_zh: 好。我这就走。

elements.text_en: Roxie tells a white lie when she returns to Archer.
elements.text_zh: Roxie回到Archer身边时说了个善意的谎言。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, I had a phone call on my way to the ladies’ room.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，去洗手间路上接了个电话。

elements.text_en: Roxie switches gears after she sits down.
elements.text_zh: Roxie坐下后换了个话题。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven told me something, it’s kind of worrying me.
elements.text_zh: Raven跟我说了一件事，有点让我担心。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: What is it?
elements.text_zh: 什么事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She said some entertainment reporters contacted her.
elements.text_zh: 她说有些娱乐记者联系过她。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Rumors about me sleeping around to try and win the show.
elements.text_zh: 关于我为了赢节目到处攀关系的传闻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Said she was warning me. To help.
elements.text_zh: 她说是提醒我，是在帮我。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You think she’s messing with you?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得她在耍你吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not sure.
elements.text_zh: 我不确定。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Well, I don’t pay attention to the gossip rags.
elements.text_zh: 我不看那些八卦小报。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Any thoughts?
elements.text_zh: 你有什么想法吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sounds like a strange thing for Raven to make up.
elements.text_zh: 听起来不像是Raven会凭空编出来的东西。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Maybe some shady bloggers contacted her.
elements.text_zh: 也许是一些可疑的博主联系了她。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Lots of lowlifes online, calling themselves reporters.
elements.text_zh: 网上有很多自称记者的乌合之众。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Surely, Jax and her team keep an eye out for that kind of stuff.
elements.text_zh: Jax和她的团队肯定会盯着这种事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, you’re probably right about that.
elements.text_zh: 是的，你说得可能没错。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Don’t worry about it. Mention it to Jax.
elements.text_zh: 别担心这个。跟Jax提一下就好。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Maybe Raven wanted to do the right thing.
elements.text_zh: 也许Raven是真的想做件对的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s not in her DNA.
elements.text_zh: 这不在她的基因里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If it’s true, she probably wants me to read the crap.
elements.text_zh: 如果是真的，她大概只是想让我去看那些东西。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Don’t do that. Just make you angry and frustrated.
elements.text_zh: 别去看。只会让你又气又烦。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s talk about something else.
elements.text_zh: 那我们聊点别的吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Good idea, looks like our dinner is coming.
elements.text_zh: 好主意，看起来菜要上了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It looks delicious.
elements.text_zh: 看起来很好吃。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The food is awesome.
elements.text_zh: 菜上来了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’d love to know the spices in these roasted potatoes.
elements.text_zh: 这菜太好吃了。真想知道这些烤土豆放了什么香料。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I know the manager. I can get the recipe.
elements.text_zh: 我认识经理，可以帮你要配方。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The potatoes are a unique species.
elements.text_zh: 这些土豆是很特别的品种。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? Something grown locally?
elements.text_zh: 真的？本地种的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah, and they grow above ground. Lots of sunshine.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，而且长在地上。阳光充足。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You would have no problem finding them.
elements.text_zh: 你肯定一眼就能找到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Very funny. I thought that when I was a child.
elements.text_zh: 真好笑。我小时候还真这么以为。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You said high school when you told the story.
elements.text_zh: 你之前讲故事的时候说你是高中。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not like you to tease like that.
elements.text_zh: 不像你会这样调侃人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Maybe there’s more to me than you realized.
elements.text_zh: 也许我比你想象的更有趣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about we talk about your awkward moment?
elements.text_zh: 要不聊聊你的尴尬瞬间？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Med school cadavers are not the best dinner conversation.
elements.text_zh: 医学院的尸体不太适合当晚餐话题。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. Well, played, doctor.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，这局你赢了，医生。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer talk after dessert.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Archer在吃完甜点后聊天。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I usually don’t eat dessert. That is the best apple pie.
elements.text_zh: 我平时不怎么吃甜点。这苹果派太好吃了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The apples grow above ground on trees, amazing.
elements.text_zh: 苹果长在树上，不是在地里。真神奇。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sorry, I overplayed my hand.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我玩笑开过头了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This has been a great evening, Archer.
elements.text_zh: 这是个很棒的夜晚，Archer。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: There is something I wanted to ask you about.
elements.text_zh: 有件事我想问你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A serious matter, if that’s okay.
elements.text_zh: 比较严肃的事，如果你不介意。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Brace yourself. Are you the one? Again.
elements.text_zh: 准备好了。又来了，是不是？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure, anything.
elements.text_zh: 当然，你说。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The last time we talked about your blackout.
elements.text_zh: 上次我们聊到你断片的事。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You seemed convinced it wasn’t an accident.
elements.text_zh: 你当时很确定那不是意外。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I worry about your safety sometimes.
elements.text_zh: 我有时会担心你的安全。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What a relief.
elements.text_zh: 松了口气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not convinced. I was accepting the possibility.
elements.text_zh: 我不能确定。我只是接受这种可能性。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Any idea of who would do something like that?
elements.text_zh: 你有怀疑是谁做的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, or why either. I’m okay. Don’t worry.
elements.text_zh: 没有，也不知道为什么。我没事，别担心。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let me know if there's something I can do.
elements.text_zh: 如果有我能帮上忙的，尽管说。

elements.text_en: Roxie, Jax, and Candy have a picnic at the launch area.
elements.text_zh: Roxie、Jax和Candy在起飞区野餐。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: So, how was dinner with doctor hottie last night?
elements.text_zh: 所以，昨晚和那位火辣医生的晚餐怎么样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was good. A bit of circus before dinner.
elements.text_zh: 挺好的。晚餐前出了点小插曲。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Gabe ambushed you. You set this up. Sounds awkward.
elements.text_zh: Gabe突然杀出来。你这是自己安排的吧？听起来很尴尬。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It wasn’t as bad as it sounds. Archer didn’t see him.
elements.text_zh: 没你想的那么糟。Archer没看见他。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t mention Lance. Not sure why he was there.
elements.text_zh: 别提Lance。不知道他为什么会在那里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven was on the observation deck before dinner.
elements.text_zh: 晚餐前，Raven也在观景平台。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What did she want?
elements.text_zh: 她想干嘛？

elements.text_en: Roxie explains Ravens' claims about reporters.
elements.text_zh: Roxie解释了Raven关于记者的说法。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I haven’t heard anything. No real reporters are asking. I would know.
elements.text_zh: 我这边没听到任何风声。真正的记者没人来问。我肯定会知道。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What’s the plan when Gabe arrives?
elements.text_zh: Gabe来了之后有什么计划？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Give me some space after saying hello.
elements.text_zh: 打完招呼后给我点空间。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t leave. I don’t know how this is going to go.
elements.text_zh: 别走。我不知道事情会怎么发展。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bail me out if things spin out of control.
elements.text_zh: 要是失控了，记得救我。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Here comes your hunky ex.
elements.text_zh: 你那身材火辣的前任来了。

elements.text_en: Quick hellos before giving Roxie and Gabe some space.
elements.text_zh: 简单打过招呼后，给Roxie和Gabe留出空间。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hello, Jax, Candy.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Jax，Candy。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Didn’t realize I was facing an interrogation.
elements.text_zh: 没想到这是场审问。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We’re having a small picnic. It’s a nice spot.
elements.text_zh: 我们在野餐。这地方挺好的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We’re gonna walk around and get a look at the balloons.
elements.text_zh: 我们去走走，看看热气球。

elements.text_en: Candy and Jax leave Gabe and Roxie alone.
elements.text_zh: Candy和Jax离开，把Gabe和Roxie留在一起。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You said you wanted to explain what happened at the bonfire.
elements.text_zh: 你说你想解释篝火那晚的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m listening.
elements.text_zh: 我在听。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: There’s more baggage than that. Let’s take it all on.
elements.text_zh: 不只是那件事。还有更多包袱，一起说清楚吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You said I cheated on you in law school.
elements.text_zh: 你说我在法学院时出轨。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I lied back then. There was a brief kiss in the law library.
elements.text_zh: 我当年撒了谎。确实在法学院图书馆有过一个短暂的吻。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I didn’t cheat on you. I shouldn’t have lied about the kiss.
elements.text_zh: 我其实没有出轨。哎，本来没有必要对那个吻撒谎。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay, what about Raven?
elements.text_zh: 好，那Raven呢？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It’s kind of weird, okay.
elements.text_zh: 这事挺怪的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I had a few drinks and bumped into Raven.
elements.text_zh: 我喝了点酒，碰到了Raven。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I was headed back to the bonfire.
elements.text_zh: 我正要回篝火那边。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: She played to my ego. Said you never appreciated me.
elements.text_zh: 她迎合我的自尊，说你从来不欣赏我。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I sat on a beach lounger to listen.
elements.text_zh: 我坐在沙滩躺椅上听她说。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Next thing I know. She’s on top of me. Kissing me.
elements.text_zh: 接下来我才反应过来。她坐在我身上，亲我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You kiss her back?
elements.text_zh: 你回亲了吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: For a moment, then I pushed her away.
elements.text_zh: 有一瞬间。然后我把她推开了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then what?
elements.text_zh: 然后呢？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: She says, let’s find Roxie. Like nothing happened.
elements.text_zh: 她说，去找Roxie吧。好像什么都没发生。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I stumbled along, confused and embarrassed.
elements.text_zh: 我跌跌撞撞地跟着走，又懵又尴尬。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was a setup by Raven.
elements.text_zh: 这是Raven设的局。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I know it sounds strange. I’m telling the truth.
elements.text_zh: 我知道听起来很怪。我说的是真话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I believe you.
elements.text_zh: 我相信你。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s give this a chance.
elements.text_zh: 给这段关系一个机会吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What are you talking about?
elements.text_zh: 你在说什么？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: This relationship. I never cheated on you.
elements.text_zh: 我们这段关系。我从没出轨。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I believe you. But we had other issues.
elements.text_zh: 我相信你。但我们还有别的问题。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I know, same thing broke up my marriage.
elements.text_zh: 我知道。同样的问题也毁了我的婚姻。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I would forget birthdays, anniversaries, and cancel plans.
elements.text_zh: 我会忘记生日、纪念日，还会取消计划。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Because of work, I’ve learned my lesson.
elements.text_zh: 都是因为工作。我已经吸取教训了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m not that person anymore.
elements.text_zh: 我不再是那样的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You came here to get back together?
elements.text_zh: 你来这里是想复合？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: To see if there was still a spark. I think there is.
elements.text_zh: 想看看还有没有火花。我觉得是有的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I know I loved you then. And I blew it.
elements.text_zh: 我知道我当年爱过你，也把事情搞砸了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. He’s putting it all on the line.
elements.text_zh: 哇。他这是把一切都押上了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, I was quick to claim infidelity, twice.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我当时两次都很快就认定你出轨。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s start over with a clean slate.
elements.text_zh: 那我们从头开始，清清白白。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I feel something. Has he really changed?
elements.text_zh: 我确实有感觉。他真的变了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s going too far, too fast.
elements.text_zh: 这太快了，我也没想清楚是不是到了复合那种程度。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You're saying no.
elements.text_zh: 你是在说不。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not saying no. But I’m not saying, yes.
elements.text_zh: 我不是说不。但我也不是说是。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It’s a possibility, then. That’s fair.
elements.text_zh: 那就是有可能。倒也合理。

elements.text_en: Gabe leans in and kisses her on the cheek.
elements.text_zh: Gabe凑近，在她脸颊上亲了一下。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m going to show you, I’m a new man.
elements.text_zh: 我会证明给你看，我已经变了。

elements.text_en: The girls rush over as Gabe leaves.
elements.text_zh: Gabe离开后，闺蜜团其他两人冲了过来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That looked very friendly, spill it.
elements.text_zh: 看起来很友好，说说细节。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Come on, Roxie, we stuck around as backup.
elements.text_zh: 来吧，Roxie，我们留下来当后援。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, I was wrong. He’s never cheated on me.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，我错了。他从没出轨。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven stole a kiss; he was a little drunk and confused.
elements.text_zh: Raven抢了个吻；他当时有点醉，也很困惑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She wanted you to think something happened, that’s her MO.
elements.text_zh: 她就是想让你以为发生了什么，这是她一贯的套路。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: There’s more. I saw how he was looking at you.
elements.text_zh: 还有别的。我看见他看你的眼神了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Looked like something big was going on.
elements.text_zh: 看起来像是发生了什么大事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The kiss on the cheek? Just a grandma kiss.
elements.text_zh: 脸颊上的那个？就很普通的友好亲一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He apologized, I accepted, and we’re still friends.
elements.text_zh: 他道了歉，我也接受了。现在相处挺正常的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You never share the good stuff!
elements.text_zh: 你从来不分享关键细节！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Don’t hold out on the sisterhood.
elements.text_zh: 别吊我们胃口啦。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I know that look. She’s not telling us anymore.
elements.text_zh: 我太懂这个表情了。她不打算继续说了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Speaking of sharing, you were going to tell us about Logan.
elements.text_zh: 说到分享，你不是还欠我们一个Logan的故事吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Not now. I’m cutting you two off.
elements.text_zh: 现在不行。暂停，姐妹们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It didn’t work out on the boat?
elements.text_zh: 游艇那次没进展？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe Logan wasn’t in the mood.
elements.text_zh: 也许Logan当时只是没心情交流。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Not in the mood for Candy?
elements.text_zh: 对Candy也没心情交流？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The pilot house. There’s this big captain’s chair.
elements.text_zh: 在驾驶舱。还有那张超大的船长椅。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Huge windows, people can see in.
elements.text_zh: 窗户特别大，外面很容易注意到。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The lights are supposed to stay on. With people onboard.
elements.text_zh: 而且船上有人时灯一般都会亮着。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: The lights were on when Logan set sail.
elements.text_zh: Logan启航的时候灯确实是亮着的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: It was a good show if anyone was watching.
elements.text_zh: 要是有人看见，估计挺显眼的。

elements.text_en: Orwell arrives a short time later.
elements.text_zh: Orwell过了一会儿才到。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My favorite chiquitas, you two going to join us?
elements.text_zh: 我最爱的姑娘们，你们要不要一起？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No. We just wanted to check out the spot.
elements.text_zh: 不了。我们只是来看看这地方。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: By the way, the break dancing on the boat was great.
elements.text_zh: 顺便说一句，游艇上的霹雳舞太炸了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A man of many talents. The bonfire gag was one of your best.
elements.text_zh: 多才多艺。篝火那次“节目效果”也是你的代表作。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Was the story true? A serial killer came to your house.
elements.text_zh: 你刚说的故事是真的吗？真的有人闯进过你家？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t be silly. He made it all up.
elements.text_zh: 别闹了。他夸张了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sweet Candy is right. It’s basically true.
elements.text_zh: 甜美的Candy说得对，大体是真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, Candy. Wow, Orwell. I didn’t realize.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，Candy。天哪，Orwell，我真不知道还有这段。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: What really happened?
elements.text_zh: 那到底发生了什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The killer heard me cough in the closet.
elements.text_zh: 我躲在壁橱里咳了一声，暴露了位置。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My mom had a butcher’s knife to protect us.
elements.text_zh: 我妈顺手拿了把厨房刀防身。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: She pushed the door open and cut off his other hand.
elements.text_zh: 她猛地推开门，把那人吓跑了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Crap. I fell for it again.
elements.text_zh: 啊……我又被你带节奏了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Dude, you had me going. Let’s get out of here, Jax.
elements.text_zh: 兄弟你太会讲了。走吧，Jax。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I got some things to take care of. Let’s go.
elements.text_zh: 我还有点事要处理。走吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Orwell chat before the balloon ride.
elements.text_zh: 在热气球起飞前，Roxie和Orwell聊天。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s a good posse, you three.
elements.text_zh: 你们三个这小队挺靠谱的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’m lucky to have them as friends.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我很幸运能有她们当朋友。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You ever go up in one of these balloons?
elements.text_zh: 你坐过热气球吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, it’s cool. Especially on a clear day like this.
elements.text_zh: 坐过。像今天这么晴朗的时候特别棒。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ll give the pilot fifty bucks. Take us up really high.
elements.text_zh: 我给飞行员点小费，让我们稍微飞高一点。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: They like to stay around 500 feet. They can go up to 3000 feet.
elements.text_zh: 他们一般在五百英尺左右，但也能飞得更高。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No! Don’t do that.
elements.text_zh: 不！别这样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: What’s wrong?
elements.text_zh: 怎么了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not great with heights. Not like panic attacks.
elements.text_zh: 我有点怕高，但也没到恐慌那种程度。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It makes me uneasy. Maybe a little bit dizzy.
elements.text_zh: 就是会不舒服，可能有点头晕。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: After 30 feet, anything higher doesn’t matter.
elements.text_zh: 那就保持在你舒服的高度，不用硬撑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you mean?
elements.text_zh: 什么意思？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Same result from 30 feet or 300 feet.
elements.text_zh: 意思是我们慢慢来，待在你觉得安全的位置。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It’s not the fall that kills you, get me.
elements.text_zh: 你说了算，好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re not helping. It's not about physics or anatomy.
elements.text_zh: 这还差不多。谢谢。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, sorry. Uncouth and uncivilized.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我刚才说得不合适。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Maybe we should do it another day.
elements.text_zh: 如果你想，我们也可以改天再坐。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, I want to face this.
elements.text_zh: 不，我想面对它。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I read about this therapy, aversive imagery.
elements.text_zh: 我读过一种方法，叫引导想象。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m game.
elements.text_zh: 我愿意试试。

elements.text_en: Orwell searches on his mobile for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Orwell在手机上搜了一会儿。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Watch this video. A head cam of a high wire walker.
elements.text_zh: 看这个，高空走绳的第一视角。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve watched it three times. I don’t feel any different.
elements.text_zh: 我看了三遍，还是没什么变化。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s just step one, queen bee.
elements.text_zh: 那只是第一步，女王蜂。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Close your eyes and walk the high wire. Picture it.
elements.text_zh: 闭上眼睛，想象你一步步走过去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re pranking me. People are gonna laugh at me.
elements.text_zh: 你别逗我……我会看起来很傻。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I promise, give it a shot.
elements.text_zh: 相信我，试一下。我在这儿。

elements.text_en: Her heart races as she creeps along, imagining she’s on a highwire.
elements.text_zh: Roxie心跳加速，慢慢挪动着，想象自己在走绳索。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is scary. I want to stop.
elements.text_zh: 好吓人……我想停下。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Keep coming toward my voice. Nearly there. Nearly there.
elements.text_zh: 跟着我的声音走，快到了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You made it.
elements.text_zh: 你做到了。

elements.text_en: Roxie hugs Orwell as she opens her eyes.
elements.text_zh: Roxie睁开眼睛，抱住了Orwell。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I felt better as I got closer.
elements.text_zh: 靠近你之后，我真的舒服多了。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Orwell climb into the balloon basket.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Orwell爬进了热气球的吊篮。

elements.name: Marco
elements.text_en: You two ready?
elements.text_zh: 准备好了吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We’re ready, captain.
elements.text_zh: 准备好了，船长。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You okay, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你还好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’m good.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我可以。

elements.text_en: Roxie feels nervous as the balloon climbs up into the air.
elements.text_zh: 热气球升空时，Roxie有点紧张。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not so great now.
elements.text_zh: 现在有点不太好……

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Let’s check out the sights. See that, sticking up out of the water?
elements.text_zh: 看看风景吧。看到水里露出来的那个了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What is that?
elements.text_zh: 那是什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The mast of a schooner that sank in 1893, the Camille.
elements.text_zh: 很久以前沉没的一艘船的桅杆，叫“卡米尔号”。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A man swam from the shore and rescued his fiancée.
elements.text_zh: 有个人从岸边游出去，救下了他在乎的人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just moments before it went under. According to legend.
elements.text_zh: 据说就在它沉没前的最后一刻。

elements.text_en: Roxie forgets about the altitude as Orwell points out more spots.
elements.text_zh: Orwell继续指着更多景点，Roxie渐渐忘了高度。

elements.name: Marco
elements.text_en: Eight hundred feet, I think we’re good here. Enjoy the ride.
elements.text_zh: 大概八百英尺就差不多了。好好享受吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: How are you doing?
elements.text_zh: 你感觉怎么样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m doing great.
elements.text_zh: 挺好的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s go up a little higher.
elements.text_zh: 我们再升高一点吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: How about 1000 feet captain? Fifty bucks to make it happen.
elements.text_zh: 要不升到一千英尺？我给你点小费当感谢。

elements.name: Marco
elements.text_en: I’m good with that.
elements.text_zh: 没问题。

elements.text_en: They are at a thousand feet and gently drifting a few minutes later.
elements.text_zh: 几分钟后，他们在一千英尺高空缓缓漂着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How far can we see from here?
elements.text_zh: 从这里能看到多远？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: About thirty miles at this height.
elements.text_zh: 这个高度大概能看到三十英里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve never seen the ocean like this. It’s so big and empty.
elements.text_zh: 我从没这样看过大海，又大又空旷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It would be a lonely place on a boat far out in the ocean.
elements.text_zh: 如果独自在海中央漂着，会很孤单吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, especially when the world was an uncharted place.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，尤其在世界还没被探索清楚的时候。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you mean?
elements.text_zh: 什么意思？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We know what it looks like now.
elements.text_zh: 现在我们知道世界是什么样了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You know where this island sits on our spherical planet.
elements.text_zh: 也知道这座岛在这颗星球上的位置。

elements.text_en: Orwell tells a story of explorers of old.
elements.text_zh: Orwell讲起了古老探险者的故事。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We have cell phones, GPS, maps, and charts showing where we are.
elements.text_zh: 我们有手机、定位、地图和导航图，随时知道自己在哪。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: If you were alone on a boat down there, you would be connected.
elements.text_zh: 就算你独自在下面那艘船上，也能和外界保持联系。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Six hundred years ago, when explorers took to the ocean.
elements.text_zh: 但六百年前，人们出海探险时——

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: There was no map of the world.
elements.text_zh: 世界还没有清晰的地图。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Close your eyes, you’re on a ship 600 years ago.
elements.text_zh: 闭上眼睛，想象你在六百年前的一艘船上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay. What am I thinking about?
elements.text_zh: 好，我在想什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Is the earth flat? Or is it a giant ball?
elements.text_zh: 地球是平的？还是一个巨大的球？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Will I go right over the edge?
elements.text_zh: 我会不会从“边缘”掉下去？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Are there palaces of gold in undiscovered lands?
elements.text_zh: 未知的土地会不会藏着金矿？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Open your eyes and imagine how you would feel.
elements.text_zh: 睁开眼，想想那会是什么感受。

elements.text_en: Roxie stares at the horizon far out on the empty ocean.
elements.text_zh: Roxie望着远方空旷的海平线。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You have a magical way of viewing the world.
elements.text_zh: 你看世界的方式很有魔力。

elements.text_en: Roxie gently squeezes Orwell’s hand.
elements.text_zh: Roxie轻轻握了握Orwell的手。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sometimes strange, but always magical.
elements.text_zh: 有时很奇怪，但总是很迷人。

elements.text_en: They embrace with a mild bit of turbulence.
elements.text_zh: 轻微的气流颠簸中，他们拥抱在一起。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just warm currents of air flowing up.
elements.text_zh: 只是暖气流往上走而已。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just friends, right?
elements.text_zh: 我们只是朋友，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t know what to say. At least friends.
elements.text_zh: 我不知道该怎么说……至少是朋友。

elements.text_en: Orwell suddenly jumps up onto the side of the basket.
elements.text_zh: Orwell突然站到吊篮边缘上。

elements.name: Marco
elements.text_en: Please, dude, don’t do that.
elements.text_zh: 拜托，兄弟，别这样。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I signed the waiver. Just chill.
elements.text_zh: 我签过安全协议了，放轻松。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sky surfing, what a rush.
elements.text_zh: “天空冲浪”，太上头了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m on top of the world.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉自己站在世界之巅。

elements.text_en: Roxie is stunned as she snaps a picture of Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一边震惊一边拍下Orwell的照片。

elements.text_en: Amazed that he looks at ease, like he’s on a tour bus.
elements.text_zh: 他从容得像在坐观光车。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What an astonishing person.
elements.text_zh: 这人也太离谱了……

elements.text_en: Roxie, Candy, and Jax catch up a couple of days after the balloon ride.
elements.text_zh: 几天后，Roxie、Candy和Jax又聚到了一起。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: How was the balloon ride? You managed, okay?
elements.text_zh: 热气球怎么样？你还扛得住吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Orwell, help you with heights?
elements.text_zh: Orwell有帮你克服恐高吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You blushed. Something going on with you and Orwell?
elements.text_zh: 你都脸红了。你和Orwell是不是有情况？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Crap. I don’t know.
elements.text_zh: 糟了……我也不知道。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t blush. He came up with a weird thing for heights.
elements.text_zh: 我才没脸红。他想了个很怪的办法对付恐高。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: You didn’t take off your clothes.
elements.text_zh: 你没做什么出格的事吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No! He wouldn’t do that. I wouldn’t do that.
elements.text_zh: 当然没有！他不会，我也不会。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll tell you about that later.
elements.text_zh: 回头我再细说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re not going to believe what he did up there.
elements.text_zh: 你们绝对想不到他在上面干了啥。

elements.text_en: Roxie shows them the picture of Orwell windsurfing as she explains.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一边解释，一边给她们看Orwell“空中冲浪”的照片。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: How high up were you?
elements.text_zh: 你们当时有多高？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A thousand feet! Can you imagine?
elements.text_zh: 一千英尺！你们敢信？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That dude is one of a kind.
elements.text_zh: 那家伙真是独一份。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes, he is.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，确实。

elements.text_en: The ladies continue to chat.
elements.text_zh: 三人继续聊天。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Corbin and Lance both asked me about that day.
elements.text_zh: Corbin和Lance都问了我那天的事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Curious about why Gabe was at the balloon launch area with you.
elements.text_zh: 他们好奇为什么Gabe会和你一起出现在热气球起飞点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why would they ask about that?
elements.text_zh: 他们干嘛问这个？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I don’t know. I fumbled a bit.
elements.text_zh: 我也不知道，当时有点说漏嘴。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I said you two smoothed things over about the bonfire night.
elements.text_zh: 我说你们已经把篝火那晚的事处理好了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How did they know Gabe was there?
elements.text_zh: 他们怎么知道Gabe在那儿？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I might have messed up.
elements.text_zh: 可能是我说多了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I saw them at the Tikki bar that night.
elements.text_zh: 那晚我在酒吧见到过他们。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I had a little too much to drink and was chatty.
elements.text_zh: 我喝多了点，话就多了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I said you and Gabe were getting back together.
elements.text_zh: 我说你和Gabe像是要复合。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Candy! Why would you say that?
elements.text_zh: Candy！你怎么能这么说？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Well, it looked like that. Sorry, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 当时看起来像嘛……对不起，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s okay. It’s not their business anyway.
elements.text_zh: 没事，本来也不关他们的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe and I did not decide to get back together.
elements.text_zh: Gabe和我并没有决定复合。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The whole truth is too complicated.
elements.text_zh: 真相太复杂了。

elements.text_en: Roxie finishes explaining Orwell’s aversion imagery.
elements.text_zh: Roxie讲完了Orwell提到的“厌恶意象”。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Pretending you’re on a high wire with your eyes closed?
elements.text_zh: 闭着眼假装走钢丝？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m picturing you swaying and creeping along, like you're drunk.
elements.text_zh: 我都能想象你摇摇晃晃往前挪的样子了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t laugh, it helped some.
elements.text_zh: 别笑，确实有点用。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Where are the guys?
elements.text_zh: 那些男的去哪儿了？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I’m ready to watch stud wars.
elements.text_zh: 我已经准备好看“猛男对决”了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Touch football, down on the beach, right?
elements.text_zh: 沙滩上打对抗式橄榄球，对吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s what Corbin said. Simon and Clyde are joining.
elements.text_zh: Corbin是这么说的。Simon和Clyde也会加入。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll just relax here by the pool.
elements.text_zh: 我就在泳池边放松一下。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We can watch from up here.
elements.text_zh: 我们在这儿也能看到。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Here they come now.
elements.text_zh: 他们来了。

elements.text_en: They hear men and women chattering as they walk along the beach.
elements.text_zh: 他们听见一群人边走边聊的声音传过来。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin have their groupies with them.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin还带着一群小迷妹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t know Gabe was part of this.
elements.text_zh: 我不知道Gabe也会参加。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, Corbin pulled a leg muscle yesterday.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，Corbin昨天腿还拉伤了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You turning your lounger to watch?
elements.text_zh: 你要把躺椅转过去看吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just passing time.
elements.text_zh: 就打发时间。

elements.text_en: Lance, Corbin, Gabe, Clyde, and Simon circle as Sophie and Lana watch.
elements.text_zh: 男生们围成一圈，Sophie和Lana在旁边看着。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie, Candy, and Jax are watching from up there.
elements.text_zh: Roxie、Candy和Jax在上面看着呢。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: So, what? Let’s focus on the game.
elements.text_zh: 那又怎样？专心比赛吧。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: He plays pro ball, Gabe. Simon played college.
elements.text_zh: 他是职业球员。Simon大学也打过。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: Let’s play soccer.
elements.text_zh: 那就踢足球。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Cowards. I knew it.
elements.text_zh: 怂了吧。我就知道。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Make it fair. I can’t throw any passes, okay.
elements.text_zh: 公平点，我可不会传球，行吧。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That’s cool, will kick your butts at your game.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，那我就用你们擅长的项目狠狠干一局。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Cream you in soccer next time around.
elements.text_zh: 下次踢足球我也能把你们狠狠干翻。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Okay, half time. All tied up, two touchdowns each.
elements.text_zh: 好，中场休息。平局，各两次达阵。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Gonna beat you at your own game, dude?
elements.text_zh: 想在你的主场赢你，兄弟？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just getting warmed up.
elements.text_zh: 刚热身完而已。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Got a cold sports drink, Sophie?
elements.text_zh: 有冰的运动饮料吗，Sophie？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Sure thing, let me towel you off.
elements.text_zh: 当然。我给你拿条毛巾擦擦汗。

elements.text_en: In a lougher area not far from the field. The gal-pals watch and chat.
elements.text_zh: 离球场不远的休息区，闺蜜团一边看比赛一边闲聊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait, half time already? Lance pushed Gabe down. Should have been a foul!
elements.text_zh: 等等，中场休息了？Lance刚把Gabe撞倒了，这不该算犯规吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That’s basketball, babe, this is football.
elements.text_zh: 那是篮球规则，宝贝，这是橄榄球。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Well… looks like you still have a soft spot for your Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 啧……看起来你对Gabe还是有点在意。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Come on. They were just patting each other on the shoulder.
elements.text_zh: 得了吧，他们就是拍了拍肩。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey! Seems like you’re taking sides.
elements.text_zh: 喂！你这是站队了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m clearly talking about the game, not the people.
elements.text_zh: 我说的是比赛，不是人。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I need to get to know Simon and Clyde better.
elements.text_zh: 我得好好认识下Simon和Clyde。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re scoping out both of them?
elements.text_zh: 你要同时考察他俩？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Greedy girl.
elements.text_zh: 贪心的女孩。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: They offer different features and options.
elements.text_zh: 各有各的优点。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: A sleek convertible or a muscle car.
elements.text_zh: 一个是拉风跑车，一个是硬派肌肉车。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Lean and buff or a chiseled hulk.
elements.text_zh: 一个修长结实，一个壮得像雕出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You are a ball of fire, chica.
elements.text_zh: 你可真来劲，小姐姐。

elements.text_en: Lance, Corbin, Gabe finds the gal pals at the pool after touch football.
elements.text_zh: 触式橄榄球结束后，Lance和Gabe在泳池边找到了闺蜜团。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: These new babes are grooving with Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 那些新来的女孩正围着Lance和Corbin转呢。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why didn’t you and Roxie come? I already lost.
elements.text_zh: 你和Roxie怎么没来？我都输完了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can tell you were really enjoying that massage from your redhead.
elements.text_zh: 看得出来你挺享受那位红发女孩给你按的那一套。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, we were forgotten a long time ago.
elements.text_zh: 对啊，我们早被你忘到脑后了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh come on… you guys are teasing me.
elements.text_zh: 行了行了……你们就别逗我了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Alright, alright, leave him alone. So, what’s the score?
elements.text_zh: 好啦好啦，放过他吧。比分多少？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Lance and Simon 6, Clyde and I 7.
elements.text_zh: 我和Clyde七分，Lance和Simon六分。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That was a good game, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 打得不错，Gabe。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You took us fair and square.
elements.text_zh: 你们赢得光明正大。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I think it would have been different if you QB'd the team.
elements.text_zh: 要是你当四分卫，结果可能不一样。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: This was fun. Cool off for a bit, first. And then... some volleyball?
elements.text_zh: 挺开心的。先去凉快下，然后……来场排球？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, sounds like a plan.
elements.text_zh: 行啊，就这么定。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Gabe leaves.
elements.text_zh: Corbin和Gabe离开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s going on with Gabe and Lance?
elements.text_zh: Gabe和Lance怎么突然这么和气？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah… how come Lance and Gabe seem kind of friendly?
elements.text_zh: 对啊……他俩怎么看着还挺友好？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Gabe’s playing the win really low-key. No trash talking.
elements.text_zh: Gabe赢了也很低调，一句狠话都没放。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, that’s weird.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，怪怪的。

elements.text_en: Gabe comes back and finds Roxie, Jax, and Candy at the pool.
elements.text_zh: Gabe回来，在泳池边找到了Roxie、Jax和Candy。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hey, gals, did you actually catch any of the action?
elements.text_zh: 嗨，姑娘们，刚才比赛看到了吗？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, we watched. Nice win.
elements.text_zh: 看了，赢得不错。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We had some luck.
elements.text_zh: 有点运气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, if Lance QB'd, you guys probably wouldn’t have won.
elements.text_zh: 要是Lance当四分卫，你们未必能赢。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hold on. I didn’t say that.
elements.text_zh: 等等，我可没这么说。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I beat him at his own game anyways. Supposed to be a pro.
elements.text_zh: 反正我在他的主场赢了他。他不是号称很强吗。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That sounds more like Gabe. Keep going.
elements.text_zh: 这才像Gabe。继续。

elements.text_en: Gabe pauses for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Gabe停顿了一下。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I mean, yeah, we had a few lucky breaks, and Lance didn’t QB.
elements.text_zh: 我的意思是，我们确实有几次走运，而且Lance没当四分卫。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: And Clyde did great, a team effort.
elements.text_zh: Clyde也发挥得很好，是团队的功劳。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know he wants to crow more.
elements.text_zh: 我知道他其实更想嘚瑟。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s going on with him?
elements.text_zh: 他今天怎么了？

elements.text_en: Gabe continues chatting with the gal pals near the pool.
elements.text_zh: Gabe继续在泳池边和闺蜜团聊天。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You going to be able to stay around much longer?
elements.text_zh: 你还能待多久？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Must be some pressing work in the office.
elements.text_zh: 公司那边肯定一堆急事吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sly girl. She’s testing him. Let's see what he says.
elements.text_zh: 小机灵鬼，在试探他呢。看看他怎么答。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m not thinking much about work at the moment.
elements.text_zh: 我现在没怎么想工作的事。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’ve earned some time off.
elements.text_zh: 我给自己放了个假。

elements.text_en: Roxie feels Gabe staring at her.
elements.text_zh: Roxie感觉Gabe在盯着她。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I have more important things on my mind.
elements.text_zh: 我脑子里有更重要的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. That seemed sincere.
elements.text_zh: 哇，听着挺真诚。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie, how was the balloon ride?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，热气球之旅怎么样？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I was a little worried. Heights can get to you.
elements.text_zh: 我有点担心，高处有时候会吓人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was great. Orwell helped me out.
elements.text_zh: 很好，Orwell帮了我。

elements.text_en: Roxie describes Orwell’s strategy and seeing the sights.
elements.text_zh: 她讲了Orwell的办法，以及看到的风景。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: High wire visualization. Dude is clever.
elements.text_zh: 高空想象训练？那家伙挺聪明。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sounds like a great day.
elements.text_zh: 听起来是很棒的一天。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Trying to prove he’s a new man? Doesn’t feel like an act.
elements.text_zh: 他是在证明自己变了吗？听着不像装的。

elements.text_en: Roxie watches as Candy accidentally pushes Gabe’s button.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看着Candy不小心戳到了Gabe的痛点。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Lance seemed to play it cool after losing.
elements.text_zh: Lance输了还挺淡定。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: He was classy, shaking hands and being a good sport.
elements.text_zh: 他很有风度，握手致意，表现得很体面。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Like you said. They would have creamed you if he QBd.
elements.text_zh: 就像你说的，要是他当四分卫，你们可能就悬了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Classy guy, yeah, right. Creamed us?
elements.text_zh: 有风度？呵。让我们输惨？怎么可能。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That hit a nerve.
elements.text_zh: 这话戳到他了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Clyde and I were clicking. Even if Lance had QB'd.
elements.text_zh: 我和Clyde配合得很好，就算Lance当四分卫也一样。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We still would have kicked . . .
elements.text_zh: 我们照样能把他们……

elements.text_en: Gabe pauses a moment.
elements.text_zh: Gabe停了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Here it comes. He’s gonna slam Lance.
elements.text_zh: 来了，他要开怼Lance了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You're right, he was a good sport.
elements.text_zh: 你说得对，他确实挺有风度。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We’re supposed to play volleyball in a bit.
elements.text_zh: 一会儿还要打排球。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let's see how that plays out.
elements.text_zh: 看看到时候怎么样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Something is simmering below the surface.
elements.text_zh: 表面平静，底下却在发酵。

elements.text_en: Clyde arrives at the pool.
elements.text_zh: Clyde来到泳池边。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Clyde, you were awesome at football.
elements.text_zh: Clyde，你刚才在球场上太厉害了。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: Thanks, Candy. You look really fine today.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Candy。你今天看起来真不错。

elements.text_en: Clyde moves closer to Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Clyde靠近了Gabe。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: You ready for volleyball, Gabe?
elements.text_zh: 准备好打排球了吗，Gabe？

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: Lance says they’re all set.
elements.text_zh: Lance说他们都准备好了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Excuse me for a second, Rox.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，Rox，我离开一下。

elements.text_en: Clyde and Gabe chat quietly, but Roxie can still hear.
elements.text_zh: Clyde和Gabe低声交谈，但Roxie还是能听到。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m ready, bro. No holds barred.
elements.text_zh: 我准备好了，兄弟。狠狠干一场。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s kick their butts off the beach.
elements.text_zh: 把他们从沙滩上狠狠干回去。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Send them crying to momma.
elements.text_zh: 让他们哭着去找人安慰。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: I’m with you.
elements.text_zh: 我跟你一起。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So much for friendly foes.
elements.text_zh: 看来“友好对手”到此为止了。

elements.text_en: Gabe turns his attention back to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Gabe把注意力转回到Roxie身上。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You okay, if I head back down, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 我先下去的话，你没问题吧，Roxie？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure, no problem.
elements.text_zh: 当然，没问题。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You need anything? You or your crew.
elements.text_zh: 你们需要什么吗？你或者你的伙伴们。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Towels, cold drinks, snacks. I can run down to the beach.
elements.text_zh: 毛巾、冷饮、零食都行。我可以跑一趟沙滩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think we’re good. Thanks for asking.
elements.text_zh: 我们够用了，谢谢你关心。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You bet, babe. Let me know if you need something.
elements.text_zh: 没问题，亲爱的。有需要就告诉我。

elements.text_en: Clyde and Gabe head back to the beach.
elements.text_zh: Clyde和Gabe一起回到沙滩。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That man is ready to do anything for you, girl.
elements.text_zh: 那家伙简直愿意为你做任何事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He just asked if we need drinks.
elements.text_zh: 他只是问我们要不要喝的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Totally blows off the idea that work is on his mind.
elements.text_zh: 完全看不出他还惦记着工作的事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Offers to wait on you hand and foot. Committed with a capital C.
elements.text_zh: 对你体贴得不行。认真得很。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s just being polite.
elements.text_zh: 他只是礼貌而已。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe she’s right.
elements.text_zh: 也许她说得对。

elements.text_en: The gal pals chat before volleyball gets started on the beach.
elements.text_zh: 排球开打前，闺蜜团先聊着天。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Clyde was eye-balling me pretty good.
elements.text_zh: Clyde刚才一直在盯着我看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? He seemed more interested in volleyball.
elements.text_zh: 真的？他看起来更关心排球。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Didn’t you hear him? I look super-hot.
elements.text_zh: 你没听见吗？他说我“特别好看”。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He said really fine. Not super-hot.
elements.text_zh: 他说的是“真不错”，不是“火辣”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Guy code. He didn’t want to diss you two.
elements.text_zh: 男人的说法啦。他是不想让你们俩尴尬。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So, you’re going for the sleek convertible.
elements.text_zh: 所以，你要选那种流线型敞篷车？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I haven’t chosen a model.
elements.text_zh: 我还没定型号呢。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Good to know he has a sweet tooth.
elements.text_zh: 至少知道他喜欢甜的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: And would like a taste of Candy.
elements.text_zh: 而且还想“尝一口Candy”。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: We’re gonna stay and watch the volleyball, right?
elements.text_zh: 我们会留下来看排球的，对吧？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’m good for that.
elements.text_zh: 当然，我没问题。

elements.text_en: The gal pals continue talking about the volleyball match.
elements.text_zh: 闺蜜团继续聊着排球赛。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: How about you, Roxie? You gonna hang with us?
elements.text_zh: 你呢，Roxie？要跟我们一起吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why don’t we go down to the beach and watch?
elements.text_zh: 不如我们下去沙滩那边看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A close-up of what’s going on with Gabe and Lance.
elements.text_zh: 近距离看看Gabe和Lance到底怎么回事。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Good idea. See the hunks up close.
elements.text_zh: 好主意，近距离看看那些帅哥。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I like it up here. These nice loungers.
elements.text_zh: 我更喜欢待在这儿，这些躺椅太舒服了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Don’t be a buzzkill. They just started. Let’s go.
elements.text_zh: 别扫兴嘛，他们才刚开始。走啦。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I’m not carrying these drinks and snacks.
elements.text_zh: 好吧好吧。但我不拿这些饮料和零食。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The view from here is fine.
elements.text_zh: 从这儿看也挺清楚的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax is right. Too much of a hassle. Let’s watch from here.
elements.text_zh: Jax说得对，太折腾了。就从这儿看吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Make up your mind, Roxie. Jeez.
elements.text_zh: 你快做决定啦，Roxie。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Looks like the truce has broken down between Lance and Gabe
elements.text_zh: 看起来Lance和Gabe的“休战”破裂了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They are really going at each other.
elements.text_zh: 他们是真的较上劲了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This seems more like reality.
elements.text_zh: 这才更像真实情况。

elements.text_en: Gabe and Lance argue about the last volley.
elements.text_zh: Gabe和Lance为刚才那球争执。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Total crap, man. That was in.
elements.text_zh: 离谱，兄弟。那球明明是界内。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It was out, Clyde called it. Our serve.
elements.text_zh: 出界了，Clyde判的。该我们发球。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You dingos would do anything to win.
elements.text_zh: 你们为了赢真是什么都敢做。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: Shut up, loser. We already kicked your tails once.
elements.text_zh: 闭嘴吧。我们已经赢过你们一次了。

elements.name: Simon
elements.text_en: Cause we’re holding back. Pro QB playing out of position.
elements.text_zh: 因为我们还没认真。职业四分卫被你们放错位置了。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: You are a total candy ass, Simon.
elements.text_zh: 你少来这套，Simon。

elements.text_en: Simon shoves Clyde as they stand near the net.
elements.text_zh: 两人站在网前，Simon推了Clyde一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Getting pretty heated down there.
elements.text_zh: 下面火气越来越大了。

elements.name: Clyde
elements.text_en: I’m gonna put your butt on the ground, jerk-off.
elements.text_zh: 再来我可不客气了。

elements.text_en: Lance and Gabe pull them apart.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Gabe把他们拉开。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Let’s play. No need for a boxing match.
elements.text_zh: 继续打球，没必要搞得像要打架。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: If they want to cheat with bogus calls, fine.
elements.text_zh: 他们要靠乱判占便宜？行啊。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Will still beat them. Your serve, prick.
elements.text_zh: 照样赢你们。你发球。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You guys keep the serve.
elements.text_zh: 发球给你们。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We don’t need bogus calls to whip your butt.
elements.text_zh: 我们不靠乱判也能赢你们。

elements.text_en: Simon serves, Clyde returns, and Lance spikes the ball back at Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Simon发球，Clyde回击，Lance把球猛扣向Gabe。

elements.text_en: The ball hits Gabe in the face. Drops of blood are coming from his nose.
elements.text_zh: 球砸中Gabe的脸，他鼻子渗出血来。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You did that on purpose.
elements.text_zh: 你是故意的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You got hands, dude; you should have blocked it.
elements.text_zh: 你有手啊，兄弟，应该拦住的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You ass hole!
elements.text_zh: 你太过分了！

elements.text_en: Clyde and Simon pull Gabe and Lance apart.
elements.text_zh: Clyde和Simon把Gabe和Lance拉开。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hurting another player on purpose, that's dirty!
elements.text_zh: 故意伤人，这太下作了！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey! I didn't cross the line. I didn’t mean to!
elements.text_zh: 喂！我没越界！我不是故意的！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh my gosh. Gabe is bleeding.
elements.text_zh: 天哪，Gabe流血了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He’s okay. He stopped the bleeding with some tissue.
elements.text_zh: 没事，他用纸巾先止住了血。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, he’s okay. They’ve started playing again.
elements.text_zh: 对，没事。他们又继续比赛了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie. It was just a shot; it happens in volleyball.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，只是个意外球，排球里很常见。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, Lance wouldn’t do that.
elements.text_zh: 也是，Lance不至于那样。

elements.text_en: The gal pals watch as the volleyball finishes on the beach
elements.text_zh: 闺蜜团看着沙滩排球赛结束。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Gabe and Clyde won.
elements.text_zh: Gabe和Clyde赢了。

elements.text_en: Gabe joins the gal pals around the pool.
elements.text_zh: Gabe回到泳池边找闺蜜团。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We won by two. It was a good match.
elements.text_zh: 我们赢了两分，打得挺不错。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We saw it all. How’s your nose?
elements.text_zh: 我们都看到了。你鼻子怎么样？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It’s no big deal. I’ve had much worse.
elements.text_zh: 没什么大不了的，我经历过更糟的。

elements.text_en: Lance joins Gabe and Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Lance走了过来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sorry about the nose, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Gabe，关于鼻子那下……抱歉。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: It's OK. It's was accident. I shouldn’t have said that.
elements.text_zh: 没事，是意外。我刚才不该那样说。

elements.text_en: Lance pats Gabe on the shoulder. Gabe nods back.
elements.text_zh: Lance拍了拍Gabe的肩，Gabe点头回应。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Oh, we have the pool challenge in like thirty minutes, right?
elements.text_zh: 对了，三十分钟后有泳池挑战，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, we do.
elements.text_zh: 对。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m gonna take a quick shower. See you then.
elements.text_zh: 我去冲个澡。待会见。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: See you.
elements.text_zh: 待会见。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Gabe talk as Lance leaves.
elements.text_zh: Lance离开后，两人交谈。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re gonna leave, I’m guessing.
elements.text_zh: 你准备走了吧？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Why do you say that?
elements.text_zh: 为什么这么说？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I mean this show.
elements.text_zh: 我是说，这个节目。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You might not want to watch. I understand.
elements.text_zh: 你可能不想看下去。我理解。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m gonna cheer you to victory.
elements.text_zh: 我会为你加油，帮你拿下胜利。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Watch you rack up points and impress the audience.
elements.text_zh: 看你一路得分，把观众都惊艳到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thanks, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Gabe。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m gonna get a shower, I’ll be right back.
elements.text_zh: 我去冲个澡，马上回来。

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie talk after Gabe leaves.
elements.text_zh: Gabe离开后，Jax和Roxie聊起来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What did Gabe say?
elements.text_zh: Gabe说了什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s going to cheer me on during the pool jousting.
elements.text_zh: 他说会在泳池对抗赛时给我加油。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He’s definitely all-in for you.
elements.text_zh: 他对你是真的很上心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe he is.
elements.text_zh: 也许吧。

elements.text_en: Harley finishes up with the cameras rolling.
elements.text_zh: Harley在镜头滚动中收尾。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: We have these safety cushions all around the pool for your safety.
elements.text_zh: 泳池周围都铺了安全缓冲垫，保障安全。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: If someone falls outside onto a cushion, the couple loses the joust.
elements.text_zh: 如果有人摔到泳池外的垫子上，那一组判负。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: If the lady rider falls into the pool, the couple loses the joust.
elements.text_zh: 如果女选手落水，那一组判负。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Anything goes except eye gouging, hair pulling, or grabbing the privates.
elements.text_zh: 除了戳眼、扯头发、以及不当身体接触外，其他动作都允许。

elements.text_en: Later, Roxie climbs onto Lance’s shoulders for another round.
elements.text_zh: 稍后，Roxie再次骑到Lance肩上进入下一轮。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Okay, Simon has a strong lower body. I’m quicker.
elements.text_zh: Simon下盘更稳，但我更灵活。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Circle behind them. I’ll pull Lana backwards.
elements.text_zh: 绕到他们后面。我把Lana往后带。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sounds like a plan.
elements.text_zh: 听起来可行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Slow down, Lance. I’m gonna fall off.
elements.text_zh: 慢点，Lance。我快要掉下去了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Here they come, right at us. Get ready.
elements.text_zh: 他们冲过来了。准备！

elements.text_en: Lance dodges out of the way and circles behind Simon.
elements.text_zh: Lance灵活闪开，绕到Simon身后。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Now, Roxie, now!
elements.text_zh: 现在，Roxie，就现在！

elements.text_en: Roxie pulls on Lana’s shoulder, and Lana falls backward into the pool.
elements.text_zh: Roxie抓住Lana的肩部发力，Lana后仰落入泳池。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good job, Lance.
elements.text_zh: 干得好，Lance。

elements.text_en: Roxie turns to see Gabe cheering for her about an hour later.
elements.text_zh: 大约一小时后，Roxie看到Gabe在为她加油。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Come on, Roxie! You can do it.
elements.text_zh: 加油，Roxie！你可以的！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ready, Lance, let's take Sophie down.
elements.text_zh: 准备好，Lance，我们把Sophie拿下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Here they come. Clyde is quick.
elements.text_zh: 他们来了。Clyde动作很快。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sophie! Don’t pull on my bikini top.
elements.text_zh: Sophie！别拉我的泳衣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I said stop it!
elements.text_zh: 我说了，停下！

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Harley didn’t say anything about yanking on swimsuits.
elements.text_zh: Harley可没说不能扯泳衣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You want to play it that way.
elements.text_zh: Fine. 你要这么玩是吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie pulls on Sophie’s top. Sophie clings to her top as Roxie grabs her leg.
elements.text_zh: Roxie反制扯住Sophie的泳衣边缘，Sophie赶紧护住；Roxie同时抓住她的腿发力。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She’s down. Way to go!
elements.text_zh: 她倒了！漂亮！

elements.text_en: Roxie and Lance hug, and Roxie gives Lance a quick kiss.
elements.text_zh: 两人拥抱庆祝，Roxie轻轻亲了Lance一下。

elements.text_en: Roxie sees a look of sad surprise in Gabe’s eye as he stares at her.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看到Gabe眼里闪过一丝意外与失落。

elements.text_en: The next day, Roxie takes some time alone to reflect on things.
elements.text_zh: 第二天，Roxie独自整理思绪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Some quiet time alone, exactly what I need.
elements.text_zh: 一个人安静一会儿，正是我需要的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe said he was going to prove he was a new man.
elements.text_zh: Gabe说他会证明自己真的变了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did he prove it yesterday?
elements.text_zh: 他昨天算证明了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sticking around for the pool competition.
elements.text_zh: 为了泳池对抗赛留下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not freaking out when I kissed Lance.
elements.text_zh: 我亲了Lance也没失控。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s going on with Lance and Gabe?
elements.text_zh: Lance和Gabe之间到底怎么了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The two of them holding back from going after each other.
elements.text_zh: 他们俩都在克制，没有真的撕破脸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: These new girls with Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin身边那几个新女孩……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I get a strange vibe. Is Jax right? Am I jealous?
elements.text_zh: 我有种说不清的感觉。Jax说得对吗？我是在吃醋？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That moment with Orwell on the balloon.
elements.text_zh: 热气球上和Orwell的那一刻……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: And Archer, that question is going to come back up.
elements.text_zh: 还有Archer——他问的那个问题迟早会再被提起。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Hey, sister. Laughing to yourself. You cracking up?
elements.text_zh: 嘿，姐妹。一个人笑这么开心？在想啥呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey, Jax, Candy. Maybe I am.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Jax，Candy。也许是吧。

elements.text_en: Candy and Jax stop to catch up with Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Candy和Jax停下来和Roxie聊聊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Looks like you're deep in thought.
elements.text_zh: 看起来你在想事情。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just chilling, what are you two up to?
elements.text_zh: 就随便放松一下。你们俩在忙啥？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Town square, shopping, then that cozy coffee shop.
elements.text_zh: 去广场逛逛，然后去那家很舒服的咖啡馆。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That was an awesome win for you and Lance.
elements.text_zh: 你和Lance那场赢得太漂亮了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Sophie darn near went topless.
elements.text_zh: Sophie当时差点走光。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That would have kept the editing team busy.
elements.text_zh: 后期剪辑估计得忙一阵。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You and Gabe, okay?
elements.text_zh: 你和Gabe……还好吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He looked a little peeved when you kissed Lance.
elements.text_zh: 你亲Lance的时候，他看起来有点不爽。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He said it wasn’t a big deal.
elements.text_zh: 他说没什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just two contestants celebrating a win.
elements.text_zh: 只是两位参赛者庆祝胜利而已。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s what you told him? You were excited to win.
elements.text_zh: 你就这么跟他说的？说你是因为赢了太兴奋？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. That’s what Gabe said.
elements.text_zh: 不是，是Gabe自己这么说的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Wow. Okay, way to go, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 哇……行，Gabe这话说得真“高明”。

elements.text_en: The gal pals continue talking.
elements.text_zh: 闺蜜团继续聊天。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: That was a clever move you used to take Sophie down.
elements.text_zh: 你刚才那招很聪明，把Sophie压制住了。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Lance was quite the steed.
elements.text_zh: Lance配合得挺稳的。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Simon and Clyde were stallions as well.
elements.text_zh: Simon和Clyde也很给力。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Why did you pass on the competition?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么没去参加对抗赛？

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: I thought it was pool jesting. Sounded boring.
elements.text_zh: 我以为就是泳池小游戏，听着有点无聊。

elements.name: Candy
