elements.text_en: Missed the chance to wrap my thighs around a studly mare's neck.
elements.text_zh: 结果错过了“近距离互动”的机会。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’ll find another chance to saddle up.
elements.text_zh: 下次还有机会“再上场”的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Let’s do some shopping and then the coffee shop.
elements.text_zh: 我们去逛逛街，再去咖啡店吧。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’m ready. You want to come, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 好啊，我准备好了。Roxie，你一起吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll catch up with you at the coffee shop in a bit.
elements.text_zh: 我一会儿在咖啡店和你们汇合。

elements.text_en: Jax and Candy head for the town square.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Candy朝广场走去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I need to ask Jax if she’s heard anything about Raven’s rumors.
elements.text_zh: 我得问问Jax，有没有听到关于Raven的传闻。

elements.text_en: Corbin and Roxie run into each other moments after the girls leave.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Candy走后不久，Roxie和Corbin碰上了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Hi Roxie, how you doing? You look worried.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Roxie，你还好吗？看起来有点担心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I wonder if Corbin has heard anything about these rumors?
elements.text_zh: Corbin会不会听过这些传闻？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m okay. Just thinking about something.
elements.text_zh: 我没事，只是在想点事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Have you heard any rumors about the show?
elements.text_zh: 你听说过关于节目的传闻吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What kind of rumors?
elements.text_zh: 什么样的传闻？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Entertainment reporters making allegations.
elements.text_zh: 有娱乐记者在散播一些说法。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No, something worrying you? Want some help?
elements.text_zh: 没有。你是在担心什么吗？需要我帮忙？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, just something Jax and I were talking about. No big deal.
elements.text_zh: 没有，只是我和Jax聊到的事，不算大事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How’s your leg doing?
elements.text_zh: 你的腿怎么样了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Kept you out of the action yesterday.
elements.text_zh: 昨天让你没法上场。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It’s a lot better. I didn’t like being on the sidelines.
elements.text_zh: 好多了。我不太喜欢一直在旁边看。

elements.text_en: Corbin tells Roxie about his athletic prowess.
elements.text_zh: Corbin开始聊起自己的运动经历。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I was really looking forward to football.
elements.text_zh: 我真的很期待那场橄榄球赛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you play football?
elements.text_zh: 你以前打过橄榄球？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Oh yeah. Intramural league in high school.
elements.text_zh: 当然，高中校内联赛。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I don’t want to toot my own horn, but I was a demon on defense.
elements.text_zh: 我不想自夸，但我防守确实很强。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I could have picked off a few of Lance’s passes if he QB'd.
elements.text_zh: 要是Lance当四分卫，我应该能拦下几次传球。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That would really get under his skin.
elements.text_zh: 那肯定能把他气到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sound confident. He’s one of the top QBs in the pros.
elements.text_zh: 你很自信啊。他可是职业顶级四分卫之一。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, but he’s got some tells.
elements.text_zh: 是，但他有些小习惯会暴露。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That must have been a really competitive intramural league.
elements.text_zh: 那你们校内联赛一定竞争很激烈。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Have you played since then? That’s been a few years.
elements.text_zh: 后来你还打吗？都过去好几年了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Well, no. But . . .
elements.text_zh: 嗯，没有。不过……

elements.text_en: Corbin pauses for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Corbin停顿了一下。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Are you teasing me?
elements.text_zh: 你是在逗我吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. Why would you think that?
elements.text_zh: 没有呀，你怎么会这么想？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Changing gears. What’s up with Lana?
elements.text_zh: 换个话题，你和Lana怎么回事？

elements.text_en: Roxie keeps Corbin off balance when his ego gets him in trouble.
elements.text_zh: Roxie用话术让Corbin的“自信”有点接不住。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Seems like you two are hitting it off. Not that it's my business.
elements.text_zh: 看起来你们俩相处得不错——当然不关我的事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She is a sweet girl. We’re having some fun.
elements.text_zh: 她挺可爱的，我们就轻松相处。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I don’t like to get too tied down to any one chick.
elements.text_zh: 我不太想被一段关系绑得太紧。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Play the field. A woman in every port. That’s how I roll.
elements.text_zh: 我更偏向随性一点，不想过早定下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really, you’re going with that.
elements.text_zh: 你真打算这么说？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m surprised. You see women as objects?
elements.text_zh: 我有点意外……你把女生当“东西”看吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Possessions or play toys. Is that how you think of us?
elements.text_zh: 像“占有物”一样？你是这么看待我们的吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: No. No. That's not what I meant.
elements.text_zh: 不是不是，我不是那个意思。

elements.text_en: Corbin pauses, seemingly flustered by his own words.
elements.text_zh: Corbin停了一下，像是意识到自己话说重了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Work is really more of a priority to me.
elements.text_zh: 对我来说，工作确实更优先。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Not a lot of time to focus on romantic entanglements.
elements.text_zh: 没太多时间把精力放在感情纠葛上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Work is more important than relationships, really?
elements.text_zh: 所以工作比关系更重要？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Wait, now. Hold on. Let me explain.
elements.text_zh: 等等，先别这样，我解释。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m messing with you, Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 我逗你的，Corbin。

elements.text_en: Corbin shrugs and seemingly laughs it off. Then becomes more serious.
elements.text_zh: Corbin耸耸肩笑了下，随后又认真起来。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Maybe don’t do that anymore.
elements.text_zh: 下次别这么吓我了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My bad. You want to walk me over to the town square.
elements.text_zh: 我的错。要陪我走去广场吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie and Corbin arrive in the town square near the coffee shop.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Corbin走到咖啡店附近的广场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is the spot. Jax and Candy aren’t here yet.
elements.text_zh: 就是这儿。Jax和Candy还没到。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: I was watching you with Gabe yesterday.
elements.text_zh: 我昨天看到你和Gabe在一起。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: He was cheering you on during the pool challenge.
elements.text_zh: 他在泳池对抗赛时一直给你加油。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, he was.
elements.text_zh: 是的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Where is he going with this?
elements.text_zh: 他想表达什么？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You two might have something real. A future together.
elements.text_zh: 你们也许是认真的，甚至有未来。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You should give it a chance.
elements.text_zh: 你可以给这段关系一个机会。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: If it works out and you're happy. I think that would be great.
elements.text_zh: 如果顺利、你也开心，我觉得那很好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh my. How sweet. What do I say?
elements.text_zh: 天啊……好贴心。我该怎么回？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Jax and Candy are here. See you around.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Candy到了。回头见。

elements.text_en: Roxie is speechless as Corbin quickly walks away.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一时说不出话，看着Corbin快步离开。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax are at the restaurant bar before Roxie’s lunch date with Lance.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax在餐厅吧台等着，Roxie待会要和Lance午餐见面。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You doing okay, Roxie? You seemed a bit out of sorts at the coffee shop.
elements.text_zh: 你还好吗，Roxie？刚在咖啡店你看起来有点心不在焉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m fine. Sorting out some of my recent man-drama.
elements.text_zh: 我没事，就是在理清最近的感情小插曲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Now this lunch date with Lance.
elements.text_zh: 现在又要和Lance吃午饭。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not sure what he wants, we traded text messages about meeting.
elements.text_zh: 不太确定他想聊什么，就只是发消息约了见面。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Are you all sorted? Male-drama-wise.
elements.text_zh: 那你都理顺了吗？关于“感情那点事”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not really. Corbin threw me a real twist before the coffee shop.
elements.text_zh: 还没有。咖啡店之前，Corbin突然说了些出乎意料的话。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You mentioned you ran into him; he do something to tick you off?
elements.text_zh: 你说你碰到他了，他惹你不高兴了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not just the opposite, a bit surprising.
elements.text_zh: 恰恰相反，有点意外。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I should keep it between him and me for now.
elements.text_zh: 我暂时想先保留在我们之间。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was really sweet.
elements.text_zh: 还挺暖心的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Corbin, sweet? Interesting.
elements.text_zh: Corbin会“暖心”？有意思。

elements.text_en: Jax has some unsettling news about Raven’s rumors.
elements.text_zh: Jax 带来了关于 Raven 那些传闻的坏消息。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We have had a few inquiries about these rumors.
elements.text_zh: 关于那些传闻，我们找圈内人打听过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve been meaning to ask you.
elements.text_zh: 我正想问你这件事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was hoping Raven was making it up. Yanking my chain.
elements.text_zh: 我还以为Raven是在胡编乱造，拿我开玩笑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What did they say about me?
elements.text_zh: 他们到底怎么说我的？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The specifics aren’t important. You don’t need to worry.
elements.text_zh: 细节不重要，你不用太担心。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I never heard of these bloggers calling themselves reporters.
elements.text_zh: 那些自称记者的博主，我以前都没听过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They have websites, supposedly they have subscribers.
elements.text_zh: 有自己的网站，还说有不少订阅者。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Send me the links. I want to check them out.
elements.text_zh: 把链接发我，我想自己看看。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Don’t do that. They aren’t real reporters. It's crap and poorly written.
elements.text_zh: 别点进去。他们根本不专业，内容又烂又离谱。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I sent emails with mild threats. Our lawyers gave me some language.
elements.text_zh: 我已经发邮件警告过了，用的是律师给的措辞。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Could Raven be behind this?
elements.text_zh: 会不会是Raven在背后搞鬼？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Could be. Hard thing to prove. For now, it’s just a nuisance.
elements.text_zh: 有这个可能，但很难抓到证据，目前只是小骚扰。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We will keep an eye on it.
elements.text_zh: 我们会继续盯着这件事。

elements.text_en: Jax shifts the conversation back to Roxie and her men.
elements.text_zh: 话题又回到了Roxie和那些男人身上。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Getting back to you and your army of admirers.
elements.text_zh: 说回你和你那一堆追求者。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I got to say, I’ve been impressed with Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 我得承认，我对Gabe有点改观。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Ever since you two talked at the balloon launch area.
elements.text_zh: 从你们在热气球那边聊完之后开始的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I know you were holding back from me and Candy.
elements.text_zh: 我知道你对我和Candy还有所保留。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, there was more to it. I love Candy, but she is a chatterbox.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，其实还有些没说的。Candy人挺好的，但有点大嘴巴。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was a bit off balance by what Gabe told me.
elements.text_zh: Gabe说的那些话让我有点乱。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He wants to get back together, right?
elements.text_zh: 他是想跟你复合吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, but that stays with me and you.
elements.text_zh: 是，不过这事我俩知道就行了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: How did you leave it?
elements.text_zh: 你们最后怎么收尾的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A big fat maybe. Not yes, not no.
elements.text_zh: 就是个很大的“也许”。既没答应，也没拒绝。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re seeing how he behaves?
elements.text_zh: 你想看看他后续的表现？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I guess so. Actions speak louder than words.
elements.text_zh: 大概吧。说到不如做到。

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie continue chatting.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Roxie继续聊天。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What do you think? Closer to a yes or no?
elements.text_zh: 你自己觉得呢？更偏向答应，还是拒绝？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not sure.
elements.text_zh: 我也说不好。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Like I said, he seems really committed. My view from the sidelines.
elements.text_zh: 但说真的，至少我这个旁观者看来，他挺认真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was really touched by his support at the pool competition.
elements.text_zh: 泳池比赛那次，他无条件支持我，对他来说很难得。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Cheering me on while I was riding on another man's shoulders.
elements.text_zh: 我和Lance参加泳池挑战，他给我加油。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He stood tall when I gave Lance a hug and a kiss.
elements.text_zh: 我们后来赢了，高兴得拥抱亲吻庆祝。他有点吃醋但没有失态。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, he did.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，他确实挺沉得住气。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax go quiet for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Roxie沉默了几秒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You know about the ‘are you the one’ moment with Archer.
elements.text_zh: 之前Archer有问过我，我们彼此会不会“是对的那个人”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think Gabe is saying the same thing to me.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉Gabe现在也在对我说同样的话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s flattering. I don’t want to hurt either one of them.
elements.text_zh: 被这样对待，其实挺让人动摇的。可我也不想伤到他们任何一个。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, I get what you’re saying.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我懂你的纠结。

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie continue chatting.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Roxie继续聊着。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re not sure what to do.
elements.text_zh: 我是真的不知道该怎么选。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Speaking of Archer, isn’t that him in that booth?
elements.text_zh: 说到Archer……你看那边卡座是不是他？

elements.text_en: Roxie sees Archer with a drop-dead gorgeous woman.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看到Archer正和一个美到惊艳的女人坐在一起。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, they seem to be very friendly.
elements.text_zh: 是他……而且他们……还挺亲密的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That chick is cover-girl beautiful. Like a fashion model.
elements.text_zh: 那女人美得像杂志封面模特。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, and they aren’t afraid to touch each other.
elements.text_zh: 而且两个人肢体接触也太自然了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They could just be old friends.
elements.text_zh: 也可能只是关系很好的朋友。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s not old. Maybe four or five years younger.
elements.text_zh: 她看着一点都不“老朋友”，顶多比我小几岁。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m a conceited idiot, saying I’m the one for two guys.
elements.text_zh: 我还觉得他俩都在跟我告白。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How could I be so arrogant?
elements.text_zh: 是不是太自恋了啊我。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Don’t beat yourself up. Don’t jump to conclusions.
elements.text_zh: 先别脑补，别急着下结论。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not jumping. She’s beautiful, and they are clearly very close.
elements.text_zh: 她确实漂亮，他们也确实很亲近。很难不这么想。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A past lover coming back into his life.
elements.text_zh: 像是Archer的某个前女友回来找他了。

elements.text_en: Jax continues to offer support.
elements.text_zh: Jax继续安慰Roxie。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s a leap. Could be a work colleague.
elements.text_zh: 会不会是你脑洞开太大了，也可能只是同事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: A business lunch.
elements.text_zh: 一个商务午餐而已。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, right. That’s pleasure, not business.
elements.text_zh: 拜托，那明显是约会，不是工作。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Looks like they spotted us. They are headed this way.
elements.text_zh: 他们好像注意到我们了，正往这边走。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s going to parade her in front of me.
elements.text_zh: 他这是要把她带过来给我看。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They finished eating. He probably figured we saw them.
elements.text_zh: 他们已经吃完了，估计也知道我们看见了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Be friendly. Real nonchalant.
elements.text_zh: 放轻松点，表现得自然一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, play it cool. Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Jax说得对，冷静点。

elements.text_en: Roxie braces as the attractive couple stops to chat.
elements.text_zh: 那对颜值超高的男女停下来寒暄，Roxie整个人放松不了一点。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Roxie. I’m so glad you’re here. This is my sister, Caroline.
elements.text_zh: 太好了，Roxie，你也在。这是我妹妹，Caroline。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Just here for the day, a business trip.
elements.text_zh: 她就来一天，顺便出个差。

elements.name: Caroline
elements.text_en: The incredible Roxie. I’ve heard a lot about you.
elements.text_zh: 原来你就是Roxie，我早就听说你了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sister? She knows about me.
elements.text_zh: 妹妹？他妹妹居然知道我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So nice to meet you.
elements.text_zh: 原来是Archer妹妹啊，幸会。

elements.text_en: Archer and his sister leave after a short chat.
elements.text_zh: Archer和妹妹简单寒暄几句后就离开了。

elements.text_en: Jax giggles after Archer and his sister leave.
elements.text_zh: 他们离开后，Jax忍不住笑了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You should have seen your face, girl.
elements.text_zh: 你刚才的表情你自己都该看看。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Shocked, happy, and confused all at once when he said sister.
elements.text_zh: 他说是妹妹那一刻，你又震惊又开心又懵。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Archer is a sly dude.
elements.text_zh: Archer这人啊，心眼挺多。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Making up that sister cover story for his secret lover.
elements.text_zh: 说不定“妹妹”就是挡箭牌。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What, really?
elements.text_zh: 什么啊？真的假的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re messing with me. Not funny.
elements.text_zh: 你别逗我，这一点都不好笑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Okay, sorry. It was funny.
elements.text_zh: 好啦好啦，收回。我觉得确实有点好笑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Maybe not so much for you.
elements.text_zh: 对你来说可能不太好笑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Archer’s sister knows about the incredible Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 不过他妹妹都知道你。还知道“很多关于你的事”

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Good possibility he thinks you are the one.
elements.text_zh: 很有可能他觉得你就是对的那个人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t pile on. Lance is going to be here soon.
elements.text_zh: 别再添油加醋了，Lance马上就到了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Okay. I’ve got some shopping and errands.
elements.text_zh: 行吧，我先去逛逛，顺便办点事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll send you a text when lunch is over. Come back around.
elements.text_zh: 午饭结束我给你发消息，你再回来这里找我哈。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sure. I’m curious to hear what Lance wants.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，我也想看看Lance今天要搞什么。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: A lot of couples get engaged here. Maybe Lance is making a move.
elements.text_zh: 这地方可是求婚圣地，没准他要放大招。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re so funny today.
elements.text_zh: Jax你天有点焉儿坏诶。

elements.text_en: Lance and Roxie are seated in a booth with great views of the ocean.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Roxie坐在包厢里，窗外是壮观的海景。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: My first time in this restaurant, it’s nice.
elements.text_zh: 我第一次来这家餐厅，还挺有格调的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You were kind of mysterious in your text messages.
elements.text_zh: 你短信发得神神秘秘的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is there some sort of problem? Between us?
elements.text_zh: 我们之间……是不是有啥事儿？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The opposite. This is a great place to pop the question.
elements.text_zh: 没有啦，我就觉得，这地方适合聊点重要的事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’ve been thinking about this. I expect an answer, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我想很久了，想听你表个态。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s asking me to marry him. Now!
elements.text_zh: 他不会是要跟我求婚吧？现在？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pop the question! You can’t be serious.
elements.text_zh: 在这说这个？你认真的吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’m serious. Do you prefer shrimp or lobster?
elements.text_zh: 我认真的。我就想问，你爱吃虾还是龙虾？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Very funny. I like both, but I prefer shrimp.
elements.text_zh: 喂！你真逗，故意的吧！我都喜欢，但更喜欢虾。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Seriously, any special reason for getting together?
elements.text_zh: 别贫啦，你约我出来到底啥事儿啊？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Just a chance for us to get together and talk. Some fun alone time.
elements.text_zh: 就想单独吃顿饭，慢慢聊聊。难得清净相处一下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: How’s that sound?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得怎么样嘛？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds great.
elements.text_zh: 挺好的呀。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Remember the women you were fawning over when we first got there.
elements.text_zh: 还记得脱衣舞俱乐部的那一晚，你盯着那些女人看的样子吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Doesn’t sound like me.
elements.text_zh: 哪有的事儿？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Four hot babes spilling out of their mini-skirts.
elements.text_zh: 四个穿迷你裙的辣妹，一起晃出来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Not ringing any bells.
elements.text_zh: 完全没印象。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I remember you getting all worked up.
elements.text_zh: 我还记得一个，你当时挺上头的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Over some dude with a spiky crew cut.
elements.text_zh: 还对着一个留着刺猬头的男人在哪疯狂尖叫。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t think so.
elements.text_zh: 哎唷，怎么可能。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That night was a blast.
elements.text_zh: 那晚是真的好玩。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You did bring down the house.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，你一出场，把全场都点燃了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You had women throwing money at you.
elements.text_zh: 你也很厉害啊，身边全是观众丢的钱。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Everyday thing for me.
elements.text_zh: 正常，正常。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You know my favorite part?
elements.text_zh: 你知道我最喜欢哪一段吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Other than me, pole dancing? Not sure.
elements.text_zh: 我那段？Candy那段？还有别的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Orwell’s cavewomen strippers.
elements.text_zh: 是Orwell那套“原始人审美”的胡说八道。

elements.text_en: Lance laughs as Roxie retells Orwell’s theory.
elements.text_zh: Lance笑着听Roxie复述奥威尔的那套理论。

elements.text_en: Roxie reacts to Lance's version of the Casino stalker.
elements.text_zh: Roxie听Lance讲赌场跟踪狂那次，Lance视角的事情经过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Your and Corbin’s faces when the security manager got there.
elements.text_zh: 你和Corbin那表情，我到现在还记得。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The two of you on top of that guy, and you hear he’s a security guard.
elements.text_zh: 你们俩压在那个人身上，结果发现对方是安保人员。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, not our finest moment.
elements.text_zh: 大型翻车现场啊真是。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This has been so much fun. The food was great.
elements.text_zh: 今天真的太开心了。菜也很好吃。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m so glad we did this.
elements.text_zh: 我很高兴我们出来吃这一顿。

elements.text_en: Roxie sees Lance’s expression change.
elements.text_zh: Roxie注意到Lance的表情忽然变了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: There is something else I wanted to talk about.
elements.text_zh: 其实……我还有件事想说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Looks like something serious?
elements.text_zh: 什么事？还挺严肃的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It’s something I need to say.
elements.text_zh: 有些话，不说我心里过不去。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I gave Gabe some grief since he’s been here.
elements.text_zh: 这段时间我对Gabe确实有点过分。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I really felt sorry for the nose and volleyball.
elements.text_zh: 不管是撞到他，还是排球那次，现在想想，都挺不好意思的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s no big deal. That’s what you wanted to talk about.
elements.text_zh: 那不算什么吧，你就是想说这个？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No, that’s not it.
elements.text_zh: 不，不是这个。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I think the world of you, Roxie. I want you to be happy.
elements.text_zh: 我是真的很在乎你，Roxie。我希望你能过得开心。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Seems to me that Gabe could be the person to make you happy.
elements.text_zh: 而且说实话，Gabe也许可以给你幸福。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I won’t cause any problems for you two.
elements.text_zh: 我不会给你们添任何麻烦。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. Just like Corbin. He’s melting my heart.
elements.text_zh: 哇……跟Corbin的意思差不多。他这句话真的戳到我了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Be careful what you say. Don’t ruin the moment.
elements.text_zh: 你突然这么说，我还

elements.text_en: Roxie pauses before saying anything.
elements.text_zh: Roxie停顿了一下，才慢慢开口。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They believe what Candy told them about me and Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 他们真的信了Candy说的那些关于我和Gabe的话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That means the world to me, Lance.
elements.text_zh: Lance，要跟谁在一起这种事情，真的很重要。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We haven’t made any final decisions.
elements.text_zh: 我和Gabe，怎么会轻易就决定复合呢？

elements.text_en: Corbin parachutes in at an awkward moment. Lance keeps things light.
elements.text_zh: Corbin在这个略显尴尬的时刻突然出现，Lance立刻把气氛往轻松的方向带。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Saw you guys from the bar.
elements.text_zh: 我刚在吧台那边看见你们了。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You hanging with this loser, Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 你居然跟他待一块儿？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We were telling stories about the Casino night.
elements.text_zh: 我们在聊赌场那晚的事。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: That was all your fault, dude.
elements.text_zh: 那事本来就是这货惹出来的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That was all on you. Roxie, I’m going to take off now.
elements.text_zh: 少来，明明是你。算了，不说这个了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I’ll pay the bill on the way out.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，我先走了。账我出去的时候结。

elements.text_en: Lance kisses Roxie on the cheek.
elements.text_zh: Lance在Roxie脸颊上轻轻一吻。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: It was great catching up.
elements.text_zh: 很高兴和你这样聊天。

elements.text_en: Roxie thinks things over as Jax arrives.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一边等Jax来，一边理着思绪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What an afternoon. Archer and his sister.
elements.text_zh: 这个下午可真不简单。先是Archer和他的妹妹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance drops his bombshell on me.
elements.text_zh: Lance突然丢给我这么一颗炸弹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Same sweet message from Corbin a couple of days ago.
elements.text_zh: 几天前，Corbin也说了同样温柔的话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Two great guys giving me some emotional space.
elements.text_zh: 两个很棒的男人，主动给了我情绪空间。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey, Roxie. What happened with Lance?
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Roxie。你和Lance聊得怎么样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He popped the question.
elements.text_zh: 他“求婚”了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Oh my God! I was joking. What did you do?
elements.text_zh: 天哪！我刚才还是开玩笑的。你怎么回应的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, it’s obvious. I prefer shrimp.
elements.text_zh: 很明显。我更喜欢虾。

elements.text_en: Roxie explains the joke and then tells Jax about both men giving her space.
elements.text_zh: Roxie解释了这个玩笑，也跟Jax说了两个人都选择退后一步的事。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Wow. They both did that.
elements.text_zh: 哇，他们俩都这么做了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Those two guys must really . . .
elements.text_zh: 那两个男人一定真的……

elements.text_en: Roxie interrupts Jax.
elements.text_zh: Roxie打断Jax。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You better not say the L word. Don’t do that to me.
elements.text_zh: 别那样对我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve got enough to think about.
elements.text_zh: 我已经有够多要想的了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s talk about something else. Not related to relationships.
elements.text_zh: 换个话题吧。不要再聊感情了。

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie are quiet for several moments.
elements.text_zh: 两人都沉默了片刻。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I got another angle on the nasty rumors.
elements.text_zh: 话说，我突然想到一件事儿，是关于那些恶意传闻的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: More reporters called, already.
elements.text_zh: 又有记者打来电话了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: In the last few hours!
elements.text_zh: 就在刚刚这几个小时？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No, sweetie, no new contacts. Something that happened yesterday.
elements.text_zh: 没有，亲爱的，没有新的联系。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I forgot about it when we met earlier.
elements.text_zh: 是昨天发生的一件事，我之前忘了说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Corbin asked me if reporters were calling about negative allegations.
elements.text_zh: Corbin问我，有没有记者因为负面指控联系过节目组。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I mentioned it to him when I ran into him at the monument.
elements.text_zh: 我在纪念碑那边碰到他时跟他说过这事儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I left it vague. What did you tell him?
elements.text_zh: 不过比较含糊。你怎么跟他说的？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I had to tell him the truth. He wanted to know if he could help.
elements.text_zh: 我只能告诉他实情。他想知道自己能不能帮忙。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I told him we had it covered. He didn’t push me.
elements.text_zh: 我跟他说我们已经处理好了。他也没有再追问。

elements.text_en: Corbin calls his attorney from his mobile on the street outside the restaurant.
elements.text_zh: Corbin在餐厅外的街上，用手机给律师打电话。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Make sure you follow up on those websites. I want them shut down.
elements.text_zh: 一定要跟进那些网站。要么关掉它们。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Or those stories taken down, ASAP.
elements.text_zh: 要么立刻把那些报道撤掉。我说的是立刻！

elements.text_en: Jax and Roxie meet a few days later, before a shoot.
elements.text_zh: 几天后，在拍摄前Jax和Roxie见面了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Thanks for meeting me early.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你这么早来见我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Something urgent?
elements.text_zh: 有什么急事吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. Just wanted to talk.
elements.text_zh: 没有。只是想聊聊。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I spent a lot of time with Gabe the last couple of days.
elements.text_zh: 这几天我和Gabe相处了很多时间。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s what you want to talk about?
elements.text_zh: 所以你想聊这个？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Your romantic advisor and counselor.
elements.text_zh: 跟你的恋爱顾问兼心理医生。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m sorry, you're sick of hearing about it.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我知道你已经听烦了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No! Roxie. I was teasing.
elements.text_zh: 没有！Roxie。我是在开玩笑。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We’ve been friends for a long time.
elements.text_zh: 我们做朋友这么久了，你快说吧没事儿。

elements.text_en: I’ve leaned on you many times.
elements.text_zh: 我也多次依靠过你。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You're sure.
elements.text_zh: 你确定愿意听？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, so you’ve made a decision?
elements.text_zh: 没事说吧，你做决定了吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie sighs and then explains.
elements.text_zh: Roxie叹了口气，然后解释。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This time with Gabe has been great.
elements.text_zh: 这次和Gabe相处，其实挺好的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A few times, I’ve been ready to go for it.
elements.text_zh: 有好几次，我都准备豁出去了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then I think of Lance giving me some space.
elements.text_zh: 然后我又想到Lance给了我空间。

elements.text_en: Roxie pauses for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Roxie停顿了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think of Archer. Then Corbin and Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 然后又想到Archer，再到Corbin和Orwell。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sounds like you're spinning in circles.
elements.text_zh: 听起来是你在兜圈子。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sorry, girlfriend don’t know what to tell you.
elements.text_zh: 说实话，姐妹，我也给不了你答案。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re going to have to sort through this more.
elements.text_zh: 这事只能你自己慢慢捋清楚。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Speaking of Corbin, he isn’t doing this shoot with you.
elements.text_zh: 对了，说到Corbin，他这组不跟你拍了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: This morning, he asked me to put Gabe in the spot.
elements.text_zh: 今天早上他找我，把位置让给了Gabe。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I called Gabe, and he agreed.
elements.text_zh: 我给Gabe打了电话，他也答应了。

elements.text_en: Jax gets a text message.
elements.text_zh: Jax手机响了一下。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’ve got to run back to the villa. You know my assistant, Margie.
elements.text_zh: 我得先回趟别墅。你认识我助理Margie吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She will brief you on the shoot after the crew gets here.
elements.text_zh: 等剧组到齐，她会跟你对拍摄流程。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’ll be back. Not sure how long. A dispute about catering bills.
elements.text_zh: 我晚点回来，时间不一定，餐饮报账那块有点事要处理。

elements.text_en: Gabe arrives moments after Jax leaves.
elements.text_zh: Jax刚走，Gabe就到了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hey, Rox. Guess you heard I’m stepping in for Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 嘿，Rox。你应该听说我顶替Corbin了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, Jax just left. Her assistant, Margie, is running things.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，Jax刚走，现在是她助理Margie在盯着。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What kind of shoot is it? Something with pottery?
elements.text_zh: 这次拍什么？跟陶艺有关？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t know. The crew just got here.
elements.text_zh: 我也不清楚，剧组才刚到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Margie’s busy with them doing setup.
elements.text_zh: Margie正忙着和他们一起布置。

elements.text_en: They walk around the shop looking at pottery.
elements.text_zh: 他们在店里四处看着陶器。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This place reminds me of that small shop in the mountains.
elements.text_zh: 这地方让我想起山里的那家小店。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: When we stayed in that cabin, the summer before law school.
elements.text_zh: 法学院前那个夏天，我们住过的小木屋。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Cooking on the outside firepit.
elements.text_zh: 在外面用火坑做饭。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We sat on that picnic table every night. Looking at the stars.
elements.text_zh: 每天晚上坐在野餐桌旁看星星。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hiking every day. What a great time.
elements.text_zh: 每天去徒步，那段日子真好。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: My favorite thing was the showers.
elements.text_zh: 我最怀念的，其实是那里的淋浴。

elements.text_en: Roxie laughs, shaking her head.
elements.text_zh: Roxie笑着摇了摇头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We had to hand pump the water.
elements.text_zh: 那会儿得手摇打水。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pour buckets over each for a shower.
elements.text_zh: 拿桶互相往身上浇着洗。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: A great view while we rubbed each other down.
elements.text_zh: 一边搓洗，一边看风景。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Toweled each other off. Great showers.
elements.text_zh: 再用毛巾擦干。那段洗澡记忆挺深的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That water was cold.
elements.text_zh: 水是真的冷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Your little man kind of shrank.
elements.text_zh: 冷到你那都缩水了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Nothing funny about cold water shrinkage.
elements.text_zh: 冷水导致缩水没什么好笑的嘛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That big stone fireplace in the evenings, to break the chill.
elements.text_zh: 晚上靠那座大石壁炉驱寒。

elements.text_en: Roxie recalls the intense lovemaking on blankets in front of the fire.
elements.text_zh: Roxie想起壁炉前，铺着毯子，还有那段亲密时刻。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’re blushing, babe.
elements.text_zh: 你脸都红了，宝贝。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: No shrinkage on those blankets was there?
elements.text_zh: 在那些毯子上可没有缩水，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Definitely not.
elements.text_zh: 当然没有。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I was thinking of roasting marshmallows in the fireplace.
elements.text_zh: 我是在想，我们在壁炉里烤棉花糖。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You remember we collected all sorts of colored stones along the trails.
elements.text_zh: 你还记得我们沿着小路捡过各种彩色石头吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I kept them in a glass jar.
elements.text_zh: 记得。我把它们装在一个玻璃罐里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Until, well, you know.
elements.text_zh: 只可惜后来……哎。

elements.text_en: They go quiet with the memory of Roxie breaking the jar when they broke up.
elements.text_zh: 他们回忆起分手时Roxie打碎玻璃罐，一时沉默。

elements.text_en: Gabe pulls out his mobile phone and shows Roxie a picture.
elements.text_zh: Gabe拿出手机，给Roxie看了一张照片。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s a really beautiful vase. A lot nicer than the usual souvenir shops.
elements.text_zh: 这花瓶真漂亮。比纪念品店里的好多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why are you showing me that? Did you buy it?
elements.text_zh: 你给我看这个干嘛？你买的？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Not exactly. I had it made for you.
elements.text_zh: 不完全是。我给你定制的。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: All the shells, beach pebbles, sand dollars, and starfish.
elements.text_zh: 贝壳、卵石、沙钱和海星都用上了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’ve been collecting since you got here.
elements.text_zh: 你记得吗，都是你来到这儿后收集的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t realize it’s gone. You took the box from my place.
elements.text_zh: 嘿！难怪不见了。原来是你从我那儿把盒子顺走啦！

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I found the best mix and had the vase made.
elements.text_zh: 我挑了最好的搭配，让人做成了花瓶。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There are words etched into the glass?
elements.text_zh: 上面还刻了字？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie’s Island Treasure. Do not break.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的岛屿珍宝。请勿打碎。

elements.text_en: Margie interrupts the tender moment.
elements.text_zh: Margie打断了这温柔的一刻。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: You two ready to get briefed?
elements.text_zh: 嗨！两位准备好了吗？给你们说下拍摄流程噢。

elements.text_en: Roxie stares at Margie when she finishes describing the setup.
elements.text_zh: Roxie听完后盯着Margie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Are you kidding?
elements.text_zh: 你在开玩笑吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: One of the most romantic movie scenes ever.
elements.text_zh: 电影史上最浪漫的场景之一。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You expect us to try and recreate that?
elements.text_zh: 你指望我们复刻那个？

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: Well, yeah. That’s the general idea.
elements.text_zh: 是的，大概就是这个意思。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Maybe it will work.
elements.text_zh: 也许能行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You good with a pottery wheel, bud?
elements.text_zh: 你玩过拉坯吗，兄弟？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A ceramics wizard?
elements.text_zh: 陶艺大师？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I don’t think they are looking to sell our vases or pots.
elements.text_zh: 做出来的东西不需要很专业，毕竟又不会拿去卖钱对吧？

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: He’s right, the shared experience is what we want to capture.
elements.text_zh: 他说得对。重点是捕捉到你们的共同体验。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: You two seem to have a good vibe.
elements.text_zh: 你们俩的感觉很好。拍出来应该效果不错的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay, I’m game.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。我OK。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t blame me if we waste a lot of clay and camera time.
elements.text_zh: 要是我们浪费了很多黏土和机位，别怪我。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: The owner agreed to give you a quick tutorial. Then we roll cameras.
elements.text_zh: 店主会先简单教你们一下。然后才开机。

elements.text_en: Margie calls for the cameras to roll again, nearly two hours later.
elements.text_zh: 将近两小时后，Margie才再次喊开机。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: Roxie, no more cursing or cackling like that last take.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，刚才那条别再骂骂咧咧，也别笑成那样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That last hunk of clay looked just like a guy’s... you know.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那团黏土，真的有点像个……你懂的。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: Keep rolling.
elements.text_zh: 继续拍。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m getting the hang of this.
elements.text_zh: 我好像慢慢找到手感了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. That’s looking like something. Good job, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，开始有样子了。干得不错，Gabe。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Give me your hands. Up and down, slowly.
elements.text_zh: 把手给我。上下，慢一点。

elements.text_en: After a few minutes, he whispers in her ear. ‘I’m the clay.’
elements.text_zh: 过了几分钟，他贴近她耳边，小声说了一句什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh, wow. Oh my.
elements.text_zh: 天哪……他这是。

elements.text_en: She feels his body pressing against her from behind.
elements.text_zh: 她感觉到他从背后靠了过来。

elements.text_en: He whispers as he kisses her neck, “I love you.”
elements.text_zh: 他在她耳边低声说了一句：“我爱你。”

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: Stop cameras. That was an awesome take.
elements.text_zh: 停机。这条太好了。

elements.name: Margie
elements.text_en: With some of the fun stuff and this, we got what we need.
elements.text_zh: 加上前面那些，我们已经拍到需要的了。

elements.text_en: Gabe has an urgent call moments after they wrap the shoot.
elements.text_zh: 拍摄结束后不久，Gabe接到一个紧急电话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m done thinking about this. I love him. I’m ready to tell him.
elements.text_zh: 我不想再纠结了。我爱他，我准备告诉他。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie. This is a really urgent call. Give me a few minutes, okay?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，这个电话真的很急，给我几分钟，好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure thing, babe. Take your time.
elements.text_zh: 当然，宝贝，你慢慢来。

elements.text_en: Moments later, Jax arrives.
elements.text_zh: 没过一会儿，Jax赶到了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hi, Roxie. Margie says the shoot went well.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Roxie。Margie说拍得很顺利。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was great. I got lost in the moment, to be honest.
elements.text_zh: 很顺利，说实话，我完全沉浸进去了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He whispered in my ear that he loved me.
elements.text_zh: 他在我耳边低声说他爱我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I could feel the sincerity. It was magical, Jax. It really was.
elements.text_zh: 我能感觉到那是真的，Jax，那一刻太美了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m ready to tell him. I love him, and I want to give this a chance.
elements.text_zh: 我准备告诉他了。我爱他，我想给我们一个机会。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you hear me? Aren’t you happy?
elements.text_zh: 你听见了吗？你不替我高兴吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why are you staring at me like that?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么这样看着我？

elements.text_en: Jax stares at Roxie but doesn’t answer.
elements.text_zh: Jax只是看着Roxie，没有回答。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s wrong, Jax? Is your mother okay? You said it was just the flu.
elements.text_zh: 怎么了，Jax？你妈妈还好吗？不是说只是流感吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: My mother is fine. Something came up at the villa.
elements.text_zh: 我妈没事。是别墅那边出了点情况。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The catering dispute? You deal with that kind of stuff all the time.
elements.text_zh: 餐饮招待费的事儿？你不是经常处理这些吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Not that either. I don’t know what it means.
elements.text_zh: 也不是那个。我现在也说不清。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Where’s Gabe?
elements.text_zh: Gabe人呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s on a phone call with work. Sounded like it might take some time.
elements.text_zh: 他在打工作电话，听着一时半会儿结束不了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I was talking to a guy on the crew just before heading back here.
elements.text_zh: 我刚才回来的路上，跟剧组一个人聊了几句。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I mentioned that you and Gabe were shooting today.
elements.text_zh: 我提到你今天和Gabe一起拍。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He said he heard you two were kind of an item.
elements.text_zh: 他说听说你们俩好像在一起了。

elements.text_en: Jax goes quiet for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Jax沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He talked about the first time he saw Gabe on the island.
elements.text_zh: 他说起第一次在岛上见到Gabe。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He was helping the villa staff with the outside perimeter lighting.
elements.text_zh: 那天他在帮别墅员工弄外围照明。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Gabe seemed to be hanging around outside. Watching.
elements.text_zh: Gabe好像一直在外面转，盯着什么看。

elements.text_en: Jax continues to explain.
elements.text_zh: Jax继续往下说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The villa staff guy he was working with was there today.
elements.text_zh: 跟他一起弄照明的那个别墅员工，今天也在。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He swore that it was Gabe. Exact same story.
elements.text_zh: 他也很确定就是Gabe，说法也都一模一样。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, so. What’s the big deal? When was this?
elements.text_zh: 那又怎样？这有什么问题？什么时候的事？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: The night of the get-to-know-you party when you first got here.
elements.text_zh: 你刚到岛上那晚，第一次互相认识的派对。

elements.text_en: Roxie flashes back. A man outside her room that night.
elements.text_zh: 那天晚上，房间外有个男人的画面突然闪过她的脑海。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: What’s wrong?
elements.text_zh: 怎么了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I saw Gabe’s face outside my room that night. Meeting me, maybe?
elements.text_zh: 那晚我在房间外看到过Gabe的脸。也许是来找我？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You’re not saying he’s the guy in your room.
elements.text_zh: 你不是在说，进你房间的那个人是他吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t know. Maybe?
elements.text_zh: 我不知道……也许是？

elements.text_en: Roxie goes quiet for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Roxie安静了片刻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know Gabe. It can’t be him.
elements.text_zh: 我了解Gabe，不可能是他。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: But he was there. He might have seen something.
elements.text_zh: 但他确实在那儿，也许他看到了什么。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: We need to figure out why he never mentioned being on the island.
elements.text_zh: 我们得弄清楚，他为什么从没说过来过岛上。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Why was he here? Why hasn’t he mentioned it before?
elements.text_zh: 他为什么会在这儿？为什么之前一句没提？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: It’s weird.
elements.text_zh: 这事很怪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, that bothers me. I can’t imagine.
elements.text_zh: 是的，这让我很不安。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Let me ask him. Not like I’m accusing him of anything.
elements.text_zh: 我来问他。不是要指责什么。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Tell him what I heard today. Just play along, okay.
elements.text_zh: 就把我今天听到的说出来看他怎么说，你配合一下，好吗？

elements.text_en: Gabe returns moments later.
elements.text_zh: Gabe过了一会儿回来了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sorry, the call went a little longer than I expected.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，电话比我想的久。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Hi, Jax. I guess Roxie told you. The pottery wheel shoot went great.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Jax。拍摄很顺利。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What’s going on? You two look like you got bad news.
elements.text_zh: 怎么了？你们俩脸色不太对。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Were surprised. I heard you came to the island once before.
elements.text_zh: 有点意外。我听人说你之前来过岛上。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Just about the time we started filming. There was a big party.
elements.text_zh: 就在我们刚开始拍的时候，那天组里还有个迎新大派对。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I wasn’t at any party. What’s this all about?
elements.text_zh: 我没参加过什么派对。这是怎么回事？

elements.text_en: Jax keeps pushing for answers.
elements.text_zh: Jax没有停下，继续追问。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: But you were on the island? You never mentioned that.
elements.text_zh: 但你来过岛上？怎么没听你提过这事。

elements.text_en: Gabe waves his hands in the air.
elements.text_zh: Gabe连连摆手。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I was here briefly before you started filming. Early one evening.
elements.text_zh: 你们开拍前我短暂来过一次。一个傍晚。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I didn’t see any party.
elements.text_zh: 我没看到任何派对。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why didn’t you ever mention this before?
elements.text_zh: 你为什么之前从没说过？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I should have. My ego got in the way.
elements.text_zh: 我应该说的，是我自尊心作祟。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I walked up to the fence outside the villa compound.
elements.text_zh: 我刚走到别墅区外的围栏那儿。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I got an urgent text message for work.
elements.text_zh: 就收到了工作的紧急短信。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I left on the same boat. Here less than an hour.
elements.text_zh: 我又坐同一艘船走了，前后不到一小时。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Not a strong endorsement for making you a priority.
elements.text_zh: 这确实不像把你放在第一位。所以我就没说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I saw you outside my room during the party. You saw me.
elements.text_zh: 派对那晚我在房间外看到你了，你也看到我了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Roxie, I didn’t see you. I wasn’t near your room or any party.
elements.text_zh: 不，我没看到你，没靠近你房间，也没去任何派对。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I need some time away from you. I need to think.
elements.text_zh: 我需要离你远一点，我得自己想清楚。

elements.text_en: Roxie walks away.
elements.text_zh: Roxie转身离开。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Why do you keep insisting you didn’t see the party?
elements.text_zh: 你为什么一直咬死说没去派对？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Two people say you were here. And Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 两个人说你来过这儿，还有Roxie也记得你来过。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: There was loud music and colored lights. A crowd of people.
elements.text_zh: 那晚音乐很吵，彩灯亮着，到处都是人。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: They have no reason to lie.
elements.text_zh: 他们没理由撒谎。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Maybe they saw me. They have the days mixed up.
elements.text_zh: 也许他们确实看到过我，只是记错了日子。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What’s the big deal? I was here before and kept it secret.
elements.text_zh: 这有什么大不了的？我来过却没对你们说。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: That was wrong. Why are you making a big deal about this party?
elements.text_zh: 我的确不该隐瞒。可你们为什么这么纠结那场派对？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Something happened to Roxie the night of the party.
elements.text_zh: 那晚Roxie出了点事。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What happened to Roxie?
elements.text_zh: 她怎么了？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m not sure what I should tell you.
elements.text_zh: 我不确定该告诉你多少。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You better tell me something, or I’m going to chase her down.
elements.text_zh: 你最好说点什么，不然我就去问她。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She blacked out in her room and almost no memory. That’s all I’m saying.
elements.text_zh: 她在房间里断片了，几乎没记忆。我只能说这些。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You two think I might have something to do with that?
elements.text_zh: 你们觉得这事跟我有关？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: No, not really.
elements.text_zh: 不是，真的不是。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Roxie says she saw you and you saw her that night.
elements.text_zh: Roxie说她看到你，你也看到她。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You say you didn’t see her. It doesn’t add up.
elements.text_zh: 可你说你没看到她，对不上。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I’m gonna prove I wasn’t at the party. Then we are gonna sort this out.
elements.text_zh: 我会证明那晚我没在派对上。然后我们把这事查清楚。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Orwell arrive at his villa early the next evening.
elements.text_zh: 第二天傍晚，Roxie和Orwell来到Orwell住的别墅。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow, Orwell. This is really nice.
elements.text_zh: 哇，Orwell，这地方真不错。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is he mega-rich?
elements.text_zh: 他是不是超级有钱？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is this your place?
elements.text_zh: 这是你住的地方？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I guess it is. A perk from my last recording deal.
elements.text_zh: 算是吧，上一次唱片合约的福利。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We’re really only custodians for these earthly places.
elements.text_zh: 我们只是这些尘世之地的看守人。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: In a millennium, it will turn to dust.
elements.text_zh: 再过一千年，这里都会化成尘土。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: But it’s a fun place to hang, for now.
elements.text_zh: 不过现在，这里用来消遣就还挺好。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Jax said you had a rough day yesterday.
elements.text_zh: Jax说你昨天过得不太顺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t want to talk about it.
elements.text_zh: 我不想聊这个。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m here if you need an ear. Not pushing.
elements.text_zh: 你如果想说，我愿意听你说。你不想也不勉强。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I just want to have some fun and hang out.
elements.text_zh: 我只想放松一下，随便玩玩。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I can dig that. Let’s try the game room.
elements.text_zh: 懂你，那我们去游戏室吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Lots of options for amusement and mirth.
elements.text_zh: 那儿的娱乐项目不少。

elements.text_en: Orwell and Roxie check out the game room.
elements.text_zh: Orwell和Roxie一起去了游戏室。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You weren’t exaggerating, lots of choices.
elements.text_zh: 你真没夸张，选择好多。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ve got the classics, ping-pong, air hockey, foosball, and such.
elements.text_zh: 经典的都有，乒乓球、空气曲棍球、桌上足球。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Over there, a mahjong table, and it's good for dominoes.
elements.text_zh: 那边是麻将桌，也能玩多米诺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A full-size billiards table. I like shooting pool.
elements.text_zh: 哇，还有标准台球桌，我喜欢打台球。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What’s in that corner?
elements.text_zh: 那个角落是什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Old school arcade video games.
elements.text_zh: 老式街机。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There’s a side room. What’s in there?
elements.text_zh: 旁边还有个小房间，里面是什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: State-of-the-art virtual reality gaming system.
elements.text_zh: 最新的VR游戏系统。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve never seen one. Can we check it out?
elements.text_zh: 我还真没见过，能看看吗？

elements.text_en: Orwell and Roxie stand in the medium-sized room.
elements.text_zh: Orwell和Roxie站在一间中等大小的房间里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s just an empty room?
elements.text_zh: 就是个空房间？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: So, you can move around.
elements.text_zh: 这样你玩的时候才能自由走动。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: There are seats on the back wall for sitting games.
elements.text_zh: 后墙有座椅，适合坐着玩的游戏。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: See the speakers built into the walls and ceiling.
elements.text_zh: 看到嵌在墙壁和天花板里的音响了吗。

elements.text_en: Orwell continues with his explanation.
elements.text_zh: Orwell继续解释。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Surround sound to immerse you.
elements.text_zh: 环绕音效，让你完全沉浸。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The VR headsets give you a 3D visual experience.
elements.text_zh: VR头显能带来三维视觉体验。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You forget you’re in a room. You’re in another world.
elements.text_zh: 你会忘记自己在房间里，仿佛进入另一个世界。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds like fun. What can we do?
elements.text_zh: 听起来挺好玩的。能玩什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Hundreds of choices. The console is in the back.
elements.text_zh: 选择可太多了，有好几百款。控制台在后面。

elements.text_en: They stand at the console as Orwell scrolls through choices.
elements.text_zh: 他们站在控制台前，Orwell翻看选项。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Fly a fighter jet or drive a race car. Other sitting games.
elements.text_zh: 能开战斗机、赛车，也有坐着玩的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Lots of sports options. Climbing mountains, exploring caves.
elements.text_zh: 运动类的很多，攀岩、探洞。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Old west shoot outs, shooting monsters . . .
elements.text_zh: 西部枪战、打怪物之类的……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Shooting monsters. What kind of monsters?
elements.text_zh: 打怪物？什么怪物？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We got zombies, alien invaders . . .
elements.text_zh: 有僵尸、外星入侵者……

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alien invaders. Let's take out some aliens.
elements.text_zh: 外星入侵者？就这个吧。

elements.text_en: Orwell explains the setup to Roxie, and they put on the headsets.
elements.text_zh: Orwell给Roxie讲解设置，两人戴上头显。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We talk to each other with these microphones. We’re a team.
elements.text_zh: 我们用麦克风交流。我们是一个队的。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: The system will tell you if you're getting close to a wall.
elements.text_zh: 系统会提醒你是否靠近墙壁。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m ready. Let’s lock and load.
elements.text_zh: 我准备好了。开打吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie just ‘shot’ Orwell with her laser gun.
elements.text_zh: Roxie刚用激光枪“打中”了Orwell。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Momacita! You shot me again.
elements.text_zh: 天哪！你又打中我了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sorry, partner, you got in my way.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉搭档，你挡路了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lookout! One of them is behind you.
elements.text_zh: 小心！有一个在你身后。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Be careful where you’re aiming.
elements.text_zh: 注意你的枪口方向。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Got you again. My bad.
elements.text_zh: 又打中你了，我的锅。

elements.text_en: They finish playing and take a break.
elements.text_zh: 游戏结束，两人停下来休息。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It was a blast. Pun intended.
elements.text_zh: 太爽了。真的爽。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I like alien shoot out. Up to four people can play together.
elements.text_zh: 我也喜欢这个外星射击，最多四人同玩。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It can get really wild.
elements.text_zh: 场面会很疯狂。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Let me show you the music room.
elements.text_zh: 我带你去看看音乐室。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Kind of a special place for me.
elements.text_zh: 对我来说算个特别的地方。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’ll get us some tea and some snacks.
elements.text_zh: 我去拿点茶和零食。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds good. Slow things down a bit after alien wars.
elements.text_zh: 听起来不错，外星大战后正好来点安静的。

elements.text_en: Orwell shows Roxie his favorite place in the villa.
elements.text_zh: Orwell带Roxie去了别墅里他最喜欢的地方。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This looks more like a music store.
elements.text_zh: 这地方更像一家乐器店。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You can’t play all of these instruments. Can you?
elements.text_zh: 这些乐器你不会全都会吧？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I can play everything in here, milady.
elements.text_zh: 你看到的我全都会，尊贵的女士。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: It comes natural to me. Since I was a wee child.
elements.text_zh: 对我来说是很自然的事儿。很小就会了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? That’s amazing.
elements.text_zh: 真的？太厉害了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: How about a quick musical tour?
elements.text_zh: 要不要来个简短的乐器串烧？

elements.text_en: Orwell picks up a series of instruments and plays a short piece on each.
elements.text_zh: Orwell拿起一件又一件乐器，每样都演奏了一小段。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: How about a classical vibe from the clarinet?
elements.text_zh: 先来点单簧管的古典风？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Maybe you’re digging the saxophone and some smooth jazz.
elements.text_zh: 也许你更喜欢萨克斯的柔滑爵士。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wow. Keep going.
elements.text_zh: 哇。继续。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Keyboards for some rock and roll.
elements.text_zh: 键盘适合演奏一段摇滚。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Country and western on the guitar.
elements.text_zh: 吉他适合弹点乡村西部风格的曲子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How about something soft on the piano?
elements.text_zh: 能不能来点温柔的钢琴曲？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I think I know the sound you’re looking for.
elements.text_zh: 那我知道你想听什么了。

elements.text_en: Roxie wakes up on a sofa in the music room.
elements.text_zh: Roxie在音乐室的沙发上醒来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did I fall asleep?
elements.text_zh: 我睡着了？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Just for about thirty minutes.
elements.text_zh: 大概三十分钟。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I figured a power nap would do you good.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得你需要小睡一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re really talented, Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 你真的很有才华，Orwell。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I feel so much better. I was tied up in knots when we got here.
elements.text_zh: 我感觉好多了，刚来时我整个人都拧着。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Offer stands if you want to chat.
elements.text_zh: 想聊的话，我一直在。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, thanks . . .Well, there is one thing.
elements.text_zh: 不用了……不过有一件事。

elements.text_en: Roxie tells Orwell about the rumors and asks for his views.
elements.text_zh: Roxie把传闻告诉了Orwell，也问了他的看法。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Yeah, I’ve heard some of the scuttlebutt.
elements.text_zh: 我也听到一些风声。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I didn’t see any reason to come to you.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得没必要来问你就没说什么。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Low-life bloggers. I heard that Jax was taking care of it.
elements.text_zh: 都是一些不入流的博主说的。我听说Jax也在处理了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You might be right about Raven being behind it.
elements.text_zh: 你怀疑Raven，我认为合理。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I think someone else around the show is also spreading this crap.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得节目里还有别人也在散布这些垃圾。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Any ideas about who that might be?
elements.text_zh: 你有怀疑对象吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Sorry. I got no suspects.
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我这暂时没有什么线索。

elements.text_en: Orwell answers a knock at the front door a short time later.
elements.text_zh: 不久后，有人敲门，Orwell去应门。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: We have some guests, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我们有客人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe? You brought him here, Jax . . .
elements.text_zh: Gabe？你把他带到这儿来了，Jax……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Calm down, Roxie. Listen to me.
elements.text_zh: 冷静点，Roxie。听我说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He was on the mainland the night of the party.
elements.text_zh: 派对那天晚上，他人的确不在岛上。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He tracked me down. He’s got a mountain of proof.
elements.text_zh: 他找到我，说是能提供不在场的所有证据。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Anyone gonna clue me in? What’s going on?
elements.text_zh: 谁能给我讲一下？这是怎么一回事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just before we started shooting the show, there was a big party.
elements.text_zh: 就在我们开始拍摄节目之前，有过一场大型派对。

elements.text_en: Roxie gives Orwell the basics of her blackout and her memory of Gabe.
elements.text_zh: Roxie向Orwell简单说明了自己断片的情况，以及关于Gabe的记忆。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s a burden to carry around, chica.
elements.text_zh: 这是个不小的心理负担啊，小姑娘。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Let’s hear the dude out. See if he’s been straight with you.
elements.text_zh: 听听Gabe怎么说吧，看看他是不是对你坦诚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah. Let’s see what you got, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。说说看吧，Gabe。

elements.text_en: Gabe begins explaining his timeline with supporting paperwork.
elements.text_zh: Gabe开一边讲述自己的时间线，一边拿出相关纸质证明文件。

elements.text_en: Orwell studies the papers on the table as Gabe finishes.
elements.text_zh: Orwell查看桌上的文件。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Statements from clients, law partners, emails, plane tickets, and more.
elements.text_zh: 客户陈述、律所合伙人的证明、邮件、机票，还不止这些呢。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You’re a rock-solid lawyer, brother.
elements.text_zh: 你这律师真是稳得不行，兄弟。

elements.text_en: Orwell softly squeezes Roxie’s shoulder as she scans the papers.
elements.text_zh: Roxie正浏览着这些纸质文件。Orwell轻轻捏了捏Roxie的肩。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: He was on the mainland during the party.
elements.text_zh: 派对那晚他确实不在岛上。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: On the island for about an hour the next evening, darling girl.
elements.text_zh: 第二天晚上才上岛，也只待了大约一小时，亲爱的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I can see.
elements.text_zh: 是的，我看得出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve got this memory of him there. Just a flash, but it’s clear.
elements.text_zh: 但我脑海里有他在那里的记忆。只是一瞬，但非常清晰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: False memory, from a dream? What is it?
elements.text_zh: 是错误记忆？是梦？还是什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Could be a bad dream from a trauma. Comes back like a memory.
elements.text_zh: 可能是创伤引起的梦，梦醒之后被你误认为你记忆一部分了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You should try and let it go.
elements.text_zh: 你该试着放下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m sorry, I didn’t believe you, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 对不起，我之前不该不相信你，Gabe。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You don’t owe me any apologies, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 你不用跟我道歉，Roxie。

elements.text_en: Everyone is quiet as Gabe collects the papers.
elements.text_zh: 大家安静地看着Gabe收起文件。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s dig into this mystery man. We can figure it out.
elements.text_zh: 我们得查清楚当晚那个神秘男人。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: At least come up with a plan.
elements.text_zh: 至少制定出一个计划。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No. No. I don’t want to talk about this. Not now.
elements.text_zh: 不。不。我现在不想谈这个。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Maybe later. You and I should talk, Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 要不待会儿。咱俩谈谈吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Jax, you want to see the gardens?
elements.text_zh: Jax，要不要看看花园？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah, that would be cool.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，听起来不错。

elements.text_en: Jax and Orwell leave Gabe and Roxie alone.
elements.text_zh: Jax和Orwell离开，留下Gabe和Roxie在屋里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I feel bad about what’s happened between us.
elements.text_zh: 我们之间发生这些事，我也很难受。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We can’t undo it. We can’t ignore it.
elements.text_zh: 不能当没发生，也不能逃避。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I get what you’re saying.
elements.text_zh: 我明白你的意思。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I still feel the same about you, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我对你的感觉依然没变。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I don’t want to go back to ground zero.
elements.text_zh: 我不想我们再被打回原点。

elements.text_en: Gabe pauses with a deep sigh.
elements.text_zh: Gabe深吸了一口气。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Things were going well. The pottery shop shoot was great.
elements.text_zh: 之前一切都进展得很好。陶艺店的拍摄很棒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, that was a special moment.
elements.text_zh: 是的，那是个特别的时刻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Things were going good before then.
elements.text_zh: 在那之前，一切都很顺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We’ve got a lot of history and some baggage.
elements.text_zh: 我们有很多过去，也有包袱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t pick up where we were after the pottery wheel.
elements.text_zh: 我没法回到陶轮那一刻的状态。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not emotionally in the same space as that precious moment.
elements.text_zh: 那一刻太珍贵了，但我现在已经不在那个情绪里了。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: What are you suggesting?
elements.text_zh: 你想说什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s rewind back a little. Slow things down for a bit.
elements.text_zh: 我们稍微倒带一下。放慢点节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: See where things head going forward.
elements.text_zh: 看看接下来我们的关系会走向哪里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Will that work for you?
elements.text_zh: 你能接受吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. I’m good with that.
elements.text_zh: 可以。我接受。

elements.text_en: Orwell and Jax come back from their walk.
elements.text_zh: Orwell和Jax散步回来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You two good?
elements.text_zh: 你们俩还好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, how was the walk outside?
elements.text_zh: 嗯，你们外面逛得怎么样？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: This place is awesome.
elements.text_zh: 这个地方太棒了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I’m thinking, maybe Gabe and I should leave.
elements.text_zh: 我在想，我和Gabe要不就先走了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, don’t leave. You okay with that, Orwell?
elements.text_zh: 不，别走。可以吗，Orwell？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It is your place, right?
elements.text_zh: 这是你的地方，你ok吗？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: That’s cool for me.
elements.text_zh: 我没问题。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s have some old-fashioned fun.
elements.text_zh: 那就来点老派的乐子吧。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That’s what you used to say years ago.
elements.text_zh: 你以前总这么说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: If neither of us had a date or any plans on a Friday or Saturday night.
elements.text_zh: 周五或周六晚上我们如果都没和人约会，也没有别事要做，就会一起聚一聚。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Neither of us had much money back then.
elements.text_zh: 那时候我俩都没什么钱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I remember. Pizza and bowling at that old place.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我记得。披萨加保龄球，老地方。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: It was cheap, but the pizza was fantastic.
elements.text_zh: 花不了几个钱，但披萨超级好吃。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Those were some great times.
elements.text_zh: 那段日子真的很棒。

elements.text_en: Orwell interrupts Jax and Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Orwell打断了Jax和Roxie。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: Pizza and bowling, a classic good time vibe. Let’s do it.
elements.text_zh: 披萨和保龄球，经典组合。安排。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Orwell, let’s stay here at the villa.
elements.text_zh: Orwell，我们就待在别墅里吧。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I’m talking about here at the villa.
elements.text_zh: 我说的就是在别墅里。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Virtual bowling? It won’t be the same.
elements.text_zh: VR保龄球？不是一回事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Not like the feel of a real ball.
elements.text_zh: 没有真球的手感的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A slice of deep dish fresh from a pizza oven.
elements.text_zh: 披萨也得是刚出炉的深盘披萨才好吃。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: You think Orwell would go low? Frozen pizzas and VR bowling.
elements.text_zh: 你以为我Orwell会这么low吗？冷冻披萨加VR保龄球。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, okay. What’s the plan?
elements.text_zh: 好吧，那你想说什么？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: My kitchen has a restaurant-grade pizza oven.
elements.text_zh: 我的厨房有专业级披萨炉。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: A full-scale bowling lane just down the hall from the kitchen.
elements.text_zh: 厨房旁边还有一条完整的保龄球道。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: With a nice booth for enjoying drinks and eats.
elements.text_zh: 还有可以吃喝的卡座。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: For real!
elements.text_zh: 真的假的？

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: One hundred percent original. Let’s check it out.
elements.text_zh: 包的。走，看看去。

elements.text_en: They enjoy pizza as they prepare for a new round of bowling.
elements.text_zh: 他们一边吃披萨，一边等着一会儿再玩一局保龄球。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This pizza is great. Original deep dish.
elements.text_zh: 这披萨太棒了。正宗深盘。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can’t believe Romano came over just to cook for us.
elements.text_zh: 真不敢相信Romano专门过来给我们做饭。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_en: I did some music spots at his pizzeria for free.
elements.text_zh: 我以前在他的披萨店免费做过音乐演出。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We ready to start another round of bowling?
elements.text_zh: 准备好再来一局了吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t want to brag, but I was on top last time.
elements.text_zh: 不想炫耀，但上轮我是第一。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sounds like you’re bragging.
elements.text_zh: 听起来你就是在炫耀。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Let’s go with teams this time.
elements.text_zh: 这次组队玩吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You were dead last, dude.
elements.text_zh: 你上次是垫底，兄弟。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not going to carry you.
elements.text_zh: 我可不带你。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Maybe I was sandbagging you.
elements.text_zh: 也许我是在给你放水也不一定呢。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Jax was in third place. We’ll take on you and Orwell.
elements.text_zh: Jax第三名。我们对你和Orwell吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re on, bud. How about $100? Make it interesting.
elements.text_zh: 来吧。要不要加点彩头？一百美元。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I can cover that action.
elements.text_zh: 我接。

elements.text_en: Roxie shouts as Gabe gets another strike.
elements.text_zh: Gabe又打出一个全中，Roxie大声喊了出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s six strikes in a row. You were holding back.
elements.text_zh: 已经六连中。你之前果然故意不发挥实力。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You fell for it. I can’t wait to spend your money.
elements.text_zh: 你上当了。我等着花你的钱。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Gabe arrive at the resort a few days later.
elements.text_zh: 几天后，Roxie和Gabe来到度假酒店。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: This place is pricey. You sure it’s free and all-inclusive for two days?
elements.text_zh: 这地方可不便宜。你确定两天都是免费的全包？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax said the production company was picking up the tab.
elements.text_zh: Jax说制作方会买单。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Drinks, meals, room service, anything we want.
elements.text_zh: 酒水、餐食、客房服务，想要什么都行。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Thanks for inviting me as your plus one.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你带我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure, a chance for some time together.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，正好可以一起待一会儿。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Feels like things are getting back to where we were.
elements.text_zh: 感觉一切都在慢慢回到从前。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, I think so.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我也这么觉得。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re sure you don’t need to do any work?
elements.text_zh: 你确定不用处理工作？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I brought my laptop just to keep up on news and sports.
elements.text_zh: 我带了电脑，看看新闻和体育就好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There’s Candy. Looks like Foley is her plus one.
elements.text_zh: 那边是Candy，看起来她选了Foley随行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What do you think about meeting them for dinner?
elements.text_zh: 要不要跟他们一起吃个晚饭？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Sure, sounds like fun.
elements.text_zh: 好啊，听起来不错。

elements.text_en: Roxie returns after chatting with Candy.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Candy聊完回来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Set for an early dinner, let’s get checked in.
elements.text_zh: 约了早些一起去吃晚饭，我们先办入住吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Gabe arrive in the restaurant.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Gabe来到餐厅。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Just me and you. What did Candy say on the phone?
elements.text_zh: 就我们俩？Candy电话里怎么说的？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: They aren’t hungry?
elements.text_zh: 他们不饿？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They decided to stay in and order room service.
elements.text_zh: 他们决定就在房间点餐。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She giggled and mentioned whipped cream and strawberries.
elements.text_zh: 她咯咯一笑，说是点了鲜奶油和草莓。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think they’re planning an X-rated meal.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得他们打算来一顿特别的晚餐。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Okay. Hey, there’s Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。嘿，那边是Lance和Corbin。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yes, and their playmates, Sophie and Lana.
elements.text_zh: 是的，还有Sophie和Lana。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Let’s stop by and say hello.
elements.text_zh: 我们过去打个招呼吧。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Gabe stop at the table.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Gabe在那桌停下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey guys, isn’t this place nice?
elements.text_zh: 嘿，伙计们，这地方不错吧？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah. And the show is paying the tab.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，节目组请客。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You want to join us for dinner?
elements.text_zh: 要不要一起吃？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sure?
elements.text_zh: 你确定？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, it will be fun.
elements.text_zh: 当然，一起更热闹。

elements.text_en: Lance finishes a funny story from college football days.
elements.text_zh: Lance讲完大学橄榄球时期的一段趣事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We had an undefeated season streak going.
elements.text_zh: 我们当时保持着不败赛季。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The starting fullback, Gordon, was superstitious.
elements.text_zh: 首发全卫Gordon特别迷信。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: With three weeks left in the season.
elements.text_zh: 赛季还剩三周的时候。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Everyone noticed a smell around Gordon’s locker.
elements.text_zh: 大家都注意到他更衣柜附近有股怪味。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: He decided his socks were lucky. Hadn’t washed them all season.
elements.text_zh: 他认定那双袜子是幸运袜，整个赛季都没洗。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Let me guess. Someone snuck in and washed them.
elements.text_zh: 我猜，有人偷偷给他洗了？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: No, it turned into a big debate. The team was split.
elements.text_zh: 没有，队里意见对半，争不出个所以然来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The equipment manager saved the day.
elements.text_zh: 最后还是队里的装备管理员救了场。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What did he do?
elements.text_zh: 他怎么救场的？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Double-bagged the socks in plastic bags in the locker.
elements.text_zh: 把袜子装进塑料袋，双层密封，放回柜子。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We went undefeated. But game day was horrible.
elements.text_zh: 我们保持全胜记录。但比赛日太折磨人了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: They were really nasty when he opened those bags.
elements.text_zh: 他打开袋子的时候，那味道简直要命。

elements.text_en: Roxie keeps an eye on Lana and Sophie.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一直留意着Lana和Sophie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: These two chicks haven’t said a word the whole dinner.
elements.text_zh: 这两个人整个晚餐一句话都没说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They keep looking at me. Like I’m a creature from another planet.
elements.text_zh: 一直盯着我看。像是在看外星生物一样。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Do you mind if I interrupt the fun?
elements.text_zh: 介意我打断一下吗？

elements.text_en: Jax is standing with a woman who looks familiar to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: Jax身边站着一个Roxie感觉有点眼熟的女人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No problem. Have a seat, we have two chairs.
elements.text_zh: 当然不介意，坐吧，这里有两把椅子。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: This is Sable. She is a special guest of the production company.
elements.text_zh: 这是Sable，制作方的特邀嘉宾。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She’s visiting the island, the villa, meeting people involved with the show.
elements.text_zh: 她来岛上看看别墅，认识一下咱们节目的男女嘉宾。

elements.text_en: Jax quickly introduces everyone to Sable.
elements.text_zh: Jax很快向Sable介绍了大家。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: It’s an honor to meet you. I’m a big fan.
elements.text_zh: 很荣幸见到你，我是你的忠实粉丝。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Your voice is once in a generation. Several generations.
elements.text_zh: 你的嗓音是一代一遇的。不，应该说是好几代难遇的。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_en: How very kind of you, Corbin.
elements.text_zh: 你太客气了，Corbin。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay, the solo opera singer.
elements.text_zh: 噢对，她是那个很出名的歌剧独唱演员。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve never gotten to see you in person.
elements.text_zh: 我从没见过你真人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It must be an exciting life. Performing for audiences around the world.
elements.text_zh: 那一定是种很精彩的人生吧，在世界各地巡回演出。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_en: Yes, it is Roxie. An honor and a privilege as well.
elements.text_zh: 是的，对我来说既是荣幸，也是特权。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She remembered my name just like that, wow.
elements.text_zh: 她一下子就记住了我的名字，太厉害了。

elements.text_en: Sable goes around the table asking about everyone.
elements.text_zh: Sable挨个询问大家的情况。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Something seems off about her. Too perfect?
elements.text_zh: 她身上有点不对劲。太完美了？

elements.text_en: Roxie is curious about what Gabe thinks of the special guest.
elements.text_zh: Roxie很好奇Gabe对这位特邀嘉宾的看法。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What did you think of Sable?
elements.text_zh: 你觉得Sable怎么样？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: I smell a setup.
elements.text_zh: 你这样问是不是在给我挖坑啊。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Like when a girl asks if she needs to lose weight or change her hair.
elements.text_zh: 就像女生问自己要不要减肥、换发型。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Any answer is wrong.
elements.text_zh: 不管怎么答，都是错的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not trying to trip you up.
elements.text_zh: 我没给你挖什么坑。

elements.name: Roxie
