elements.text_en: Obviously, she is beautiful, talented, and famous.
elements.text_zh: 显然，她很漂亮、有才华，又很有名。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Rich, elegant, and sophisticated.
elements.text_zh: 对嘛，她有钱，优雅，还很有格调。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay, funny boy.
elements.text_zh: 行了行了，少贫嘴。说真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Anything about her strike you as a bit weird?
elements.text_zh: 她有没有什么地方让你觉得有点怪？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: No. Like what?
elements.text_zh: 没有吧。你觉得她哪儿怪？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She remembered all of our names immediately.
elements.text_zh: 她立刻记住了我们所有人的名字。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So interested in all of us, even Corbin’s boring job.
elements.text_zh: 对每个人都很感兴趣，甚至包括Corbin那无聊的工作。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You’re right. Good memory and manners. Very bizarre.
elements.text_zh: 你说得对。记性好，又很有教养。她真是太奇怪了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Okay, fine, she’s perfect.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，那这么说，她就是这么完美咯。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m gonna try the steam shower.
elements.text_zh: 我要去试试蒸汽淋浴。

elements.text_en: Roxie finishes the shower and finds Gabe at his laptop.
elements.text_zh: Roxie洗完澡出来，看见Gabe坐在电脑前。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The steam shower is awesome. So refreshing.
elements.text_zh: 蒸汽淋浴太棒了，洗完整个人都清爽了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Work emails? You said the laptop was for sports and news.
elements.text_zh: 工作邮件？你不是说只看新闻和体育吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: You were in the shower. I figured, no big deal.
elements.text_zh: 你在洗澡，我就随便处理了一下，不是什么要紧事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Could you put some lotion on my shoulders?
elements.text_zh: 能帮我在肩膀上抹点乳液吗？

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Your neck feels tight. Let me rub out those knots.
elements.text_zh: 你脖子好紧，我帮你把结揉开。

elements.text_en: Roxie slips her towel down and pulls Gabe’s hands to her breasts.
elements.text_zh: Roxie把毛巾往下拉，把Gabe的手带到自己胸前。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nice and slow, babe.
elements.text_zh: 慢一点，宝贝。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Time to take this to the next level?
elements.text_zh: 是时候更进一步了吗？

elements.text_en: Gabe races to his laptop when it chimes with emails.
elements.text_zh: 电脑响起邮件提示音，Gabe立刻冲过去。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: We’re after a new client. Massive account.
elements.text_zh: 我们在谈一个新客户，超级大单。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I can't believe he did that.
elements.text_zh: 我简直不敢相信他居然这样。

elements.text_en: Gabe shuts down the laptop twenty minutes later.
elements.text_zh: 二十分钟后，Gabe合上了电脑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We need to talk.
elements.text_zh: 我们需要谈谈。

elements.name: Gabe
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. I know what’s coming.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，好吧。我知道你想谈什么。

elements.text_en: Roxie spends some quiet time alone on the hotel patio.
elements.text_zh: Roxie一个人在酒店露台静静待了一会儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s best for me and him. He agreed.
elements.text_zh: 这样对我和他都好。他也同意了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He’s a great guy. He might even love me.
elements.text_zh: 他是个很好的人。甚至很可能是爱我的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t want to be second place to his job.
elements.text_zh: 但我不想排在他的工作后面。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Hey girl, what you doing here?
elements.text_zh: 嘿，姑娘，你在这儿干嘛？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Quality time with Gabe. How’s it working out?
elements.text_zh: 和Gabe的“高质量相处时间”。进展如何？

elements.text_en: Jax listens as Roxie explains their decision.
elements.text_zh: 她向Jax解释了他们的决定。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: You seem like you're fine with things coming down this way.
elements.text_zh: 你看起来对事情发展成这样还挺坦然的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We are both good with it.
elements.text_zh: 我们两个人都觉得这样挺好。

elements.text_en: They go quiet for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: 两人沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sable? What’s the deal with her?
elements.text_zh: Sable？她到底什么来头？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Going to be an investor in the show, celebrity judge?
elements.text_zh: 是要投资节目？还是当明星评委？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I can’t tell you yet. Sorry.
elements.text_zh: 现在还不能告诉你，抱歉。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She was really positive about meeting all of you.
elements.text_zh: 她对见你们大家这件事真的挺期待的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Keep your weird vibe to yourself.
elements.text_zh: 期待，得了吧，我可不吃这怪里怪气的一套。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: By the way, I ran into Archer the day before yesterday.
elements.text_zh: 对了，我前天碰到Archer了。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Jax keep chatting.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Jax继续聊着。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He asked about the blow-up between you and Gabe.
elements.text_zh: 他问起你和Gabe在陶艺坊为什么吵架。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I think Candy spilled the beans to him.
elements.text_zh: 我猜Candy把事情全抖给他了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That girl, did Archer really need to know?
elements.text_zh: 这个Candy真是的，Archer真的有必要知道吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Her heart is in the right place.
elements.text_zh: 她是好心的。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: She might have helped you out.
elements.text_zh: 这样做也许反而能帮到你。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I told him that you and Gabe worked things out.
elements.text_zh: 我告诉他你和Gabe已经把事情处理好了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He just kind of took it in, right? No outward emotion.
elements.text_zh: 他肯定就是默默听着，对吧？一点情绪都不表露出来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Yeah. I mentioned your frustration over this false memory.
elements.text_zh: 是的。我还提到你对那段错误记忆相当困扰。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: He said he had an idea. He would do some checking.
elements.text_zh: 他说他有个想法，不过会去查一查再说。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: I don’t know what he has in mind.
elements.text_zh: 我也不知道具体是啥想法。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He is a doctor. Maybe hypnosis would do the trick.
elements.text_zh: 他是医生。说不定来点催眠就搞定了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: That sounds more like Orwell.
elements.text_zh: 那更像是Orwell会干的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll try most anything to purge it from my memory banks.
elements.text_zh: 我什么办法都愿意试，只要能把这段烦人的记忆从我脑子里清掉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll wait and see what Archer comes up with.
elements.text_zh: 我会等等，看Archer能查出什么法子。

elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin, followed by their groupies, find Roxie and Jax.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin带着她们的“女伴”，找到了Roxie和Jax。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Can we join you?
elements.text_zh: 我们能一起坐坐吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sure, thing.
elements.text_zh: 当然。

elements.text_en: Lana and Sophie stand behind Lance and Corbin as the men sit down.
elements.text_zh: Lana和Sophie站在Lance和Corbin身后，两个男人坐了下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They are giving me that weird stare.
elements.text_zh: 她们在用那种奇怪的眼神看我。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Where’s Gabe?
elements.text_zh: Gabe呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Catching up on some work on his laptop.
elements.text_zh: 在他电脑上处理点工作。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Meeting Sable was a real treat.
elements.text_zh: 见到Sable真的是一大惊喜。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I didn’t know who she was. Never heard of her.
elements.text_zh: 我都不知道她是谁，从没听说过。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: You've got no sense of culture. Opera is enriching.
elements.text_zh: 你有点文化品味好不好。歌剧是陶冶情操的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Screeching in some language I don’t understand.
elements.text_zh: 歌剧是用我听不懂的语言尖叫。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Good ole country-western or rock and roll will do me just fine.
elements.text_zh: 老派的乡村音乐或者摇滚乐就挺好，完全够我听了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: But she seemed to like football. She must be ok.
elements.text_zh: 不过她似乎喜欢橄榄球。那至少说明她还行。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She was being polite. She was really into my job.
elements.text_zh: 她只是出于礼貌。她其实是对我的工作很感兴趣。

elements.text_en: Roxie listens but keeps her thoughts about Sable to herself.
elements.text_zh: Roxie听着，却把自己对Sable的看法藏在心里。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Roxie, what do you think?
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你怎么看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She’s hiding something behind that perfect shell.
elements.text_zh: 她那副完美外壳下一定还藏着点什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Think about what?
elements.text_zh: 怎么看什么？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Opera and culture. Set this oaf straight.
elements.text_zh: 歌剧和文化。给这个莽汉讲讲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Opera is beautiful, even if I don’t understand the language.
elements.text_zh: 歌剧很美，即便我听不懂在唱什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t listen to it every day.
elements.text_zh: 但我不会天天听。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If I’m looking to have some fun and just chill.
elements.text_zh: 如果只是想放松、找点乐子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jazz or rock and roll. Maybe some country, old school.
elements.text_zh: 我会选爵士、摇滚，或者老派乡村。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah! Take that, Mr. Culture.
elements.text_zh: 对嘛！听到了吗，就你有文化。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Yeah, fine. Changing subjects.
elements.text_zh: 好吧，换个话题。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Any updates on those rumors?
elements.text_zh: 那些传闻有新进展吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: About the show and Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 关于节目，还有Roxie的。

elements.text_en: Roxie sees Lana flinch.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看到Lana明显缩了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She knows something.
elements.text_zh: 她肯定知道点什么。

elements.text_en: Roxie stares down Lana for a few moments.
elements.text_zh: Roxie盯着Lana看了几秒。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lana, you have something to say?
elements.text_zh: Lana，你是不是有话想说？

elements.text_en: Lana looks away and shakes her head.
elements.text_zh: Lana移开视线，摇了摇头。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: Why are you asking her?
elements.text_zh: 你为什么问她？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Seemed like she wanted to say something.
elements.text_zh: 我看她欲言又止的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: She doesn’t know anything about this mess.
elements.text_zh: 她什么都不知道。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think she knows something. Don’t you, Lana?
elements.text_zh: 我觉得她知道点什么，对吧，Lana？

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: We need to tell them, Sophie. She’s been lying to us.
elements.text_zh: 我们得告诉他们，Sophie。她一直在骗我们。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: Roxie isn’t like what she said. She’s nice.
elements.text_zh: Roxie根本不是她说的那样。她人很好。

elements.text_en: Sophie shakes her head and stays quiet.
elements.text_zh: Sophie摇了摇头，没有说话。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_en: What’s this about? Who’s been lying to you?
elements.text_zh: 这是怎么回事？谁在骗你们？

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: Raven asked us to help her protect the show.
elements.text_zh: Raven让我们帮她“保护节目”。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: She said Roxie was going to destroy the show's reputation.
elements.text_zh: 她说Roxie会毁掉节目的名声。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: Please, Sophie, we need to come clean.
elements.text_zh: Sophie，求你了，我们得说清楚。

elements.text_en: Lance prods Sophie as tears stream down Lana’s face.
elements.text_zh: Lance推了推Sophie，Lana已经哭了出来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Speak up if you know something, Sophie.
elements.text_zh: 如果你知道什么，就说出来。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Lana, don’t cry. I dragged you into this.
elements.text_zh: 别哭，Lana。是我把你拖进来的。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Raven came to me, said Roxie was going to destroy the show.
elements.text_zh: Raven找过我，说Roxie会毁掉节目。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: I didn’t know what to think. Why would she lie?
elements.text_zh: 我当时不知道该怎么想。她为什么要骗我？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: She showed me some news stories from the internet.
elements.text_zh: 她给我看了一些网上的新闻。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You believed it was true?
elements.text_zh: 你真的相信那些是真的？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: We didn’t know you. I convinced Lana we should help Raven.
elements.text_zh: 我们不认识你。是我说服Lana帮Raven的。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Tell people about the stories and keep an eye on you.
elements.text_zh: 把那些事传出去，顺便盯着你。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Hook up with Lance and Corbin to be close to you.
elements.text_zh: 和Lance、Corbin在一起，好接近你。

elements.text_en: Roxie sees a look of disappointment on the faces of Lance and Corbin.
elements.text_zh: Roxie看到Lance和Corbin脸上闪过一丝失望。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Sorry, Roxie. Sorry, Lance and Corbin. We’re both so sorry.
elements.text_zh: 对不起，Roxie。对不起，Lance，Corbin。真的很抱歉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven can be pretty convincing.
elements.text_zh: Raven确实挺会说服人的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I appreciate you being honest with me.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你们对我坦诚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m guessing Lance and Corbin aren’t happy campers.
elements.text_zh: 我猜Lance和Corbin现在心情不太好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ll let them sort that out in private.
elements.text_zh: 让他们私下自己解决吧。

elements.text_en: Everyone goes quiet, and Jax leaves to meet Sable.
elements.text_zh: 所有人安静下来，Jax离开去见Sable。

elements.text_en: Sophie whispers to Lance as she leaves with Lana, as Archer arrives.
elements.text_zh: Sophie低声对Lance说了几句，随后和Lana离开，Archer走了过来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Here you are, Roxie. Jax texted me that you were here.
elements.text_zh: 嗨，Roxie。Jax说你在这儿。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I didn’t realize Corbin and Lance were with you.
elements.text_zh: 我不知道Corbin和Lance也在。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Do they know about the night of the party?
elements.text_zh: 他们知道派对那晚的事吗？

elements.text_en: Roxie gives them a basic rundown of the mystery man and her memory.
elements.text_zh: Roxie简单把神秘男人和记忆片段说了一遍。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That’s rough, Roxie. Wish you had said something to us.
elements.text_zh: 这件事儿太让人难受了。真该早点跟我们说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve been able to deal with it.
elements.text_zh: 我自己吧，勉强也应付下来了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Jax said you might be able to help me, Archer.
elements.text_zh: Jax说你也许能帮我，Archer。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Did you come up with a magic pill or potion?
elements.text_zh: 你是不是有啥灵丹妙药？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m ready to try most anything to get rid of this memory.
elements.text_zh: 只要能抹掉这段记忆，我什么都愿意试。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve got a different sort of solution. Not medical.
elements.text_zh: 我有个不一样的办法，但不是医疗手段。

elements.text_en: Archer explains what he means.
elements.text_zh: Archer开始展开讲自己的思路。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Jax told me about what you think might be going on.
elements.text_zh: Jax跟我说了你的判断。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sounded like a pretty good self-diagnosis.
elements.text_zh: 听起来其实挺靠谱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A memory can be triggered by a dream that I don’t remember?
elements.text_zh: 一个我记不住的梦，真的可能触发一段记忆？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We don’t always remember dreams. They can flash back as memories.
elements.text_zh: 梦不一定记得，但梦会以记忆的形式闪回。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Seemingly as real as a true memory.
elements.text_zh: 让你感觉跟真记忆一样真实。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That got me thinking. Triggered by a dream, but not false.
elements.text_zh: 被梦触发，但并不是假的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You lost me with that last little bit.
elements.text_zh: 等等，最后那句你把我绕晕了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe was not on the island. We know that one hundred percent.
elements.text_zh: Gabe那晚不在岛上，这是确定的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He can’t be in two places at once!
elements.text_zh: 他不可能分身！

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Well, maybe yes and maybe no.
elements.text_zh: 说不好，他也许可以，也许不行。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Now you’re starting to sound a little crazy.
elements.text_zh: 你说话越来越离谱了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: You got kind of time travel theory like Orwell would cook up.
elements.text_zh: 越来越像Orwell会搞出来的时间旅行理论。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer, what are you saying?
elements.text_zh: Archer，你到底想说什么？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It is a little crazy, but it’s quite real.
elements.text_zh: 听起来会有点离谱，但这事是真的。

elements.text_en: Archer explains as he lays pictures on a table.
elements.text_zh: 他一边解释，一边把照片铺在桌子上。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: These are still images from the villa security camera archive.
elements.text_zh: 这些是别墅安保的监控截图。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Time-stamped the night of the party.
elements.text_zh: 时间是派对当晚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s me. That guy is leading me along. I’m stumbling a bit.
elements.text_zh: 那是我，他拉着我走，我有点站不稳。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: That’s Gabe. How is that possible!
elements.text_zh: 那是Gabe？怎么可能！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait! That’s not Gabe. Gabe is taller and more muscular.
elements.text_zh: 不对，那不是Gabe。他更高更壮。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s right. A dead ringer for Gabe. A doppelganger.
elements.text_zh: 没错，是个长得极像Gabe的男人，一个替身！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Holy crap! It wasn’t a dream!
elements.text_zh: 天哪，这不是梦！

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: I thought that was just bullshit made up for movies.
elements.text_zh: 我一直以为这种事只存在电影里。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s fiction that we all have a perfect match.
elements.text_zh: 所谓完美替身，本来就是虚构的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Given genetics, matches this close are fairly rare.
elements.text_zh: 从遗传角度看，这么像的极其罕见。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Somebody tracked down a doppelganger to do this.
elements.text_zh: 有人故意找了个像Gabe的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven. It’s gotta be Raven.
elements.text_zh: Raven。肯定是Raven。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: We need to catch the bitch.
elements.text_zh: 我们得抓住她。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: How we going to prove it was her?
elements.text_zh: 我们怎么证明是她干的？

elements.text_en: They continue to discuss how to prove what happened to Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 他们接着讨论，要怎么把 Roxie 遭遇的事证明清楚。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We got nothing connecting Raven to this Gabe look-alike.
elements.text_zh: 我们没有任何东西能把Raven和这个Gabe替身直接联系起来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Next to impossible for us to find out who this guy is.
elements.text_zh: 要查清这个人是谁，几乎不可能。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Speculation and these pictures aren’t enough for the police.
elements.text_zh: 我们的推测，加上这些照片，警察不会采信的。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sophie whispered something to me before she left.
elements.text_zh: Sophie走前跟我说了点事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: They will do anything to make it right. For what they did.
elements.text_zh: 她们会不惜一切去补救。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That was about Raven and the rumors.
elements.text_zh: 指的是Raven和她们抹黑我的事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Spreading false stories online. Surely, that’s illegal.
elements.text_zh: 在网上造谣，肯定违法。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re right. If they can help us connect Raven to that.
elements.text_zh: 你说得对。如果她们能帮我们把Raven和这件事连起来就再好不过了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. We corner her and get her to confess.
elements.text_zh: 那就逼她露馅，让她自己招。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin, you guys make sure Lana and Sophie will help us.
elements.text_zh: Lance、Corbin，你们去说服Lana和Sophie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer and I will kick around some ideas for a plan.
elements.text_zh: 我和Archer再捋一捋，想出一个具体方案来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven is clever; it’s going to have to be rock solid.
elements.text_zh: Raven很聪明，方案必须滴水不漏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Lance and Corbin head off as Archer and Roxie brainstorm.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Corbin离开，留下她和Archer一起头脑风暴。

elements.text_en: A few hours later, Lance finds Roxie on the patio.
elements.text_zh: 几小时后，Lance在露台找到Roxie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why are you here, alone?
elements.text_zh: 你怎么一个人在这？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Gabe and I said our goodbyes. He’s leaving the island.
elements.text_zh: 我和Gabe已经道别了，他要离开岛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A private charter boat is taking him to the big island.
elements.text_zh: 一艘私人包船会把他送去大岛。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Never a big fan of soccer boy. Whatever is best for you.
elements.text_zh: 我本来就不喜欢那家伙，你开心就好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m worried about Lana and Sophie.
elements.text_zh: 我担心Lana和Sophie。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: They said they would help.
elements.text_zh: 她们答应帮忙了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: They both understand the plan.
elements.text_zh: 计划她们也清楚。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: What are you worried about?
elements.text_zh: 你在担心什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not sure I trust them.
elements.text_zh: 我不太信任她们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They might double-cross us.
elements.text_zh: 怕她们反水。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Why would they do that?
elements.text_zh: 她们为什么要这么做？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Worried that the police might go after them.
elements.text_zh: 怕警察找上她们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They could tip Raven off to our plan.
elements.text_zh: 她们可能提前把计划告诉Raven。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Raven denies everything and turns it around on us.
elements.text_zh: 然后Raven否认一切，反咬我们一口。

elements.text_en: Lana and Sophie are alone in a famous Chinese Tea House, a few days later.
elements.text_zh: 几天后，Lana和Sophie单独坐在一家著名的中式茶馆里。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: I’m worried, Sophie. I’m not sure I can do this.
elements.text_zh: 我有点担心，Sophie。我不确定我能不能做到。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: It will work out. Just like we talked about, okay.
elements.text_zh: 会顺利的。就像我们说好的那样，好吗？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Just follow my lead.
elements.text_zh: 跟着我的节奏走就行。

elements.text_en: Raven comes into the room.
elements.text_zh: Raven走进了房间。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Ladies, this is not our arrangement. I decide when we meet.
elements.text_zh: 女士们，这不是我们原本的安排。见面的时间一向是由我来决定的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You said there is something urgent.
elements.text_zh: 是有什么紧急情况吗？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Yeah, Roxie and her friends want us to help them trap you.
elements.text_zh: 是的，Roxie和她的朋友想让我们帮忙设局对付你。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Something about a man doing something to Roxie and these rumors.
elements.text_zh: 说是有个男人对Roxie做了什么，还有那些传闻。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: What did you tell them?
elements.text_zh: 你们跟他们说了什么？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: We told them we would help. But I don’t trust them.
elements.text_zh: 我们说会帮忙。但我不信任他们。

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Lana is really worried.
elements.text_zh: Lana真的很担心。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: What is bothering you, little sister?
elements.text_zh: 是什么在困扰你，我的小妹妹？

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: I like Roxie. I’m not sure I believe these stories.
elements.text_zh: 我喜欢Roxie。我不太相信这些说法。

elements.text_en: Raven smiles with a reassuring nod.
elements.text_zh: Raven微笑着点了点头，示意她们放心。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You think maybe this is some sort of twisted sister rivalry?
elements.text_zh: 你们觉得，这是不是某种扭曲的姐妹竞争？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Roxie is very clever, two-faced, and deceptive.
elements.text_zh: Roxie很聪明，也很会装，手段不少。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: She seems nice and easy to talk to.
elements.text_zh: 她看起来挺友好，也好说话。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Yes, she is a real charmer.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，她很会迷人。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: These articles I showed you. Real reporters, right?
elements.text_zh: 我给你们看的那些文章你们也看到了，是真记者写的吧？

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: I guess so. Sophie said she checked them out.
elements.text_zh: 应该是。Sophie说她查过。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ve been given pictures of Roxie posing nude.
elements.text_zh: 我拿到了一些Roxie的裸照。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I hear she’s trying to sell them to the highest bidder.
elements.text_zh: 听说她本人想价高者得。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Can you imagine the impact on the show?
elements.text_zh: 你们能想象这对节目影响多大吗？

elements.name: Sophie
elements.text_en: Lana, Raven’s right, we need to keep going.
elements.text_zh: Lana，Raven说得对，我们得继续推进原计划。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ll keep the stories coming. You spread them around.
elements.text_zh: 我继续放料，你们负责扩散。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Tell people, you’ve seen some of it yourselves.
elements.text_zh: 就说你们自己也亲眼见过其中一些照片。

elements.name: Lana
elements.text_en: That would be lying.
elements.text_zh: 那不就是撒谎吗？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: But for the greater good. Protecting the show.
elements.text_zh: 但这是为了大局，为了节目。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Sometimes the president lies to us. To protect the country.
elements.text_zh: 有时候总统也会撒谎，为了国家。

elements.text_en: Roxie, Archer, and Lance enter the room as Sophie and Lana leave.
elements.text_zh: Roxie、Archer和Lance走进房间，Sophie和Lana离开。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You’ve been listening.
elements.text_zh: 你们一直在偷听。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Your little double agents were convincing.
elements.text_zh: 你们的小双面间谍演得还挺像。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I underestimated them and apparently you as well, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我低估了她们，也低估了你，Roxie。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We did more than listen. We recorded the whole conversation.
elements.text_zh: 我们不只是听，全程都录下来了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s legal here, so long as one party to the conversation agrees.
elements.text_zh: 在这儿，只要一方同意，录音就合法。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’m sure your little snoops agreed.
elements.text_zh: 我相信你们的小间谍是同意的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Talking badly about someone isn’t a crime.
elements.text_zh: 说人坏话不犯法。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Spreading false information on the internet is a crime.
elements.text_zh: 可是在网上造谣是违法的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We got enough for the police to go after these bloggers.
elements.text_zh: 这些证据够警察查那些博主了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: They are going to finger you as their source.
elements.text_zh: 他们会指认你是源头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sophie and Lana will tell the cops what you told them to do.
elements.text_zh: Sophie和Lana会如实告诉警察，是你让她们这么做的。

elements.text_en: Raven stays cool with a sharp rebuttal.
elements.text_zh: Raven依旧冷静反击。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I will admit to being confused and regret spreading some rumors.
elements.text_zh: 我会承认当时搞不清楚，也后悔传了些话。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Not the kind of thing that’s going to excite a prosecutor.
elements.text_zh: 这点事，检察官未必感兴趣。

elements.text_en: Archer hits a nerve.
elements.text_zh: Archer戳中要害。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I think you are probably right about that.
elements.text_zh: 你说得也许没错。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: But your comments about nude photos will get their attention.
elements.text_zh: 但你提到裸照，他们一定会认真。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’ve never posed for nude photos.
elements.text_zh: 我从没拍过裸照。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Pictures taken by a Gabe look-alike, right? Someone you hired.
elements.text_zh: 是那个长得像Gabe的人拍的吧？你雇的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: After someone drugged Roxie or swapped her drink at the party.
elements.text_zh: 而且是在有人给Roxie下药，或换了酒之后。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Okay, what do you want?
elements.text_zh: 好吧，你们想要什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I want to know why you would do all of this to me?
elements.text_zh: 我想知道，你为什么要这么对我？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ll talk to Roxie. Only Roxie and no recording.
elements.text_zh: 我只跟Roxie谈。不能有其他人，不能录音。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay.
elements.text_zh: 好，我答应你。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Hell no, Roxie. We’ve got her.
elements.text_zh: 不行，Roxie。我们已经抓到她了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Let's call the cops, give them the recording.
elements.text_zh: 报警吧，把录音交给警察。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Were going to do this my way.
elements.text_zh: 这次听我的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This is between Raven and me for now.
elements.text_zh: 现在这是我和Raven之间的事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Yeah, okay. We will be right outside.
elements.text_zh: 好吧。我们去外面等。

elements.text_en: Raven and Roxie are quiet for a few moments after Lance and Archer leave.
elements.text_zh: Lance和Archer离开后，两姐妹沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Where do you want me to start?
elements.text_zh: 你想让我从哪儿说起？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You were behind all of this?
elements.text_zh: 这一切都是你在背后做的？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: There wasn’t someone paying you or something?
elements.text_zh: 没有别人给你钱，指使你？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Nobody was paying me.
elements.text_zh: 没人付我钱。

elements.text_en: Raven goes quiet for several moments.
elements.text_zh: Raven沉默了好一会儿。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: It started as deep-seated anger years and years ago.
elements.text_zh: 这事儿吧，算积怨已久。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Got mixed in with wanting to win the dating show.
elements.text_zh: 只不过后来，又掺杂进了我想赢下这档恋综的念头。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Or making sure you didn’t win.
elements.text_zh: 或者至少，不能让你赢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: When we were children, we used to get along.
elements.text_zh: 我们小时候明明关系很好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know it changed. I don’t know why.
elements.text_zh: 后来变了，我却不知道为什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Is there something I did to you?
elements.text_zh: 是不是我做过什么伤害你的事？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You really don’t know?
elements.text_zh: 你真不知道还是假不知道？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I have no idea why you hate me so much.
elements.text_zh: 我真的不明白你为什么这么恨我。

elements.text_en: Roxie is surprised to learn the roots of Raven’s anger.
elements.text_zh: Roxie得知真相，有点意外。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: We see our father very differently.
elements.text_zh: 我没想到你对父亲的看法和我差这么多。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I don’t understand your feelings about him.
elements.text_zh: 我不理解你对他的感受。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He was a drunk who emotionally abused my mother.
elements.text_zh: 他是个酒鬼，对我妈是情绪虐待。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: He was never a father to me. Those are my feelings.
elements.text_zh: 他从来都不是我的父亲。这就是我的真实感受。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He wasn’t like that when he met my mother.
elements.text_zh: 他遇到我妈的时候不是这样。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He didn’t drink, he loved her and me. Took care of us.
elements.text_zh: 他不喝酒，爱她，也爱我，照顾我们。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Great. That doesn’t change what he did to me.
elements.text_zh: 那很好，但这改变不了他对我做过的事。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Do you remember when our mothers used to get us together to play?
elements.text_zh: 你还记得小时候我们被妈妈们凑在一起玩吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Yeah, sure. We had fun together.
elements.text_zh: 记得，我们那时候很开心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It started to change. Maybe when I was in high school.
elements.text_zh: 后来开始变了，大概我上高中时。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What happened?
elements.text_zh: 发生了什么？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Dad, well, our dad. I guess he had regrets about how he had been.
elements.text_zh: 爸爸——我们的爸爸，他后悔过自己之前的事儿。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He started paying attention to you.
elements.text_zh: 他开始关注你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No, he didn’t. I never saw him.
elements.text_zh: 没有，他没有。我从没见过他。

elements.text_en: Roxie understands Raven better.
elements.text_zh: Roxie这才发现，Raven为什么会这么生气。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Maybe you didn’t know. Maybe he was in the shadows.
elements.text_zh: 也许你不知道，也许他一直躲在暗处。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He had pictures of you at volleyball games, school awards.
elements.text_zh: 他有你打排球、领奖、上学的照片。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Roxie did this. Roxie did that. Roxie. Roxie. Roxie!
elements.text_zh: Roxie做了这个。Roxie做了那个。全都是你！

elements.text_en: Raven goes quiet for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Raven沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I was doing everything I could to get him to notice me.
elements.text_zh: 我拼命想让他注意到我。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: All I ever heard about was you.
elements.text_zh: 可我听到的，永远都是你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t know about any of that.
elements.text_zh: 我真的不知道这些事。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: You would trash him when I would see you.
elements.text_zh: 我见到你时，你总是在骂他。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: That made me even angrier.
elements.text_zh: 这让我更生气了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: He loved you more than me, and you hated him.
elements.text_zh: 他更爱你，而你却恨他。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I started to hate you, more and more.
elements.text_zh: 我开始恨你，越来越恨。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She is really hurting inside. Definitely not an act.
elements.text_zh: 她内心真的很痛，这不是演出来的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m sure he loves you, Raven.
elements.text_zh: 我相信他是爱你的，Raven。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I didn’t know what was going on with you.
elements.text_zh: 我不知道你当时经历了这些。

elements.text_en: Roxie goes quiet for a moment.
elements.text_zh: Roxie沉默了一会儿。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hire someone to knock me out and take nude pictures.
elements.text_zh: 雇人把我弄晕，还拍了那些照片。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The affair with my ex-husband, before. Let’s put that aside.
elements.text_zh: 至于我和前夫的旧事，先放一边吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m sure he was a willing participant.
elements.text_zh: 我敢肯定他也是自愿的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Because of things from childhood. From so long ago?
elements.text_zh: 就因为童年的事？那么久以前的事？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: It’s hard to explain why I went so far.
elements.text_zh: 我很难解释自己为什么会走到这一步。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I kind of snapped when I heard you were going to be on the show.
elements.text_zh: 听说你要上节目时，我真的失控了。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I had been pushing to get on the show. The idea that you might win.
elements.text_zh: 我一直想上这个节目，一想到你可能会赢。

elements.text_en: Raven sighs as she stares at the floor.
elements.text_zh: Raven盯着地板，叹了口气。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I realized how horrible it was after it was done.
elements.text_zh: 事情做完后，我才发现有多可怕。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I tried to minimize it. Telling myself you weren’t physically harmed.
elements.text_zh: 我还试着安慰自己，说你没受身体伤害。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You didn’t come to me.
elements.text_zh: 可你没有来找我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You must have known I was worried about that night.
elements.text_zh: 你明明知道我一直在为那晚的事焦虑。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You started spreading these horrible rumors.
elements.text_zh: 你却选择散布那些谣言。

elements.text_en: Raven continues to stare silently at the floor before answering.
elements.text_zh: Raven低着头盯着地板看了好一会儿，才开口。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Yes, I did. It’s quite horrible.
elements.text_zh: 是的，都是我做的。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’m ashamed and truly sorry, Roxie.
elements.text_zh: 我真的很羞愧，也很抱歉。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: Maybe over time, we can repair our relationship.
elements.text_zh: 也许慢慢地，我们还能修复关系。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’m ready to accept the consequences of my actions.
elements.text_zh: 我愿意为自己做过的事承担后果。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ll resign from the show and go to the police with you.
elements.text_zh: 我会退出节目，也愿意跟你一起去报警。

elements.text_en: Roxie is quiet before she answers.
elements.text_zh: Roxie沉默了一会儿，才开口。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A sincere apology is enough for me.
elements.text_zh: 一句真诚的道歉，对我来说就够了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t want your life ruined because of these mistakes.
elements.text_zh: 我不想因为这些事毁了你一辈子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Stay on the show, and let’s try to fix things between us.
elements.text_zh: 留下来吧，我们试着把姐妹关系修复好。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: That’s incredibly generous. I would like that.
elements.text_zh: 你真的太宽容了。我……我也希望能这样。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: I’ll make sure these rumors are taken down and retracted.
elements.text_zh: 我会把所有谣言撤掉并澄清。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: The pictures will be deleted. There are no copies.
elements.text_zh: 那些照片也会全部删除，不留任何备份。

elements.text_en: Raven hugs Roxie before she leaves.
elements.text_zh: Raven离开前抱了抱 Roxie。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_en: See you around, sis.
elements.text_zh: 回头见，姐姐。

elements.text_en: Lance joins Roxie after Raven leaves.
elements.text_zh: Raven离开后，Lance走到Roxie身边。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: The wicked witch isn’t going to get punished?
elements.text_zh: 她干了这么多破事，就这么算了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: No more witch jokes about Raven.
elements.text_zh: 算了，这次就还是点到为止吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: We’re going to try to be real sisters again.
elements.text_zh: 我们想试着重新做真正的姐妹。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: She did some awful things.
elements.text_zh: 她确实做过很多很糟的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: She offered to go to the police with me and confess.
elements.text_zh: 她愿意陪我去警局坦白。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That’s not what I want, okay?
elements.text_zh: 但那不是我想要的结果，明白吗？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_en: Sure, if it works for you.
elements.text_zh: 只要这是你觉得对的，我尊重你的决定。

elements.text_en: Lance leaves, and Jax comes by.
elements.text_zh: Lance离开后，Jax走了过来。

elements.text_en: Roxie gives Jax a short version of what happened with Raven.
elements.text_zh: Roxie简要跟Jax说了她和Raven聊的情况。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Sounds like the right call. For you and Raven. Hope it works out.
elements.text_zh: 听起来这是个正确的选择。对你，对Raven都是。希望能有好结果。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I think it will. It will take some time.
elements.text_zh: 我觉得会的，只是需要时间。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: Make any decisions about men, girlfriend?
elements.text_zh: 那感情方面呢，有决定了吗？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_en: One of the four amigos, or you waiting for Mr. Right?
elements.text_zh: 是那四个里的一个，还是等对的人？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I have made a decision.
elements.text_zh: 我已经想清楚了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I don’t need a man to define me, and I’ve got time.
elements.text_zh: 我不需要男人来定义我，我也不着急。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m keeping my options open.
elements.text_zh: 所以这就不是一道选择题了，是开放题。
茗月圆的风波过后，岛上难得平静了一天。傍晚，嘉宾们聚在别墅前的露天区域，夕阳把所有人染成金色。
Raven坐在Roxie旁边，两人之间的距离比以前近了很多，但还是有种小心翼翼的感觉。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 我帮你倒了杯果汁。不加冰，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你记得？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 小时候一起吃冰淇淋你就说过，不喜欢太冰的东西。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她还记得这些。也许我们之间的裂痕，真的可以修补。）
不远处，Lance一直看着这边，表情有些复杂。他走到Roxie旁边坐下。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: Roxie，能聊两句吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 当然。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我知道你原谅Raven了。我尊重你的决定。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 但她干过的那些事——雇人给你下药、拍照、散布谣言——那不是小事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我只是想说，如果她再有任何不对劲的地方，告诉我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Lance。我会注意的。
这时，Harley从别墅里走出来，手里拿着一个金色信封，表情神秘。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 各位！我有一个重大消息要宣布！

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 从下周开始，我们的节目将迎来两位全新嘉宾。其中一位……是大家都认识的人。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 大家都认识？是明星吗？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 我只能说这么多。具体是谁，下周揭晓。
众人议论纷纷。Corbin靠在柱子上，没有加入讨论。他拿出手机，低头搜索着什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Corbin好像在查什么。他的直觉一向很准……）
嘉宾们聚在别墅大厅，Harley拿着平板电脑走进来，脸上挂着标志性的职业微笑。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 我猜是个有名的人！Harley那个表情我太熟了，绝对是大新闻！

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 各位，我正式宣布——我们的第一位新嘉宾是……当红影视明星，Sable！
话音刚落，别墅大门被推开。一个高挑的身影踩着高跟鞋走了进来，身后跟着一个西装革履的男人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （天哪，真的是Sable？那个拍了三部票房冠军的Sable？！）
Sable和Raymond走进别墅大厅，所有人的视线都被吸引过去。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: Hi everyone！我是Sable。很高兴来到心动岛屿，希望大家多多关照。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 欢迎！我是Roxie。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: Roxie？我听说过你呢，据说你是岛上最受欢迎的女孩。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她的笑容很完美……太完美了。像是练了一千遍。）
第二天，Sable成了所有人的话题中心。男嘉宾们争着和她搭话，连摄像机都优先对准她。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 别在意镜头的事，Roxie。你知道综艺节目最喜欢新鲜感。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 我没在意……好吧，可能有一点。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 一点？你刚才对着镜子整了三遍头发。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 那是因为今天湿度大！
午餐时间，Sable被一群人围着。她优雅地讲述好莱坞的趣事，所有人听得入迷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （我好像变成了背景板……不，我不能这样想。）
傍晚，嘉宾们在泳池边聚会。Sable试图和Corbin聊天，但Corbin只是礼貌性地点了点头。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 我不太看电影。
Sable愣了一下，但很快恢复了笑容。没人能拒绝她——至少以前从来没有。
Roxie注意到Corbin走到阳台独自待着，于是跟了过去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 不喜欢热闹？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 不喜欢表演。她身上每个动作都是算过的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Corbin看人一向很准。但他对Sable的警惕，是直觉还是偏见？）
深夜，别墅走廊里很安静。Raymond独自走进节目组的资料室，打开了一个文件柜。
Raymond翻阅着文件，手电筒的光在黑暗中摇曳。
第二天早上，Archer在餐厅遇到Roxie。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 昨晚我失眠出来走走，看到Sable的助理在走廊里鬼鬼祟祟的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Raymond？他在做什么？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 不确定，可能在找什么东西。我叫他的时候他说在找洗手间。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 但那条走廊我很熟，根本没有洗手间。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Raymond在找什么？这跟Sable有关系吗？）
节目组安排了一场即兴才艺展示。Sable自信满满地第一个上台，弹了一首钢琴曲。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 这首曲子是我在巴黎学的。希望大家喜欢。
掌声雷动。轮到Roxie时，她犹豫了一下，然后讲了一个关于自己出糗的真实故事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 然后我就这么一脚踩进了泳池里，全身湿透，嘴里还叼着一片披萨。
全场笑声不断。Sable看着大家围在Roxie身边，嘴角的笑容微微僵了一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （好像……真实的东西比完美的表演更打动人？）
深夜。泳池边只有Sable一个人，她正在打电话，声音压得很低但掩不住焦虑。
Roxie路过时听到了只言片语——"还款期限""违约金""别让媒体知道"。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Sable在担心钱的事？一个大明星？）
Sable挂了电话，发现Roxie站在不远处。两人对视了一秒。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 夜里睡不着？我也是。这里的星星确实很美。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 是啊，城里看不到这样的天空。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她刚才明明很慌张，现在却装作什么都没发生。这个人……有很多面。）
又过了两天。Lance主动找到Roxie，表情比平时认真得多。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: Roxie，我想跟你说实话。Sable昨天约我单独聊了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: ……然后呢？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 她确实很有魅力。但我来这里不是为了追明星。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我来这里是因为你。从第一天起就是。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他的眼神……我知道他说的是真心话。）
这时Jax匆匆跑过来。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 你们快来！Archer说他发现了什么重要的东西，跟Sable的助理有关！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Raymond……果然有问题。这一切要浮出水面了。）
午后，Candy拉着Roxie到阳台上，脸上写满了八卦的兴奋。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 你知道吗？Sable刚才约了Lance去海边散步！就他们两个！

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 就"哦"？拜托，你不吃醋吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （当然吃醋。但我不能让她觉得我怕她。）

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Lance是个大人了，他有自己的选择。
傍晚，Lance主动找到Roxie。他的表情前所未有地认真。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我和Sable散步了，但全程她都在打听你的事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 打听我？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 她问了你之前的感情经历、你和男嘉宾的关系、你的弱点……

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 说实话，感觉她不是在了解我，是在通过我了解你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她在搜集我的情报……为什么？）
出人意料地，Sable在早餐时主动坐到了Roxie旁边。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: Roxie，我觉得我们之前有些误会。我真的不是来跟你抢人的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 那你来这里是为了什么？

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 说实话……我需要曝光。最近事业不太顺利。这档节目是我翻身的机会。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她主动坦白了？这是真心话还是又一层伪装？）
Archer把Roxie叫到花园里，神色严肃。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我又看到Raymond了。这次他在拍我们嘉宾的资料页。用手机拍的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 他拍那些干什么？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我猜是给Sable看。她需要知道每个人的底细，才能"表演"得更自然。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 一个真正想交朋友的人，不需要助理帮她做背景调查。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （所以Sable今天的"坦白"，也是算计好的？她知道我已经起疑了。）
Roxie和Jax坐在沙滩上，盯着远处的海面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 我想好了。我不跟她斗。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 不斗？那你打算怎么办？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 做自己。她越是表演，我越是真实。观众自然会看出区别。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 这才是我认识的Roxie。
节目组安排了一次嘉宾分享会。每个人说一件自己最不愿意公开的事情。
Roxie第一个开口，毫不犹豫地讲了自己曾经被骗的经历。真实，脆弱，但有力量。
轮到Sable时，她张了张嘴，又合上了。第一次，她的表情不是表演出来的。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 我……其实我欠了很多钱。外面看到的那些，豪车、名牌包，都是借的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （她说了真话。我能看出来——这次不是演的。）
分享会结束后，Corbin罕见地主动找到Roxie。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 刚才你说的那些，需要勇气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你不是一向不喜欢这种分享吗？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 我不喜欢假的。你的不假。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （从Corbin嘴里听到这种话，比一百句甜言蜜语都管用。）
第二天清晨，Sable做了一件让所有人意外的事。
她当着所有嘉宾的面，让Raymond道歉。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 我让Raymond调查大家的背景，这是我的主意。我道歉。

elements.name: Sable
elements.text_zh: 来这里之后我一直在演。但昨天Roxie让我明白，真实比完美更有力量。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Sable……谢谢你说出来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （也许Sable没有我以为的那么糟。每个人都有自己的困境。）
月影花庭的花园里，灯火通明。迎宾派对正式开始，空气中弥漫着茉莉花香。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 这花庭的设计者一定是个浪漫主义者。你看那月亮，像是专门为这个地方挂上去的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你倒是挺有情调的。我以为你这种类型的人会觉得这些太俗气。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 谁告诉你我是什么类型的？人不可貌相。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他说得对。也许我不该太快给人贴标签。）
远处传来钢琴声，柔和的旋律在月光下流淌。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: （端着酒杯走过来）你们俩聊什么呢？Orwell又在说那些文艺的话了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谁在弹琴？好好听。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 不知道。不过弹琴的人，品味不错。
午后，Roxie在花庭角落发现了一张被遗忘的纸条。上面的字迹潦草但刻意伪装过。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Jax，你看这个。有人在传纸条？

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 哈！纸条？什么年代了还玩这个。让我看看……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 上面写着"第三天晚上，后花园"。听着像是在约什么秘密会面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （谁在搞小动作？这里的水比我想象的深。）

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 要不我们去蹲守？当一回侦探！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你确定不会被发现？
花庭的玻璃温室门突然卡住了。Roxie和Orwell被困在里面，四周是盛开的热带花卉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 门打不开……信号也没有。看来只能等人来找我们了。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 也不错。至少空气很好，还有花看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你这心态倒是让人羡慕。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 我以前经常一个人待着。习惯了安静。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他好像有很多没说的故事。）

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: 你呢？你看起来总是很热闹，但偶尔眼神会空一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: ……你观察力挺强的。
月光晚宴上，Lance举起酒杯，目光穿过烛光，落在Roxie身上。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我想说一件事。在场的每个人都很优秀，但有一个人让我特别想了解。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你身上有一种……真实感。跟你说话的时候，我不需要演。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: （小声对Roxie耳语）天哪，他这话说得也太直接了。全场都在看你呢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Lance……谢谢你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他说得很真诚。但我注意到他刚才看向窗外的那一瞬间——那个眼神不太对。）
宴会结束后，Roxie独自在花庭散步，月光把她的影子拉得很长。
早餐时，每个人的盘子下面都压着一封信。匿名信。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 天哪，我的信上写"你不是你表现出来的那个人"。好恐怖！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 我的写着"小心你最信任的人"。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 这是谁写的？节目组搞的吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （不像节目组的手笔。这信……有人想制造混乱。）

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 别想太多了，说不定就是恶作剧。来，吃颗草莓。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你说得对。但我会留意的。
凌晨两点，Roxie被一阵压低的争吵声惊醒。声音从后花园传来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （谁在吵架？这个时间点……）
Roxie悄悄走到窗边，透过月光看到两个身影。一个高大的男人和一个她认不出的人。
她听到了断断续续的话——"合同"、"不能说"、"后果"。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （听起来像是威胁。这里到底藏着什么秘密？）
两人突然安静下来，似乎察觉到了什么。Roxie赶紧缩回窗帘后面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （太危险了。但我必须查清楚。）
午餐时，有人当众质疑Roxie的"真实"——说她表现得太完美，一定是在演戏。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 我只是觉得有些事该说清楚。有的人来这里是为了赢得关注，而不是真心。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 够了。你们谁都没资格这么说她。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: Roxie是我在这里认识的最真实的人。她不需要向任何人证明什么。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Jax……谢谢你。在最尴尬的时候站出来。）
气氛缓和后，Jax和Roxie走到花庭外。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 别放在心上。嫉妒你的人永远不会停止找茬。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 有你在真好。
Harley在客厅召集所有人，表情罕见地严肃。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 各位，节目组做了一个决定。从下周开始，将启动淘汰机制。
房间里一片哗然。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 每周一次投票，得票最高的嘉宾将离开花庭。希望大家做好准备。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （淘汰？这下所有人的关系都要变了。谁是盟友，谁是对手？）

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 淘汰？！这也太突然了吧……我们才刚开始互相了解啊。
深夜，Roxie在花庭的钢琴房找到了Corbin。他正对着琴键发呆。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 睡不着？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 这架钢琴……跟我妈以前那架一模一样。她教我弹的第一首曲子就是月光奏鸣曲。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你妈妈是钢琴家？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 是。她去世后我就没再弹过。直到今晚看到这架琴。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他一直把这些藏在冷漠的外表下面。）

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你愿意的话，可以弹给我听。
化妆舞会上，所有人都戴着面具。音乐声中，一个面具后的声音叫住了Roxie。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 面具下说话比较自由。有件事我一直想告诉你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 什么事？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 深夜吵架的那两个人——其中一个是节目组的人。他们在花庭安排了一个"卧底"。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （卧底？所以这一切都是被操控的？）

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 小心点。信任的代价可能比你想象的高。

elements.name: Orwell
elements.text_zh: （从人群中走来，面具后的眼神意味深长）有趣的派对，不是吗？每个人都在扮演别人。
投票前一晚，花庭里弥漫着紧张的气息。Raven找到了Roxie。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 姐，有人在拉票想把你投出去。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谁？

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 我不能说名字。但你最好今晚跟每个人都聊聊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Raven在帮我。她真的变了。）

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你告诉我。

elements.name: Raven
elements.text_zh: 别谢我。你被淘汰的话，这里就太无聊了。
投票结果出来了——Roxie安全。但她得票第二，差一点就被淘汰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （原来真的有人想让我走。这种感觉比我以为的更难受。）
Roxie独自走到花庭最高的露台，俯瞰整个庄园。月光洒在她身上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （但我不会逃。我来这里不是为了讨好所有人。我来这里是为了找到真正重要的东西。）
她深吸一口气，眼神变得坚定。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 好吧。来吧。
月圆之夜。Archer把所有证据摆在了桌上——纸条、录音、照片。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 花庭里的"卧底"是制片人安排的。目的是制造冲突，提高收视率。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 匿名信、深夜的争吵、淘汰机制的突然加速——全是一个人在背后操纵。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谁？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 不重要了。重要的是，我们知道了真相。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （原来从一开始，就有人在把我们当棋子。但真正的感情不是棋局能控制的。）

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Archer。查清这些一定花了不少心思。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 值得的。
花庭的玫瑰园里，Archer拦住了准备回房间的Roxie。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: Roxie，等一下。有句话如果今天不说，我怕以后没机会了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你说。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我查那些证据，表面上说是为了正义。但真正的原因是……我不想看到有人伤害你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Archer……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 不用现在给我答案。我只是想让你知道。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （以爱之名的守护。原来一直在身边。）
花庭的最后一个夜晚。所有嘉宾围坐在庭院里，篝火跳动，星光满天。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 不管结果怎样，认识你们每个人，我都不后悔。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 我也是。这段日子教会了我很多。
Roxie环顾四周——Jax在旁边冲她笑，Corbin在角落里安静地弹吉他，Archer靠在柱子上看着星空。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: （轻轻拨动吉他弦）有些话不用说出口。音乐会替你说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （月影花庭。这个名字我会记很久。不是因为这里发生了什么，而是因为我在这里找到了自己。）
清晨，阳光洒进花庭。Roxie站在门口，身后是行李箱。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 走了？不多留一会儿？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 该走的时候就得走。不然就成了留恋了。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 留恋有什么不好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 因为前面还有更好的风景。
Roxie回头看了一眼月影花庭。花还在开，月亮还会升起。但她已经不一样了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （谢谢你，月影花庭。下一站，我来了。）
海崖灯塔。一座矗立在悬崖边的白色灯塔，被节目组翻新成了"终极约会胜地"。海风带着盐味，阳光刺眼。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: 各位！我为大家介绍我们的新嘉宾——他从NASA休假来到这里，著名宇航员，Conrad！

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 嘿，大家好。太空待久了，终于回到地面找点乐子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 宇航员？认真的？

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: （走近Roxie）你一定是Roxie。我在太空站的时候看了节目片段，你比屏幕上更好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （宇航员、会说话、长得不错……但他看我的眼神太精准了，像早就研究过我一样。）

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_zh: Conrad将和大家一起生活在灯塔附近。好好享受吧！
Conrad邀请Roxie沿悬崖栈道散步。海面在阳光下闪着碎银般的光。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 知道吗，从太空看地球，海岸线是最美的部分。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 但说实话，现在这个角度看海，比太空好多了。因为有人陪。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你这搭讪话术在NASA也用吗？

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: （笑）在NASA说这种话只会被扔进离心机。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 那你倒是挺会挑场合。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 我注意到你总在观察别人。你是那种靠直觉做判断的人，对吧？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他的观察力……有点太准了。像在读我的档案一样。）

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 你不需要防备我，Roxie。我只是想认识真正的你。
傍晚，灯塔观景台上。夕阳把海面染成橘红色，Conrad正跟Roxie聊天，Lance走了过来。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 嘿，在聊什么？

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Roxie在跟我讲你们之前的故事。你是NFL球星？佩服佩服。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: （看向Roxie）你跟他讲这些？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 随便聊几句而已。别紧张。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Lance，你是个好人。但别把Roxie当成需要保护的人——她比我们都强。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Conrad这话……是在夸我，还是在挑拨我和Lance之间的关系？）

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: （深吸一口气）我先走了。晚点找你。
深夜，灯塔的旋转光束扫过黑色海面。Corbin在灯塔下面等着Roxie。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 你有空吗？我有话跟你说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 听起来很严肃。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 那个Conrad。我查了他的背景。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你查他？

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 职业习惯。他来之前在三档类似的节目里客串过。每次都跟女主走得很近，然后节目热度暴涨。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 他不是来找感情的。他是来制造话题的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Corbin说话一向直接。但他的判断从来没错过……）

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 我会留意的。谢谢你告诉我。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 小心点。这种人最擅长让你觉得一切都是你自己的选择。
清晨，Roxie一个人坐在悬崖边看日出。海面上的第一缕阳光像金线一样铺开。

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 睡不着？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 脑子里太多东西了。Conrad、Lance、Corbin……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 你不需要马上做决定。这不是考试。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 但所有人都在看着我。镜头、嘉宾、观众……

elements.name: Jax
elements.text_zh: 那就先别看他们。看海。
两个人安静地坐了一会儿。海风吹起Roxie的头发。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Jax。有你在真好。
悬崖顶的平台上，节目组准备了一场户外野餐。Conrad自告奋勇负责烤肉。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Lance，听说你是私厨？来给点专业意见——这牛排几分熟合适？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 你烤就行，别问我。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: （笑着对Roxie）他好像不太喜欢我。是因为我跟你散步的事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Conrad，别挑事。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 你想太多了，兄弟。我只是不喜欢演戏的人。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: （举起双手）和平，和平。我只是觉得大家应该坦诚一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Conrad在笑，但他的每句话都像是精心设计过的。他在试探Lance的底线。）
夜晚，Archer把Roxie叫到灯塔的储藏室。他的表情很凝重。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我发现了一些事情。Conrad在跟节目制片人私下通电话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 制片人？为什么？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我没听到全部，但他说了一句——"按计划走，第三周制造最大冲突"。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 制造冲突？他跟制片人是一伙的？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 我不确定。但Conrad来这里明显有别的目的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Corbin说得对。Conrad不简单。但他到底想做什么？）

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 先别打草惊蛇。我们观察几天。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你，Archer。你总是第一个发现问题的人。
Conrad邀请Roxie到灯塔顶层看星空。360度的玻璃穹顶外，银河清晰可见。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 在太空看星星，它们不会闪。只有在地球上，透过大气层，才看得到那种闪烁。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 有些东西，离得太远反而看不到本质。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你在说星星，还是在说别的？

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Roxie……如果我说，我来这里真的是因为你呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 那我会问——你在多少个节目里说过同样的话？
Conrad的表情凝固了一秒。然后他笑了，但这次的笑容里少了表演的成分。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 你果然不好骗。这是我最喜欢你的地方。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （刚才那一秒……他的面具裂了。我看到了真实的他。但那个"真实"是什么？）
栈道上，Lance拦住了Conrad。空气中弥漫着火药味。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我们谈谈。男人对男人。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 哦？什么事？

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 你到底想干什么？别跟我说你是来找爱情的。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Lance，你的直觉很好。但你的脾气会害了你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 够了，你们两个！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: Lance，冷静点。Conrad，别火上浇油。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: （举起双手后退）好的好的。Roxie说了算。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他每次都这样——退一步，但留下的裂痕已经够深了。）
深夜，灯塔需要人值班看守信号灯。Roxie、Corbin和Candy自告奋勇。

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: 我去泡咖啡！你们先聊着！
Candy跑去厨房后，灯塔里只剩下两个人和旋转的光束。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 你还在想Conrad的事？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 想着所有人的事。你、Archer、Lance、Conrad……你们每个人都让我看到不同的东西。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 我不会跟你说甜言蜜语。你知道的。

elements.name: Corbin
elements.text_zh: 但有些事我只对你说过。这比任何花言巧语都重要。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （Corbin说得对。他从来不演。也许这就是他最打动我的地方。）

elements.name: Candy
elements.text_zh: （端着三杯咖啡回来）哎呀，我是不是打断什么了？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 没有！快来，咖啡要凉了。
傍晚，悬崖边。Conrad叫住了Roxie，表情前所未有地认真。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: Roxie，我知道你在怀疑我。所有人都在怀疑我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 那你给我一个不怀疑你的理由。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 我确实跟制片人有协议。来这里是为了制造话题。这是真的。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 但认识你之后……计划变了。你不是我预设的角色。你是真实的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 你现在说的这些，怎么知道不是新的"计划"？

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 因为如果是计划，我不会告诉你真相。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （他的眼神……跟灯塔顶上那一秒一样。面具碎了。这是真的Conrad吗？）
夕阳在他们身后坠入大海。不知道是谁先转身离开。
暴风雨突然来袭。所有人困在灯塔里，雨声和雷声震耳欲聋。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: Conrad。我听到了你跟制片人的电话。全部。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: ……你听到多少？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_zh: 够多了。你来这里是节目安排的"冲突制造者"。制片人让你挑拨嘉宾关系来提高收视率。
雷声轰鸣。Conrad沉默了很久。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 你说得对。一开始确实是这样。

elements.name: Conrad
elements.text_zh: 但后来我做不到了。因为Roxie不是可以被操控的人。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （深吸一口气）Conrad，谢谢你最终说了实话。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 但信任一旦碎了，不是道歉能修好的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （暴风雨会过去。但有些东西，雨停了也回不来了。）
暴风雨过后的清晨，空气清新得像世界刚被洗过。灯塔在晨光中闪着温暖的白。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 昨晚的事……你还好吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 说不上好不好。但至少现在一切都清楚了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 我一直在想……如果我当时更早站出来说清楚——

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: 别自责。你做得已经够好了。

elements.name: Lance
elements.text_zh: 走吧，该离开灯塔了。不管下一站是哪里，我会陪着你。
两人并肩走下悬崖栈道。身后的灯塔渐渐变小，但它见证的一切不会消失。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_zh: （海崖灯塔。暴风雨教会了我——真正在乎你的人，不会在风暴中消失。）

100000101.useageDescription: 小岛-热带双人派对开场

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie, congrats—your performance this season was absolutely standout. The brand specifically asked for you to come to the island.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，恭喜——你这季表现太亮眼了。品牌点名邀请你来站台。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me? I thought they only wanted someone who knows how to pose for photos.
elements.text_zh: 我？我还以为他们只想找个“懂套路”的人。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: That’s exactly why they want you—the no-act version of you. Clean, sexy, and genuinely real.
elements.text_zh: 他们要的就是你——不演的那种你。真实、带劲、有点刺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So what am I actually doing there? Don’t tell me I have to memorize lines again.
elements.text_zh: 所以我到底要干嘛？别告诉我又要“演”。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Relax. Your role is simple: host, plus special guest.
elements.text_zh: 放心。你的任务很简单：主持人＋特别嘉宾。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I get the host part. What does “special guest” mean?
elements.text_zh: 主持我懂。“特别嘉宾”是什么意思？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: It means you don’t have to hold back—snark if you want, hype the vibe if you feel like it.
elements.text_zh: 就是你不用收着——想吐槽就吐槽，想怼就怼。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Sounds like you’re giving me a “say whatever you want” pass.
elements.text_zh: 听着像给了我一张“随便说”的通行证。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Exactly. Bring your vacation outfits—and that best-smelling perfume you own.
elements.text_zh: 没错。把你的度假衣服带上——再带那条最能打的礼服裙。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fine. I’ll go see what you’re really up to.
elements.text_zh: 行。我倒要看看你们到底想玩什么。

elements.text_en: Roxie is rushing to get ready backstage.
elements.text_zh: Roxie赶去后台做准备。

elements.text_en: She double-checks the rundown while trying to steady herself.
elements.text_zh: 她一边核对流程，一边努力把心跳压稳。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie, lighting just confirmed—you’ll enter from Stage Left, Position Three. Let’s run the opening beat one more time.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，灯光刚确认——你从舞台左侧上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Got it. I’ll follow your lead. It’s just a bit crowded back here—I need to stay focused so I don’t get thrown off.
elements.text_zh: 收到。我跟着你走。就是后台也太挤了点。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Don’t worry. You’re in great shape. Everyone’s been staring at your posters—expectations are high.
elements.text_zh: 别担心，你状态很好。大家都见过你的海报了，就等你登场。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thanks. Let me smooth out the opening once more and I’ll be solid.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢。我再把开场顺一遍就好。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: “I’m very honored to represent—” Wait. Why did that line suddenly slip?
elements.text_zh: “非常荣幸代表——”等等，这句怎么突然卡住了？

elements.text_en: As Roxie walks and rehearses her lines, she loses her grip. The cue cards slip from her hand and smack onto the floor.
elements.text_zh: Roxie边走边默背台词，一个不稳，手里的道具散了一地。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Heh. Guess the props are more nervous than I am today.
elements.text_zh: 呵，看来今天紧张的不是我，是道具。

elements.text_en: She bends down to pick them up. Her arm brushes against the metal edge of a stage prop, leaving a faint red mark.
elements.text_zh: 她弯腰去捡，手臂擦过舞台装饰的金属边。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hiss—wow, that decoration’s sharper than it looks.
elements.text_zh: 嘶——这装饰也太锋利了吧。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Are you hurt? Want me to get someone to take a look?
elements.text_zh: 你没事吧？要不要我找人来看看？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s fine—just a small scrape. Keeping the rhythm steady matters more right now.
elements.text_zh: 没事，小擦伤而已。先别打乱节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Deep breath. Stay steady, Roxie. You’ve got this.
elements.text_zh: ……深呼吸。稳住，Roxie。你可以的。

elements.text_en: Roxie lowers her head to check the scrape when a familiar voice comes from nearby.
elements.text_zh: Roxie低头查看伤口时，身后传来熟悉的声音。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sorry—I just saw you get cut. Mind if I take a look?
elements.text_zh: 抱歉，我看到你划到了。介意我看看吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Huh? Archer? What are you doing here?
elements.text_zh: 啊？Archer？你怎么会在这儿？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The brand invited me to the event—also asked me to show a painting. Didn’t expect the first thing I’d see to be you getting hurt.
elements.text_zh: 品牌邀请我来参加活动，也顺便请我做点现场创作。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s okay. Just a small scrape.
elements.text_zh: 真没事，就一点小口子。

elements.text_en: Archer naturally reaches out, gesturing for her to hand it over.
elements.text_zh: Archer很自然地伸手，示意她把手给他。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let me see. I won’t take much of your time.
elements.text_zh: 给我看看，不会耽误你太久。

elements.text_en: Roxie hesitates for half a second, then extends her hand. Archer gently cleans the scratch with a disinfectant pad he carries with him.
elements.text_zh: Roxie犹豫了半秒，还是把手递了过去。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re good. It’s not deep—just needs a quick clean.
elements.text_zh: 没事，不深。简单清理一下就行。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Be careful. You’re the focus tonight. Can’t let something like this trip you up.
elements.text_zh: 小心点。今晚你是焦点，别让这种小意外抢戏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thanks. You really showed up at the perfect moment.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你……你来得太及时了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah. I’d say the timing worked out pretty well.
elements.text_zh: 是啊，时机刚刚好。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Your breathing’s a little fast. Still nervous?
elements.text_zh: 你呼吸有点快。还紧张吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You caught that? I thought I was hiding it pretty well.
elements.text_zh: 你都看出来了？我还以为我装得挺稳。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Too many people try to look calm in front of me. I’ve seen it enough times.
elements.text_zh: 太多人在我面前假装镇定了，我见得多。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright, fine. I won’t pretend. The backstage chaos definitely threw me off.
elements.text_zh: 行，我不装了。后台这阵仗……确实有点压人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Follow me—let’s take one slow breath together. In… and out.
elements.text_zh: 跟我来——我们一起慢慢吸一口气，再慢慢吐。

elements.text_en: Roxie does as he says, her shoulders visibly relaxing.
elements.text_zh: Roxie照他说的做，肩膀明显放松下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Mm… yeah. That does feel better.
elements.text_zh: 嗯……确实好很多。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You were well prepared. The environment just got to you.
elements.text_zh: 你准备得很充分，是环境把你拽紧了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I always thought I handled pressure pretty well. Guess the stage can still shake me.
elements.text_zh: 我一直以为自己挺抗压的……看来也会被撼到。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s normal. The more something matters, the more it gets under your skin.
elements.text_zh: 很正常。越在意的事，越容易让人有感觉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So you’re saying that’s me being “responsible”?
elements.text_zh: 所以你是说……这是我“太负责”？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Something like that. And a reminder—you’re already ready.
elements.text_zh: 差不多。也顺便提醒你：你其实已经准备好了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Thanks. I really do feel more like myself now.
elements.text_zh: ……谢谢。我现在真的更像我自己了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then go. It’s your moment.
elements.text_zh: 那就去吧——这是你的时刻。

elements.text_en: Roxie and Archer arrive at the charity gallery.
elements.text_zh: Roxie和Archer来到公益画廊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Whew—finally done! The second I stepped onstage, my heart was racing like I’d downed three cups of coffee.
elements.text_zh: 呼——终于结束！我刚一上台，心跳快得像灌了三杯咖啡。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: And yet you handled it beautifully. Not a single moment where the audience drifted.
elements.text_zh: 但你处理得特别漂亮。观众从头到尾都没走神。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Really? When the lights came up, I honestly panicked for a split second.
elements.text_zh: 真的？灯一亮那一下，我真的慌了半秒。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: But you pulled it back. You’re better at holding a big stage than you give yourself credit for.
elements.text_zh: 但你立刻拉回来了。你比自己以为的更能扛大场面。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So does that mean I can add “great with large crowds” to my résumé now?
elements.text_zh: 那我现在简历上是不是能加一句“擅长应对大型人群”？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Absolutely. The crowd response was strong too.
elements.text_zh: 当然。现场反应也很强烈。

elements.text_en: Roxie looks around the exhibition space. A signature in the corner of a painting catches her eye.
elements.text_zh: Roxie环顾展区，一幅画角落的签名吸引了她的目光。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hmm? This signature… Archer, don’t tell me that’s your name too.
elements.text_zh: 嗯？这个签名……Archer，你别告诉我这是你的名字。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re not wrong. That one’s mine.
elements.text_zh: 你没看错。那幅是我的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It feels even better up close. The colors are really refreshing.
elements.text_zh: 近看更舒服。配色真清爽。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I wanted the painting to help people relax, so I deliberately left a lot of open space.
elements.text_zh: 我想让它让人放松，所以特意留了不少“空”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That explains it. It’s comfortable to look at. You give off the same kind of vibe—steady, grounded, never crowding people.
elements.text_zh: 难怪看着这么舒展。你的气场也像这样——稳、踏实，不挤压别人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That sounds like you just ran a full personality analysis on me.
elements.text_zh: 听起来你刚给我做完一整套性格分析。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You asked what I liked, so I answered honestly.
elements.text_zh: 你问我喜欢什么，我就实话实说。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What I like most is the negative space. It feels like an invitation for others to fill in their own story.
elements.text_zh: 我最喜欢的是这些留白。像在邀请别人把自己的故事填进去。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Most people just compliment the colors. You’re the one who really looked.
elements.text_zh: 大多数人只夸颜色。你是真的看进去了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I may not know the technical stuff, but I understand how something feels.
elements.text_zh: 我不懂技术细节，但我懂“感觉”。

elements.text_en: A staff member walks over briskly.
elements.text_zh: 一名工作人员快步走来。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie, Archer—the follow-up product promo video will be filmed with the two of you as a pair. Please get ready.
elements.text_zh: Roxie、Archer——后续产品宣传视频要拍你们“搭档”出镜。请准备一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait, the two of us?
elements.text_zh: 等等，我们俩一起？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Alright. I just want to know what kind of “surprise” the production team has cooked up this time.
elements.text_zh: ……行。我就想知道，这次节目组又憋了什么“惊喜”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A two-person shoot? The production team’s “surprises” always come out of nowhere.
elements.text_zh: 双人拍摄？节目组的“惊喜”总是从天而降。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Don’t worry. I’ll match your pace.
elements.text_zh: 别担心。我会配合你的节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not worried about you—I’m worried they’ll suddenly make me skydive or throw in some extreme stunt.
elements.text_zh: 我不是怕你。我是怕他们突然让我跳伞、或者搞什么极限项目。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If it comes to that, I’ll make sure you’re clipped in properly first.
elements.text_zh: 如果真的来那一套，我会先确认你有没有系好安全扣。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright. That’s actually pretty reassuring.
elements.text_zh: 好吧……这话确实挺让人安心的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A collaboration runs on two people’s rhythm, not one person’s task. I’ll work in whatever way feels most comfortable for you.
elements.text_zh: 合作是两个人的节奏，不是一个人的任务。我会按你最舒服的方式来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Mm. Don’t worry—I run a clear lead style. Just keep up and you’ll be fine.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，你放心。我带队风格一向清晰——你跟上就行。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sounds good. You can count on me.
elements.text_zh: 好。你可以完全信我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then let’s get started, partner.
elements.text_zh: 那就开始吧，搭档。

elements.text_en: Golden beams of light flood the shooting area.
elements.text_zh: 金色灯束洒满拍摄区。

elements.text_en: The shadow-and-light installation hums quietly in front of the backdrop, drawing a small crowd of onlookers.
elements.text_zh: 幕布前的光影装置低低嗡鸣着运转，吸引了一小圈围观者。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Alright, you two—this filming is for the new hand care oil. Start by spreading the oil evenly. Shortly, we’ll be filming close-ups of your hands with light-and-shadow effects.
elements.text_zh: 好了两位——这段是新品护手护理广告。先把“光影”这趴拍完。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Light and shadow… hand shadow play? I thought we were going to dance.
elements.text_zh: 光影……手影戏？我还以为要跳舞呢。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Safer than dancing. At least we won’t be stepping on each other.
elements.text_zh: 比跳舞安全，至少不会踩到脚。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Mm… true. Still, with this many people watching, it kind of feels like an exam.
elements.text_zh: 也是……但这么多人盯着，我还是有点紧张。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: We just need to work well with each other. No need to worry about anyone else.
elements.text_zh: 我们只要配合好就行，别管他们。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: In a moment, you’ll place your hands into this light installation. We’ll capture two things at once: close-ups of your hands, and the interaction of your shadows on the backdrop.
elements.text_zh: 等会儿你们把手伸进这束光里：重点拍手影互动，还有手背上护手霜的细节。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So… hands and shadows on camera? Sounds like double scrutiny.
elements.text_zh: 所以是……手本体＋影子一起被拍？听起来像双倍审视。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Think of it as letting the light do part of the performance for us. Just follow the rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 只是让光替我们完成一部分表演。你只要跟着节奏来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You say that like shadows actually listen.
elements.text_zh: 说得好像影子也会听话一样。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Your hand shadows will appear together at the center of the screen, so try to keep your movements in sync.
elements.text_zh: 你们的手影会一起呈现在幕布中央，所以动作要尽量同步。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then let’s start with breathing—sync that first. The shadows will follow naturally.
elements.text_zh: 那我们先从呼吸开始，同步一下。影子自然会跟上。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Both of you, place your hands into the center of the light ring. Start with the most basic open-and-close motion.
elements.text_zh: 两位，把手放到光圈中心，从最基础的开合动作开始。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Open and close? That sounds like… kindergarten warm-ups.
elements.text_zh: 开合？听着像幼儿园游戏...

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Let’s take it slow. I’ll keep it steady—you focus on making it look good.
elements.text_zh: 慢一点。我来稳住，你负责好看就行。

elements.text_en: Their hand shadows fall onto the backdrop, a little awkward at first, but gradually falling into sync.
elements.text_zh: 两人的手影落在幕布上，一开始有点生疏，但很快对上了。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Nice. Now try this—alternate moving your hands closer so the shadows interact.
elements.text_zh: 不错。现在试——双手交替靠近，让影子“有互动”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alternate… closer? It’s just a hand care ad. Do we really need to—
elements.text_zh: 交替靠近？这只是护手护理广告，至于这么……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Relax. Just follow the light. We won’t cross any lines.
elements.text_zh: 放松，跟着光走。我们不会越线。

elements.text_en: Their hands drift closer within the light, shadows nearly overlapping. The air picks up a faint, almost unspoken tension.
elements.text_zh: 他们的手在光里慢慢靠近，影子贴得更近，空气也更暧昧了些。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Great. Now let’s try the next set—wrists linking together. The shadows will have more depth.
elements.text_zh: 很好。下一组——手腕相扣的动作，影子会更有层次。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey—going straight to high difficulty on the first run? You guys sure you’re not messing with us?
elements.text_zh: 啊？第一轮就上高难度？导演你确定不是整我们？

elements.text_en: The rehearsal wraps smoothly. At the director’s call, the lights refocus—official filming begins.
elements.text_zh: 彩排很顺。导演一声令下，灯光重新聚焦，正式开拍。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie, Archer—move five centimeters closer.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，Archer——再靠近五厘米。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Five centimeters? Are we about to end up in the same shadow?
elements.text_zh: 五厘米？我们这是要把影子叠成一个吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A little closer is fine. Overlapping shadows look better. I’m on your left.
elements.text_zh: 再近一点没事。影子重叠会更好看。我在你左边。

elements.text_en: Their arms naturally draw closer, shadows slowly merging on the backdrop.
elements.text_zh: 两人的手臂自然靠拢，影子在幕布上慢慢交叠。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Good. Slowly spread your fingers. Keep your breathing steady.
elements.text_zh: 好，慢慢张开手指——呼吸别乱。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait… the light’s moving too fast. I’m about to lose it.
elements.text_zh: 等一下……光走太快了，我要跟丢了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: No worries. Stay close.
elements.text_zh: 别怕，贴近我。

elements.text_en: Archer’s fingertips lightly brush the back of her hand—brief, restrained, but enough to steady her.
elements.text_zh: Archer的指尖轻轻掠过她手背——短短一下，却足够让她稳住。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I know. I just… got momentarily dazzled by the light.
elements.text_zh: 我知道……我只是刚刚被光晃了一下。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah, I saw it. You pulled yourself back nicely.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，我看见了。你拉回得很漂亮。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Nice. Now switch to the second sequence—alternate fingertip contact.
elements.text_zh: 很好，切到第二段——指尖交替贴合。

elements.text_en: Their fingertips meet softly in the light. The shadows press closer. It goes unexpectedly fluid.
elements.text_zh: 指尖在光里轻轻相触，影子更贴近，动作也越来越顺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If we get any closer, they’ll think we’re shooting a romance film.
elements.text_zh: 再近一点，他们就要以为我们在拍浪漫片了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then maybe giving it a romantic edge isn’t such a bad thing.
elements.text_zh: 那给它一点“浪漫感”，也不一定是坏事。

elements.text_en: The final beam of light sweeps across them. Their movements are smooth, natural—almost perfectly in sync.
elements.text_zh: 最后一束光扫过，两人的动作流畅自然，几乎完美同步。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Amazing! One take! You two are hands down the most in-sync pair today!
elements.text_zh: 太棒了！一条过！今天最有默契的一对就是你们！

elements.text_en: A sea breeze drifts by as Roxie and Archer walk along the wooden boardwalk toward the next shooting location. String lights sway gently in the wind.
elements.text_zh: 海风轻拂，Roxie和Archer沿着木栈道慢慢往下走，灯串随风轻轻摇晃。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Are those lights swaying a bit too much? Feels like they’re setting up a runway for us.
elements.text_zh: 这些灯是不是晃得有点过？感觉像在给我们加戏。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If they make you walk with that much presence, then they’re doing their job well.
elements.text_zh: 要是它们能让你走得更有气场，那它们就很敬业。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So—are you complimenting me, or the lights?
elements.text_zh: 所以……你是在夸我，还是夸灯？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Both. Just… don’t walk too fast. This stretch is a little slippery.
elements.text_zh: 都夸。只是……别走太快，这段路有点滑。

elements.text_en: Archer subtly shifts his position, standing slightly to the outside, almost instinctively blocking the wind for her.
elements.text_zh: Archer不动声色地侧了侧身，站到更外侧一点，像在不着痕迹地挡着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey, it’s not my first time on a boardwalk. No need to go full bodyguard mode.
elements.text_zh: 喂，我又不是第一次走栈道，不用把我当护送对象。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah, I know. It’s just a habit.
elements.text_zh: 我知道。只是习惯。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A habit of taking care of people?
elements.text_zh: 照顾人的习惯？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A habit of… paying attention to you.
elements.text_zh: 习惯……注意你...

elements.text_en: The sea breeze cools some of the unspoken warmth, but it doesn’t scatter the paired shadows cast by the lights at their feet.
elements.text_zh: 海风吹散了一点没说出口的热度，脚边灯光却把两人的影子拉得更近。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Come on. If we keep letting the lights frame us like this, I’m going to get the wrong idea.
elements.text_zh: 得了。再让这些灯这么“框”着我们，我都要误会了。

elements.text_en: Moonlight spills over the wooden railing, the sea breeze turning gentle. Walking side by side through the lights, Roxie slowly lets her guard down...
elements.text_zh: 月光落在木栏杆上，海风柔和。两人并肩走在灯光间，Roxie也慢慢放松下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Back onstage just now… honestly, I was so nervous I almost missed my footing.
elements.text_zh: 刚才在后台……说实话，我紧张得要命。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I could tell, just a little. But you steadied yourself quickly—no one else could see the nerves.
elements.text_zh: 我看出来一点点。但你稳得很快，快到别人都看不出你紧张。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh? So you were watching that closely? You even noticed whether my breathing was off?
elements.text_zh: 哦？你看得这么细？连我换气你都能抓到？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Not watching—just… the moment your breathing shifted, I knew you were searching for your rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 不是盯着……只是你一换气，我就能判断你在找节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sound like a stage coach. Too bad I’m not usually that well-behaved.
elements.text_zh: 听起来像舞台教练。可惜我平时不怎么上这套。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …To be honest, I thought I was hiding it pretty well. And then one sentence from you exposed me.
elements.text_zh: ……说真的，我还以为我藏得挺好。结果你一句话就拆穿了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Not exposing you. Just reminding you—you don’t have to push yourself so hard all the time.
elements.text_zh: 我没拆穿你。只是提醒你——你不需要一直这么用力。

elements.text_en: The night deepens, the sound of waves seeming closer. Without realizing it, their pace slows.
elements.text_zh: 夜更深了，海浪声像更近了些。两人的脚步不知不觉慢下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer, have you noticed… I feel kind of “transparent” in front of you.
elements.text_zh: Archer，你有没有发现……我在你面前好像有点“透明”。

elements.name: Archer
