elements.text_en: Transparent? What makes you think that?
elements.text_zh: 透明？你怎么会这么觉得？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s just… you always seem to know what I’m thinking right away. It catches me off guard.
elements.text_zh: 就是……你总能第一时间看出我在想什么。挺让人措手不及的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s not “seeing through” you. It’s me paying close attention to you.
elements.text_zh: 这不是“看穿”你。是我在认真留意你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh? A doctor’s professional habit? Or are you just especially strict with me?
elements.text_zh: 哦？医生的职业习惯？还是你对我特别“上心”？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Neither. During the shoot, I wanted you to feel comfortable—at ease.
elements.text_zh: 都不是。拍摄的时候，我只是想让你觉得舒服、自在。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So you kept watching the whole time? That almost sounds more stressful.
elements.text_zh: 所以你就一直在“看着”？那我压力不是更大了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Not watching—keeping track of your rhythm. When you speed up, I follow. When you slow down, I wait.
elements.text_zh: 不是盯着，是记你的节奏。你快，我跟；你慢，我也慢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You make it sound so considerate…
elements.text_zh: 你说得也太体贴了……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: When you work with me, you don’t need any defenses.
elements.text_zh: 跟我合作，你不需要任何防备。

elements.text_en: The testing room glows with warm, dim light. Golden mist slowly drifts from the fragrance device, like a quiet interrogation by scent.
elements.text_zh: 试香室灯光暖而昏，金色雾气在香氛装置里缓缓散开，像个有点神秘的小空间。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Alright, you two—the brand wants each of you to pick a perfume for the other, based on their personality.
elements.text_zh: 两位，品牌方希望你们先根据对方的性格，选择一款最适合对方的香水。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Based on personality? That sounds… more honest than a confession.
elements.text_zh: 按性格？听着比“看脸”还得真诚一点。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s not that scary. Your first impression—you’re pretty bright.
elements.text_zh: 没那么吓人。你给人的第一印象——挺“明亮”的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Bright? That’s your polite way of saying I’m loud, isn’t it.
elements.text_zh: “明亮”？这是不是你礼貌地说我挺吵？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: No. I mean… when you’re close, people relax. It feels warm-toned.
elements.text_zh: 不是。我是说……你一靠近，别人会放松、那种暖的感觉。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh… then what about you? Guess I’ll have to go with my instincts.
elements.text_zh: 哦……那你呢？看来我也得“认真闻一闻”了。

elements.text_en: Roxie steps closer, lightly breathing in near Archer’s chest. The movement is natural, measured—just shy of deliberate intimacy.
elements.text_zh: Roxie往前凑了点，呼吸轻轻贴近Archer胸前，动作自然得像只是随口一试。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Mm… you smell clean, but a little stubborn. Like cedarwood with a hint of tobacco.
elements.text_zh: 嗯……你闻起来很干净，但有点固执。像雪松里带一点烟草。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You describe it better than a perfumer.
elements.text_zh: 你形容得比调香师还像调香师。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Well, you’ve been watching me this closely—it’s only fair I return the favor.
elements.text_zh: 谁让你刚才盯我盯那么紧……算你“自找”的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then… I guess I’ve been caught.
elements.text_zh: 那……看来我被抓包了。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Now for the scent test. Roxie sprays her wrist. Archer sprays the side of her neck.
elements.text_zh: 现在进入试香环节：Roxie喷手腕，Archer喷她颈侧。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Keep in mind, skin-close application requires close distance. Try to stay as natural as possible.
elements.text_zh: 注意贴肤喷香需要近距离接触，两位尽量自然。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Natural? Spraying perfume on someone’s neck… how natural can that be?
elements.text_zh: 自然？在别人脖子旁边喷香水……这叫哪门子自然？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If you’re uncomfortable, I can switch to your wrist.
elements.text_zh: 你要是不舒服，我可以改闻你的手腕。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Relax. I’m not that fragile.
elements.text_zh: 没关系。我没那么脆弱。

elements.text_en: Roxie gently lifts Archer’s hand, moving close enough for the scent to drift softly with the motion.
elements.text_zh: Roxie轻轻抬起Archer的手，拉近到合适的距离，香气随着动作轻轻散开。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Higher pulse points carry warmth—the fragrance blooms longer and more naturally.
elements.text_zh: 脉搏高的地方更带“温度”，香会扩得更自然。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You really know your stuff.
elements.text_zh: 你还真懂。

elements.text_en: Archer raises his hand to spray Roxie’s perfume, his fingertips almost brushing her shoulder and neck.
elements.text_zh: Archer抬手去为Roxie喷香，指尖几乎擦到她的肩颈。

elements.text_en: Roxie stiffens for a brief moment—but doesn’t step back.
elements.text_zh: Roxie僵了一瞬，但没有退开。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I won’t cross any lines. You can count on me.
elements.text_zh: 我不会越界。你可以信我。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: I’m not scared… it just tickles a little.
elements.text_zh: 我不是怕……只是有点痒。

elements.text_en: After the scent test, the two sit at the fragrance evaluation table, filling out a pairing questionnaire.
elements.text_zh: 试香结束后，两人坐到香氛测试台前填写配对问卷。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: First item… record the top-note impression.
elements.text_zh: 第一项……记录前调的第一印象。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You go first. I won’t peek.
elements.text_zh: 你先写。我不偷看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’s not like I’m writing a love letter.
elements.text_zh: 我又不是在写情书。

elements.text_en: Roxie leans in slightly, gently inhaling at Archer’s wrist.
elements.text_zh: Roxie微微倾身，轻轻闻了闻Archer手腕。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The top note is bright—citrus, maybe. Very clean.
elements.text_zh: 前调更明亮——像柑橘？很干净。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re taking this seriously, huh?
elements.text_zh: 你还挺认真的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Of course. If I’m writing it, I want it to be accurate.
elements.text_zh: 当然。写了就要写准一点。

elements.text_en: Roxie leans in a little more, close enough to feel each other’s breathing.
elements.text_zh: Roxie又靠近了一点，近到能感觉到彼此的呼吸。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Roxie, you’re… a bit too close.
elements.text_zh: Roxie，你……有点太近了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Huh? I’m just sensing the scent.
elements.text_zh: 啊？我只是在闻味道。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ahem—I’m done. Your turn next.
elements.text_zh: 咳……我好了。轮到你。

elements.text_en: They finally pull a little apart, but the fragrance in the air still lingers between them.
elements.text_zh: 两人终于拉开一点距离，但空气里的香味仍旧缠着彼此。

elements.text_en: The ballroom music starts. Warm lights glow as the close-contact dance shoot is about to begin.
elements.text_zh: 舞会音乐响起，灯光暖起来，贴面舞的拍摄马上开始。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Let’s try the steps first, get used to the distance.
elements.text_zh: 两位先试舞步，熟悉一下距离。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Distance? You guys have a pretty bold definition of “distance,” don’t you?
elements.text_zh: 距离感？你们对“距离”的定义也太敢了吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: For a close-contact dance… closeness is kind of the point.
elements.text_zh: 贴面舞嘛，本来就得靠近一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright—as long as you don’t step on my feet.
elements.text_zh: 行。只要你别踩我脚。

elements.text_en: Archer lightly supports Roxie at her waist, guiding her a step forward.
elements.text_zh: Archer轻扶住Roxie的腰，带着她往前一步。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re way too natural about this. It’s easy to get the wrong idea.
elements.text_zh: 你这么熟练，容易让人误会。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: What kind of wrong idea?
elements.text_zh: 误会成什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Like… you’ve done this dance a little too many times.
elements.text_zh: 比如你跳这支舞跳得太多次了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s actually my first time. Somehow, though—it feels familiar with you.
elements.text_zh: 其实这是第一次。不知道为什么——跟你一起就像很熟。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t say things like that out of nowhere. It really messes with my rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 别突然说这种话。你把我节奏带乱了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then just follow my rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 那就跟着我的节奏。

elements.text_en: Their steps fall into sync, their profiles close enough to brush each other’s breath.
elements.text_zh: 两人步伐渐渐同步，侧脸近到几乎擦过彼此的呼吸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you get any closer, you’ll hear my heartbeat.
elements.text_zh: 你再靠近一点，我就要听到你心跳了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If I do… I’ll pretend I didn’t.
elements.text_zh: 要真听见了……我就当没发生。

elements.text_en: The air between them grows thicker than the music—just right, and just not crossing the line.
elements.text_zh: 两人之间的空气比音乐还浓，刚好——又不过界。

elements.text_en: Before the official shoot, the brand asks the two of them to change into ballroom attire.
elements.text_zh: 正式拍摄前，品牌方要求两人换上舞会礼服。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie’s hidden clasp is stuck. Archer, please help her out.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的暗扣卡住了，Archer，帮她一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: What? Him? Are you sure about that?
elements.text_zh: 啊？让他来？你们确定？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve got steady hands. I won’t touch anything I shouldn’t.
elements.text_zh: 我手很稳。我不会碰不该碰的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You make it sound like I’d be the one moving around.
elements.text_zh: 你说得好像我才是那个乱动的人。

elements.text_en: Roxie turns slightly, revealing the clasps along her back.
elements.text_zh: Roxie侧过身，露出背后的扣子。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ll take it slow. Try not to tense up.
elements.text_zh: 我慢一点来。别绷着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Tense? I’m just worried about the dress getting damaged.
elements.text_zh: 绷？我只是怕把礼服扯坏。

elements.text_en: Archer’s fingertips brush the clasp, his focus unwavering.
elements.text_zh: Archer的指尖轻触扣环，动作专注得几乎不带多余情绪。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Don’t move—this part’s a bit tight.
elements.text_zh: 别动——这里有点紧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That tone… you sound like you’re soothing someone.
elements.text_zh: 你这语气……像在哄人。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: And do you want to be soothed?
elements.text_zh: 那你想被哄吗？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Focus, doctor.
elements.text_zh: 专心点，医生。

elements.text_en: The clasp clicks into place, the fabric settling smoothly along her back.
elements.text_zh: 扣子“咔哒”一声扣好，布料顺着她的背线贴合下来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Is it done?
elements.text_zh: ……好了？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah. It looks great.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，很好看。

elements.text_en: The official shoot begins. The brand suddenly requests an added “paired spin” sequence.
elements.text_zh: 正式拍摄开始，品牌方忽然要求加拍“双人旋转舞”。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Make the spin bigger. Stay closer together—the camera loves it.
elements.text_zh: 转大一点。两位再贴近些——镜头更好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You really love closeness, don’t you?
elements.text_zh: 你们真就这么爱“贴近”啊？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s okay. I’ve got you.
elements.text_zh: 没事，我在。

elements.text_en: Archer takes Roxie’s hand, his other hand steady at her waist.
elements.text_zh: Archer握住Roxie的手，另一只手稳稳扶住她的腰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t spin too fast. I’d like to keep my ankles intact.
elements.text_zh: 别转太快。我想保住我的脚踝。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’m here. You won’t fall.
elements.text_zh: 有我在，你不会摔。

elements.text_en: As they spin, Roxie’s skirt lifts, the lights blurring around them.
elements.text_zh: 旋转间，Roxie的裙摆扬起，灯光在周围晕成一圈。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait—I’m losing my balance!
elements.text_zh: 等一下——我有点失衡！

elements.text_en: Her foot slips, her body pitching forward.
elements.text_zh: Roxie脚下一滑，身体往前冲。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve got you.
elements.text_zh: 我接住你。

elements.text_en: Archer catches her in time, one arm at her waist, the other supporting her back, holding her steady against him.
elements.text_zh: Archer及时托住她，一只手在她腰侧稳住，另一只手护住她的背。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …That was way too close.
elements.text_zh: ……这也太近了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: As long as I’m here, you won’t fall.
elements.text_zh: 只要我在，你就不会摔。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That line came out a little too smoothly.
elements.text_zh: 这句也说得太顺了吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s not a line. It’s a fact.
elements.text_zh: 不是台词。是事实。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then let go of me first—we’re still filming.
elements.text_zh: 那你先放开我——我们还在拍。

elements.text_en: The wine-tasting segment begins. Soft lighting falls as their shadows meet over the same tasting table.
elements.text_zh: 红酒品鉴环节开始，灯光柔和，两人的影子落在同一张品酒桌上。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Please feed each other a sip of wine and have your partner guess the aroma notes.
elements.text_zh: 请互相喂一口酒，让对方猜出香调。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Feeding wine? Your production team is seriously bold.
elements.text_zh: 喂酒？你们节目组胆子真不小。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: All the challenges today have been pretty intimate. We should be used to it by now.
elements.text_zh: 今天这些挑战都够亲密的了——我们该习惯了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Roxie lifts the glass and brings it to Archer’s lips.
elements.text_zh: Roxie端起酒杯，递到Archer唇边。

elements.text_en: Alright, Doctor—take a guess.
elements.text_zh: 来，医生先生，猜猜看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The glass wobbles slightly. Roxie’s hand is clearly shaking.
elements.text_zh: 酒杯微微一晃，Roxie的手明显在抖。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Wait—your hand’s trembling.
elements.text_zh: 等下，你手在抖。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s not. The glass is just slippery.
elements.text_zh: 没有，是杯子太滑了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer raises his hand, gently holding her wrist to steady the rim.
elements.text_zh: Archer抬手，轻轻握住她的手腕，帮她稳住杯口。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Here. I’ll help keep it steady.
elements.text_zh: 来，我帮你稳着。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: …You’re standing this close—that’s cheating.
elements.text_zh: ……你靠这么近，算作弊吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer takes a small sip, the flavor unfolding on his lips.
elements.text_zh: Archer轻啜一口，香气在唇齿间散开。

elements.text_en: Blackberry, vanilla… and a hint of smoke.
elements.text_zh: 黑莓、香草……还有一点烟熏味。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh wow. You actually know your stuff.
elements.text_zh: 哇，你还真懂。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: The second round is Truth or Drink. Who’s drawing first?
elements.text_zh: 第二轮：真心话或喝酒。谁先抽？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright, I’ll draw.
elements.text_zh: 行，我来抽。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh—this one’s good: “What’s the most attractive thing about the other person tonight?”
elements.text_zh: 哦，这题不错：“对方身上最吸引你的点是什么？”

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s… suspiciously accurate.
elements.text_zh: 这也太……精准了吧。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So—answer, or drink?
elements.text_zh: 那你选：回答，还是喝？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: What attracts me… is how focused you are when you dance.
elements.text_zh: 吸引我的……是你专注起来的样子。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Focused? You sure it’s not the dress?
elements.text_zh: 专注？你确定不是因为这条裙子？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The dress looks great—but you look better.
elements.text_zh: 裙子很好看——但你更好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Ahem… saying things like that is totally unfair.
elements.text_zh: 咳……你这么说就犯规了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then what about you?
elements.text_zh: 那你呢？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Me? I think you’re… very steady with your hands.
elements.text_zh: 我？我觉得你……手挺稳的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Just the hands?
elements.text_zh: 只夸手？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Want to hear more? Take a sip first.
elements.text_zh: 想听更多？先喝一口。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Alright.
elements.text_zh: 行。

elements.text_en: Archer lifts the glass and takes a sip, watching Roxie with clear interest.
elements.text_zh: Archer端起酒杯喝了一口，目光还落在Roxie身上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You being this obedient could really give people the wrong idea.
elements.text_zh: 你这么配合，别人会误会的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: And maybe that’s not such a bad misunderstanding.
elements.text_zh: 误会一下……也不算坏。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: The final round is the “dual-straw shared cup.” You both have to finish it in sync.
elements.text_zh: 最后一轮：双人吸管同杯。你们得同步喝。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This design… is way too intentional.
elements.text_zh: 这设计……也太刻意了吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Every task today has been intentional.
elements.text_zh: 今天每个任务都挺刻意的。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Alright, let’s do it. Don’t start drinking before I do.
elements.text_zh: 行，来吧。等我先开始你再喝。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then listen to my count.
elements.text_zh: 那听我数。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why do you get to count?
elements.text_zh: 凭什么你数？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Because you’d deliberately mess up the rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 因为你肯定会故意乱节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Fine. You count.
elements.text_zh: ……行，你数。

elements.text_en: They both lean down at the same time, their cheeks nearly touching.
elements.text_zh: 两人同时俯下，脸颊几乎贴在一起。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: One… two… go.
elements.text_zh: 一……二……开始。

elements.text_en: They drink almost perfectly in sync, their shoulders brushing lightly.
elements.text_zh: 两人几乎同步，肩膀轻轻碰到。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re drinking too fast.
elements.text_zh: 你喝太快了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then keep up with me.
elements.text_zh: 那就跟上我。

elements.text_en: Roxie adjusts her pace. The straws make the same soft sound as they draw.
elements.text_zh: Roxie调了下节奏，两根吸管发出同样的水声。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …That was close. You almost carried me away with you.
elements.text_zh: ……好险，差点被你带跑节奏。

elements.text_en: The cup empties quickly, but the distance between them doesn’t fade right away.
elements.text_zh: 杯子很快见底，但两人的距离却没拉开。

elements.text_en: Steam curls through the air by the hot spring…
elements.text_zh: 温泉边雾气缭绕……

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: The photographer hands over a pose reference. “You’ll need to stand like this—the closer you are, the more natural it looks.”
elements.text_zh: 摄影师递来姿势图：“你们就这样站，越近越自然。”

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Huh? That close? This is basically a… close-contact ad, isn’t it?
elements.text_zh: 啊？这么近？这不就是……贴身广告吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If you’re uncomfortable, we can take it slow. I’ll follow your lead.
elements.text_zh: 不舒服就慢点。我配合你。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Who said I can’t handle it? I just… need a second to get in the right headspace.
elements.text_zh: 谁说我不行？我只是……需要缓一下。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Roxie steps half a pace forward. Archer stands behind her, his hand placed at her waist.
elements.text_zh: Roxie往前半步，Archer站在她身后，手扶在她腰上。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: B-behind me? You’re holding my waist?
elements.text_zh: 在、在我后面？还扶我腰？

elements.text_en: Roxie takes a deep breath and steps forward.
elements.text_zh: Roxie深吸一口气，又往前迈了一步。

elements.text_en: Archer’s palm settles lightly at her side—steady, warm, controlled.
elements.text_zh: Archer的掌心轻落在她腰侧，稳、又暖。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Your hand is really warm.
elements.text_zh: ……你手好暖。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Probably the hot spring. Just relax.
elements.text_zh: 可能是温泉的缘故。放松。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Perfect! Roxie, tilt your head slightly toward Archer’s shoulder.
elements.text_zh: 完美！Roxie，头稍微往Archer那边偏一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Any closer and this is turning into a couple’s cover shot.
elements.text_zh: ……再近点，就要拍成情侣封面了。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Next shot—apply the essential oil for each other. Keep it natural, stay a little closer.
elements.text_zh: 下一镜——互相给对方涂精油。动作自然点，再贴近一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: A little closer? You’re really pushing it today.
elements.text_zh: 再近点？你们今天是真敢。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ll do it. If it feels too close, just say the word.
elements.text_zh: 我来。要是觉得太近，你说一声就停。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You really sound like a doctor—steady as ever.
elements.text_zh: 你这语气真像医生，一如既往地稳。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Archer lifts his hand. The aroma wand gently touches the line of her shoulder and neck.
elements.text_zh: Archer抬手，香薰棒轻轻点到她的肩颈。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Can you… go a little slower? It tickles.
elements.text_zh: 你……能慢一点吗？有点痒。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Tickles? Or… nervous?
elements.text_zh: 痒？还是……紧张？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Nervous? I’m a host. You’re just standing too close.
elements.text_zh: 紧张？我可是主持人。是你站太近了。

elements.text_en: Archer naturally steps half a pace forward, his breath brushing lightly against her back.
elements.text_zh: Archer顺势又近半步，呼吸擦过她耳侧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: This step has to be close. Otherwise it won’t look right on camera.
elements.text_zh: 这一步必须靠近点，不然镜头不好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So it’s for professional reasons?
elements.text_zh: 所以全是“工作需要”？

elements.text_en: Roxie lifts her hand in return, the aroma wand settling lightly near Archer’s collarbone.
elements.text_zh: Roxie也抬手回敬，香薰棒落在Archer锁骨前。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then it’s your turn to step closer, Doctor.
elements.text_zh: 那轮到你再近一点了，医生。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Next up is a close-contact composition. Roxie sits by the edge of the pool, Archer stands behind her and supports her.
elements.text_zh: 接下来是贴身构图：Roxie坐在石边，Archer站在她身后。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This brand really has a thing for “close contact” today.
elements.text_zh: 这品牌今天是盯上“贴身”了吧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’m right behind you. Don’t worry about your balance.
elements.text_zh: 我就在你身后，别担心重心。

elements.text_en: Roxie half-sits on the stone edge, her body leaning back slightly.
elements.text_zh: Roxie半坐在石沿，身体微微后仰。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hey—!
Archer immediately wraps one arm around hers, the other steadying her back.
elements.text_zh: Archer立刻一臂环住她，托住她的背。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Careful!
elements.text_zh: 小心！

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …That one wasn’t on purpose.
elements.text_zh: ……刚才不是我故意的。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I know. You’re doing great.
elements.text_zh: 我知道。你做得很好。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: That moment was perfect! Hold it—move even closer.
elements.text_zh: 刚才那一下太完美了！保持——再近一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Any closer and we’re making the gossip headlines…
elements.text_zh: 再近就要上八卦头条了……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: As long as you don’t mind, I don’t.
elements.text_zh: 只要你不介意，我就不介意。

elements.text_en: In the warm mist and drifting scent, the space between them shrinks until they can almost hear each other’s heartbeat.
elements.text_zh: 在暖雾和香气里，两人之间的空隙越来越薄。

elements.text_en: The lights fall between them. The director asks them to sync their breathing with “palms facing, eyes aligned.”
elements.text_zh: 灯光落在两人之间，导演让他们用“掌心对视”来同步呼吸。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Sit facing each other first. Raise your hands to chest height.
elements.text_zh: 先面对面坐好，手抬到胸口高度。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: This close? I’m worried my breathing’s going to go off.
elements.text_zh: 这么近？我怕我呼吸会乱。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: That’s normal. I’ll help you regulate it.
elements.text_zh: 很正常。我帮你把节奏调回来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’ll help me? How?
elements.text_zh: 你帮我？怎么帮？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Look at me. Slow your breathing—like drawing a line. The steadier, the better.
elements.text_zh: 看着我，把呼吸放慢——像画线一样，越拉越稳。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …That actually makes sense.
elements.text_zh: ……听起来还真有道理。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Your shoulders are still tense. Don’t lift them. Use your diaphragm—it’ll look much better.
elements.text_zh: 你肩还紧，别耸着。用腹部带动呼吸。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You can really read breathing down to that level?
elements.text_zh: 你连呼吸都能看这么细？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Occupational hazard. People who paint notice details—especially yours.
elements.text_zh: 职业病。画画的人就爱盯细节——尤其是你这种。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Alright, next scene is a “paired extended stretch.” You’ll need close contact, but keep the lines smooth.
elements.text_zh: 二位，下一幕——双人盘式延展。要贴身，但动作得顺。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Close contact… how close are we talking?
elements.text_zh: 贴身？到底贴到多贴？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Lean forward. I’ll stay behind you and adjust your balance. I won’t let you fall.
elements.text_zh: 你往前倾。我在你后面扶着，帮你调重心。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You saying that just makes me more nervous.
elements.text_zh: 你这么说我更紧张了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Relax your hips a little more. At this angle, the camera will read you as stiff.
elements.text_zh: 髋再松一点。这个角度镜头才好看。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: H-how do you even know that?
elements.text_zh: 你、你怎么知道这些？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’ve studied some anatomy. You’re engaging the wrong muscles right now.
elements.text_zh: 学过点解剖。你现在用错力了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re standing this close… it’s hard for me to focus.
elements.text_zh: 你离这么近……我很难专心。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then follow my count—one, two… exhale.
elements.text_zh: 那就跟我数：一、二——呼气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …You know that’s really unfair, right?
elements.text_zh: ……你不觉得这很不讲理吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I’m just making sure you look good on camera.
elements.text_zh: 我只是确保你上镜好看。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Final move—“trust flight.” This one requires a very high level of stability. Ready?
elements.text_zh: 最后一招——“信任飞行”。要非常稳。准备？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Just looking at this angle feels dangerous…
elements.text_zh: 光看这个角度就很危险……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It only feels dangerous because you’re thinking about falling. Leave it to me—it won’t happen.
elements.text_zh: 危险只是因为你在想“会危险”。交给我，不会出事。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: How can you be so sure?
elements.text_zh: 你凭什么这么笃定？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Your center of gravity is at your hips. I’ll support you here first—don’t tense up.
elements.text_zh: 重心在髋。我托着这儿，别用力。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Wait—wait… you’re really lifting me?
elements.text_zh: 等、等等……你真要把我抬起来？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Not lifting—supporting. Big difference.
elements.text_zh: 不是抬，是托。差别很大。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Oh god, I’m actually off the ground.
elements.text_zh: ……天，我真离地了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Good. Don’t shrug your shoulders. Give me a little more trust.
elements.text_zh: 很好，别耸肩。再把信任给我一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Hearing you say that… it’s hard not to trust you.
elements.text_zh: 你这么说……我很难不信你。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then hold it right there. The camera’s going to love this.
elements.text_zh: 就保持这样。镜头会爱死这画面。

elements.text_en: The crew asks them to stand close and adjust their chest mics. The lighting is warm, almost deliberately atmospheric.
elements.text_zh: 工作人员让两人贴身调胸麦，灯光暖得像在故意营造气氛。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The mic’s that small—do we really have to be this close?
elements.text_zh: 胸麦就这么点大，非得贴这么近？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The mic sits near the heart. Even a slight shift will pick up noise.
elements.text_zh: 胸麦在心口旁，动一下就会收进噪音。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: So right now… you’re listening to my heartbeat?
elements.text_zh: 所以你现在……是在听我的心跳？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Mm… it’s pretty steady. A lot calmer than when you first arrived on set.
elements.text_zh: 嗯，很稳。比你刚才紧张的时候稳多了。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Don’t make it sound like I was about to faint like a rookie.
elements.text_zh: 别说得我像新手差点晕过去一样。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You’re not a rookie. You’re just especially real when you’re nervous.
elements.text_zh: 你不是新手。你紧张的时候，只是更真实。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That almost sounds like a compliment.
elements.text_zh: 听着像在夸我。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It is. You work well with the camera—especially at this distance.
elements.text_zh: 就是在夸你。你很上镜——尤其这种距离。

elements.text_en: The mic is set, yet neither of them takes even half a step back.
elements.text_zh: 胸麦调好了，两人却谁都没后退半步。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Up next is the aromatherapy balm shot. As you spread it, keep the motion gentle—and stay a little closer.
elements.text_zh: 下一镜：香薰膏特写。互相抹开——靠近点，动作自然。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Closer again? I can count his eyelashes from here.
elements.text_zh: 又要再近？我都能数清他睫毛了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then don’t blink.
elements.text_zh: 那就别眨眼。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Fine. Then don’t move.
elements.text_zh: 行。那你也别动。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: And what happens if I do?
elements.text_zh: 我动了会怎样？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It’ll get messy. The shot will look way too intimate.
elements.text_zh: 会乱套。画面会暧昧得过分。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You saying that is what makes it intimate.
elements.text_zh: 你这么一说，才更暧昧。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: The director said to spread it. I’m spreading it.
elements.text_zh: 导演让抹，我就在抹。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re spreading it right onto my heartbeat.
elements.text_zh: 你抹到我心跳上了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then stay professional. Keep it steady.
elements.text_zh: 那就专业点，稳住。

elements.text_en: Archer gently closes his hand around her wrist.
elements.text_zh: Archer轻轻握住她的手腕。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you do that… I’m even less steady.
elements.text_zh: 你这样……我更稳不住了。

elements.text_en: Their hands overlap, the room growing warmer by the second.
elements.text_zh: 两只手交叠，屋里的温度跟着往上窜。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: For the final part, you’ll switch positions and apply the balm to an area with “more defined lines.”
elements.text_zh: 最后一部分，需要你们互换位置，把香膏推到“更有线条感的地方”。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: “More defined lines”? The production team’s wording is getting riskier by the minute.
elements.text_zh: 更有线条感？你们节目组的词越来越危险了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Sit steady. I’ve got this.
elements.text_zh: 坐稳，我来。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’re moving that slowly—afraid I’ll run?
elements.text_zh: 你动作这么慢，是怕我跑？

elements.text_en: Archer’s fingers trace along her spine, spreading the balm.
elements.text_zh: Archer手指贴着她背脊推开香膏。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Afraid you’ll move. The shot will blur.
elements.text_zh: 怕你乱动，镜头会糊。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You sure you’re not worried about losing control yourself?
elements.text_zh: 你确定不是怕你自己失控？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Right now, I’m surviving on professionalism.
elements.text_zh: 我现在全靠职业操守撑着。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Then you’d better hold out a little longer.
elements.text_zh: 那你可要撑久一点。

elements.text_en: Roxie’s body sways subtly with Archer’s motion. He steadies her with a hand at her waist.
elements.text_zh: Roxie的身体随着Archer的手法轻微晃动，Archer手掌贴在她腰侧稳住。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Relax a bit.
elements.text_zh: 放松一点。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: With you this close… that’s hard to do.
elements.text_zh: 你这样贴着……很难放松耶。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Then I’ll go lighter. You don’t move.
elements.text_zh: 那我动作轻点，你别乱动。

elements.text_en: Roxie turns slightly, watching Archer from the corner of her eye.
elements.text_zh: Roxie半侧身，余光看着Archer。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: The lighter you go, the more it feels like you’re teasing me.
elements.text_zh: 你越轻，我越像在被撩拨。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Blame the balm. I’m just following directions.
elements.text_zh: 那就怪香膏了，我只是照要求来。

elements.text_en: The lights come up. The crew hands over a single microphone.
elements.text_zh: 灯光亮起，节目组递来唯一的麦克风。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Get a little closer—you’ll get cleaner audio.
elements.text_zh: 你俩贴近点，收音会更稳。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh… like this? Isn’t that a bit too close?
elements.text_zh: 呃……这样吗？好像有点太近了？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: It’s just the mic that’s close. We’re perfectly normal.
elements.text_zh: 只有麦克风近，我们很正常。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Easy for you to say—my shoulder’s already stiff.
elements.text_zh: 你说得轻松，我肩僵了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Don’t tense up. Relax. The camera loves natural.
elements.text_zh: 别绷着，放松点。镜头要自然。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: A little to the left—yeah, that angle.
elements.text_zh: 往左一点——对，就是这个角度。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Why does it feel like we’re whispering in each other’s ears…
elements.text_zh: 为什么感觉我们像在贴耳私语……

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: So who’s the one leaning in—you or me?
elements.text_zh: 是你靠过来？还是我？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Oh, now you’re blaming me?
elements.text_zh: 现在怪我？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Great! You two have amazing on-screen chemistry.
elements.text_zh: 很好！你俩画面感很强。

elements.text_en: The mic is taken away, but neither of them makes the first move to step back.
elements.text_zh: 麦克风收走后，俩人谁都没主动拉开。

elements.text_en: The lights brighten as the crew raises the interview board, signaling the two of them to move a little closer.
elements.text_zh: 灯光亮起，节目组举起采访板，示意两人靠得更近一些。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: How did tonight’s collaboration feel? You can comment on each other.
elements.text_zh: 今晚合作感觉如何？两位可以互相评价一下。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: It went really smoothly. He’s steady—made me feel at ease.
elements.text_zh: 挺顺的。他很稳，让我放心。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: She’s even stronger than I expected. Working with her, it’s hard not to get fully invested.
elements.text_zh: 她比我想象得还要强。跟她一起，很难不投入。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Invested? Can you be a bit more specific?
elements.text_zh: 投入？可以具体一点吗？

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: When she locks in, I naturally fall into her rhythm.
elements.text_zh: 她一专注，我就会自动跟上她的节奏。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: That sounds… like a compliment?
elements.text_zh: 听起来……像在夸我？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Then what moment tonight made you feel the most in sync?
elements.text_zh: 那今晚最让你们觉得默契的瞬间是什么？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Probably the light-and-shadow shoot. Our movements lined up really well.
elements.text_zh: 大概是拍光影的时候。我们动作很一致。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: When she leaned in, I almost forgot about the camera.
elements.text_zh: 她靠过来的时候，我几乎忘了镜头。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Are you planning to leave that in the final cut?
elements.text_zh: ……你这是要剪进去吗？

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: That line’s great! Very real—we’ll keep it.
elements.text_zh: 这句很好！保真，留着。

elements.name: Harley
elements.text_en: Alright, last still shot. You two, move in naturally.
elements.text_zh: 来，最后一张定格照。两位自然靠近一点。

elements.text_en: Before Roxie can react, Archer gently slips an arm around her shoulder, closing the distance just enough.
elements.text_zh: Roxie还没反应过来，Archer已经轻轻搭上她的肩，把距离收得恰到好处。

elements.text_en: Only warm lights glow in the hallway. Their footsteps slow without either of them noticing.
elements.text_zh: 走廊只亮着暖灯，两人的脚步越来越慢。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Thanks for staying with me all night.
elements.text_zh: 谢谢你陪了一整晚。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I was supposed to be by your side.
elements.text_zh: 我本来就应该在你旁边。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: You’ve been… unusually good with words tonight.
elements.text_zh: 你今晚……好像特别会说话。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Because you were willing to listen.
elements.text_zh: 因为你愿意听。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If you keep talking like that, I’ll start thinking you don’t want me to go back to my room.
elements.text_zh: 再这样，我会以为你舍不得我回房。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: …I’m not in a hurry.
elements.text_zh: ……我确实不急。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Archer.
elements.text_zh: Archer。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Yeah?
elements.text_zh: 嗯？

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: If we don’t say good night soon, we’re really going to stand here till morning.
elements.text_zh: 如果再不说晚安，我们真的要站到天亮了。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I wouldn’t hate that.
elements.text_zh: 也不是不行。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Go to sleep.
elements.text_zh: 去睡觉。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Alright. Tomorrow—we’ll keep going together.
elements.text_zh: 好。明天继续一起。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Good night.
elements.text_zh: 晚安。

elements.text_en: As she turns away, he’s still standing there, like he’s waiting for an answer he doesn’t dare ask out loud.
elements.text_zh: 她转身的瞬间，他却仍站在那里，像在等一个他不敢开口的答案。

100000135.useageDescription: 小岛-热带双人派对-彩蛋

elements.text_en: When Roxie reaches her door, she notices a pale envelope slipped under it—alongside a brand-new bottle of perfume.
elements.text_zh: 回到房门口时，Roxie注意到门缝下多了一封浅色信笺。

elements.text_en: The paper is clean and smooth, its edges carrying a faint scent.
elements.text_zh: 信纸干净平整，边缘还带着淡淡的香气。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Archer?
elements.text_zh: ……Archer？

elements.text_en: Roxie picks up the note and opens it inside the room.
elements.text_zh: Roxie拾起信笺，在房间内展开。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Roxie—tonight, your presence on camera was lighter than the breeze, yet more precise than the lights.
elements.text_zh: Roxie——今晚你的镜头感，比风还轻，却比灯光更稳。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: There were moments when I thought you’d pull back. But you didn’t.
elements.text_zh: 有几次我以为你会退开。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: You kept moving forward—and it was far more distracting than I expected.
elements.text_zh: 但你一直向前——比我想象得更让人分心。

elements.text_en: Roxie takes a quiet breath, her gaze slowly lowering.
elements.text_zh: Roxie轻吸一口气，视线慢慢沉下来。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: During those few seconds when we stood too close… I almost forgot to look at the camera.
elements.text_zh: 拍摄里靠得太近的那几秒……我差点忘了镜头的存在。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: This is a perfume I blended myself. It’s softer than the one we used during the shoot.
elements.text_zh: 这是我自己调的香水，味道比拍摄那支更淡一些。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: If you like it, I can show you tomorrow how to wear it more comfortably.
elements.text_zh: 如果你喜欢，明天我可以教你怎么用会更舒服。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: I don’t know what the production team has planned next.
elements.text_zh: 我不确定节目组之后还会安排什么。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: But as long as you’re there, I’m willing to go along with it.
elements.text_zh: 但只要你在，我都愿意配合。

elements.name: Archer
elements.text_en: Good night.
elements.text_zh: 晚安。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: …Does this count as crossing the line—quietly?
elements.text_zh: ……这算不算，偷偷越线？

elements.text_en: Roxie folds the letter, her fingertips brushing the perfume bottle.
elements.text_zh: Roxie将信折好，指尖轻轻擦过那支香水。

elements.name: Roxie
elements.text_en: Tomorrow… I’m actually looking forward to it.
elements.text_zh: 明天……还真有点期待。

PhoneChatNpc2.text: Raven在岛上。她参加了这个节目。
